authors_text: Li Ding,Ryan Boldi,Thomas Helmuth,Lee Spector
title: Lexicase Selection at Scale
title_zh: 大规模 Lexicase 选择
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (pp. 2054-2062)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion (pp. 2054-2062)
abstract: Lexicase selection is a semantic-aware parent selection method, which assesses individual test cases in a randomly-shuffled data stream. It has demonstrated success in multiple research areas including genetic programming, genetic algorithms, and more recently symbolic regression and deep learning. One potential drawback of lexicase selection and its variants is that the selection procedure requires evaluating training cases in a single data stream, making it difficult to handle tasks where the evaluation is computationally heavy or the dataset is large-scale, e.g., deep learning. In this work, we investigate how the weighted shuffle methods can be employed to improve the efficiency of lexicase selection. We propose a novel method, fast lexicase selection, which incorporates lexicase selection and weighted shuffle with partial evaluation. Experiments on both classic genetic programming and deep learning tasks indicate that the proposed method can significantly reduce the number of evaluation steps needed for lexicase selection to select an individual, improving its efficiency while maintaining the performance.
summary: Lexicase selection is a semantic-aware parent selection method, which assesses individual test cases in a randomly-shuffled data stream. It has demonstrated success in multiple research areas including genetic programming, genetic algorithms, and more recently symbolic regression and deep learning. One potential drawback of lexicase selection and its variants is that the selection procedure requires evaluating training cases in a single data stream, making it difficult to handle tasks where the evaluation is computationally heavy or the dataset is large-scale, e.g., deep learning. In this work, we investigate how the weighted shuffle methods can be employed to improve the efficiency of lexicase selection. We propose a novel method, fast lexicase selection, which incorporates lexicase selection and weighted shuffle with partial evaluation. Experiments on both classic genetic programming and deep learning tasks indicate that the proposed method can significantly reduce the number of evaluation steps needed for lexicase selection to select an individual, improving its efficiency while maintaining the performance.
abstract_zh: Lexicase 选择是一种语义感知的父选择方法，它评估随机打乱的数据流中的各个测试用例。它在多个研究领域取得了成功，包括遗传编程、遗传算法以及最近的符号回归和深度学习。词汇选择及其变体的一个潜在缺点是，选择过程需要评估单个数据流中的训练案例，这使得处理评估计算量大或数据集规模大的任务（例如深度学习）变得困难。在这项工作中，我们研究了如何采用加权洗牌方法来提高词典选择的效率。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即快速词典选择，它结合了词典选择和带有部分评估的加权洗牌。在经典遗传编程和深度学习任务上的实验表明，该方法可以显着减少词典选择个体所需的评估步骤数，在保持性能的同时提高其效率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的大规模Lexicase选择方法
AI.motivation: 传统Lexicase选择在大规模数据或计算密集型任务中效率低下，需提高其效率
AI.method: 提出快速Lexicase选择方法，结合加权洗牌与部分评估，减少评估步骤
AI.result: 在遗传编程和深度学习任务中显著减少评估步骤，保持性能
AI.conclusion: 快速Lexicase选择方法在保持性能的同时提升效率，适用于大规模和计算密集型任务

authors_text: Kisoo Kwon,Kuhwan Jung,Junghyun Park,Hwidong Na,Jinwoo Shin
title: String-based Molecule Generation via Multi-decoder VAE
title_zh: 通过多解码器 VAE 进行基于字符串的分子生成
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of string-based molecular generation via variational autoencoders (VAEs) that have served a popular generative approach for various tasks in artificial intelligence. We propose a simple, yet effective idea to improve the performance of VAE for the task. Our main idea is to maintain multiple decoders while sharing a single encoder, i.e., it is a type of ensemble techniques. Here, we first found that training each decoder independently may not be effective as the bias of the ensemble decoder increases severely under its auto-regressive inference. To maintain both small bias and variance of the ensemble model, our proposed technique is two-fold: (a) a different latent variable is sampled for each decoder (from estimated mean and variance offered by the shared encoder) to encourage diverse characteristics of decoders and (b) a collaborative loss is used during training to control the aggregated quality of decoders using different latent variables. In our experiments, the proposed VAE model particularly performs well for generating a sample from out-of-domain distribution.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of string-based molecular generation via variational autoencoders (VAEs) that have served a popular generative approach for various tasks in artificial intelligence. We propose a simple, yet effective idea to improve the performance of VAE for the task. Our main idea is to maintain multiple decoders while sharing a single encoder, i.e., it is a type of ensemble techniques. Here, we first found that training each decoder independently may not be effective as the bias of the ensemble decoder increases severely under its auto-regressive inference. To maintain both small bias and variance of the ensemble model, our proposed technique is two-fold: (a) a different latent variable is sampled for each decoder (from estimated mean and variance offered by the shared encoder) to encourage diverse characteristics of decoders and (b) a collaborative loss is used during training to control the aggregated quality of decoders using different latent variables. In our experiments, the proposed VAE model particularly performs well for generating a sample from out-of-domain distribution.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了通过变分自动编码器（VAE）进行基于字符串的分子生成问题，该编码器已成为人工智能中各种任务的流行生成方法。我们提出了一个简单而有效的想法来提高 VAE 任务的性能。我们的主要思想是在共享单个编码器的同时维护多个解码器，即，它是一种集成技术。在这里，我们首先发现独立训练每个解码器可能并不有效，因为集成解码器的偏差在其自回归推理下严重增加。为了保持集成模型的小偏差和方差，我们提出的技术有两个方面：（a）为每个解码器采样不同的潜在变量（根据共享编码器提供的估计均值和方差）以鼓励解码器的不同特征；（b）在训练过程中使用协作损失来控制使用不同潜在变量的解码器的聚合质量。在我们的实验中，所提出的 VAE 模型在从域外分布生成样本方面尤其表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多解码器变分自编码器（VAE）的字符串分子生成方法，通过共享编码器和独立解码器的结构改进分子生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统单解码器VAE在分子生成任务中存在偏差和方差难以平衡的问题，独立训练多解码器会导致偏差增加，需设计新方法控制模型稳定性。
AI.method: 采用共享编码器与多解码器结构，为每个解码器采样独立潜在变量以增强多样性，并引入协作损失函数协调不同解码器的生成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在生成分布外分子样本时表现优于现有方法，验证了多解码器设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在变量多样化和协作训练机制，多解码器VAE能有效降低模型偏差与方差，为分子生成任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Weihao Yan,Yeqiang Qian,Chunxiang Wang,Ming Yang
title: Threshold-adaptive Unsupervised Focal Loss for Domain Adaptation of Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割领域适应的阈值自适应无监督焦点损失
comment: 10 pages, 8 figure, 7 tables, submitted to T-ITS on April 2, 2022
comments: 10 pages, 8 figure, 7 tables, submitted to T-ITS on April 2, 2022
abstract: Semantic segmentation is an important task for intelligent vehicles to understand the environment. Current deep learning methods require large amounts of labeled data for training. Manual annotation is expensive, while simulators can provide accurate annotations. However, the performance of the semantic segmentation model trained with the data of the simulator will significantly decrease when applied in the actual scene. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation has recently gained increasing research attention, aiming to reduce the domain gap and improve the performance on the target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel two-stage entropy-based UDA method for semantic segmentation. In stage one, we design a threshold-adaptative unsupervised focal loss to regularize the prediction in the target domain, which has a mild gradient neutralization mechanism and mitigates the problem that hard samples are barely optimized in entropy-based methods. In stage two, we introduce a data augmentation method named cross-domain image mixing (CIM) to bridge the semantic knowledge from two domains. Our method achieves state-of-the-art 58.4% and 59.6% mIoUs on SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA5-to-Cityscapes using DeepLabV2 and competitive performance using the lightweight BiSeNet.
summary: Semantic segmentation is an important task for intelligent vehicles to understand the environment. Current deep learning methods require large amounts of labeled data for training. Manual annotation is expensive, while simulators can provide accurate annotations. However, the performance of the semantic segmentation model trained with the data of the simulator will significantly decrease when applied in the actual scene. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation has recently gained increasing research attention, aiming to reduce the domain gap and improve the performance on the target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel two-stage entropy-based UDA method for semantic segmentation. In stage one, we design a threshold-adaptative unsupervised focal loss to regularize the prediction in the target domain, which has a mild gradient neutralization mechanism and mitigates the problem that hard samples are barely optimized in entropy-based methods. In stage two, we introduce a data augmentation method named cross-domain image mixing (CIM) to bridge the semantic knowledge from two domains. Our method achieves state-of-the-art 58.4% and 59.6% mIoUs on SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA5-to-Cityscapes using DeepLabV2 and competitive performance using the lightweight BiSeNet.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是智能车辆理解环境的一项重要任务。当前的深度学习方法需要大量的标记数据进行训练。手动标注成本高昂，而模拟器可以提供准确的标注。然而，用模拟器的数据训练的语义分割模型应用于实际场景时，性能会明显下降。用于语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）最近引起了越来越多的研究关注，旨在减少域间隙并提高目标域的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于两阶段熵的 UDA 语义分割方法。在第一阶段，我们设计了一种阈值自适应的无监督焦点损失来规范目标域中的预测，它具有温和的梯度中和机制，并缓解了基于熵的方法中硬样本几乎无法优化的问题。在第二阶段，我们引入了一种名为跨域图像混合（CIM）的数据增强方法来桥接两个领域的语义知识。我们的方法使用 DeepLabV2 在 SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes 和 GTA5-to-Cityscapes 上实现了最先进的 58.4% 和 59.6% mIoU，并使用轻量级 BiSeNet 实现了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段熵-based无监督域自适应方法，用于解决语义分割中的域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 模拟器生成的数据与真实场景存在域差距，导致语义分割模型性能下降，现有方法在处理困难样本时优化不足。
AI.method: 第一阶段设计阈值自适应无监督焦损失，缓解梯度中和问题；第二阶段引入跨域图像混合（CIM）方法促进域间知识迁移。
AI.result: 在SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes和GTA5-to-Cityscapes数据集上分别达到58.4%和59.6%的mIoU，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过双阶段策略有效缩小域差距，在语义分割域自适应任务中取得先进性能。

conclusion: 该方法通过双阶段策略有效缩小域差距，在语义分割域自适应任务中取得先进性能。
search_text: Threshold-adaptive Unsupervised Focal Loss for Domain Adaptation of Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割领域适应的阈值自适应无监督焦点损失 Semantic segmentation is an important task for intelligent vehicles to understand the environment. Current deep learning methods require large amounts of labeled data for training. Manual annotation is expensive, while simulators can provide accurate annotations. However, the performance of the semantic segmentation model trained with the data of the simulator will significantly decrease when applied in the actual scene. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) for semantic segmentation has recently gained increasing research attention, aiming to reduce the domain gap and improve the performance on the target domain. In this paper, we propose a novel two-stage entropy-based UDA method for semantic segmentation. In stage one, we design a threshold-adaptative unsupervised focal loss to regularize the prediction in the target domain, which has a mild gradient neutralization mechanism and mitigates the problem that hard samples are barely optimized in entropy-based methods. In stage two, we introduce a data augmentation method named cross-domain image mixing (CIM) to bridge the semantic knowledge from two domains. Our method achieves state-of-the-art 58.4% and 59.6% mIoUs on SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes and GTA5-to-Cityscapes using DeepLabV2 and competitive performance using the lightweight BiSeNet. 语义分割是智能车辆理解环境的一项重要任务。当前的深度学习方法需要大量的标记数据进行训练。手动标注成本高昂，而模拟器可以提供准确的标注。然而，用模拟器的数据训练的语义分割模型应用于实际场景时，性能会明显下降。用于语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）最近引起了越来越多的研究关注，旨在减少域间隙并提高目标域的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于两阶段熵的 UDA 语义分割方法。在第一阶段，我们设计了一种阈值自适应的无监督焦点损失来规范目标域中的预测，它具有温和的梯度中和机制，并缓解了基于熵的方法中硬样本几乎无法优化的问题。在第二阶段，我们引入了一种名为跨域图像混合（CIM）的数据增强方法来桥接两个领域的语义知识。我们的方法使用 DeepLabV2 在 SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes 和 GTA5-to-Cityscapes 上实现了最先进的 58.4% 和 59.6% mIoU，并使用轻量级 BiSeNet 实现了具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种两阶段熵-based无监督域自适应方法，用于解决语义分割中的域差距问题。 Weihao Yan,Yeqiang Qian,Chunxiang Wang,Ming Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Shu Tang,Yang Wu,Hongxing Qin,Xianzhong Xie,Shuli Yang,Jing Wang
title: A Constrained Deformable Convolutional Network for Efficient Single Image Dynamic Scene Blind Deblurring with Spatially-Variant Motion Blur Kernels Estimation
title_zh: 一种利用空间变化运动模糊核估计实现高效单图像动态场景盲去模糊的约束可变形卷积网络
abstract: Most existing deep-learning-based single image dynamic scene blind deblurring (SIDSBD) methods usually design deep networks to directly remove the spatially-variant motion blurs from one inputted motion blurred image, without blur kernels estimation. In this paper, inspired by the Projective Motion Path Blur (PMPB) model and deformable convolution, we propose a novel constrained deformable convolutional network (CDCN) for efficient single image dynamic scene blind deblurring, which simultaneously achieves accurate spatially-variant motion blur kernels estimation and the high-quality image restoration from only one observed motion blurred image. In our proposed CDCN, we first construct a novel multi-scale multi-level multi-input multi-output (MSML-MIMO) encoder-decoder architecture for more powerful features extraction ability. Second, different from the DLVBD methods that use multiple consecutive frames, a novel constrained deformable convolution reblurring (CDCR) strategy is proposed, in which the deformable convolution is first applied to blurred features of the inputted single motion blurred image for learning the sampling points of motion blur kernel of each pixel, which is similar to the estimation of the motion density function of the camera shake in the PMPB model, and then a novel PMPB-based reblurring loss function is proposed to constrain the learned sampling points convergence, which can make the learned sampling points match with the relative motion trajectory of each pixel better and promote the accuracy of the spatially-variant motion blur kernels estimation.
summary: Most existing deep-learning-based single image dynamic scene blind deblurring (SIDSBD) methods usually design deep networks to directly remove the spatially-variant motion blurs from one inputted motion blurred image, without blur kernels estimation. In this paper, inspired by the Projective Motion Path Blur (PMPB) model and deformable convolution, we propose a novel constrained deformable convolutional network (CDCN) for efficient single image dynamic scene blind deblurring, which simultaneously achieves accurate spatially-variant motion blur kernels estimation and the high-quality image restoration from only one observed motion blurred image. In our proposed CDCN, we first construct a novel multi-scale multi-level multi-input multi-output (MSML-MIMO) encoder-decoder architecture for more powerful features extraction ability. Second, different from the DLVBD methods that use multiple consecutive frames, a novel constrained deformable convolution reblurring (CDCR) strategy is proposed, in which the deformable convolution is first applied to blurred features of the inputted single motion blurred image for learning the sampling points of motion blur kernel of each pixel, which is similar to the estimation of the motion density function of the camera shake in the PMPB model, and then a novel PMPB-based reblurring loss function is proposed to constrain the learned sampling points convergence, which can make the learned sampling points match with the relative motion trajectory of each pixel better and promote the accuracy of the spatially-variant motion blur kernels estimation.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的基于深度学习的单图像动态场景盲去模糊（SIDSBD）方法通常设计深度网络来直接从一幅输入的运动模糊图像中去除空间变化的运动模糊，而不需要模糊核估计。在本文中，受投影运动路径模糊（PMPB）模型和可变形卷积的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的约束可变形卷积网络（CDCN），用于高效的单图像动态场景盲去模糊，它同时实现了准确的空间变化运动模糊核估计和仅从一个观察到的运动模糊图像的高质量图像恢复。在我们提出的CDCN中，我们首先构建了一种新颖的多尺度多级多输入多输出（MSML-MIMO）编码器-解码器架构，以实现更强大的特征提取能力。其次，与使用多个连续帧的DLVBD方法不同，提出了一种新颖的约束变形卷积再模糊（CDCR）策略，其中首先将可变形卷积应用于输入的单运动模糊图像的模糊特征，以学习每个像素的运动模糊核的采样点，这类似于PMPB模型中相机抖动的运动密度函数的估计，然后提出一种新颖的基于PMPB的再模糊损失函数来约束学习的采样点收敛，可以使学习到的采样点与每个像素的相对运动轨迹更好地匹配，提高空间变化运动模糊核估计的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种约束可变形卷积网络（CDCN），用于从单张运动模糊图像中同时估计空间可变运动模糊核并实现高质量图像复原。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像动态场景盲去模糊方法通常直接去除模糊而不估计模糊核，导致去模糊效果受限。本文旨在通过联合估计空间可变模糊核与图像复原提升去模糊精度。
AI.method: 设计多尺度多级多输入多输出（MSML-MIMO）编码器-解码器架构，并提出约束可变形卷积重模糊（CDCR）策略，结合可变形卷积学习像素级模糊核采样点及基于PMPB模型的重模糊损失函数。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法在空间可变模糊核估计与图像复原任务上均优于现有方法，且仅需单张输入图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合模糊核估计与图像复原，CDCN在动态场景盲去模糊任务中实现了更高效准确的性能。

authors_text: Xinbin Liang,Yaru Liu,Yang Yu,Kaixuan Liu,Yadong Liu,Zongtan Zhou
title: Convolutional Neural Networks with A Topographic Representation Module for EEG-Based Brain-Computer Interfaces
title_zh: 具有用于基于脑电图的脑机接口的地形表示模块的卷积神经网络
abstract: Objective: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have shown great potential in the field of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). The raw Electroencephalogram (EEG) signal is usually represented as 2-Dimensional (2-D) matrix composed of channels and time points, which ignores the spatial topological information. Our goal is to make the CNN with the raw EEG signal as input have the ability to learn EEG spatial topological features, and improve its performance while essentially maintaining its original structure. Methods:We propose an EEG Topographic Representation Module (TRM). This module consists of (1) a mapping block from the raw EEG signal to a 3-D topographic map and (2) a convolution block from the topographic map to an output of the same size as input. According to the size of the kernel used in the convolution block, we design 2 types of TRMs, namely TRM-(5,5) and TRM-(3,3). We embed the TRM into 3 widely used CNNs, and tested them on 2 publicly available datasets (Emergency Braking During Simulated Driving Dataset (EBDSDD), and High Gamma Dataset (HGD)). Results: The results show that the classification accuracies of all 3 CNNs are improved on both datasets after using the TRM. With TRM-(5,5), the average accuracies of DeepConvNet, EEGNet and ShallowConvNet are improved by 6.54%, 1.72% and 2.07% on EBDSDD, and by 6.05%, 3.02% and 5.14% on HGD, respectively; with TRM-(3,3), they are improved by 7.76%, 1.71% and 2.17% on EBDSDD, and by 7.61%, 5.06% and 6.28% on HGD, respectively. Significance: We improve the classification performance of 3 CNNs on 2 datasets by the use of TRM, indicating that it has the capability to mine the EEG spatial topological information. In addition, since the output of TRM has the same size as the input, CNNs with the raw EEG signal as input can use this module without changing their original structures.
summary: Objective: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have shown great potential in the field of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). The raw Electroencephalogram (EEG) signal is usually represented as 2-Dimensional (2-D) matrix composed of channels and time points, which ignores the spatial topological information. Our goal is to make the CNN with the raw EEG signal as input have the ability to learn EEG spatial topological features, and improve its performance while essentially maintaining its original structure. Methods:We propose an EEG Topographic Representation Module (TRM). This module consists of (1) a mapping block from the raw EEG signal to a 3-D topographic map and (2) a convolution block from the topographic map to an output of the same size as input. According to the size of the kernel used in the convolution block, we design 2 types of TRMs, namely TRM-(5,5) and TRM-(3,3). We embed the TRM into 3 widely used CNNs, and tested them on 2 publicly available datasets (Emergency Braking During Simulated Driving Dataset (EBDSDD), and High Gamma Dataset (HGD)). Results: The results show that the classification accuracies of all 3 CNNs are improved on both datasets after using the TRM. With TRM-(5,5), the average accuracies of DeepConvNet, EEGNet and ShallowConvNet are improved by 6.54%, 1.72% and 2.07% on EBDSDD, and by 6.05%, 3.02% and 5.14% on HGD, respectively; with TRM-(3,3), they are improved by 7.76%, 1.71% and 2.17% on EBDSDD, and by 7.61%, 5.06% and 6.28% on HGD, respectively. Significance: We improve the classification performance of 3 CNNs on 2 datasets by the use of TRM, indicating that it has the capability to mine the EEG spatial topological information. In addition, since the output of TRM has the same size as the input, CNNs with the raw EEG signal as input can use this module without changing their original structures.
abstract_zh: 目的：卷积神经网络（CNN）在脑机接口（BCI）领域显示出巨大的潜力。原始脑电图（EEG）信号通常表示为由通道和时间点组成的二维（2-D）矩阵，忽略了空间拓扑信息。我们的目标是使以原始脑电信号为输入的CNN具有学习脑电空间拓扑特征的能力，并在本质上保持其原始结构的同时提高其性能。方法：我们提出了脑电图地形表示模块（TRM）。该模块由 (1) 从原始 EEG 信号到 3-D 地形图的映射块和 (2) 从地形图到与输入大小相同的输出的卷积块组成。根据卷积块中使用的内核的大小，我们设计了两种类型的TRM，即TRM-(5,5)和TRM-(3,3)。我们将 TRM 嵌入到 3 个广泛使用的 CNN 中，并在 2 个公开数据集（模拟驾驶期间紧急制动数据集 (EBDSDD) 和高伽玛数据集 (HGD)）上对其进行测试。结果：结果表明，使用 TRM 后，所有 3 个 CNN 在两个数据集上的分类精度均得到提高。使用TRM-(5,5)，DeepConvNet、EEGNet和ShallowConvNet的平均准确率在EBDSDD上分别提高了6.54%、1.72%和2.07%，在HGD上分别提高了6.05%、3.02%和5.14%；使用TRM-(3,3)，它们在EBDSDD上分别提高了7.76%、1.71%和2.17%，在HGD上分别提高了7.61%、5.06%和6.28%。意义：我们利用TRM提高了3个CNN在2个数据集上的分类性能，表明它具有挖掘EEG空间拓扑信息的能力。此外，由于TRM的输出与输入具有相同的大小，因此以原始EEG信号作为输入的CNN可以在不改变其原始结构的情况下使用该模块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拓扑表示模块（TRM）的卷积神经网络（CNN），以提升脑电图（EEG）脑机接口的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN处理EEG信号时忽略其空间拓扑信息，导致性能受限。本文旨在通过增强CNN对EEG空间特征的学习能力，提升分类准确率。
AI.method: 设计TRM模块，包含将原始EEG映射为3D拓扑图的映射块，以及保持输入尺寸的卷积块。提出TRM-(5,5)和TRM-(3,3)两种变体，并嵌入三种主流CNN模型中，于EBDSDD和HGD数据集进行验证。
AI.result: TRM显著提升模型性能：在EBDSDD数据集上，DeepConvNet、EEGNet、ShallowConvNet分别提升6.54%/7.76%、1.72%/1.71%、2.07%/2.17%；在HGD数据集上分别提升6.05%/7.61%、3.02%/5.06%、5.14%/6.28%。
AI.conclusion: TRM有效挖掘EEG空间拓扑信息，且输出尺寸与输入一致，无需修改原有CNN结构即可提升性能，为EEG分类提供新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 设计TRM模块，包含将原始EEG映射为3D拓扑图的映射块，以及保持输入尺寸的卷积块。提出TRM-(5,5)和TRM-(3,3)两种变体，并嵌入三种主流CNN模型中，于EBDSDD和HGD数据集进行验证。
ai_content_json.result: TRM显著提升模型性能：在EBDSDD数据集上，DeepConvNet、EEGNet、ShallowConvNet分别提升6.54%/7.76%、1.72%/1.71%、2.07%/2.17%；在HGD数据集上分别提升6.05%/7.61%、3.02%/5.06%、5.14%/6.28%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: TRM有效挖掘EEG空间拓扑信息，且输出尺寸与输入一致，无需修改原有CNN结构即可提升性能，为EEG分类提供新思路。

search_text: Convolutional Neural Networks with A Topographic Representation Module for EEG-Based Brain-Computer Interfaces 具有用于基于脑电图的脑机接口的地形表示模块的卷积神经网络 Objective: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have shown great potential in the field of Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). The raw Electroencephalogram (EEG) signal is usually represented as 2-Dimensional (2-D) matrix composed of channels and time points, which ignores the spatial topological information. Our goal is to make the CNN with the raw EEG signal as input have the ability to learn EEG spatial topological features, and improve its performance while essentially maintaining its original structure. Methods:We propose an EEG Topographic Representation Module (TRM). This module consists of (1) a mapping block from the raw EEG signal to a 3-D topographic map and (2) a convolution block from the topographic map to an output of the same size as input. According to the size of the kernel used in the convolution block, we design 2 types of TRMs, namely TRM-(5,5) and TRM-(3,3). We embed the TRM into 3 widely used CNNs, and tested them on 2 publicly available datasets (Emergency Braking During Simulated Driving Dataset (EBDSDD), and High Gamma Dataset (HGD)). Results: The results show that the classification accuracies of all 3 CNNs are improved on both datasets after using the TRM. With TRM-(5,5), the average accuracies of DeepConvNet, EEGNet and ShallowConvNet are improved by 6.54%, 1.72% and 2.07% on EBDSDD, and by 6.05%, 3.02% and 5.14% on HGD, respectively; with TRM-(3,3), they are improved by 7.76%, 1.71% and 2.17% on EBDSDD, and by 7.61%, 5.06% and 6.28% on HGD, respectively. Significance: We improve the classification performance of 3 CNNs on 2 datasets by the use of TRM, indicating that it has the capability to mine the EEG spatial topological information. In addition, since the output of TRM has the same size as the input, CNNs with the raw EEG signal as input can use this module without changing their original structures. 目的：卷积神经网络（CNN）在脑机接口（BCI）领域显示出巨大的潜力。原始脑电图（EEG）信号通常表示为由通道和时间点组成的二维（2-D）矩阵，忽略了空间拓扑信息。我们的目标是使以原始脑电信号为输入的CNN具有学习脑电空间拓扑特征的能力，并在本质上保持其原始结构的同时提高其性能。方法：我们提出了脑电图地形表示模块（TRM）。该模块由 (1) 从原始 EEG 信号到 3-D 地形图的映射块和 (2) 从地形图到与输入大小相同的输出的卷积块组成。根据卷积块中使用的内核的大小，我们设计了两种类型的TRM，即TRM-(5,5)和TRM-(3,3)。我们将 TRM 嵌入到 3 个广泛使用的 CNN 中，并在 2 个公开数据集（模拟驾驶期间紧急制动数据集 (EBDSDD) 和高伽玛数据集 (HGD)）上对其进行测试。结果：结果表明，使用 TRM 后，所有 3 个 CNN 在两个数据集上的分类精度均得到提高。使用TRM-(5,5)，DeepConvNet、EEGNet和ShallowConvNet的平均准确率在EBDSDD上分别提高了6.54%、1.72%和2.07%，在HGD上分别提高了6.05%、3.02%和5.14%；使用TRM-(3,3)，它们在EBDSDD上分别提高了7.76%、1.71%和2.17%，在HGD上分别提高了7.61%、5.06%和6.28%。意义：我们利用TRM提高了3个CNN在2个数据集上的分类性能，表明它具有挖掘EEG空间拓扑信息的能力。此外，由于TRM的输出与输入具有相同的大小，因此以原始EEG信号作为输入的CNN可以在不改变其原始结构的情况下使用该模块。 本文提出一种基于拓扑表示模块（TRM）的卷积神经网络（CNN），以提升脑电图（EEG）脑机接口的分类性能。 Xinbin Liang,Yaru Liu,Yang Yu,Kaixuan Liu,Yadong Liu,Zongtan Zhou eess.SP,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Banafsheh Mohajeri,Jinghui Cheng
title: "Inconsistent Performance": Understanding Concerns of Real-World Users on Smart Mobile Health Applications Through Analyzing App Reviews
title_zh: “表现不一致”：通过分析应用评论了解现实用户对智能移动健康应用的担忧
abstract: While smart mobile health apps that adapt to users' progressive individual needs are proliferating, many of them struggle to fulfill their promises due to an inferior user experience. Understanding the concerns of real-world users related to those apps, and their smart components in particular, could help advance the app design to attract and retain users. In this paper, we target this issue through a preliminary thematic analysis of 120 user reviews of six smart health apps. We found that accuracy, customizability, and convenience of data input are primary concerns raised in real-world user reviews. Many concerns on the smart components are related to the trust issue of the users towards the apps. However, several important aspects such as privacy and fairness were rarely discussed in the reviews. Overall, our study provides insights that can inspire further investigations to support the design of smart mobile health apps.
summary: While smart mobile health apps that adapt to users' progressive individual needs are proliferating, many of them struggle to fulfill their promises due to an inferior user experience. Understanding the concerns of real-world users related to those apps, and their smart components in particular, could help advance the app design to attract and retain users. In this paper, we target this issue through a preliminary thematic analysis of 120 user reviews of six smart health apps. We found that accuracy, customizability, and convenience of data input are primary concerns raised in real-world user reviews. Many concerns on the smart components are related to the trust issue of the users towards the apps. However, several important aspects such as privacy and fairness were rarely discussed in the reviews. Overall, our study provides insights that can inspire further investigations to support the design of smart mobile health apps.
abstract_zh: 尽管适应用户不断进步的个人需求的智能移动健康应用程序正在激增，但由于用户体验较差，其中许多应用程序难以兑现其承诺。了解现实世界用户对这些应用程序（尤其是其智能组件）的担忧，有助于推进应用程序设计以吸引和留住用户。在本文中，我们通过对六款智能健康应用程序的 120 条用户评论进行初步主题分析来解决这个问题。我们发现数据输入的准确性、可定制性和便利性是现实世界用户评论中提出的主要问题。对智能组件的许多担忧都与用户对应用程序的信任问题有关。然而，评论中很少讨论隐私和公平等几个重要方面。总的来说，我们的研究提供了一些见解，可以激发进一步的研究，以支持智能移动健康应用程序的设计。

AI.tldr: 通过分析用户评论，识别智能移动健康应用在实际使用中用户的主要担忧。
AI.motivation: 智能健康应用用户体验不佳，需理解用户对应用及智能组件的担忧以改进设计。
AI.method: 对六款智能健康应用的120条用户评论进行初步主题分析。
AI.result: 用户主要关注准确性、可定制性及数据输入便利性，隐私与公平性讨论较少。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为优化智能健康应用设计提供了方向，需进一步探索用户信任与隐私问题。

authors_text: Jinkai Lv,Yuyong Hu,Quanshui Fu,Zhiwang Zhang,Yuqiang Hu,Lin Lv,Guoqing Yang,Jinpeng Li,Yi Zhao
title: CM-MLP: Cascade Multi-scale MLP with Axial Context Relation Encoder for Edge Segmentation of Medical Image
title_zh: CM-MLP：带有轴向上下文关系编码器的级联多尺度 MLP，用于医学图像边缘分割
abstract: The convolutional-based methods provide good segmentation performance in the medical image segmentation task. However, those methods have the following challenges when dealing with the edges of the medical images: (1) Previous convolutional-based methods do not focus on the boundary relationship between foreground and background around the segmentation edge, which leads to the degradation of segmentation performance when the edge changes complexly. (2) The inductive bias of the convolutional layer cannot be adapted to complex edge changes and the aggregation of multiple-segmented areas, resulting in its performance improvement mostly limited to segmenting the body of segmented areas instead of the edge. To address these challenges, we propose the CM-MLP framework on MFI (Multi-scale Feature Interaction) block and ACRE (Axial Context Relation Encoder) block for accurate segmentation of the edge of medical image. In the MFI block, we propose the cascade multi-scale MLP (Cascade MLP) to process all local information from the deeper layers of the network simultaneously and utilize a cascade multi-scale mechanism to fuse discrete local information gradually. Then, the ACRE block is used to make the deep supervision focus on exploring the boundary relationship between foreground and background to modify the edge of the medical image. The segmentation accuracy (Dice) of our proposed CM-MLP framework reaches 96.96%, 96.76%, and 82.54% on three benchmark datasets: CVC-ClinicDB dataset, sub-Kvasir dataset, and our in-house dataset, respectively, which significantly outperform the state-of-the-art method. The source code and trained models will be available at https://github.com/ProgrammerHyy/CM-MLP.
summary: The convolutional-based methods provide good segmentation performance in the medical image segmentation task. However, those methods have the following challenges when dealing with the edges of the medical images: (1) Previous convolutional-based methods do not focus on the boundary relationship between foreground and background around the segmentation edge, which leads to the degradation of segmentation performance when the edge changes complexly. (2) The inductive bias of the convolutional layer cannot be adapted to complex edge changes and the aggregation of multiple-segmented areas, resulting in its performance improvement mostly limited to segmenting the body of segmented areas instead of the edge. To address these challenges, we propose the CM-MLP framework on MFI (Multi-scale Feature Interaction) block and ACRE (Axial Context Relation Encoder) block for accurate segmentation of the edge of medical image. In the MFI block, we propose the cascade multi-scale MLP (Cascade MLP) to process all local information from the deeper layers of the network simultaneously and utilize a cascade multi-scale mechanism to fuse discrete local information gradually. Then, the ACRE block is used to make the deep supervision focus on exploring the boundary relationship between foreground and background to modify the edge of the medical image. The segmentation accuracy (Dice) of our proposed CM-MLP framework reaches 96.96%, 96.76%, and 82.54% on three benchmark datasets: CVC-ClinicDB dataset, sub-Kvasir dataset, and our in-house dataset, respectively, which significantly outperform the state-of-the-art method. The source code and trained models will be available at https://github.com/ProgrammerHyy/CM-MLP.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积的方法在医学图像分割任务中提供了良好的分割性能。然而，这些方法在处理医学图像的边缘时存在以下挑战：（1）先前基于卷积的方法没有关注分割边缘周围前景和背景之间的边界关系，这导致当边缘变化复杂时分割性能下降。 （2）卷积层的归纳偏置无法适应复杂的边缘变化和多分割区域的聚合，导致其性能提升大多局限于分割分割区域的主体而不是边缘。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了基于 MFI（多尺度特征交互）块和 ACRE（轴向上下文关系编码器）块的 CM-MLP 框架，用于精确分割医学图像的边缘。在MFI模块中，我们提出级联多尺度MLP（Cascade MLP）来同时处理来自网络较深层的所有局部信息，并利用级联多尺度机制逐渐融合离散局部信息。然后，使用ACRE块使深度监督集中于探索前景和背景之间的边界关系以修改医学图像的边缘。我们提出的 CM-MLP 框架的分割精度 (Dice) 在三个基准数据集：CVC-ClinicDB 数据集、sub-Kvasir 数据集和我们的内部数据集上分别达到 96.96%、96.76% 和 82.54%，这明显优于最先进的方法。源代码和经过训练的模型将在 https://github.com/ProgrammerHyy/CM-MLP 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CM-MLP框架，通过级联多尺度MLP和轴向上下文关系编码器，解决医学图像边缘分割中的边界关系建模与复杂边缘处理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积方法在医学图像边缘分割中存在两个挑战：忽略前景与背景的边界关系，且难以适应复杂边缘变化及多区域聚合，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 设计MFI模块中的级联多尺度MLP（Cascade MLP）并行处理多尺度局部信息，并通过ACRE模块建立轴向上下文关系，聚焦边界关系优化分割边缘。
AI.result: 在CVC-ClinicDB、sub-Kvasir和自建数据集上Dice系数分别达到96.96%、96.76%和82.54%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CM-MLP通过多尺度特征交互与边界关系建模，有效提升了医学图像边缘分割精度，验证了方法在复杂边缘场景下的优越性。

search_text: CM-MLP: Cascade Multi-scale MLP with Axial Context Relation Encoder for Edge Segmentation of Medical Image CM-MLP：带有轴向上下文关系编码器的级联多尺度 MLP，用于医学图像边缘分割 The convolutional-based methods provide good segmentation performance in the medical image segmentation task. However, those methods have the following challenges when dealing with the edges of the medical images: (1) Previous convolutional-based methods do not focus on the boundary relationship between foreground and background around the segmentation edge, which leads to the degradation of segmentation performance when the edge changes complexly. (2) The inductive bias of the convolutional layer cannot be adapted to complex edge changes and the aggregation of multiple-segmented areas, resulting in its performance improvement mostly limited to segmenting the body of segmented areas instead of the edge. To address these challenges, we propose the CM-MLP framework on MFI (Multi-scale Feature Interaction) block and ACRE (Axial Context Relation Encoder) block for accurate segmentation of the edge of medical image. In the MFI block, we propose the cascade multi-scale MLP (Cascade MLP) to process all local information from the deeper layers of the network simultaneously and utilize a cascade multi-scale mechanism to fuse discrete local information gradually. Then, the ACRE block is used to make the deep supervision focus on exploring the boundary relationship between foreground and background to modify the edge of the medical image. The segmentation accuracy (Dice) of our proposed CM-MLP framework reaches 96.96%, 96.76%, and 82.54% on three benchmark datasets: CVC-ClinicDB dataset, sub-Kvasir dataset, and our in-house dataset, respectively, which significantly outperform the state-of-the-art method. The source code and trained models will be available at https://github.com/ProgrammerHyy/CM-MLP. 基于卷积的方法在医学图像分割任务中提供了良好的分割性能。然而，这些方法在处理医学图像的边缘时存在以下挑战：（1）先前基于卷积的方法没有关注分割边缘周围前景和背景之间的边界关系，这导致当边缘变化复杂时分割性能下降。 （2）卷积层的归纳偏置无法适应复杂的边缘变化和多分割区域的聚合，导致其性能提升大多局限于分割分割区域的主体而不是边缘。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了基于 MFI（多尺度特征交互）块和 ACRE（轴向上下文关系编码器）块的 CM-MLP 框架，用于精确分割医学图像的边缘。在MFI模块中，我们提出级联多尺度MLP（Cascade MLP）来同时处理来自网络较深层的所有局部信息，并利用级联多尺度机制逐渐融合离散局部信息。然后，使用ACRE块使深度监督集中于探索前景和背景之间的边界关系以修改医学图像的边缘。我们提出的 CM-MLP 框架的分割精度 (Dice) 在三个基准数据集：CVC-ClinicDB 数据集、sub-Kvasir 数据集和我们的内部数据集上分别达到 96.96%、96.76% 和 82.54%，这明显优于最先进的方法。源代码和经过训练的模型将在 https://github.com/ProgrammerHyy/CM-MLP 上提供。 本文提出CM-MLP框架，通过级联多尺度MLP和轴向上下文关系编码器，解决医学图像边缘分割中的边界关系建模与复杂边缘处理问题。 Jinkai Lv,Yuyong Hu,Quanshui Fu,Zhiwang Zhang,Yuqiang Hu,Lin Lv,Guoqing Yang,Jinpeng Li,Yi Zhao eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Wei,Huaiwei Cong,Zheng Zhang,Junran Peng,Guoping Chen,Jinpeng Li
title: Faint Features Tell: Automatic Vertebrae Fracture Screening Assisted by Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 微弱的特征告诉我们：对比学习辅助的自动椎骨骨折筛查
comment: Accepted by BIBM2022 as short paper
comments: Accepted by BIBM2022 as short paper
abstract: Long-term vertebral fractures severely affect the life quality of patients, causing kyphotic, lumbar deformity and even paralysis. Computed tomography (CT) is a common clinical examination to screen for this disease at early stages. However, the faint radiological appearances and unspecific symptoms lead to a high risk of missed diagnosis, especially for the mild vertebral fractures. In this paper, we argue that reinforcing the faint fracture features to encourage the inter-class separability is the key to improving the accuracy. Motivated by this, we propose a supervised contrastive learning based model to estimate Genent's Grade of vertebral fracture with CT scans. The supervised contrastive learning, as an auxiliary task, narrows the distance of features within the same class while pushing others away, enhancing the model's capability of capturing subtle features of vertebral fractures. Our method has a specificity of 99% and a sensitivity of 85% in binary classification, and a macro-F1 of 77% in multi-class classification, indicating that contrastive learning significantly improves the accuracy of vertebrae fracture screening. Considering the lack of datasets in this field, we construct a database including 208 samples annotated by experienced radiologists. Our desensitized data and codes will be made publicly available for the community.

abstract_zh: 长期的椎体骨折严重影响患者的生活质量，导致脊柱后凸、腰椎畸形甚至瘫痪。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 是早期筛查这种疾病的常见临床检查。然而，微弱的放射学表现和非特异性症状导致漏诊的风险很高，特别是对于轻度椎体骨折。在本文中，我们认为增强微弱断裂特征以促进类间可分离性是提高准确性的关键。受此启发，我们提出了一种基于监督对比学习的模型，通过 CT 扫描来估计脊椎骨折的 Genent 等级。有监督对比学习作为辅助任务，缩小了同一类别内特征的距离，同时将其他特征推开，增强了模型捕捉椎骨骨折细微特征的能力。我们的方法在二元分类中具有 99% 的特异性和 85% 的敏感性，在多类分类中具有 77% 的宏观 F1，表明对比学习显着提高了椎骨骨折筛查的准确性。考虑到该领域数据集的缺乏，我们构建了一个数据库，其中包含由经验丰富的放射科医生注释的 208 个样本。我们的脱敏数据和代码将向社区公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的模型，用于提高CT扫描中脊椎骨折筛查的准确性。
AI.motivation: 脊椎骨折的细微影像特征和非特异性症状导致临床误诊率高，尤其对轻度骨折的检测存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计监督对比学习框架作为辅助任务，通过缩小同类特征距离并增大异类距离，增强模型对细微骨折特征的捕捉能力。
AI.result: 二分类任务中特异性达99%、敏感性85%，多分类任务宏观F1值为77%，并构建包含208例放射科医生标注的公开数据集。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习显著提升脊椎骨折筛查准确率，公开数据集为领域研究提供基础支持。

authors_text: Lingfeng Li,Huaiwei Cong,Gangming Zhao,Junran Peng,Zheng Zhang,Jinpeng Li
title: Structure Regularized Attentive Network for Automatic Femoral Head Necrosis Diagnosis and Localization
title_zh: 构建用于股骨头坏死自动诊断和定位的正则化关注网络
abstract: In recent years, several works have adopted the convolutional neural network (CNN) to diagnose the avascular necrosis of the femoral head (AVNFH) based on X-ray images or magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, due to the tissue overlap, X-ray images are difficult to provide fine-grained features for early diagnosis. MRI, on the other hand, has a long imaging time, is more expensive, making it impractical in mass screening. Computed tomography (CT) shows layer-wise tissues, is faster to image, and is less costly than MRI. However, to our knowledge, there is no work on CT-based automated diagnosis of AVNFH. In this work, we collected and labeled a large-scale dataset for AVNFH ranking. In addition, existing end-to-end CNNs only yields the classification result and are difficult to provide more information for doctors in diagnosis. To address this issue, we propose the structure regularized attentive network (SRANet), which is able to highlight the necrotic regions during classification based on patch attention. SRANet extracts features in chunks of images, obtains weight via the attention mechanism to aggregate the features, and constrains them by a structural regularizer with prior knowledge to improve the generalization. SRANet was evaluated on our AVNFH-CT dataset. Experimental results show that SRANet is superior to CNNs for AVNFH classification, moreover, it can localize lesions and provide more information to assist doctors in diagnosis. Our codes are made public at https://github.com/tomas-lilingfeng/SRANet.
summary: In recent years, several works have adopted the convolutional neural network (CNN) to diagnose the avascular necrosis of the femoral head (AVNFH) based on X-ray images or magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). However, due to the tissue overlap, X-ray images are difficult to provide fine-grained features for early diagnosis. MRI, on the other hand, has a long imaging time, is more expensive, making it impractical in mass screening. Computed tomography (CT) shows layer-wise tissues, is faster to image, and is less costly than MRI. However, to our knowledge, there is no work on CT-based automated diagnosis of AVNFH. In this work, we collected and labeled a large-scale dataset for AVNFH ranking. In addition, existing end-to-end CNNs only yields the classification result and are difficult to provide more information for doctors in diagnosis. To address this issue, we propose the structure regularized attentive network (SRANet), which is able to highlight the necrotic regions during classification based on patch attention. SRANet extracts features in chunks of images, obtains weight via the attention mechanism to aggregate the features, and constrains them by a structural regularizer with prior knowledge to improve the generalization. SRANet was evaluated on our AVNFH-CT dataset. Experimental results show that SRANet is superior to CNNs for AVNFH classification, moreover, it can localize lesions and provide more information to assist doctors in diagnosis. Our codes are made public at https://github.com/tomas-lilingfeng/SRANet.
abstract_zh: 近年来，一些工作采用卷积神经网络（CNN）根据X射线图像或磁共振成像（MRI）诊断股骨头缺血性坏死（AVNFH）。然而，由于组织重叠，X射线图像很难为早期诊断提供细粒度的特征。另一方面，MRI 成像时间长，价格昂贵，因此在大规模筛查中不切实际。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 可显示分层组织，成像速度更快，并且比 MRI 成本更低。然而，据我们所知，目前还没有基于 CT 的 AVNFH 自动诊断工作。在这项工作中，我们收集并标记了一个用于 AVNFH 排名的大规模数据集。此外，现有的端到端CNN仅产生分类结果，难以为医生的诊断提供更多信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了结构正则化注意网络（SRANet），它能够在基于补丁注意的分类过程中突出显示坏死区域。 SRANet提取图像块中的特征，通过注意力机制获得权重来聚合特征，并通过具有先验知识的结构正则化器来约束它们以提高泛化能力。 SRANet 在我们的 AVNFH-CT 数据集上进行了评估。实验结果表明，SRANet 在 AVNFH 分类方面优于 CNN，而且可以定位病变并提供更多信息来协助医生诊断。我们的代码在 https://github.com/tomas-lilingfeng/SRANet 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构正则化注意力网络（SRANet）的自动股骨头坏死诊断与定位方法，利用CT图像实现疾病分类与病灶区域定位。
AI.motivation: 现有基于X光或MRI的股骨头坏死（AVNFH）诊断方法存在细粒度特征不足、成本高或成像时间长的问题，而CT图像具有分层组织特性且成本更低，但缺乏基于CT的自动化诊断方法。此外，现有CNN模型无法提供病灶定位信息。
AI.method: 设计SRANet网络，通过图像分块提取特征，结合注意力机制加权聚合特征，并引入结构正则化约束以提升泛化能力，实现分类与病灶定位双重目标。
AI.result: 在自建的AVNFH-CT数据集上，SRANet在分类性能上优于传统CNN，且能有效定位病灶区域，为医生提供辅助诊断信息。
AI.conclusion: SRANet通过结合注意力机制与结构先验约束，在CT图像上实现了股骨头坏死的准确诊断与定位，为大规模筛查提供了可行方案。

SRANet was evaluated on our AVNFH-CT dataset. Experimental results show that SRANet is superior to CNNs for AVNFH classification, moreover, it can localize lesions and provide more information to assist doctors in diagnosis. Our codes are made public at https://github.com/tomas-lilingfeng/SRANet. 近年来，一些工作采用卷积神经网络（CNN）根据X射线图像或磁共振成像（MRI）诊断股骨头缺血性坏死（AVNFH）。然而，由于组织重叠，X射线图像很难为早期诊断提供细粒度的特征。另一方面，MRI 成像时间长，价格昂贵，因此在大规模筛查中不切实际。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 可显示分层组织，成像速度更快，并且比 MRI 成本更低。然而，据我们所知，目前还没有基于 CT 的 AVNFH 自动诊断工作。在这项工作中，我们收集并标记了一个用于 AVNFH 排名的大规模数据集。此外，现有的端到端CNN仅产生分类结果，难以为医生的诊断提供更多信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了结构正则化注意网络（SRANet），它能够在基于补丁注意的分类过程中突出显示坏死区域。 SRANet提取图像块中的特征，通过注意力机制获得权重来聚合特征，并通过具有先验知识的结构正则化器来约束它们以提高泛化能力。 SRANet 在我们的 AVNFH-CT 数据集上进行了评估。实验结果表明，SRANet 在 AVNFH 分类方面优于 CNN，而且可以定位病变并提供更多信息来协助医生诊断。我们的代码在 https://github.com/tomas-lilingfeng/SRANet 上公开。 本文提出了一种基于结构正则化注意力网络（SRANet）的自动股骨头坏死诊断与定位方法，利用CT图像实现疾病分类与病灶区域定位。 Lingfeng Li,Huaiwei Cong,Gangming Zhao,Junran Peng,Zheng Zhang,Jinpeng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Penghua Zhai,Enwei Zhu,Baolian Qi,Xin Wei,Jinpeng Li
title: Spiral Contrastive Learning: An Efficient 3D Representation Learning Method for Unannotated CT Lesions
title_zh: 螺旋对比学习：一种针对未注释 CT 病变的高效 3D 表示学习方法
abstract: Computed tomography (CT) samples with pathological annotations are difficult to obtain. As a result, the computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) algorithms are trained on small datasets (e.g., LIDC-IDRI with 1,018 samples), limiting their accuracies and reliability. In the past five years, several works have tailored for unsupervised representations of CT lesions via two-dimensional (2D) and three-dimensional (3D) self-supervised learning (SSL) algorithms. The 2D algorithms have difficulty capturing 3D information, and existing 3D algorithms are computationally heavy. Light-weight 3D SSL remains the boundary to explore. In this paper, we propose the spiral contrastive learning (SCL), which yields 3D representations in a computationally efficient manner. SCL first transforms 3D lesions to the 2D plane using an information-preserving spiral transformation, and then learn transformation-invariant features using 2D contrastive learning. For the augmentation, we consider natural image augmentations and medical image augmentations. We evaluate SCL by training a classification head upon the embedding layer. Experimental results show that SCL achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on LIDC-IDRI (89.72%), LNDb (82.09%) and TianChi (90.16%) for unsupervised representation learning. With 10% annotated data for fine-tune, the performance of SCL is comparable to that of supervised learning algorithms (85.75% vs. 85.03% on LIDC-IDRI, 78.20% vs. 73.44% on LNDb and 87.85% vs. 83.34% on TianChi, respectively). Meanwhile, SCL reduces the computational effort by 66.98% compared to other 3D SSL algorithms, demonstrating the efficiency of the proposed method in unsupervised pre-training.

In this paper, we propose the spiral contrastive learning (SCL), which yields 3D representations in a computationally efficient manner. SCL first transforms 3D lesions to the 2D plane using an information-preserving spiral transformation, and then learn transformation-invariant features using 2D contrastive learning. Experimental results show that SCL achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on LIDC-IDRI (89.72%), LNDb (82.09%) and TianChi (90.16%) for unsupervised representation learning. With 10% annotated data for fine-tune, the performance of SCL is comparable to that of supervised learning algorithms (85.75% vs. 85.03% on LIDC-IDRI, 78.20% vs. 73.44% on LNDb and 87.85% vs. 83.34% on TianChi, respectively). abstract_zh: 具有病理注释的计算机断层扫描 (CT) 样本很难获得。因此，计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 算法是在小型数据集（例如具有 1,018 个样本的 LIDC-IDRI）上进行训练的，从而限制了其准确性和可靠性。在过去的五年中，有几项工作通过二维 (2D) 和三维 (3D) 自监督学习 (SSL) 算法为 CT 病变的无监督表示进行了定制。 2D算法难以捕获3D信息，并且现有的3D算法计算量大。轻量级 3D SSL 仍然是有待探索的边界。在本文中，我们提出了螺旋对比学习（SCL），它以计算有效的方式产生 3D 表示。 SCL 首先使用信息保留螺旋变换将 3D 病变变换到 2D 平面，然后使用 2D 对比学习学习变换不变特征。对于增强，我们考虑自然图像增强和医学图像增强。我们通过在嵌入层上训练分类头来评估 SCL。实验结果表明，SCL 在无监督表示学习的 LIDC-IDRI (89.72%)、LNDb (82.09%) 和 TianChi (90.16%) 上实现了最先进的准确率。在使用 10% 注释数据进行微调的情况下，SCL 的性能与监督学习算法的性能相当（LIDC-IDRI 上分别为 85.75% vs. 85.03%，LNDb 上分别为 78.20% vs. 73.44%，TianChi 上分别为 87.85% vs. 83.34%）。同时，与其他3D SSL算法相比，SCL减少了66.98%的计算量，证明了该方法在无监督预训练中的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的3D表示学习方法SCL，用于处理未标注的CT病灶数据。
AI.motivation: CT病理标注数据稀缺，现有3D自监督学习方法计算成本高且难以捕捉3D信息。
AI.method: 通过信息保留的螺旋变换将3D病灶转化为2D平面，结合2D对比学习与医学图像增强技术进行特征学习。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI等数据集上达到SOTA准确率（89.72%），计算成本较其他3D方法降低66.98%。
AI.conclusion: SCL在无监督预训练中兼顾效率与性能，少量标注数据微调后可媲美监督学习效果。

authors_text: Simin Li,Huangxinxin Xu,Jiakai Wang,Aishan Liu,Fazhi He,Xianglong Liu,Dacheng Tao
title: Hierarchical Perceptual Noise Injection for Social Media Fingerprint Privacy Protection
title_zh: 用于社交媒体指纹隐私保护的分层感知噪声注入
abstract: Billions of people are sharing their daily life images on social media every day. However, their biometric information (e.g., fingerprint) could be easily stolen from these images. The threat of fingerprint leakage from social media raises a strong desire for anonymizing shared images while maintaining image qualities, since fingerprints act as a lifelong individual biometric password. To guard the fingerprint leakage, adversarial attack emerges as a solution by adding imperceptible perturbations on images. However, existing works are either weak in black-box transferability or appear unnatural. Motivated by visual perception hierarchy (i.e., high-level perception exploits model-shared semantics that transfer well across models while low-level perception extracts primitive stimulus and will cause high visual sensitivities given suspicious stimulus), we propose FingerSafe, a hierarchical perceptual protective noise injection framework to address the mentioned problems. For black-box transferability, we inject protective noises on fingerprint orientation field to perturb the model-shared high-level semantics (i.e., fingerprint ridges). Considering visual naturalness, we suppress the low-level local contrast stimulus by regularizing the response of Lateral Geniculate Nucleus. Our FingerSafe is the first to provide feasible fingerprint protection in both digital (up to 94.12%) and realistic scenarios (Twitter and Facebook, up to 68.75%). Our code can be found at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/FingerSafe.
summary: Billions of people are sharing their daily life images on social media every day. However, their biometric information (e.g., fingerprint) could be easily stolen from these images. The threat of fingerprint leakage from social media raises a strong desire for anonymizing shared images while maintaining image qualities, since fingerprints act as a lifelong individual biometric password. To guard the fingerprint leakage, adversarial attack emerges as a solution by adding imperceptible perturbations on images. However, existing works are either weak in black-box transferability or appear unnatural. Motivated by visual perception hierarchy (i.e., high-level perception exploits model-shared semantics that transfer well across models while low-level perception extracts primitive stimulus and will cause high visual sensitivities given suspicious stimulus), we propose FingerSafe, a hierarchical perceptual protective noise injection framework to address the mentioned problems. For black-box transferability, we inject protective noises on fingerprint orientation field to perturb the model-shared high-level semantics (i.e., fingerprint ridges). Considering visual naturalness, we suppress the low-level local contrast stimulus by regularizing the response of Lateral Geniculate Nucleus. Our FingerSafe is the first to provide feasible fingerprint protection in both digital (up to 94.12%) and realistic scenarios (Twitter and Facebook, up to 68.75%). Our code can be found at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/FingerSafe.
abstract_zh: 每天都有数十亿人在社交媒体上分享他们的日常生活图片。然而，他们的生物识别信息（例如指纹）很容易从这些图像中被窃取。社交媒体指纹泄露的威胁引发了人们对共享图像进行匿名化同时保持图像质量的强烈愿望，因为指纹充当终身的个人生物识别密码。为了防止指纹泄露，对抗性攻击通过在图像上添加难以察觉的扰动而成为一种解决方案。然而，现有的作品要么黑盒可移植性较弱，要么显得不自然。受视觉感知层次结构的启发（即，高级感知利用模型共享语义，可以在模型之间很好地传输，而低级感知提取原始刺激，并在给定可疑刺激的情况下导致高视觉敏感度），我们提出了 FingerSafe，一种分层感知保护性噪声注入框架来解决上述问题。对于黑盒可转移性，我们在指纹方向场上注入保护性噪声，以扰乱模型共享的高级语义（即指纹脊）。考虑到视觉自然度，我们通过规范外侧膝状核的反应来抑制低水平的局部对比刺激。我们的 FingerSafe 率先在数字（高达 94.12%）和现实场景（Twitter 和 Facebook，高达 68.75%）中提供可行的指纹保护。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/FingerSafe 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层感知噪声注入框架FingerSafe，用于在社交媒体图像中保护指纹隐私，同时保持图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有指纹保护方法在黑盒迁移性或视觉自然性上存在不足，需通过分层感知机制平衡模型共享语义扰动与视觉感知抑制。
AI.method: 在指纹方向场注入高阶语义噪声扰动指纹脊线，同时通过抑制外侧膝状体响应降低低级局部对比度刺激，实现双重保护。
AI.result: 数字场景指纹保护准确率达94.12%，在Twitter和Facebook等现实平台测试中达68.75%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FingerSafe是首个同时满足数字与现实场景指纹保护的框架，验证了分层感知噪声注入的有效性。

Considering visual naturalness, we suppress the low-level local contrast stimulus by regularizing the response of Lateral Geniculate Nucleus. Our FingerSafe is the first to provide feasible fingerprint protection in both digital (up to 94.12%) and realistic scenarios (Twitter and Facebook, up to 68.75%). Our code can be found at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/FingerSafe. 每天都有数十亿人在社交媒体上分享他们的日常生活图片。然而，他们的生物识别信息（例如指纹）很容易从这些图像中被窃取。社交媒体指纹泄露的威胁引发了人们对共享图像进行匿名化同时保持图像质量的强烈愿望，因为指纹充当终身的个人生物识别密码。为了防止指纹泄露，对抗性攻击通过在图像上添加难以察觉的扰动而成为一种解决方案。然而，现有的作品要么黑盒可移植性较弱，要么显得不自然。受视觉感知层次结构的启发（即，高级感知利用模型共享语义，可以在模型之间很好地传输，而低级感知提取原始刺激，并在给定可疑刺激的情况下导致高视觉敏感度），我们提出了 FingerSafe，一种分层感知保护性噪声注入框架来解决上述问题。对于黑盒可转移性，我们在指纹方向场上注入保护性噪声，以扰乱模型共享的高级语义（即指纹脊）。考虑到视觉自然度，我们通过规范外侧膝状核的反应来抑制低水平的局部对比刺激。我们的 FingerSafe 率先在数字（高达 94.12%）和现实场景（Twitter 和 Facebook，高达 68.75%）中提供可行的指纹保护。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/FingerSafe 找到。 本文提出一种分层感知噪声注入框架FingerSafe，用于在社交媒体图像中保护指纹隐私，同时保持图像质量。 Simin Li,Huangxinxin Xu,Jiakai Wang,Aishan Liu,Fazhi He,Xianglong Liu,Dacheng Tao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Gaurav R. Ghosal,Matthew Zurek,Daniel S. Brown,Anca D. Dragan
title: The Effect of Modeling Human Rationality Level on Learning Rewards from Multiple Feedback Types
title_zh: 人类理性水平建模对多种反馈类型学习奖励的影响
comment: Published at AAAI 2023; 10 pages, 5 figures plus appendices
comments: Published at AAAI 2023; 10 pages, 5 figures plus appendices
abstract: When inferring reward functions from human behavior (be it demonstrations, comparisons, physical corrections, or e-stops), it has proven useful to model the human as making noisy-rational choices, with a "rationality coefficient" capturing how much noise or entropy we expect to see in the human behavior. Prior work typically sets the rationality level to a constant value, regardless of the type, or quality, of human feedback. However, in many settings, giving one type of feedback (e.g. a demonstration) may be much more difficult than a different type of feedback (e.g. answering a comparison query). Thus, we expect to see more or less noise depending on the type of human feedback. In this work, we advocate that grounding the rationality coefficient in real data for each feedback type, rather than assuming a default value, has a significant positive effect on reward learning. We test this in both simulated experiments and in a user study with real human feedback. We find that overestimating human rationality can have dire effects on reward learning accuracy and regret. We also find that fitting the rationality coefficient to human data enables better reward learning, even when the human deviates significantly from the noisy-rational choice model due to systematic biases. Further, we find that the rationality level affects the informativeness of each feedback type: surprisingly, demonstrations are not always the most informative -- when the human acts very suboptimally, comparisons actually become more informative, even when the rationality level is the same for both. Ultimately, our results emphasize the importance and advantage of paying attention to the assumed human-rationality level, especially when agents actively learn from multiple types of human feedback.
summary: When inferring reward functions from human behavior (be it demonstrations, comparisons, physical corrections, or e-stops), it has proven useful to model the human as making noisy-rational choices, with a "rationality coefficient" capturing how much noise or entropy we expect to see in the human behavior. Prior work typically sets the rationality level to a constant value, regardless of the type, or quality, of human feedback. However, in many settings, giving one type of feedback (e.g. a demonstration) may be much more difficult than a different type of feedback (e.g. answering a comparison query). Thus, we expect to see more or less noise depending on the type of human feedback. In this work, we advocate that grounding the rationality coefficient in real data for each feedback type, rather than assuming a default value, has a significant positive effect on reward learning. We test this in both simulated experiments and in a user study with real human feedback. We find that overestimating human rationality can have dire effects on reward learning accuracy and regret. We also find that fitting the rationality coefficient to human data enables better reward learning, even when the human deviates significantly from the noisy-rational choice model due to systematic biases. Further, we find that the rationality level affects the informativeness of each feedback type: surprisingly, demonstrations are not always the most informative -- when the human acts very suboptimally, comparisons actually become more informative, even when the rationality level is the same for both. Ultimately, our results emphasize the importance and advantage of paying attention to the assumed human-rationality level, especially when agents actively learn from multiple types of human feedback.
abstract_zh: 当从人类行为（无论是演示、比较、物理校正或紧急停止）推断奖励函数时，事实证明，将人类建模为做出噪声理性选择是有用的，其中“理性系数”捕获了我们期望在人类行为中看到多少噪声或熵。先前的工作通常将合理性水平设置为恒定值，无论人类反馈的类型或质量如何。然而，在许多设置中，提供一种类型的反馈（例如演示）可能比提供不同类型的反馈（例如回答比较查询）困难得多。因此，我们期望看到更多或更少的噪音，具体取决于人类反馈的类型。在这项工作中，我们主张将合理性系数建立在每种反馈类型的实际数据中，而不是假设默认值，这对奖励学习具有显着的积极影响。我们在模拟实验和具有真实人类反馈的用户研究中对此进行了测试。我们发现，高估人类理性会对奖励学习的准确性和遗憾产生可怕的影响。我们还发现，即使人类由于系统偏差而显着偏离噪声理性选择模型，将理性系数拟合到人类数据也可以实现更好的奖励学习。此外，我们发现理性水平会影响每种反馈类型的信息量：令人惊讶的是，演示并不总是最有信息量的——当人类行为非常次优时，比较实际上会变得更有信息量，即使两者的理性水平相同。最终，我们的结果强调了关注假设的人类理性水平的重要性和优势，特别是当智能体积极地从多种类型的人类反馈中学习时。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在从多种人类反馈类型（如示范、比较等）学习奖励函数时，建模人类理性水平的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统方法假设人类反馈的理性系数为固定值，但不同反馈类型的噪声水平可能差异显著，需根据反馈类型调整理性系数以提高学习效果。
AI.method: 通过模拟实验和真实用户研究，基于实际数据拟合每种反馈类型的理性系数，而非使用默认值，并分析不同反馈类型的信息量差异。
AI.result: 过估计人类理性会降低奖励学习准确性；拟合理性系数可提升学习效果，即使存在系统性偏差；当人类表现极不理性时，比较反馈可能比示范更信息丰富。
AI.conclusion: 在多类型人类反馈学习中，需动态调整理性系数假设，以提升奖励学习性能并避免偏差影响。

authors_text: Jean Lee,Taejun Lim,Heejun Lee,Bogeun Jo,Yangsok Kim,Heegeun Yoon,Soyeon Caren Han
title: K-MHaS: A Multi-label Hate Speech Detection Dataset in Korean Online News Comment
title_zh: K-MHaS：韩国在线新闻评论中的多标签仇恨言论检测数据集
abstract: Online hate speech detection has become an important issue due to the growth of online content, but resources in languages other than English are extremely limited. We introduce K-MHaS, a new multi-label dataset for hate speech detection that effectively handles Korean language patterns. The dataset consists of 109k utterances from news comments and provides a multi-label classification using 1 to 4 labels, and handles subjectivity and intersectionality. We evaluate strong baseline experiments on K-MHaS using Korean-BERT-based language models with six different metrics. KR-BERT with a sub-character tokenizer outperforms others, recognizing decomposed characters in each hate speech class.
summary: Online hate speech detection has become an important issue due to the growth of online content, but resources in languages other than English are extremely limited. We introduce K-MHaS, a new multi-label dataset for hate speech detection that effectively handles Korean language patterns. The dataset consists of 109k utterances from news comments and provides a multi-label classification using 1 to 4 labels, and handles subjectivity and intersectionality. We evaluate strong baseline experiments on K-MHaS using Korean-BERT-based language models with six different metrics. KR-BERT with a sub-character tokenizer outperforms others, recognizing decomposed characters in each hate speech class.
abstract_zh: 由于在线内容的增长，在线仇恨言论检测已成为一个重要问题，但英语以外语言的资源极其有限。我们引入了 K-MHaS，这是一种用于仇恨语音检测的新多标签数据集，可有效处理韩语语言模式。该数据集由新闻评论中的 109k 条话语组成，并提供使用 1 到 4 个标签的多标签分类，并处理主观性和交叉性。我们使用基于韩语 BERT 的语言模型和六种不同的指标来评估 K-MHaS 的强大基线实验。带有子字符标记器的 KR-BERT 优于其他标记器，可以识别每个仇恨言论类别中的分解字符。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于检测韩语在线新闻评论中仇恨言论的多标签数据集K-MHaS。
AI.motivation: 由于在线内容的增长，仇恨言论检测变得重要，但非英语资源极度有限，需针对韩语等语言开发专用数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含109k条新闻评论的多标签数据集，采用1-4个标签分类，并利用韩语BERT模型（含子字符分词器）进行基线实验。
AI.result: 使用子字符分词器的KR-BERT模型在多个指标上表现最佳，能有效分解字符识别仇恨言论类别。
AI.conclusion: K-MHaS为韩语仇恨言论检测提供新数据支持，证明子字符分词技术对非英语语言处理的有效性，需进一步研究多语言场景。

authors_text: Boshen Zhang,Yuxi Li,Yuanpeng Tu,Jinlong Peng,Yabiao Wang,Cunlin Wu,Yang Xiao,Cairong Zhao
title: Learning from Noisy Labels with Coarse-to-Fine Sample Credibility Modeling
title_zh: 通过从粗到细的样本可信度建模从噪声标签中学习
abstract: Training deep neural network (DNN) with noisy labels is practically challenging since inaccurate labels severely degrade the generalization ability of DNN. Previous efforts tend to handle part or full data in a unified denoising flow via identifying noisy data with a coarse small-loss criterion to mitigate the interference from noisy labels, ignoring the fact that the difficulties of noisy samples are different, thus a rigid and unified data selection pipeline cannot tackle this problem well. In this paper, we first propose a coarse-to-fine robust learning method called CREMA, to handle noisy data in a divide-and-conquer manner. In coarse-level, clean and noisy sets are firstly separated in terms of credibility in a statistical sense. Since it is practically impossible to categorize all noisy samples correctly, we further process them in a fine-grained manner via modeling the credibility of each sample. Specifically, for the clean set, we deliberately design a memory-based modulation scheme to dynamically adjust the contribution of each sample in terms of its historical credibility sequence during training, thus alleviating the effect from noisy samples incorrectly grouped into the clean set. Meanwhile, for samples categorized into the noisy set, a selective label update strategy is proposed to correct noisy labels while mitigating the problem of correction error. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmarks of different modalities, including image classification (CIFAR, Clothing1M etc) and text recognition (IMDB), with either synthetic or natural semantic noises, demonstrating the superiority and generality of CREMA.
summary: Training deep neural network (DNN) with noisy labels is practically challenging since inaccurate labels severely degrade the generalization ability of DNN. Previous efforts tend to handle part or full data in a unified denoising flow via identifying noisy data with a coarse small-loss criterion to mitigate the interference from noisy labels, ignoring the fact that the difficulties of noisy samples are different, thus a rigid and unified data selection pipeline cannot tackle this problem well. In this paper, we first propose a coarse-to-fine robust learning method called CREMA, to handle noisy data in a divide-and-conquer manner. In coarse-level, clean and noisy sets are firstly separated in terms of credibility in a statistical sense. Since it is practically impossible to categorize all noisy samples correctly, we further process them in a fine-grained manner via modeling the credibility of each sample. Specifically, for the clean set, we deliberately design a memory-based modulation scheme to dynamically adjust the contribution of each sample in terms of its historical credibility sequence during training, thus alleviating the effect from noisy samples incorrectly grouped into the clean set. Meanwhile, for samples categorized into the noisy set, a selective label update strategy is proposed to correct noisy labels while mitigating the problem of correction error. Extensive experiments are conducted on benchmarks of different modalities, including image classification (CIFAR, Clothing1M etc) and text recognition (IMDB), with either synthetic or natural semantic noises, demonstrating the superiority and generality of CREMA.
abstract_zh: 使用噪声标签训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 实际上具有挑战性，因为不准确的标签会严重降低 DNN 的泛化能力。以往的努力倾向于通过粗略的小损失准则识别噪声数据来处理统一去噪流程中的部分或全部数据，以减轻噪声标签的干扰，忽略了噪声样本的难度不同的事实，因此严格且统一的数据选择管道不能很好地解决这个问题。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种名为 CREMA 的从粗到细的鲁棒学习方法，以分而治之的方式处理噪声数据。在粗粒度上，首先根据统计意义上的可信度来区分干净集和噪声集。由于实际上不可能对所有噪声样本进行正确分类，因此我们通过对每个样本的可信度进行建模来进一步以细粒度的方式处理它们。具体来说，对于干净集，我们特意设计了一种基于记忆的调制方案，在训练过程中动态调整每个样本对其历史可信度序列的贡献，从而减轻噪声样本错误分组到干净集中的影响。同时，对于分类到噪声集中的样本，提出了选择性标签更新策略来校正噪声标签，同时减轻校正误差问题。在不同模式的基准上进行了大量的实验，包括图像分类（CIFAR、Clothing1M 等）和文本识别（IMDB），以及合成或自然语义噪声，证明了 CREMA 的优越性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种粗到细的样本可信度建模方法，以应对深度神经网络中的噪声标签问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效处理不同难度的噪声样本，导致去噪效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出CREMA方法，通过粗粒度统计可信度分离和细粒度样本可信度建模，结合记忆调制和选择性标签更新策略处理噪声数据。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集（如CIFAR、Clothing1M、IMDB）上实验，证明了CREMA在处理合成和自然噪声下的优越性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: CREMA通过分阶段处理不同难度的噪声样本，提高了模型在噪声环境下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Tsuyoshi Idé,Amit Dhurandhar,Jiří Navrátil,Moninder Singh,Naoki Abe
title: Anomaly Attribution with Likelihood Compensation
title_zh: 具有似然补偿的异常归因
abstract: This paper addresses the task of explaining anomalous predictions of a black-box regression model. When using a black-box model, such as one to predict building energy consumption from many sensor measurements, we often have a situation where some observed samples may significantly deviate from their prediction. It may be due to a sub-optimal black-box model, or simply because those samples are outliers. In either case, one would ideally want to compute a ``responsibility score'' indicative of the extent to which an input variable is responsible for the anomalous output. In this work, we formalize this task as a statistical inverse problem: Given model deviation from the expected value, infer the responsibility score of each of the input variables. We propose a new method called likelihood compensation (LC), which is founded on the likelihood principle and computes a correction to each input variable. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first principled framework that computes a responsibility score for real valued anomalous model deviations. We apply our approach to a real-world building energy prediction task and confirm its utility based on expert feedback.
summary: This paper addresses the task of explaining anomalous predictions of a black-box regression model. When using a black-box model, such as one to predict building energy consumption from many sensor measurements, we often have a situation where some observed samples may significantly deviate from their prediction. It may be due to a sub-optimal black-box model, or simply because those samples are outliers. In either case, one would ideally want to compute a ``responsibility score'' indicative of the extent to which an input variable is responsible for the anomalous output. In this work, we formalize this task as a statistical inverse problem: Given model deviation from the expected value, infer the responsibility score of each of the input variables. We propose a new method called likelihood compensation (LC), which is founded on the likelihood principle and computes a correction to each input variable. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first principled framework that computes a responsibility score for real valued anomalous model deviations. We apply our approach to a real-world building energy prediction task and confirm its utility based on expert feedback.
abstract_zh: 本文致力于解释黑盒回归模型的异常预测。当使用黑盒模型（例如通过许多传感器测量来预测建筑能耗）时，我们经常会遇到一些观察到的样本可能与其预测存在显着偏差的情况。这可能是由于黑盒模型次优，或者仅仅是因为这些样本是异常值。在任何一种情况下，理想情况下都希望计算一个“责任分数”，以表明输入变量对异常输出负责的程度。在这项工作中，我们将此任务形式化为统计逆问题：给定模型与预期值的偏差，推断每个输入变量的责任得分。我们提出了一种称为似然补偿（LC）的新方法，它基于似然原理并计算每个输入变量的校正。据我们所知，这是第一个计算真实值异常模型偏差的责任分数的原则框架。我们将我们的方法应用于现实世界的建筑能源预测任务，并根据专家反馈确认其实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为黑盒回归模型的异常预测提供责任分数，以归因于输入变量的贡献。
AI.motivation: 在使用黑盒模型时，预测值与实际观测值的偏差可能由模型缺陷或数据异常引起，需确定各输入变量的责任程度以进行有效分析与改进。
AI.method: 提出基于似然原理的似然补偿（LC）方法，通过计算输入变量的修正来确定其对异常输出的责任分数。
AI.result: 在实际建筑能耗预测任务中验证了方法的有效性，并通过专家反馈确认其实用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出基于统计逆问题的框架，为实值异常模型偏差计算责任分数，有效解决了黑盒模型异常归因问题。

authors_text: Tsuyoshi Idé,Georgios Kollias,Dzung T. Phan,Naoki Abe
title: Cardinality-Regularized Hawkes-Granger Model
title_zh: 基数正则霍克斯-格兰杰模型
abstract: We propose a new sparse Granger-causal learning framework for temporal event data. We focus on a specific class of point processes called the Hawkes process. We begin by pointing out that most of the existing sparse causal learning algorithms for the Hawkes process suffer from a singularity in maximum likelihood estimation. As a result, their sparse solutions can appear only as numerical artifacts. In this paper, we propose a mathematically well-defined sparse causal learning framework based on a cardinality-regularized Hawkes process, which remedies the pathological issues of existing approaches. We leverage the proposed algorithm for the task of instance-wise causal event analysis, where sparsity plays a critical role. We validate the proposed framework with two real use-cases, one from the power grid and the other from the cloud data center management domain.
summary: We propose a new sparse Granger-causal learning framework for temporal event data. We focus on a specific class of point processes called the Hawkes process. We begin by pointing out that most of the existing sparse causal learning algorithms for the Hawkes process suffer from a singularity in maximum likelihood estimation. As a result, their sparse solutions can appear only as numerical artifacts. In this paper, we propose a mathematically well-defined sparse causal learning framework based on a cardinality-regularized Hawkes process, which remedies the pathological issues of existing approaches. We leverage the proposed algorithm for the task of instance-wise causal event analysis, where sparsity plays a critical role. We validate the proposed framework with two real use-cases, one from the power grid and the other from the cloud data center management domain.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的用于时间事件数据的稀疏格兰杰因果学习框架。我们关注一类称为霍克斯过程的特定点过程。我们首先指出，霍克斯过程的大多数现有稀疏因果学习算法都存在最大似然估计的奇点。因此，它们的稀疏解只能显示为数值伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于基数正则化霍克斯过程的数学上明确定义的稀疏因果学习框架，该框架弥补了现有方法的病态问题。我们利用所提出的算法来执行实例因果事件分析任务，其中稀疏性起着至关重要的作用。我们用两个真实用例验证了所提出的框架，一个来自电网，另一个来自云数据中心管理领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于基数正则化的Hawkes-Granger模型，用于解决时间事件数据的稀疏因果学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Hawkes过程的稀疏因果学习算法在最大似然估计中存在奇异性问题，导致稀疏解出现数值伪影，需构建更稳健的框架。
AI.method: 通过引入基数正则化约束，建立数学上严谨的稀疏因果学习框架，并应用于实例级因果事件分析任务。
AI.result: 在电力网络和云数据中心管理两个实际案例中验证了框架有效性，证明其能准确捕捉稀疏因果关系。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法解决了现有算法的病理问题，在实际场景中展示了稀疏性对因果分析的关键作用。

motivation: 现有Hawkes过程的稀疏因果学习算法在最大似然估计中存在奇异性问题，导致稀疏解出现数值伪影，需构建更稳健的框架。
method: 通过引入基数正则化约束，建立数学上严谨的稀疏因果学习框架，并应用于实例级因果事件分析任务。
result: 在电力网络和云数据中心管理两个实际案例中验证了框架有效性，证明其能准确捕捉稀疏因果关系。
conclusion: 所提方法解决了现有算法的病理问题，在实际场景中展示了稀疏性对因果分析的关键作用。
search_text: Cardinality-Regularized Hawkes-Granger Model 基数正则霍克斯-格兰杰模型 We propose a new sparse Granger-causal learning framework for temporal event data. We focus on a specific class of point processes called the Hawkes process. We begin by pointing out that most of the existing sparse causal learning algorithms for the Hawkes process suffer from a singularity in maximum likelihood estimation. As a result, their sparse solutions can appear only as numerical artifacts. In this paper, we propose a mathematically well-defined sparse causal learning framework based on a cardinality-regularized Hawkes process, which remedies the pathological issues of existing approaches. We leverage the proposed algorithm for the task of instance-wise causal event analysis, where sparsity plays a critical role. We validate the proposed framework with two real use-cases, one from the power grid and the other from the cloud data center management domain. 我们提出了一种新的用于时间事件数据的稀疏格兰杰因果学习框架。我们关注一类称为霍克斯过程的特定点过程。我们首先指出，霍克斯过程的大多数现有稀疏因果学习算法都存在最大似然估计的奇点。因此，它们的稀疏解只能显示为数值伪影。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于基数正则化霍克斯过程的数学上明确定义的稀疏因果学习框架，该框架弥补了现有方法的病态问题。我们利用所提出的算法来执行实例因果事件分析任务，其中稀疏性起着至关重要的作用。我们用两个真实用例验证了所提出的框架，一个来自电网，另一个来自云数据中心管理领域。 本文提出了一种基于基数正则化的Hawkes-Granger模型，用于解决时间事件数据的稀疏因果学习问题。 Tsuyoshi Idé,Georgios Kollias,Dzung T. Phan,Naoki Abe cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Sidharth Malhotra,Girik Malik
title: Solving Royal Game of Ur Using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习解决乌尔皇家游戏
abstract: Reinforcement Learning has recently surfaced as a very powerful tool to solve complex problems in the domain of board games, wherein an agent is generally required to learn complex strategies and moves based on its own experiences and rewards received. While RL has outperformed existing state-of-the-art methods used for playing simple video games and popular board games, it is yet to demonstrate its capability on ancient games. Here, we solve one such problem, where we train our agents using different methods namely Monte Carlo, Qlearning and Expected Sarsa to learn optimal policy to play the strategic Royal Game of Ur. The state space for our game is complex and large, but our agents show promising results at playing the game and learning important strategic moves. Although it is hard to conclude that when trained with limited resources which algorithm performs better overall, but Expected Sarsa shows promising results when it comes to fastest learning.
summary: Reinforcement Learning has recently surfaced as a very powerful tool to solve complex problems in the domain of board games, wherein an agent is generally required to learn complex strategies and moves based on its own experiences and rewards received. While RL has outperformed existing state-of-the-art methods used for playing simple video games and popular board games, it is yet to demonstrate its capability on ancient games. Here, we solve one such problem, where we train our agents using different methods namely Monte Carlo, Qlearning and Expected Sarsa to learn optimal policy to play the strategic Royal Game of Ur. The state space for our game is complex and large, but our agents show promising results at playing the game and learning important strategic moves. Although it is hard to conclude that when trained with limited resources which algorithm performs better overall, but Expected Sarsa shows promising results when it comes to fastest learning.
abstract_zh: 强化学习最近成为解决棋盘游戏领域复杂问题的非常强大的工具，其中代理通常需要根据自己的经验和收到的奖励来学习复杂的策略和动作。虽然强化学习已经超越了用于玩简单视频游戏和流行棋盘游戏的现有最先进方法，但它尚未在古代游戏上展示其能力。在这里，我们解决了一个这样的问题，我们使用不同的方法（即蒙特卡罗、Qlearning 和 Expected Sarsa）训练我们的智能体，以学习玩乌尔战略皇家游戏的最佳策略。我们游戏的状态空间复杂且庞大，但我们的智能体在玩游戏和学习重要战略举措方面表现出了有希望的结果。尽管很难得出结论，当使用有限的资源进行训练时，哪种算法总体表现更好，但预期 Sarsa 在最快的学习方面显示出了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文利用强化学习方法解决古代棋盘游戏《皇家乌尔棋》的最优策略问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习在现代游戏领域表现优异，但尚未在古代复杂游戏中验证其有效性，需探索其在古游戏中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛方法、Q学习和预期Sarsa三种强化学习算法训练智能体，通过游戏状态空间学习策略。
AI.result: 智能体成功掌握游戏核心策略，但受限于资源条件难以明确算法优劣，其中预期Sarsa展现最快学习速度。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可有效解决古代复杂游戏问题，预期Sarsa在资源有限场景下具有更优的学习效率。

authors_text: Alzayat Saleh,Marcus Sheaves,Dean Jerry,Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
title: How to Track and Segment Fish without Human Annotations: A Self-Supervised Deep Learning Approach
title_zh: 如何在没有人工注释的情况下跟踪和分割鱼：一种自我监督的深度学习方法
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures. Published at Pattern Analysis and Applications journal
comments: 22 pages, 11 figures. Published at Pattern Analysis and Applications journal
abstract: Tracking fish movements and sizes of fish is crucial to understanding their ecology and behaviour. Knowing where fish migrate, how they interact with their environment, and how their size affects their behaviour can help ecologists develop more effective conservation and management strategies to protect fish populations and their habitats. Deep learning is a promising tool to analyze fish ecology from underwater videos. However, training deep neural networks (DNNs) for fish tracking and segmentation requires high-quality labels, which are expensive to obtain. We propose an alternative unsupervised approach that relies on spatial and temporal variations in video data to generate noisy pseudo-ground-truth labels. We train a multitask DNN using these pseudo-labels. Our framework consists of three stages: (1) an optical flow model generates the pseudo labels using spatial and temporal consistency between frames, (2) a self-supervised model refines the pseudo-labels incrementally, and (3) a segmentation network uses the refined labels for training. Consequently, we perform extensive experiments to validate our method on three public underwater video datasets and demonstrate its effectiveness for video annotation and segmentation. We also evaluate its robustness to different imaging conditions and discuss its limitations.
summary: Tracking fish movements and sizes of fish is crucial to understanding their ecology and behaviour. Knowing where fish migrate, how they interact with their environment, and how their size affects their behaviour can help ecologists develop more effective conservation and management strategies to protect fish populations and their habitats. Deep learning is a promising tool to analyze fish ecology from underwater videos. However, training deep neural networks (DNNs) for fish tracking and segmentation requires high-quality labels, which are expensive to obtain. We propose an alternative unsupervised approach that relies on spatial and temporal variations in video data to generate noisy pseudo-ground-truth labels. We train a multitask DNN using these pseudo-labels. Our framework consists of three stages: (1) an optical flow model generates the pseudo labels using spatial and temporal consistency between frames, (2) a self-supervised model refines the pseudo-labels incrementally, and (3) a segmentation network uses the refined labels for training. Consequently, we perform extensive experiments to validate our method on three public underwater video datasets and demonstrate its effectiveness for video annotation and segmentation. We also evaluate its robustness to different imaging conditions and discuss its limitations.
abstract_zh: 跟踪鱼的运动和鱼的大小对于了解它们的生态和行为至关重要。了解鱼类迁徙的地点、它们如何与环境相互作用以及它们的体型如何影响它们的行为，可以帮助生态学家制定更有效的保护和管理策略，以保护鱼类种群及其栖息地。深度学习是一种很有前途的工具，可以通过水下视频分析鱼类生态。然而，训练用于鱼类跟踪和分割的深度神经网络 (DNN) 需要高质量的标签，而获得这些标签的成本很高。我们提出了一种替代的无监督方法，它依赖于视频数据的空间和时间变化来生成嘈杂的伪地面真实标签。我们使用这些伪标签训练多任务 DNN。我们的框架由三个阶段组成：（1）光流模型利用帧之间的空间和时间一致性生成伪标签，（2）自监督模型逐步细化伪标签，（3）分割网络使用细化的标签进行训练。因此，我们进行了大量的实验，在三个公共水下视频数据集上验证我们的方法，并证明其在视频注释和分割方面的有效性。我们还评估了它对不同成像条件的鲁棒性并讨论了它的局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自监督深度学习方法，用于追踪和分割水下视频中的鱼类。
AI.motivation: 鱼类追踪与分割对生态研究至关重要，但传统深度学习方法依赖昂贵的人工标注数据，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 三阶段框架：1）光流模型生成时空一致性的伪标签；2）自监督模型迭代优化伪标签；3）分割网络基于优化标签训练。
AI.result: 在三个水下视频数据集上验证了方法有效性，展示了对不同成像条件的鲁棒性，并分析了方法局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法降低了人工标注依赖，为水下生态研究提供可行工具，但需进一步优化复杂场景下的分割精度。

authors_text: Fan-Yun Sun,Isaac Kauvar,Ruohan Zhang,Jiachen Li,Mykel Kochenderfer,Jiajun Wu,Nick Haber
title: Interaction Modeling with Multiplex Attention
title_zh: 具有多重注意力的交互建模
abstract: Modeling multi-agent systems requires understanding how agents interact. Such systems are often difficult to model because they can involve a variety of types of interactions that layer together to drive rich social behavioral dynamics. Here we introduce a method for accurately modeling multi-agent systems. We present Interaction Modeling with Multiplex Attention (IMMA), a forward prediction model that uses a multiplex latent graph to represent multiple independent types of interactions and attention to account for relations of different strengths. We also introduce Progressive Layer Training, a training strategy for this architecture. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art models in trajectory forecasting and relation inference, spanning three multi-agent scenarios: social navigation, cooperative task achievement, and team sports. We further demonstrate that our approach can improve zero-shot generalization and allows us to probe how different interactions impact agent behavior.
summary: Modeling multi-agent systems requires understanding how agents interact. Such systems are often difficult to model because they can involve a variety of types of interactions that layer together to drive rich social behavioral dynamics. Here we introduce a method for accurately modeling multi-agent systems. We present Interaction Modeling with Multiplex Attention (IMMA), a forward prediction model that uses a multiplex latent graph to represent multiple independent types of interactions and attention to account for relations of different strengths. We also introduce Progressive Layer Training, a training strategy for this architecture. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art models in trajectory forecasting and relation inference, spanning three multi-agent scenarios: social navigation, cooperative task achievement, and team sports. We further demonstrate that our approach can improve zero-shot generalization and allows us to probe how different interactions impact agent behavior.
abstract_zh: 多智能体系统建模需要了解智能体如何交互。此类系统通常很难建模，因为它们可能涉及多种类型的交互，这些交互叠加在一起以驱动丰富的社会行为动态。这里我们介绍一种精确建模多智能体系统的方法。我们提出了多重注意力交互建模（IMMA），这是一种前向预测模型，它使用多重潜在图来表示多种独立类型的交互和注意力，以考虑不同强度的关系。我们还引入了渐进层训练（Progressive Layer Training），这是该架构的训练策略。我们表明，我们的方法在轨迹预测和关系推理方面优于最先进的模型，涵盖三个多智能体场景：社交导航、合作任务完成和团队运动。我们进一步证明我们的方法可以提高零样本泛化能力，并使我们能够探究不同的交互如何影响智能体的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IMMA的多智能体交互建模方法，通过多路注意力机制和渐进分层训练策略，解决复杂社会行为动态建模难题。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统因交互类型多样且层次复杂，现有模型难以准确捕捉不同强度的交互关系，导致轨迹预测和关系推理效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多路潜在图表示独立交互类型，结合注意力机制处理关系强度差异，并引入渐进分层训练策略优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在社交导航、协作任务和团队运动三个场景中，IMMA在轨迹预测和关系推理任务上优于现有方法，且提升零样本泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: IMMA通过多路注意力机制有效建模多智能体交互，验证了其在复杂场景下的优越性，并为分析交互对行为的影响提供新视角。
