search_text: Interaction Modeling with Multiplex Attention 具有多重注意力的交互建模 Modeling multi-agent systems requires understanding how agents interact. Such systems are often difficult to model because they can involve a variety of types of interactions that layer together to drive rich social behavioral dynamics. Here we introduce a method for accurately modeling multi-agent systems. We present Interaction Modeling with Multiplex Attention (IMMA), a forward prediction model that uses a multiplex latent graph to represent multiple independent types of interactions and attention to account for relations of different strengths. We also introduce Progressive Layer Training, a training strategy for this architecture. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art models in trajectory forecasting and relation inference, spanning three multi-agent scenarios: social navigation, cooperative task achievement, and team sports. We further demonstrate that our approach can improve zero-shot generalization and allows us to probe how different interactions impact agent behavior. 多智能体系统建模需要了解智能体如何交互。此类系统通常很难建模，因为它们可能涉及多种类型的交互，这些交互叠加在一起以驱动丰富的社会行为动态。这里我们介绍一种精确建模多智能体系统的方法。我们提出了多重注意力交互建模（IMMA），这是一种前向预测模型，它使用多重潜在图来表示多种独立类型的交互和注意力，以考虑不同强度的关系。我们还引入了渐进层训练（Progressive Layer Training），这是该架构的训练策略。我们表明，我们的方法在轨迹预测和关系推理方面优于最先进的模型，涵盖三个多智能体场景：社交导航、合作任务完成和团队运动。我们进一步证明我们的方法可以提高零样本泛化能力，并使我们能够探究不同的交互如何影响智能体的行为。 本文提出一种名为IMMA的多智能体交互建模方法，通过多路注意力机制和渐进分层训练策略，解决复杂社会行为动态建模难题。 Fan-Yun Sun,Isaac Kauvar,Ruohan Zhang,Jiachen Li,Mykel Kochenderfer,Jiajun Wu,Nick Haber cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Prabhjot Kaur,Qifan Wang,Weisong Shi
title: Fall Detection from Audios with Audio Transformers
title_zh: 使用音频变压器从音频进行跌倒检测
abstract: Fall detection for the elderly is a well-researched problem with several proposed solutions, including wearable and non-wearable techniques. While the existing techniques have excellent detection rates, their adoption by the target population is lacking due to the need for wearing devices and user privacy concerns. Our paper provides a novel, non-wearable, non-intrusive, and scalable solution for fall detection, deployed on an autonomous mobile robot equipped with a microphone. The proposed method uses ambient sound input recorded in people's homes. We specifically target the bathroom environment as it is highly prone to falls and where existing techniques cannot be deployed without jeopardizing user privacy. The present work develops a solution based on a Transformer architecture that takes noisy sound input from bathrooms and classifies it into fall/no-fall class with an accuracy of 0.8673. Further, the proposed approach is extendable to other indoor environments, besides bathrooms and is suitable for deploying in elderly homes, hospitals, and rehabilitation facilities without requiring the user to wear any device or be constantly "watched" by the sensors.
summary: Fall detection for the elderly is a well-researched problem with several proposed solutions, including wearable and non-wearable techniques. While the existing techniques have excellent detection rates, their adoption by the target population is lacking due to the need for wearing devices and user privacy concerns. Our paper provides a novel, non-wearable, non-intrusive, and scalable solution for fall detection, deployed on an autonomous mobile robot equipped with a microphone. The proposed method uses ambient sound input recorded in people's homes. We specifically target the bathroom environment as it is highly prone to falls and where existing techniques cannot be deployed without jeopardizing user privacy. The present work develops a solution based on a Transformer architecture that takes noisy sound input from bathrooms and classifies it into fall/no-fall class with an accuracy of 0.8673. Further, the proposed approach is extendable to other indoor environments, besides bathrooms and is suitable for deploying in elderly homes, hospitals, and rehabilitation facilities without requiring the user to wear any device or be constantly "watched" by the sensors.
abstract_zh: 老年人跌倒检测是一个经过深入研究的问题，提出了多种解决方案，包括可穿戴和非可穿戴技术。虽然现有技术具有出色的检测率，但由于需要穿戴设备和用户隐私问题，目标人群并未采用它们。我们的论文提供了一种新颖的、非可穿戴的、非侵入性的、可扩展的跌倒检测解决方案，部署在配备麦克风的自主移动机器人上。所提出的方法使用在人们家中记录的环境声音输入。我们特别针对浴室环境，因为它很容易跌倒，而且现有技术无法在不损害用户隐私的情况下部署。目前的工作开发了一种基于 Transformer 架构的解决方案，该解决方案接收来自浴室的噪音输入，并将其分类为跌倒/无跌倒类别，精度为 0.8673。此外，所提出的方法可以扩展到浴室之外的其他室内环境，并且适合部署在老人院、医院和康复设施中，而不需要用户佩戴任何设备或不断地被传感器“监视”。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频Transformer的非接触式跌倒检测方法，通过部署在自主移动机器人上的麦克风采集浴室等隐私敏感环境的音频信号，实现跌倒分类。
AI.motivation: 现有跌倒检测技术因需佩戴设备及隐私问题导致老年群体接受度低，而浴室等隐私敏感区域缺乏有效监测手段。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构处理浴室环境下的噪声音频输入，通过声学特征分析实现跌倒/非跌倒二分类。
AI.result: 在浴室场景下达到0.8673的分类准确率，方法可扩展至其他室内环境且无需用户佩戴设备。
AI.conclusion: 该非侵入式音频监测方案有效解决了隐私矛盾，在养老机构等场景具有部署价值。

authors_text: Nan Li,Lianbo Ma,Guo Yu,Bing Xue,Mengjie Zhang,Yaochu Jin
title: Survey on Evolutionary Deep Learning: Principles, Algorithms, Applications and Open Issues
title_zh: 进化深度学习综述：原理、算法、应用和开放问题
abstract: Over recent years, there has been a rapid development of deep learning (DL) in both industry and academia fields. However, finding the optimal hyperparameters of a DL model often needs high computational cost and human expertise. To mitigate the above issue, evolutionary computation (EC) as a powerful heuristic search approach has shown significant merits in the automated design of DL models, so-called evolutionary deep learning (EDL). This paper aims to analyze EDL from the perspective of automated machine learning (AutoML). Specifically, we firstly illuminate EDL from machine learning and EC and regard EDL as an optimization problem. According to the DL pipeline, we systematically introduce EDL methods ranging from feature engineering, model generation, to model deployment with a new taxonomy (i.e., what and how to evolve/optimize), and focus on the discussions of solution representation and search paradigm in handling the optimization problem by EC. Finally, key applications, open issues and potentially promising lines of future research are suggested. This survey has reviewed recent developments of EDL and offers insightful guidelines for the development of EDL.
summary: Over recent years, there has been a rapid development of deep learning (DL) in both industry and academia fields. However, finding the optimal hyperparameters of a DL model often needs high computational cost and human expertise. To mitigate the above issue, evolutionary computation (EC) as a powerful heuristic search approach has shown significant merits in the automated design of DL models, so-called evolutionary deep learning (EDL). This paper aims to analyze EDL from the perspective of automated machine learning (AutoML). Specifically, we firstly illuminate EDL from machine learning and EC and regard EDL as an optimization problem. According to the DL pipeline, we systematically introduce EDL methods ranging from feature engineering, model generation, to model deployment with a new taxonomy (i.e., what and how to evolve/optimize), and focus on the discussions of solution representation and search paradigm in handling the optimization problem by EC. Finally, key applications, open issues and potentially promising lines of future research are suggested. This survey has reviewed recent developments of EDL and offers insightful guidelines for the development of EDL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习（DL）在工业界和学术界都得到了快速发展。然而，寻找深度学习模型的最佳超参数通常需要高昂的计算成本和人类专业知识。为了缓解上述问题，进化计算 (EC) 作为一种强大的启发式搜索方法，在 DL 模型的自动化设计（即所谓的进化深度学习 (EDL)）中显示出了显着的优点。本文旨在从自动化机器学习（AutoML）的角度来分析EDL。具体来说，我们首先从机器学习和EC来阐释EDL，并将EDL视为优化问题。根据深度学习管道，我们系统地介绍了 EDL 方法，从特征工程、模型生成到具有新分类法（即进化/优化的内容和方式）的模型部署，并重点讨论了 EC 处理优化问题时的解决方案表示和搜索范式。最后，提出了关键应用、悬而未决的问题和未来研究的潜在前景。这项调查回顾了 EDL 的最新发展，并为 EDL 的发展提供了富有洞察力的指南。

AI.tldr: 综述进化深度学习（EDL）的原理、算法、应用及开放问题，系统分析其在自动化机器学习中的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 解决深度学习模型超参数优化的高成本与高专业性依赖问题，通过进化计算实现自动化设计。
AI.method: 基于深度学习流程，系统分类EDL方法，提出新分类法（what and how to evolve），并分析解决方案表示与搜索范式。
AI.result: 回顾了EDL的最新进展，提供了自动化机器学习中EDL发展的见解与指导。
AI.conclusion: EDL在自动化深度学习中具有潜力，但仍需解决开放问题，未来研究需关注应用拓展与算法优化。

motivation: 解决深度学习模型超参数优化的高成本与高专业性依赖问题，通过进化计算实现自动化设计。
method: 基于深度学习流程，系统分类EDL方法，提出新分类法（what and how to evolve），并分析解决方案表示与搜索范式。
result: 回顾了EDL的最新进展，提供了自动化机器学习中EDL发展的见解与指导。
conclusion: EDL在自动化深度学习中具有潜力，但仍需解决开放问题，未来研究需关注应用拓展与算法优化。
search_text: Survey on Evolutionary Deep Learning: Principles, Algorithms, Applications and Open Issues 进化深度学习综述：原理、算法、应用和开放问题 Over recent years, there has been a rapid development of deep learning (DL) in both industry and academia fields. However, finding the optimal hyperparameters of a DL model often needs high computational cost and human expertise. To mitigate the above issue, evolutionary computation (EC) as a powerful heuristic search approach has shown significant merits in the automated design of DL models, so-called evolutionary deep learning (EDL). This paper aims to analyze EDL from the perspective of automated machine learning (AutoML). Specifically, we firstly illuminate EDL from machine learning and EC and regard EDL as an optimization problem. According to the DL pipeline, we systematically introduce EDL methods ranging from feature engineering, model generation, to model deployment with a new taxonomy (i.e., what and how to evolve/optimize), and focus on the discussions of solution representation and search paradigm in handling the optimization problem by EC. Finally, key applications, open issues and potentially promising lines of future research are suggested. This survey has reviewed recent developments of EDL and offers insightful guidelines for the development of EDL. 近年来，深度学习（DL）在工业界和学术界都得到了快速发展。然而，寻找深度学习模型的最佳超参数通常需要高昂的计算成本和人类专业知识。为了缓解上述问题，进化计算 (EC) 作为一种强大的启发式搜索方法，在 DL 模型的自动化设计（即所谓的进化深度学习 (EDL)）中显示出了显着的优点。本文旨在从自动化机器学习（AutoML）的角度来分析EDL。具体来说，我们首先从机器学习和EC来阐释EDL，并将EDL视为优化问题。根据深度学习管道，我们系统地介绍了 EDL 方法，从特征工程、模型生成到具有新分类法（即进化/优化的内容和方式）的模型部署，并重点讨论了 EC 处理优化问题时的解决方案表示和搜索范式。最后，提出了关键应用、悬而未决的问题和未来研究的潜在前景。这项调查回顾了 EDL 的最新发展，并为 EDL 的发展提供了富有洞察力的指南。 综述进化深度学习（EDL）的原理、算法、应用及开放问题，系统分析其在自动化机器学习中的优化方法。 Nan Li,Lianbo Ma,Guo Yu,Bing Xue,Mengjie Zhang,Yaochu Jin cs.NE

authors_text: Rayson Laroca,Marcelo Santos,Valter Estevam,Eduardo Luz,David Menotti
title: A First Look at Dataset Bias in License Plate Recognition
title_zh: 车牌识别中的数据集偏差初探
comment: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Graphics, Patterns and Images (SIBGRAPI) 2022
comments: Accepted for presentation at the Conference on Graphics, Patterns and Images (SIBGRAPI) 2022
abstract: Public datasets have played a key role in advancing the state of the art in License Plate Recognition (LPR). Although dataset bias has been recognized as a severe problem in the computer vision community, it has been largely overlooked in the LPR literature. LPR models are usually trained and evaluated separately on each dataset. In this scenario, they have often proven robust in the dataset they were trained in but showed limited performance in unseen ones. Therefore, this work investigates the dataset bias problem in the LPR context. We performed experiments on eight datasets, four collected in Brazil and four in mainland China, and observed that each dataset has a unique, identifiable "signature" since a lightweight classification model predicts the source dataset of a license plate (LP) image with more than 95% accuracy. In our discussion, we draw attention to the fact that most LPR models are probably exploiting such signatures to improve the results achieved in each dataset at the cost of losing generalization capability. These results emphasize the importance of evaluating LPR models in cross-dataset setups, as they provide a better indication of generalization (hence real-world performance) than within-dataset ones.
summary: Public datasets have played a key role in advancing the state of the art in License Plate Recognition (LPR). Although dataset bias has been recognized as a severe problem in the computer vision community, it has been largely overlooked in the LPR literature. LPR models are usually trained and evaluated separately on each dataset. In this scenario, they have often proven robust in the dataset they were trained in but showed limited performance in unseen ones. Therefore, this work investigates the dataset bias problem in the LPR context. We performed experiments on eight datasets, four collected in Brazil and four in mainland China, and observed that each dataset has a unique, identifiable "signature" since a lightweight classification model predicts the source dataset of a license plate (LP) image with more than 95% accuracy. In our discussion, we draw attention to the fact that most LPR models are probably exploiting such signatures to improve the results achieved in each dataset at the cost of losing generalization capability. These results emphasize the importance of evaluating LPR models in cross-dataset setups, as they provide a better indication of generalization (hence real-world performance) than within-dataset ones.
abstract_zh: 公共数据集在推进车牌识别 (LPR) 技术发展方面发挥了关键作用。尽管数据集偏差已被认为是计算机视觉界的一个严重问题，但在 LPR 文献中它在很大程度上被忽视了。 LPR 模型通常在每个数据集上单独训练和评估。在这种情况下，它们通常在所训练的数据集中表现出稳健性，但在看不见的数据集中表现出有限的性能。因此，这项工作研究了 LPR 背景下的数据集偏差问题。我们对八个数据集（四个在巴西收集，四个在中国大陆收集）进行了实验，并观察到每个数据集都有一个独特的、可识别的“签名”，因为轻量级分类模型以超过 95% 的准确率预测车牌 (LP) 图像的源数据集。在我们的讨论中，我们提请注意这样一个事实：大多数 LPR 模型可能正在利用此类签名来改善每个数据集中取得的结果，但代价是失去泛化能力。这些结果强调了在跨数据集设置中评估 LPR 模型的重要性，因为它们比数据集内模型提供了更好的泛化指示（因此是真实世界的性能）。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了车牌识别（LPR）中的数据集偏差问题，通过分析来自巴西和中国八个数据集的特征，发现每个数据集具有独特的可识别特征，导致模型在跨数据集测试中表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 尽管数据集偏差是计算机视觉领域的已知问题，但LPR领域长期忽视这一问题，导致模型在训练数据集上表现良好却难以泛化到新数据集。
AI.method: 在八个数据集（巴西4个、中国4个）上进行实验，使用轻量级分类模型预测车牌图像来源数据集，准确率超过95%，揭示数据集特有特征被模型利用的现象。
AI.result: 每个数据集存在独特且可识别的'签名'特征，LPR模型通过利用这些特征提升单数据集性能，但牺牲了跨数据集的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 强调需通过跨数据集评估来测试LPR模型的泛化能力，以更真实反映其实际应用表现。

search_text: A First Look at Dataset Bias in License Plate Recognition 车牌识别中的数据集偏差初探 Public datasets have played a key role in advancing the state of the art in License Plate Recognition (LPR). Although dataset bias has been recognized as a severe problem in the computer vision community, it has been largely overlooked in the LPR literature. LPR models are usually trained and evaluated separately on each dataset. In this scenario, they have often proven robust in the dataset they were trained in but showed limited performance in unseen ones. Therefore, this work investigates the dataset bias problem in the LPR context. We performed experiments on eight datasets, four collected in Brazil and four in mainland China, and observed that each dataset has a unique, identifiable "signature" since a lightweight classification model predicts the source dataset of a license plate (LP) image with more than 95% accuracy. In our discussion, we draw attention to the fact that most LPR models are probably exploiting such signatures to improve the results achieved in each dataset at the cost of losing generalization capability. These results emphasize the importance of evaluating LPR models in cross-dataset setups, as they provide a better indication of generalization (hence real-world performance) than within-dataset ones. 公共数据集在推进车牌识别 (LPR) 技术发展方面发挥了关键作用。尽管数据集偏差已被认为是计算机视觉界的一个严重问题，但在 LPR 文献中它在很大程度上被忽视了。 LPR 模型通常在每个数据集上单独训练和评估。在这种情况下，它们通常在所训练的数据集中表现出稳健性，但在看不见的数据集中表现出有限的性能。因此，这项工作研究了 LPR 背景下的数据集偏差问题。我们对八个数据集（四个在巴西收集，四个在中国大陆收集）进行了实验，并观察到每个数据集都有一个独特的、可识别的“签名”，因为轻量级分类模型以超过 95% 的准确率预测车牌 (LP) 图像的源数据集。在我们的讨论中，我们提请注意这样一个事实：大多数 LPR 模型可能正在利用此类签名来改善每个数据集中取得的结果，但代价是失去泛化能力。这些结果强调了在跨数据集设置中评估 LPR 模型的重要性，因为它们比数据集内模型提供了更好的泛化指示（因此是真实世界的性能）。 本文研究了车牌识别（LPR）中的数据集偏差问题，通过分析来自巴西和中国八个数据集的特征，发现每个数据集具有独特的可识别特征，导致模型在跨数据集测试中表现不佳。 Rayson Laroca,Marcelo Santos,Valter Estevam,Eduardo Luz,David Menotti cs.CV

authors_text: Chun-Han Yao,Jimei Yang,Duygu Ceylan,Yi Zhou,Yang Zhou,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: Learning Visibility for Robust Dense Human Body Estimation
title_zh: 学习稳健密集人体估计的可见性
abstract: Estimating 3D human pose and shape from 2D images is a crucial yet challenging task. While prior methods with model-based representations can perform reasonably well on whole-body images, they often fail when parts of the body are occluded or outside the frame. Moreover, these results usually do not faithfully capture the human silhouettes due to their limited representation power of deformable models (e.g., representing only the naked body). An alternative approach is to estimate dense vertices of a predefined template body in the image space. Such representations are effective in localizing vertices within an image but cannot handle out-of-frame body parts. In this work, we learn dense human body estimation that is robust to partial observations. We explicitly model the visibility of human joints and vertices in the x, y, and z axes separately. The visibility in x and y axes help distinguishing out-of-frame cases, and the visibility in depth axis corresponds to occlusions (either self-occlusions or occlusions by other objects). We obtain pseudo ground-truths of visibility labels from dense UV correspondences and train a neural network to predict visibility along with 3D coordinates. We show that visibility can serve as 1) an additional signal to resolve depth ordering ambiguities of self-occluded vertices and 2) a regularization term when fitting a human body model to the predictions. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D human datasets demonstrate that visibility modeling significantly improves the accuracy of human body estimation, especially for partial-body cases. Our project page with code is at: https://github.com/chhankyao/visdb.
summary: Estimating 3D human pose and shape from 2D images is a crucial yet challenging task. While prior methods with model-based representations can perform reasonably well on whole-body images, they often fail when parts of the body are occluded or outside the frame. Moreover, these results usually do not faithfully capture the human silhouettes due to their limited representation power of deformable models (e.g., representing only the naked body). An alternative approach is to estimate dense vertices of a predefined template body in the image space. Such representations are effective in localizing vertices within an image but cannot handle out-of-frame body parts. In this work, we learn dense human body estimation that is robust to partial observations. We explicitly model the visibility of human joints and vertices in the x, y, and z axes separately. The visibility in x and y axes help distinguishing out-of-frame cases, and the visibility in depth axis corresponds to occlusions (either self-occlusions or occlusions by other objects). We obtain pseudo ground-truths of visibility labels from dense UV correspondences and train a neural network to predict visibility along with 3D coordinates. We show that visibility can serve as 1) an additional signal to resolve depth ordering ambiguities of self-occluded vertices and 2) a regularization term when fitting a human body model to the predictions. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D human datasets demonstrate that visibility modeling significantly improves the accuracy of human body estimation, especially for partial-body cases. Our project page with code is at: https://github.com/chhankyao/visdb.
abstract_zh: 从 2D 图像估计 3D 人体姿势和形状是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。虽然现有的基于模型表示的方法可以在全身图像上表现得相当好，但当身体的某些部分被遮挡或在框架之外时，它们通常会失败。此外，由于可变形模型的表示能力有限（例如，仅表示裸体），这些结果通常不能忠实地捕捉人体轮廓。另一种方法是估计图像空间中预定义模板主体的密集顶点。这种表示可以有效地定位图像内的顶点，但无法处理框架外的身体部位。在这项工作中，我们学习了对部分观察具有鲁棒性的密集人体估计。我们分别对人体关节和顶点在 x、y 和 z 轴上的可见性进行显式建模。 x 轴和 y 轴的可见性有助于区分框架外的情况，深度轴的可见性对应于遮挡（自遮挡或其他对象的遮挡）。我们从密集的 UV 对应关系中获取可见性标签的伪地面事实，并训练神经网络来预测可见性以及 3D 坐标。我们表明，可见性可以充当：1）解决自遮挡顶点的深度排序模糊性的附加信号；2）将人体模型拟合到预测时的正则化项。对多个 3D 人体数据集的大量实验表明，可见性建模显着提高了人体估计的准确性，特别是对于部分身体情况。我们的项目页面及其代码位于：https://github.com/chhankyao/visdb。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种通过学习人体可见性来提升密集人体估计鲁棒性的方法，以解决部分遮挡和身体部位超出画面的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于模型的方法在处理遮挡或身体部位超出画面时表现不佳，且无法准确捕捉人体轮廓；而基于预定义模板的方法虽能定位图像内顶点，但无法处理超出画面的部分。
AI.method: 分别建模人体关节和顶点在x、y、z轴的可见性：x/y轴可见性用于区分超出画面的情况，z轴可见性对应遮挡。通过密集UV对应生成伪标签，训练神经网络联合预测3D坐标与可见性，并将可见性作为正则化项优化人体模型拟合。
AI.result: 在多个3D人体数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了人体估计精度，尤其在部分身体观测场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 可见性建模能有效解决自遮挡深度歧义问题，并作为正则化项提升人体模型拟合效果，为鲁棒密集人体估计提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Visibility for Robust Dense Human Body Estimation 学习稳健密集人体估计的可见性 Estimating 3D human pose and shape from 2D images is a crucial yet challenging task. While prior methods with model-based representations can perform reasonably well on whole-body images, they often fail when parts of the body are occluded or outside the frame. Moreover, these results usually do not faithfully capture the human silhouettes due to their limited representation power of deformable models (e.g., representing only the naked body). An alternative approach is to estimate dense vertices of a predefined template body in the image space. Such representations are effective in localizing vertices within an image but cannot handle out-of-frame body parts. In this work, we learn dense human body estimation that is robust to partial observations. We explicitly model the visibility of human joints and vertices in the x, y, and z axes separately. The visibility in x and y axes help distinguishing out-of-frame cases, and the visibility in depth axis corresponds to occlusions (either self-occlusions or occlusions by other objects). We obtain pseudo ground-truths of visibility labels from dense UV correspondences and train a neural network to predict visibility along with 3D coordinates. We show that visibility can serve as 1) an additional signal to resolve depth ordering ambiguities of self-occluded vertices and 2) a regularization term when fitting a human body model to the predictions. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D human datasets demonstrate that visibility modeling significantly improves the accuracy of human body estimation, especially for partial-body cases. Our project page with code is at: https://github.com/chhankyao/visdb. 从 2D 图像估计 3D 人体姿势和形状是一项至关重要但具有挑战性的任务。虽然现有的基于模型表示的方法可以在全身图像上表现得相当好，但当身体的某些部分被遮挡或在框架之外时，它们通常会失败。此外，由于可变形模型的表示能力有限（例如，仅表示裸体），这些结果通常不能忠实地捕捉人体轮廓。另一种方法是估计图像空间中预定义模板主体的密集顶点。这种表示可以有效地定位图像内的顶点，但无法处理框架外的身体部位。在这项工作中，我们学习了对部分观察具有鲁棒性的密集人体估计。我们分别对人体关节和顶点在 x、y 和 z 轴上的可见性进行显式建模。 x 轴和 y 轴的可见性有助于区分框架外的情况，深度轴的可见性对应于遮挡（自遮挡或其他对象的遮挡）。我们从密集的 UV 对应关系中获取可见性标签的伪地面事实，并训练神经网络来预测可见性以及 3D 坐标。我们表明，可见性可以充当：1）解决自遮挡顶点的深度排序模糊性的附加信号；2）将人体模型拟合到预测时的正则化项。对多个 3D 人体数据集的大量实验表明，可见性建模显着提高了人体估计的准确性，特别是对于部分身体情况。我们的项目页面及其代码位于：https://github.com/chhankyao/visdb。 本论文提出了一种通过学习人体可见性来提升密集人体估计鲁棒性的方法，以解决部分遮挡和身体部位超出画面的问题。 Chun-Han Yao,Jimei Yang,Duygu Ceylan,Yi Zhou,Yang Zhou,Ming-Hsuan Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Yuan Deng,Jieming Mao,Vahab Mirrokni,Hanrui Zhang,Song Zuo
title: Efficiency of the First-Price Auction in the Autobidding World
title_zh: 自动竞价领域首价拍卖的效率
abstract: We study the price of anarchy of the first-price auction in the autobidding world, where bidders can be either utility maximizers (i.e., traditional bidders) or value maximizers (i.e., autobidders). We show that with autobidders only, the price of anarchy of the first-price auction is $1/2$, and with both kinds of bidders, the price of anarchy degrades to about $0.457$ (the precise number is given by an optimization). These results complement the recent result by Jin and Lu [2022] showing that the price of anarchy of the first-price auction with traditional bidders only is $1 - 1/e^2$. We further investigate a setting where the seller can utilize machine-learned advice to improve the efficiency of the auctions. There, we show that as the accuracy of the advice increases, the price of anarchy improves smoothly from about $0.457$ to $1$.
summary: We study the price of anarchy of the first-price auction in the autobidding world, where bidders can be either utility maximizers (i.e., traditional bidders) or value maximizers (i.e., autobidders). We show that with autobidders only, the price of anarchy of the first-price auction is $1/2$, and with both kinds of bidders, the price of anarchy degrades to about $0.457$ (the precise number is given by an optimization). These results complement the recent result by Jin and Lu [2022] showing that the price of anarchy of the first-price auction with traditional bidders only is $1 - 1/e^2$. We further investigate a setting where the seller can utilize machine-learned advice to improve the efficiency of the auctions. There, we show that as the accuracy of the advice increases, the price of anarchy improves smoothly from about $0.457$ to $1$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究自动投标世界中最高价格拍卖的无政府状态的价格，其中投标人可以是效用最大化者（即传统投标者）或价值最大化者（即自动投标者）。我们表明，仅对于自动投标人，第一价格拍卖的无政府状态价格为 $1/2$，对于两种投标人，无政府状态价格都会降低至约 $0.457$（精确数字由优化给出）。这些结果补充了 Jin 和 Lu [2022] 的最新结果，该结果显示仅由传统投标人进行的第一价格拍卖的无政府状态价格为 1 - 1/e^2$。我们进一步研究了卖家可以利用机器学习建议来提高拍卖效率的设置。在那里，我们表明，随着建议准确性的提高，无政府状态的价格从大约 0.457 美元平稳提高到 1 美元。

AI.tldr: 研究一阶拍卖在自动竞价环境下的效率，分析不同竞标者类型对价格无效率的影响，并探讨机器学习建议的优化效果。
AI.motivation: 自动竞价（autobidding）的普及改变了传统拍卖环境，需重新评估一阶拍卖的效率及价格无效率，尤其在混合竞标者场景下的表现。
AI.method: 通过博弈论分析纳什均衡，结合优化方法计算价格无效率，并引入机器学习建议的模拟框架验证效率提升。
AI.result: 仅自动竞标者时价格无效率为1/2，混合竞标者下降至约0.457；机器学习建议准确性提升可使价格无效率从0.457平滑恢复至1。
AI.conclusion: 自动竞价环境显著降低拍卖效率，但通过精准的机器学习建议可有效缓解效率损失，接近理想最优状态。

authors_text: Justin J. Page,Laura K. Treers,Steven Jens Jorgensen,Ronald S. Fearing,Hannah S. Stuart
title: The Robustness of Tether Friction in Non-idealized Terrains
title_zh: 非理想地形中系绳摩擦的鲁棒性
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Reduced traction limits the ability of mobile robotic systems to resist or apply large external loads, such as tugging a massive payload. One simple and versatile solution is to wrap a tether around naturally occurring objects to leverage the capstan effect and create exponentially-amplified holding forces. Experiments show that an idealized capstan model explains force amplification experienced on common irregular outdoor objects - trees, rocks, posts. Robust to variable environmental conditions, this exponential amplification method can harness single or multiple capstan objects, either in series or in parallel with a team of robots. This adaptability allows for a range of potential configurations especially useful for when objects cannot be fully encircled or gripped. These principles are demonstrated with mobile platforms to (1) control the lowering and arrest of a payload, (2) to achieve planar control of a payload, and (3) to act as an anchor point for a more massive platform to winch towards. We show the simple addition of a tether, wrapped around shallow stones in sand, amplifies holding force of a low-traction platform by up to 774x.
summary: Reduced traction limits the ability of mobile robotic systems to resist or apply large external loads, such as tugging a massive payload. One simple and versatile solution is to wrap a tether around naturally occurring objects to leverage the capstan effect and create exponentially-amplified holding forces. Experiments show that an idealized capstan model explains force amplification experienced on common irregular outdoor objects - trees, rocks, posts. Robust to variable environmental conditions, this exponential amplification method can harness single or multiple capstan objects, either in series or in parallel with a team of robots. This adaptability allows for a range of potential configurations especially useful for when objects cannot be fully encircled or gripped. These principles are demonstrated with mobile platforms to (1) control the lowering and arrest of a payload, (2) to achieve planar control of a payload, and (3) to act as an anchor point for a more massive platform to winch towards. We show the simple addition of a tether, wrapped around shallow stones in sand, amplifies holding force of a low-traction platform by up to 774x.
abstract_zh: 牵引力的减小限制了移动机器人系统抵抗或施加较大外部负载（例如牵引大量有效负载）的能力。一种简单且通用的解决方案是将系绳缠绕在自然物体上，以利用绞盘效应并产生指数级放大的固定力。实验表明，理想化的绞盘模型可以解释常见的不规则户外物体（树木、岩石、柱子）所经历的力放大。这种指数放大方法对可变的环境条件具有鲁棒性，可以利用单个或多个绞盘物体，与一组机器人串联或并联。这种适应性允许一系列潜在的配置，当物体无法完全包围或抓住时特别有用。这些原理通过移动平台进行了演示，以（1）控制有效负载的降低和制动，（2）实现有效负载的平面控制，以及（3）充当更大的平台绞车的锚点。我们展示了简单地添加一条系绳，将其缠绕在沙子中的浅石上，可将低牵引力平台的保持力增强高达 774 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在非理想地形中利用绳索摩擦力（卡普坦效应）增强移动机器人牵引力的方法，通过实验验证其在复杂环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人在低牵引力地形中难以应对大负载，传统抓握方式受限于环境障碍物形态，需开发无需完全包裹物体的通用增强方案。
AI.method: 通过实验测试绳索缠绕天然物体（树、石块等）的摩擦力放大效应，结合单/多物体串联并联配置，验证其在负载控制、平面操控及锚定功能中的适用性。
AI.result: 实验表明，绳索缠绕沙地浅层石块可使低牵引力平台的抓持力提升774倍，且该方法对环境变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 基于绳索摩擦力的指数放大机制为机器人提供了适应复杂地形的通用负载处理方案，无需精密抓取即可实现大负载操控。

authors_text: Zeyu Fu,Jianbo Jiao,Robail Yasrab,Lior Drukker,Aris T. Papageorghiou,J. Alison Noble
title: Anatomy-Aware Contrastive Representation Learning for Fetal Ultrasound
title_zh: 胎儿超声的解剖感知对比表征学习
abstract: Self-supervised contrastive representation learning offers the advantage of learning meaningful visual representations from unlabeled medical datasets for transfer learning. However, applying current contrastive learning approaches to medical data without considering its domain-specific anatomical characteristics may lead to visual representations that are inconsistent in appearance and semantics. In this paper, we propose to improve visual representations of medical images via anatomy-aware contrastive learning (AWCL), which incorporates anatomy information to augment the positive/negative pair sampling in a contrastive learning manner. The proposed approach is demonstrated for automated fetal ultrasound imaging tasks, enabling the positive pairs from the same or different ultrasound scans that are anatomically similar to be pulled together and thus improving the representation learning. We empirically investigate the effect of inclusion of anatomy information with coarse- and fine-grained granularity, for contrastive learning and find that learning with fine-grained anatomy information which preserves intra-class difference is more effective than its counterpart. We also analyze the impact of anatomy ratio on our AWCL framework and find that using more distinct but anatomically similar samples to compose positive pairs results in better quality representations. Experiments on a large-scale fetal ultrasound dataset demonstrate that our approach is effective for learning representations that transfer well to three clinical downstream tasks, and achieves superior performance compared to ImageNet supervised and the current state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods. In particular, AWCL outperforms ImageNet supervised method by 13.8% and state-of-the-art contrastive-based method by 7.1% on a cross-domain segmentation task.
summary: Self-supervised contrastive representation learning offers the advantage of learning meaningful visual representations from unlabeled medical datasets for transfer learning. However, applying current contrastive learning approaches to medical data without considering its domain-specific anatomical characteristics may lead to visual representations that are inconsistent in appearance and semantics. In this paper, we propose to improve visual representations of medical images via anatomy-aware contrastive learning (AWCL), which incorporates anatomy information to augment the positive/negative pair sampling in a contrastive learning manner. The proposed approach is demonstrated for automated fetal ultrasound imaging tasks, enabling the positive pairs from the same or different ultrasound scans that are anatomically similar to be pulled together and thus improving the representation learning. We empirically investigate the effect of inclusion of anatomy information with coarse- and fine-grained granularity, for contrastive learning and find that learning with fine-grained anatomy information which preserves intra-class difference is more effective than its counterpart. We also analyze the impact of anatomy ratio on our AWCL framework and find that using more distinct but anatomically similar samples to compose positive pairs results in better quality representations. Experiments on a large-scale fetal ultrasound dataset demonstrate that our approach is effective for learning representations that transfer well to three clinical downstream tasks, and achieves superior performance compared to ImageNet supervised and the current state-of-the-art contrastive learning methods. In particular, AWCL outperforms ImageNet supervised method by 13.8% and state-of-the-art contrastive-based method by 7.1% on a cross-domain segmentation task.
abstract_zh: 自监督对比表示学习提供了从未标记的医学数据集中学习有意义的视觉表示以进行迁移学习的优势。然而，将当前的对比学习方法应用于医学数据而不考虑其特定领域的解剖特征可能会导致外观和语义不一致的视觉表示。在本文中，我们建议通过解剖感知对比学习（AWCL）来改善医学图像的视觉表示，该学习结合解剖信息以对比学习方式增强正/负对采样。所提出的方法被证明可用于自动胎儿超声成像任务，使来自相同或不同超声扫描的解剖学上相似的阳性对能够被拉在一起，从而改善表示学习。我们实证研究了包含粗粒度和细粒度的解剖信息对于对比学习的影响，发现使用保留类内差异的细粒度解剖信息的学习比其对应的学习更有效。我们还分析了解剖学比例对 AWCL 框架的影响，发现使用更独特但解剖学上相似的样本来组成正对可以得到更好质量的表示。在大规模胎儿超声数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法对于学习表示有效，可以很好地转移到三个临床下游任务，并且与 ImageNet 监督和当前最先进的对比学习方法相比，实现了卓越的性能。特别是，在跨域分割任务上，AWCL 的性能优于 ImageNet 监督方法 13.8%，优于最先进的基于对比的方法 7.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖特征的对比表示学习方法AWCL，用于改进胎儿超声图像的表征学习，以提升临床任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在医学图像中忽略解剖特征，导致表征在外观和语义上不一致，影响下游任务性能。
AI.method: 通过结合粗粒度和细粒度解剖信息增强正负样本对采样，利用细粒度解剖信息保留类内差异，并调整解剖比例优化正样本对组成。
AI.result: 在大规模胎儿超声数据集上，AWCL在三个临床任务中优于ImageNet监督方法13.8%和现有对比学习方法7.1%，尤其在跨域分割任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 解剖感知的对比学习能有效提升医学图像表征质量，细粒度解剖信息与合理样本比例是关键因素。

authors_text: Haoyang Yang,Pratham Darrpan Mehta,Jonathan Leo,Zhiyan Zhou,Megan Dass,Anish Upadhayay,Timothy C. Slesnick,Fawwaz Shaw,Amanda Randles,Duen Horng Chau
title: Evaluating Cardiovascular Surgical Planning in Mobile Augmented Reality
title_zh: 在移动增强现实中评估心血管手术计划
abstract: Advanced surgical procedures for congenital heart diseases (CHDs) require precise planning before the surgeries. The conventional approach utilizes 3D-printing and cutting physical heart models, which is a time and resource intensive process. While rapid advances in augmented reality (AR) technologies have the potential to streamline surgical planning, there is limited research that evaluates such AR approaches with medical experts. This paper presents an evaluation with 6 experts, 4 cardiothoracic surgeons, and 2 cardiologists, from Children's Healthcare of Atlanta (CHOA) Heart Center to validate the usability and technical innovations of CardiacAR, a prototype mobile AR surgical planning application. Potential future improvements based on user feedback are also proposed to further improve the design of CardiacAR and broaden its access.
summary: Advanced surgical procedures for congenital heart diseases (CHDs) require precise planning before the surgeries. The conventional approach utilizes 3D-printing and cutting physical heart models, which is a time and resource intensive process. While rapid advances in augmented reality (AR) technologies have the potential to streamline surgical planning, there is limited research that evaluates such AR approaches with medical experts. This paper presents an evaluation with 6 experts, 4 cardiothoracic surgeons, and 2 cardiologists, from Children's Healthcare of Atlanta (CHOA) Heart Center to validate the usability and technical innovations of CardiacAR, a prototype mobile AR surgical planning application. Potential future improvements based on user feedback are also proposed to further improve the design of CardiacAR and broaden its access.
abstract_zh: 先天性心脏病 (CHD) 的高级外科手术需要在手术前进行精确的计划。传统方法利用 3D 打印和切割物理心脏模型，这是一个时间和资源密集型的过程。虽然增强现实 (AR) 技术的快速发展有可能简化手术计划，但与医学专家一起评估此类 AR 方法的研究有限。本文由来自亚特兰大儿童保健中心 (CHOA) 心脏中心的 6 名专家、4 名心胸外科医生和 2 名心脏病专家进行了评估，以验证 CardiacAR（一款原型移动 AR 手术计划应用程序）的可用性和技术创新。还提出了基于用户反馈的未来潜在改进，以进一步改进 CardiacAR 的设计并扩大其使用范围。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了移动增强现实（AR）技术在先天性心脏病手术规划中的应用，验证了CardiacAR原型系统的可用性与技术创新。
AI.motivation: 传统心脏手术规划依赖耗时的3D打印实体模型，而AR技术虽具潜力但缺乏医学专家的系统评估，需验证其临床可行性。
AI.method: 邀请6名医学专家（4名心脏外科医生和2名心脏病学家）对CardiacAR原型进行测试，收集其对系统可用性及技术改进的反馈。
AI.result: 验证了CardiacAR在手术规划中的实用性，同时根据专家反馈提出优化设计与扩展应用的建议。
AI.conclusion: 移动AR技术有望成为传统手术规划方法的补充或替代方案，未来需结合临床反馈进一步完善系统设计。

authors_text: Mojtaba Lashgari,Nishant Ravikumar,Irvin Teh,Jing-Rebecca Li,David L. Buckley,Jurgen E. Schneider,Alejandro F. Frangi
title: Three-dimensional micro-structurally informed in silico myocardium -- towards virtual imaging trials in cardiac diffusion weighted MRI
title_zh: 计算机模拟心肌中的三维微观结构——面向心脏扩散加权 MRI 的虚拟成像试验
abstract: In silico tissue models enable evaluating quantitative models of magnetic resonance imaging. This includes validating and sensitivity analysis of imaging biomarkers and tissue microstructure parameters. We propose a novel method to generate a realistic numerical phantom of myocardial microstructure. We extend previous studies accounting for the cardiomyocyte shape variability, water exchange between the cardiomyocytes (intercalated discs), myocardial microstructure disarray, and four sheetlet orientations. In the first stage of the method, cardiomyocytes and sheetlets are generated by considering the shape variability and intercalated discs in cardiomyocyte-to-cardiomyocyte connections. Sheetlets are then aggregated and oriented in the directions of interest. Our morphometric study demonstrates no significant difference ($p>0.01$) between the distribution of volume, length, and primary and secondary axes of the numerical and real (literature) cardiomyocyte data. Structural correlation analysis validates that the in-silico tissue is in the same class of disorderliness as the real tissue. Additionally, the absolute angle differences between the simulated helical angle (HA) and input HA (reference value) of the cardiomyocytes ($4.3^\circ\pm 3.1^\circ$) demonstrate a good agreement with the absolute angle difference between the measured HA using experimental cardiac diffusion tensor imaging (cDTI) and histology (reference value) reported by (Holmes et al., 2000) ($3.7^\circ\pm6.4^\circ$) and (Scollan et al., 1998) ($4.9^\circ\pm 14.6^\circ$). The angular distance between eigenvectors and sheetlet angles of the input and simulated cDTI is smaller than those between measured angles using structural tensor imaging (gold standard) and experimental cDTI. These results confirm that the proposed method can generate richer numerical phantoms for the myocardium than previous studies.

The angular distance between eigenvectors and sheetlet angles of the input and simulated cDTI is smaller than those between measured angles using structural tensor imaging (gold standard) and experimental cDTI. These results confirm that the proposed method can generate richer numerical phantoms for the myocardium than previous studies.
abstract_zh: 计算机组织模型能够评估磁共振成像的定量模型。这包括成像生物标志物和组织微观结构参数的验证和敏感性分析。我们提出了一种新方法来生成心肌微观结构的逼真数值模型。我们扩展了之前的研究，考虑了心肌细胞形状变异性、心肌细胞之间的水交换（闰盘）、心肌微结构混乱和四个小片方向。在该方法的第一阶段，通过考虑心肌细胞与心肌细胞连接中的形状变异性和闰盘来生成心肌细胞和片状细胞。然后将小张聚合并定向到感兴趣的方向。我们的形态测量研究表明，数值和真实（文献）心肌细胞数据的体积、长度以及主轴和副轴的分布之间没有显着差异（$p>0.01$）。结构相关分析验证了计算机组织与真实组织处于同一类无序状态。此外，心肌细胞的模拟螺旋角 (HA) 和输入 HA（参考值）之间的绝对角度差异 ($4.3^\circ\pm 3.1^\circ$) 与使用实验心脏扩散张量成像 (cDTI) 和组织学（参考值）（Holmes 等人，2000）报告的测量 HA 之间的绝对角度差异具有良好的一致性 ($3.7^\circ\pm6.4^\circ$) 和（Scollan 等人，1998）（$4.9^\circ\pm 14.6^\circ$）。输入和模拟 cDTI 的特征向量和小片角度之间的角距离小于使用结构张量成像（金标准）和实验 cDTI 测量的角度之间的角距离。这些结果证实，所提出的方法可以为心肌生成比以前的研究更丰富的数值模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成心肌微结构三维数值模型的新方法，用于改进心脏扩散加权MRI的虚拟成像试验。
AI.motivation: 现有心肌MRI模拟模型未能充分反映真实微结构复杂性，如心肌细胞形状变异、细胞间水分交换及纤维排列紊乱等特征。
AI.method: 通过考虑心肌细胞形状变化及连接方式生成细胞和sheetlet结构，再按目标方向聚合排列。采用形态学分析和结构相关性验证模型与真实数据的一致性。
AI.result: 数值模型与真实数据在体积、长度及主次轴分布上无显著差异（p>0.01），模拟与实际测得的螺旋角差异（4.3°±3.1°）与文献报道结果（3.7°±6.4°至4.9°±14.6°）高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该方法生成的数值phantom较以往模型更贴近真实心肌结构，可为心脏MRI生物标志物验证提供更可靠的虚拟试验平台。

search_text: Three-dimensional micro-structurally informed in silico myocardium -- towards virtual imaging trials in cardiac diffusion weighted MRI 计算机模拟心肌中的三维微观结构——面向心脏扩散加权 MRI 的虚拟成像试验 In silico tissue models enable evaluating quantitative models of magnetic resonance imaging. This includes validating and sensitivity analysis of imaging biomarkers and tissue microstructure parameters. We propose a novel method to generate a realistic numerical phantom of myocardial microstructure. We extend previous studies accounting for the cardiomyocyte shape variability, water exchange between the cardiomyocytes (intercalated discs), myocardial microstructure disarray, and four sheetlet orientations. In the first stage of the method, cardiomyocytes and sheetlets are generated by considering the shape variability and intercalated discs in cardiomyocyte-to-cardiomyocyte connections. Sheetlets are then aggregated and oriented in the directions of interest. Our morphometric study demonstrates no significant difference ($p>0.01$) between the distribution of volume, length, and primary and secondary axes of the numerical and real (literature) cardiomyocyte data. Structural correlation analysis validates that the in-silico tissue is in the same class of disorderliness as the real tissue. Additionally, the absolute angle differences between the simulated helical angle (HA) and input HA (reference value) of the cardiomyocytes ($4.3^\circ\pm 3.1^\circ$) demonstrate a good agreement with the absolute angle difference between the measured HA using experimental cardiac diffusion tensor imaging (cDTI) and histology (reference value) reported by (Holmes et al., 2000) ($3.7^\circ\pm6.4^\circ$) and (Scollan et al., 1998) ($4.9^\circ\pm 14.6^\circ$). The angular distance between eigenvectors and sheetlet angles of the input and simulated cDTI is smaller than those between measured angles using structural tensor imaging (gold standard) and experimental cDTI. These results confirm that the proposed method can generate richer numerical phantoms for the myocardium than previous studies. 计算机组织模型能够评估磁共振成像的定量模型。这包括成像生物标志物和组织微观结构参数的验证和敏感性分析。我们提出了一种新方法来生成心肌微观结构的逼真数值模型。我们扩展了之前的研究，考虑了心肌细胞形状变异性、心肌细胞之间的水交换（闰盘）、心肌微结构混乱和四个小片方向。在该方法的第一阶段，通过考虑心肌细胞与心肌细胞连接中的形状变异性和闰盘来生成心肌细胞和片状细胞。然后将小张聚合并定向到感兴趣的方向。我们的形态测量研究表明，数值和真实（文献）心肌细胞数据的体积、长度以及主轴和副轴的分布之间没有显着差异（$p>0.01$）。结构相关分析验证了计算机组织与真实组织处于同一类无序状态。此外，心肌细胞的模拟螺旋角 (HA) 和输入 HA（参考值）之间的绝对角度差异 ($4.3^\circ\pm 3.1^\circ$) 与使用实验心脏扩散张量成像 (cDTI) 和组织学（参考值）（Holmes 等人，2000）报告的测量 HA 之间的绝对角度差异具有良好的一致性 ($3.7^\circ\pm6.4^\circ$) 和（Scollan 等人，1998）（$4.9^\circ\pm 14.6^\circ$）。输入和模拟 cDTI 的特征向量和小片角度之间的角距离小于使用结构张量成像（金标准）和实验 cDTI 测量的角度之间的角距离。这些结果证实，所提出的方法可以为心肌生成比以前的研究更丰富的数值模型。 本文提出一种生成心肌微结构三维数值模型的新方法，用于改进心脏扩散加权MRI的虚拟成像试验。 Mojtaba Lashgari,Nishant Ravikumar,Irvin Teh,Jing-Rebecca Li,David L. authors_text: Joona Halkola,Markku Suomalainen,Basak Sakcak,Katherine J. Mimnaugh,Juho Kalliokoski,Alexis P. Chambers,Timo Ojala,Steven M. LaValle
title: Leaning-Based Control of an Immersive-Telepresence Robot
title_zh: 沉浸式远程呈现机器人的基于学习的控制
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE ISMAR 2022 (International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality)
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE ISMAR 2022 (International Symposium on Mixed and Augmented Reality)
abstract: In this paper, we present an implementation of a leaning-based control of a differential drive telepresence robot and a user study in simulation, with the goal of bringing the same functionality to a real telepresence robot. The participants used a balance board to control the robot and viewed the virtual environment through a head-mounted display. The main motivation for using a balance board as the control device stems from Virtual Reality (VR) sickness; even small movements of your own body matching the motions seen on the screen decrease the sensory conflict between vision and vestibular organs, which lies at the heart of most theories regarding the onset of VR sickness. To test the hypothesis that the balance board as a control method would be less sickening than using joysticks, we designed a user study (N=32, 15 women) in which the participants drove a simulated differential drive robot in a virtual environment with either a Nintendo Wii Balance Board or joysticks. However, our pre-registered main hypotheses were not supported; the joystick did not cause any more VR sickness on the participants than the balance board, and the board proved to be statistically significantly more difficult to use, both subjectively and objectively. Analyzing the open-ended questions revealed these results to be likely connected, meaning that the difficulty of use seemed to affect sickness; even unlimited training time before the test did not make the use as easy as the familiar joystick. Thus, making the board easier to use is a key to enable its potential; we present a few possibilities towards this goal.

The participants used a balance board to control the robot and viewed the virtual environment through a head-mounted display. The main motivation for using a balance board as the control device stems from Virtual Reality (VR) sickness; even small movements of your own body matching the motions seen on the screen decrease the sensory conflict between vision and vestibular organs, which lies at the heart of most theories regarding the onset of VR sickness. To test the hypothesis that the balance board as a control method would be less sickening than using joysticks, we designed a user study (N=32, 15 women) in which the participants drove a simulated differential drive robot in a virtual environment with either a Nintendo Wii Balance Board or joysticks. However, our pre-registered main hypotheses were not supported; the joystick did not cause any more VR sickness on the participants than the balance board, and the board proved to be statistically significantly more difficult to use, both subjectively and objectively. Analyzing the open-ended questions revealed these results to be likely connected, meaning that the difficulty of use seemed to affect sickness; even unlimited training time before the test did not make the use as easy as the familiar joystick. Thus, making the board easier to use is a key to enable its potential; we present a few possibilities towards this goal.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的差速驱动远程呈现机器人控制的实现以及模拟中的用户研究，目的是为真正的远程呈现机器人带来相同的功能。参与者使用平衡板来控制机器人，并通过头戴式显示器查看虚拟环境。使用平衡板作为控制设备的主要动机源于虚拟现实（VR）疾病；即使你自己身体的微小运动与屏幕上看到的运动相匹配，也会减少视觉和前庭器官之间的感觉冲突，这是大多数关于 VR 疾病发作的理论的核心。为了检验平衡板作为控制方法比使用操纵杆更不易令人恶心的假设，我们设计了一项用户研究（N=32，15 名女性），其中参与者使用任天堂 Wii 平衡板或操纵杆在虚拟环境中驾驶模拟差动驱动机器人。然而，我们预先登记的主要假设并没有得到支持；与平衡板相比，操纵杆并没有给参与者带来更多的 VR 晕眩感，而且事实证明，无论是主观还是客观，平衡板在统计上都更难使用。分析开放式问题表明这些结果可能是相关的，这意味着使用的难度似乎会影响疾病；即使在测试前无限的训练时间也没有使使用像熟悉的操纵杆那样容易。因此，让开发板更易于使用是发挥其潜力的关键；我们提出了实现这一目标的一些可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于倾斜控制的差速驱动远程存在机器人实现方案，并通过模拟用户研究验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 为减少虚拟现实（VR）眩晕感，尝试用平衡板替代传统摇杆作为控制设备，以降低视觉与前庭系统之间的感官冲突。
AI.method: 设计用户实验（N=32），让参与者通过任天堂Wii平衡板或摇杆在虚拟环境中控制模拟机器人，对比两种控制方式的眩晕感和操作难度。
AI.result: 平衡板未显著降低眩晕感，且操作难度显著高于摇杆；主观和客观测试均显示平衡板使用困难与眩晕感存在关联。
AI.conclusion: 提升平衡板的操作易用性是发挥其潜力的关键，需优化控制交互设计以降低学习成本。

authors_text: Han Xuanyuan,Pietro Barbiero,Dobrik Georgiev,Lucie Charlotte Magister,Pietro Lió
title: Global Concept-Based Interpretability for Graph Neural Networks via Neuron Analysis
title_zh: 通过神经元分析实现图神经网络的基于全局概念的可解释性
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are highly effective on a variety of graph-related tasks; however, they lack interpretability and transparency. Current explainability approaches are typically local and treat GNNs as black-boxes. They do not look inside the model, inhibiting human trust in the model and explanations. Motivated by the ability of neurons to detect high-level semantic concepts in vision models, we perform a novel analysis on the behaviour of individual GNN neurons to answer questions about GNN interpretability, and propose new metrics for evaluating the interpretability of GNN neurons. We propose a novel approach for producing global explanations for GNNs using neuron-level concepts to enable practitioners to have a high-level view of the model. Specifically, (i) to the best of our knowledge, this is the first work which shows that GNN neurons act as concept detectors and have strong alignment with concepts formulated as logical compositions of node degree and neighbourhood properties; (ii) we quantitatively assess the importance of detected concepts, and identify a trade-off between training duration and neuron-level interpretability; (iii) we demonstrate that our global explainability approach has advantages over the current state-of-the-art -- we can disentangle the explanation into individual interpretable concepts backed by logical descriptions, which reduces potential for bias and improves user-friendliness.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are highly effective on a variety of graph-related tasks; however, they lack interpretability and transparency. Current explainability approaches are typically local and treat GNNs as black-boxes. They do not look inside the model, inhibiting human trust in the model and explanations. Motivated by the ability of neurons to detect high-level semantic concepts in vision models, we perform a novel analysis on the behaviour of individual GNN neurons to answer questions about GNN interpretability, and propose new metrics for evaluating the interpretability of GNN neurons. We propose a novel approach for producing global explanations for GNNs using neuron-level concepts to enable practitioners to have a high-level view of the model. Specifically, (i) to the best of our knowledge, this is the first work which shows that GNN neurons act as concept detectors and have strong alignment with concepts formulated as logical compositions of node degree and neighbourhood properties; (ii) we quantitatively assess the importance of detected concepts, and identify a trade-off between training duration and neuron-level interpretability; (iii) we demonstrate that our global explainability approach has advantages over the current state-of-the-art -- we can disentangle the explanation into individual interpretable concepts backed by logical descriptions, which reduces potential for bias and improves user-friendliness.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在各种与图相关的任务上非常有效；然而，它们缺乏可解释性和透明度。目前的可解释性方法通常是局部的，并将 GNN 视为黑匣子。他们不深入模型内部，从而抑制了人们对模型和解释的信任。受神经元检测视觉模型中高级语义概念的能力的启发，我们对单个 GNN 神经元的行为进行了新颖的分析，以回答有关 GNN 可解释性的问题，并提出了评估 GNN 神经元可解释性的新指标。我们提出了一种使用神经元级概念为 GNN 生成全局解释的新方法，使实践者能够对模型有一个高层次的了解。具体来说，(i) 据我们所知，这是第一个表明 GNN 神经元充当概念检测器的工作，并且与表述为节点度和邻域属性的逻辑组合的概念具有很强的一致性； （ii）我们定量评估检测到的概念的重要性，并确定训练持续时间和神经元级可解释性之间的权衡； (iii) 我们证明，我们的全局可解释性方法比当前最先进的方法具有优势——我们可以将解释分解为由逻辑描述支持的个体可解释概念，这减少了偏见的可能性并提高了用户友好性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过分析图神经网络（GNN）神经元的行为，为GNN提供全局概念级可解释性方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN可解释性方法多为局部且将模型视为黑盒，无法揭示内部机制，影响用户信任。受视觉模型中神经元检测语义概念的启发，需探索GNN神经元的内在解释性。
AI.method: 分析单个GNN神经元行为，提出概念检测指标；基于神经元级概念生成全局解释，结合逻辑描述分离可解释概念。
AI.result: 首次证明GNN神经元可作为概念检测器，与节点度及邻域属性的逻辑组合强相关；量化概念重要性，揭示训练时长与可解释性的权衡；全局解释方法优于现有技术，减少偏见并提升友好性。
AI.conclusion: 通过神经元级概念分析，本文为GNN提供了高阶全局解释框架，增强了模型透明度与用户信任。

authors_text: Huy Phan,Cong Shi,Yi Xie,Tianfang Zhang,Zhuohang Li,Tianming Zhao,Jian Liu,Yan Wang,Yingying Chen,Bo Yuan
title: RIBAC: Towards Robust and Imperceptible Backdoor Attack against Compact DNN
title_zh: RIBAC：针对紧凑 DNN 的稳健且难以察觉的后门攻击
abstract: Recently backdoor attack has become an emerging threat to the security of deep neural network (DNN) models. To date, most of the existing studies focus on backdoor attack against the uncompressed model; while the vulnerability of compressed DNNs, which are widely used in the practical applications, is little exploited yet. In this paper, we propose to study and develop Robust and Imperceptible Backdoor Attack against Compact DNN models (RIBAC). By performing systematic analysis and exploration on the important design knobs, we propose a framework that can learn the proper trigger patterns, model parameters and pruning masks in an efficient way. Thereby achieving high trigger stealthiness, high attack success rate and high model efficiency simultaneously. Extensive evaluations across different datasets, including the test against the state-of-the-art defense mechanisms, demonstrate the high robustness, stealthiness and model efficiency of RIBAC. Code is available at https://github.com/huyvnphan/ECCV2022-RIBAC
summary: Recently backdoor attack has become an emerging threat to the security of deep neural network (DNN) models. To date, most of the existing studies focus on backdoor attack against the uncompressed model; while the vulnerability of compressed DNNs, which are widely used in the practical applications, is little exploited yet. In this paper, we propose to study and develop Robust and Imperceptible Backdoor Attack against Compact DNN models (RIBAC). By performing systematic analysis and exploration on the important design knobs, we propose a framework that can learn the proper trigger patterns, model parameters and pruning masks in an efficient way. Thereby achieving high trigger stealthiness, high attack success rate and high model efficiency simultaneously. Extensive evaluations across different datasets, including the test against the state-of-the-art defense mechanisms, demonstrate the high robustness, stealthiness and model efficiency of RIBAC. Code is available at https://github.com/huyvnphan/ECCV2022-RIBAC
abstract_zh: 最近，后门攻击已成为深度神经网络（DNN）模型安全的新威胁。迄今为止，现有的研究大多集中在针对未压缩模型的后门攻击上；而在实际应用中广泛使用的压缩 DNN 的漏洞却很少被利用。在本文中，我们建议研究和开发针对紧凑 DNN 模型的鲁棒且难以察觉的后门攻击 (RIBAC)。通过对重要的设计旋钮进行系统分析和探索，我们提出了一个可以有效学习正确的触发模式、模型参数和修剪掩模的框架。从而同时实现高触发隐秘性、高攻击成功率和高模型效率。对不同数据集的广泛评估，包括针对最先进防御机制的测试，证明了 RIBAC 的高鲁棒性、隐秘性和模型效率。代码可在 https://github.com/huyvnphan/ECCV2022-RIBAC 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对紧凑型深度神经网络（DNN）的鲁棒且难以察觉的后门攻击方法RIBAC。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击研究主要针对未压缩模型，而实际应用中广泛使用的压缩DNN的安全性尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 通过系统分析关键设计参数，提出框架同时学习触发模式、模型参数和剪枝掩码，实现高效攻击。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了RIBAC的高隐蔽性、攻击成功率和模型效率，并能有效对抗最新防御机制。
AI.conclusion: RIBAC为压缩DNN提供了新型后门攻击方案，揭示了其潜在安全风险。

authors_text: Jonathan Ventura,Camille Pawlak,Milo Honsberger,Cameron Gonsalves,Julian Rice,Natalie L. R. Love,Skyler Han,Viet Nguyen,Keilana Sugano,Jacqueline Doremus,G. Andrew Fricker,Jenn Yost,Matt Ritter
title: Individual Tree Detection in Large-Scale Urban Environments using High-Resolution Multispectral Imagery
title_zh: 使用高分辨率多光谱图像检测大型城市环境中的单棵树
comment: ef:International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation 130 (2024): 103848
comments: ef:International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation 130 (2024): 103848
abstract: We introduce a novel deep learning method for detection of individual trees in urban environments using high-resolution multispectral aerial imagery. We use a convolutional neural network to regress a confidence map indicating the locations of individual trees, which are localized using a peak finding algorithm. Our method provides complete spatial coverage by detecting trees in both public and private spaces, and can scale to very large areas. We performed a thorough evaluation of our method, supported by a new dataset of over 1,500 images and almost 100,000 tree annotations, covering eight cities, six climate zones, and three image capture years. We trained our model on data from Southern California, and achieved a precision of 73.6% and recall of 73.3% using test data from this region. We generally observed similar precision and slightly lower recall when extrapolating to other California climate zones and image capture dates. We used our method to produce a map of trees in the entire urban forest of California, and estimated the total number of urban trees in California to be about 43.5 million. Our study indicates the potential for deep learning methods to support future urban forestry studies at unprecedented scales.
summary: We introduce a novel deep learning method for detection of individual trees in urban environments using high-resolution multispectral aerial imagery. We use a convolutional neural network to regress a confidence map indicating the locations of individual trees, which are localized using a peak finding algorithm. Our method provides complete spatial coverage by detecting trees in both public and private spaces, and can scale to very large areas. We performed a thorough evaluation of our method, supported by a new dataset of over 1,500 images and almost 100,000 tree annotations, covering eight cities, six climate zones, and three image capture years. We trained our model on data from Southern California, and achieved a precision of 73.6% and recall of 73.3% using test data from this region. We generally observed similar precision and slightly lower recall when extrapolating to other California climate zones and image capture dates. We used our method to produce a map of trees in the entire urban forest of California, and estimated the total number of urban trees in California to be about 43.5 million. Our study indicates the potential for deep learning methods to support future urban forestry studies at unprecedented scales.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于使用高分辨率多光谱航空图像检测城市环境中的单棵树木。我们使用卷积神经网络来回归指示各个树的位置的置信图，这些树使用峰值查找算法进行本地化。我们的方法通过检测公共和私人空间中的树木来提供完整的空间覆盖，并且可以扩展到非常大的区域。我们对我们的方法进行了全面评估，并得到了包含 1,500 多张图像和近 100,000 个树木注释的新数据集的支持，涵盖八个城市、六个气候区和三个图像捕获年份。我们使用南加州的数据训练模型，使用该地区的测试数据实现了 73.6% 的精确度和 73.3% 的召回率。当推断到加州其他气候区和图像捕获日期时，我们通常观察到相似的精度和略低的召回率。我们使用我们的方法制作了加州整个城市森林的树木地图，并估计加州城市树木的总数约为 4350 万棵。我们的研究表明深度学习方法有潜力以前所未有的规模支持未来的城市林业研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高分辨率多光谱航拍图像的深度学习方法，用于大规模城市环境中单棵树的检测。
AI.motivation: 城市森林管理需要高效、大规模的树木检测技术，传统方法在覆盖范围和精度上存在局限，亟需利用深度学习实现自动化和规模化检测。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络生成置信度图，结合峰值检测算法定位单棵树；通过包含1500张图像和近10万标注的多城市数据集训练模型，并验证其跨气候区和年份的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在南加州测试区域达到73.6%的精度和73.3%的召回率，其他气候区精度相近但召回率略低；估算加州城市树木总数约为4350万棵。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可为城市林业研究提供前所未有的大规模数据支持，但需进一步优化跨区域和时间的检测稳定性。

search_text: Individual Tree Detection in Large-Scale Urban Environments using High-Resolution Multispectral Imagery 使用高分辨率多光谱图像检测大型城市环境中的单棵树 We introduce a novel deep learning method for detection of individual trees in urban environments using high-resolution multispectral aerial imagery. We use a convolutional neural network to regress a confidence map indicating the locations of individual trees, which are localized using a peak finding algorithm. Our method provides complete spatial coverage by detecting trees in both public and private spaces, and can scale to very large areas. We performed a thorough evaluation of our method, supported by a new dataset of over 1,500 images and almost 100,000 tree annotations, covering eight cities, six climate zones, and three image capture years. We trained our model on data from Southern California, and achieved a precision of 73.6% and recall of 73.3% using test data from this region. We generally observed similar precision and slightly lower recall when extrapolating to other California climate zones and image capture dates. We used our method to produce a map of trees in the entire urban forest of California, and estimated the total number of urban trees in California to be about 43.5 million. Our study indicates the potential for deep learning methods to support future urban forestry studies at unprecedented scales. 我们引入了一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于使用高分辨率多光谱航空图像检测城市环境中的单棵树木。我们使用卷积神经网络来回归指示各个树的位置的置信图，这些树使用峰值查找算法进行本地化。我们的方法通过检测公共和私人空间中的树木来提供完整的空间覆盖，并且可以扩展到非常大的区域。我们对我们的方法进行了全面评估，并得到了包含 1,500 多张图像和近 100,000 个树木注释的新数据集的支持，涵盖八个城市、六个气候区和三个图像捕获年份。我们使用南加州的数据训练模型，使用该地区的测试数据实现了 73.6% 的精确度和 73.3% 的召回率。当推断到加州其他气候区和图像捕获日期时，我们通常观察到相似的精度和略低的召回率。我们使用我们的方法制作了加州整个城市森林的树木地图，并估计加州城市树木的总数约为 4350 万棵。我们的研究表明深度学习方法有潜力以前所未有的规模支持未来的城市林业研究。 本文提出了一种基于高分辨率多光谱航拍图像的深度学习方法，用于大规模城市环境中单棵树的检测。 Jonathan Ventura,Camille Pawlak,Milo Honsberger,Cameron Gonsalves,Julian Rice,Natalie L. R. Love,Skyler Han,Viet Nguyen,Keilana Sugano,Jacqueline Doremus,G. Andrew Fricker,Jenn Yost,Matt Ritter cs.CV

authors_text: Gagandeep Singh,Dionysios Diamantopoulos,Juan Gómez-Luna,Sander Stuijk,Henk Corporaal,Onur Mutlu
title: LEAPER: Fast and Accurate FPGA-based System Performance Prediction via Transfer Learning
title_zh: LEAPER：通过迁移学习快速准确地预测基于 FPGA 的系统性能
abstract: Machine learning has recently gained traction as a way to overcome the slow accelerator generation and implementation process on an FPGA. It can be used to build performance and resource usage models that enable fast early-stage design space exploration. First, training requires large amounts of data (features extracted from design synthesis and implementation tools), which is cost-inefficient because of the time-consuming accelerator design and implementation process. Second, a model trained for a specific environment cannot predict performance or resource usage for a new, unknown environment. In a cloud system, renting a platform for data collection to build an ML model can significantly increase the total-cost-ownership (TCO) of a system. Third, ML-based models trained using a limited number of samples are prone to overfitting. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAPER, a transfer learning-based approach for prediction of performance and resource usage in FPGA-based systems. The key idea of LEAPER is to transfer an ML-based performance and resource usage model trained for a low-end edge environment to a new, high-end cloud environment to provide fast and accurate predictions for accelerator implementation. Experimental results show that LEAPER (1) provides, on average across six workloads and five FPGAs, 85% accuracy when we use our transferred model for prediction in a cloud environment with 5-shot learning and (2) reduces design-space exploration time for accelerator implementation on an FPGA by 10x, from days to only a few hours.
summary: Machine learning has recently gained traction as a way to overcome the slow accelerator generation and implementation process on an FPGA. It can be used to build performance and resource usage models that enable fast early-stage design space exploration. First, training requires large amounts of data (features extracted from design synthesis and implementation tools), which is cost-inefficient because of the time-consuming accelerator design and implementation process. Second, a model trained for a specific environment cannot predict performance or resource usage for a new, unknown environment. In a cloud system, renting a platform for data collection to build an ML model can significantly increase the total-cost-ownership (TCO) of a system. Third, ML-based models trained using a limited number of samples are prone to overfitting. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAPER, a transfer learning-based approach for prediction of performance and resource usage in FPGA-based systems. The key idea of LEAPER is to transfer an ML-based performance and resource usage model trained for a low-end edge environment to a new, high-end cloud environment to provide fast and accurate predictions for accelerator implementation. Experimental results show that LEAPER (1) provides, on average across six workloads and five FPGAs, 85% accuracy when we use our transferred model for prediction in a cloud environment with 5-shot learning and (2) reduces design-space exploration time for accelerator implementation on an FPGA by 10x, from days to only a few hours.
abstract_zh: 机器学习最近作为一种克服 FPGA 上加速器生成和实现过程缓慢的方法而受到关注。它可用于构建性能和资源使用模型，从而实现快速的早期设计空间探索。首先，训练需要大量数据（从设计综合和实现工具中提取的特征），由于加速器设计和实现过程非常耗时，因此成本效率低下。其次，针对特定环境训练的模型无法预测新的未知环境的性能或资源使用情况。在云系统中，租用数据收集平台来构建机器学习模型可以显着增加系统的总拥有成本（TCO）。第三，使用有限数量的样本训练的基于机器学习的模型很容易出现过度拟合。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 LEAPER，一种基于迁移学习的方法，用于预测基于 FPGA 的系统中的性能和资源使用情况。 LEAPER 的关键思想是将针对低端边缘环境训练的基于 ML 的性能和资源使用模型转移到新的高端云环境，为加速器实施提供快速、准确的预测。实验结果表明，当我们在云环境中使用迁移模型进行 5 次学习预测时，LEAPER (1) 在 6 个工作负载和 5 个 FPGA 上平均提供 85% 的准确率，(2) 将 FPGA 上加速器实现的设计空间探索时间缩短了 10 倍，从几天缩短到几个小时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEAPER，一种基于迁移学习的FPGA系统性能预测方法，旨在解决传统机器学习模型在FPGA加速器设计中的数据成本高、环境适应性差和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型需大量数据训练，且难以跨环境泛化，导致云平台建模成本高、设计空间探索耗时长，并存在样本不足时的过拟合风险。
AI.method: 通过将低端边缘设备训练的性能模型迁移至高端云环境，利用迁移学习实现跨环境的快速准确预测，减少对新环境数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在六种工作负载和五种FPGA上的实验表明，LEAPER在云环境5-shot学习下平均准确率达85%，将FPGA加速器设计空间探索时间缩短10倍（从天级到小时级）。
AI.conclusion: LEAPER通过迁移学习有效解决了FPGA性能预测的数据成本、环境适应性和过拟合问题，显著提升了设计效率和预测准确性。

search_text: LEAPER: Fast and Accurate FPGA-based System Performance Prediction via Transfer Learning LEAPER：通过迁移学习快速准确地预测基于 FPGA 的系统性能 Machine learning has recently gained traction as a way to overcome the slow accelerator generation and implementation process on an FPGA. It can be used to build performance and resource usage models that enable fast early-stage design space exploration. First, training requires large amounts of data (features extracted from design synthesis and implementation tools), which is cost-inefficient because of the time-consuming accelerator design and implementation process. Second, a model trained for a specific environment cannot predict performance or resource usage for a new, unknown environment. In a cloud system, renting a platform for data collection to build an ML model can significantly increase the total-cost-ownership (TCO) of a system. Third, ML-based models trained using a limited number of samples are prone to overfitting. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAPER, a transfer learning-based approach for prediction of performance and resource usage in FPGA-based systems. The key idea of LEAPER is to transfer an ML-based performance and resource usage model trained for a low-end edge environment to a new, high-end cloud environment to provide fast and accurate predictions for accelerator implementation. Experimental results show that LEAPER (1) provides, on average across six workloads and five FPGAs, 85% accuracy when we use our transferred model for prediction in a cloud environment with 5-shot learning and (2) reduces design-space exploration time for accelerator implementation on an FPGA by 10x, from days to only a few hours. 机器学习最近作为一种克服 FPGA 上加速器生成和实现过程缓慢的方法而受到关注。它可用于构建性能和资源使用模型，从而实现快速的早期设计空间探索。首先，训练需要大量数据（从设计综合和实现工具中提取的特征），由于加速器设计和实现过程非常耗时，因此成本效率低下。其次，针对特定环境训练的模型无法预测新的未知环境的性能或资源使用情况。在云系统中，租用数据收集平台来构建机器学习模型可以显着增加系统的总拥有成本（TCO）。第三，使用有限数量的样本训练的基于机器学习的模型很容易出现过度拟合。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了 LEAPER，一种基于迁移学习的方法，用于预测基于 FPGA 的系统中的性能和资源使用情况。 LEAPER 的关键思想是将针对低端边缘环境训练的基于 ML 的性能和资源使用模型转移到新的高端云环境，为加速器实施提供快速、准确的预测。实验结果表明，当我们在云环境中使用迁移模型进行 5 次学习预测时，LEAPER (1) 在 6 个工作负载和 5 个 FPGA 上平均提供 85% 的准确率，(2) 将 FPGA 上加速器实现的设计空间探索时间缩短了 10 倍，从几天缩短到几个小时。 本文提出LEAPER，一种基于迁移学习的FPGA系统性能预测方法，旨在解决传统机器学习模型在FPGA加速器设计中的数据成本高、环境适应性差和过拟合问题。 Gagandeep Singh,Dionysios Diamantopoulos,Juan Gómez-Luna,Sander Stuijk,Henk Corporaal,Onur Mutlu cs.AR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wai Tong,Zhutian Chen,Meng Xia,Leo Yu-Ho Lo,Linping Yuan,Benjamin Bach,Huamin Qu
title: Exploring Interactions with Printed Data Visualizations in Augmented Reality
title_zh: 探索增强现实中与打印数据可视化的交互
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures, 1 table, accepted at IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures, 1 table, accepted at IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: This paper presents a design space of interaction techniques to engage with visualizations that are printed on paper and augmented through Augmented Reality. Paper sheets are widely used to deploy visualizations and provide a rich set of tangible affordances for interactions, such as touch, folding, tilting, or stacking. At the same time, augmented reality can dynamically update visualization content to provide commands such as pan, zoom, filter, or detail on demand. This paper is the first to provide a structured approach to mapping possible actions with the paper to interaction commands. This design space and the findings of a controlled user study have implications for future designs of augmented reality systems involving paper sheets and visualizations. Through workshops (N=20) and ideation, we identified 81 interactions that we classify in three dimensions: 1) commands that can be supported by an interaction, 2) the specific parameters provided by an (inter)action with paper, and 3) the number of paper sheets involved in an interaction. We tested user preference and viability of 11 of these interactions with a prototype implementation in a controlled study (N=12, HoloLens 2) and found that most of the interactions are intuitive and engaging to use. We summarized interactions (e.g., tilt to pan) that have strong affordance to complement "point" for data exploration, physical limitations and properties of paper as a medium, cases requiring redundancy and shortcuts, and other implications for design.
summary: This paper presents a design space of interaction techniques to engage with visualizations that are printed on paper and augmented through Augmented Reality. Paper sheets are widely used to deploy visualizations and provide a rich set of tangible affordances for interactions, such as touch, folding, tilting, or stacking. At the same time, augmented reality can dynamically update visualization content to provide commands such as pan, zoom, filter, or detail on demand. This paper is the first to provide a structured approach to mapping possible actions with the paper to interaction commands. This design space and the findings of a controlled user study have implications for future designs of augmented reality systems involving paper sheets and visualizations. Through workshops (N=20) and ideation, we identified 81 interactions that we classify in three dimensions: 1) commands that can be supported by an interaction, 2) the specific parameters provided by an (inter)action with paper, and 3) the number of paper sheets involved in an interaction. We tested user preference and viability of 11 of these interactions with a prototype implementation in a controlled study (N=12, HoloLens 2) and found that most of the interactions are intuitive and engaging to use. We summarized interactions (e.g., tilt to pan) that have strong affordance to complement "point" for data exploration, physical limitations and properties of paper as a medium, cases requiring redundancy and shortcuts, and other implications for design.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个交互技术的设计空间，用于与打印在纸上并通过增强现实增强的可视化进行交互。纸张广泛用于部署可视化，并为交互提供丰富的有形可供性，例如触摸、折叠、倾斜或堆叠。同时，增强现实可以动态更新可视化内容，以按需提供平移、缩放、过滤或细节等命令。本文首次提供了一种结构化方法，将论文中可能的操作映射到交互命令。这个设计空间和受控用户研究的结果对涉及纸张和可视化的增强现实系统的未来设计具有影响。通过研讨会 (N=20) 和构思，我们确定了 81 种交互，并按三个维度进行分类：1) 交互可以支持的命令，2) 与纸张的（交互）动作提供的具体参数，3) 交互中涉及的纸张数量。我们在一项对照研究（N=12，HoloLens 2）中通过原型实现测试了其中 11 种交互的用户偏好和可行性，发现大多数交互都很直观且易于使用。我们总结了交互（例如，从倾斜到平移），这些交互具有强大的可供性来补充数据探索的“点”、物理限制和纸张作为媒介的特性、需要冗余和快捷方式的情况以及对设计的其他影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合纸质可视化与增强现实（AR）的交互设计空间，通过映射纸张操作到AR命令，探索物理媒介与动态内容的协同交互方式。
AI.motivation: 纸质可视化具有丰富的实体交互特性，但缺乏动态更新能力；AR可提供动态交互但未充分结合纸质媒介的物理属性，需探索两者的互补设计方法。
AI.method: 通过工作坊（N=20）生成81种交互并按命令类型、交互参数、纸张数量三维度分类，选取11种交互使用HoloLens 2原型进行受控用户研究（N=12）验证可行性。
AI.result: 用户研究发现多数交互直观易用，总结出如'倾斜平移'等强映射关系的交互模式，并指出纸张物理限制、冗余设计需求等对交互设计的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该设计空间为AR与纸质可视化结合提供了结构化设计框架，强调物理交互与数字命令的映射关系，为未来混合媒介交互系统设计提供参考。

search_text: Exploring Interactions with Printed Data Visualizations in Augmented Reality 探索增强现实中与打印数据可视化的交互 This paper presents a design space of interaction techniques to engage with visualizations that are printed on paper and augmented through Augmented Reality. Paper sheets are widely used to deploy visualizations and provide a rich set of tangible affordances for interactions, such as touch, folding, tilting, or stacking. At the same time, augmented reality can dynamically update visualization content to provide commands such as pan, zoom, filter, or detail on demand. This paper is the first to provide a structured approach to mapping possible actions with the paper to interaction commands. This design space and the findings of a controlled user study have implications for future designs of augmented reality systems involving paper sheets and visualizations. Through workshops (N=20) and ideation, we identified 81 interactions that we classify in three dimensions: 1) commands that can be supported by an interaction, 2) the specific parameters provided by an (inter)action with paper, and 3) the number of paper sheets involved in an interaction. We tested user preference and viability of 11 of these interactions with a prototype implementation in a controlled study (N=12, HoloLens 2) and found that most of the interactions are intuitive and engaging to use. We summarized interactions (e.g., tilt to pan) that have strong affordance to complement "point" for data exploration, physical limitations and properties of paper as a medium, cases requiring redundancy and shortcuts, and other implications for design. 本文提出了一个交互技术的设计空间，用于与打印在纸上并通过增强现实增强的可视化进行交互。纸张广泛用于部署可视化，并为交互提供丰富的有形可供性，例如触摸、折叠、倾斜或堆叠。同时，增强现实可以动态更新可视化内容，以按需提供平移、缩放、过滤或细节等命令。本文首次提供了一种结构化方法，将论文中可能的操作映射到交互命令。这个设计空间和受控用户研究的结果对涉及纸张和可视化的增强现实系统的未来设计具有影响。通过研讨会 (N=20) 和构思，我们确定了 81 种交互，并按三个维度进行分类：1) 交互可以支持的命令，2) 与纸张的（交互）动作提供的具体参数，3) 交互中涉及的纸张数量。我们在一项对照研究（N=12，HoloLens 2）中通过原型实现测试了其中 11 种交互的用户偏好和可行性，发现大多数交互都很直观且易于使用。我们总结了交互（例如，从倾斜到平移），这些交互具有强大的可供性来补充数据探索的“点”、物理限制和纸张作为媒介的特性、需要冗余和快捷方式的情况以及对设计的其他影响。 本文提出了一种结合纸质可视化与增强现实（AR）的交互设计空间，通过映射纸张操作到AR命令，探索物理媒介与动态内容的协同交互方式。 Wai Tong,Zhutian Chen,Meng Xia,Leo Yu-Ho Lo,Linping Yuan,Benjamin Bach,Huamin Qu cs.HC

authors_text: Saeid Alavi Naeini,Leif Simmatis,Yana Yunusova,Babak Taati
title: Concurrent Validity of Automatic Speech and Pause Measures During Passage Reading in ALS
title_zh: ALS 段落阅读期间自动语音和暂停措施的并发有效性
comment: 2022 IEEE EMBS International Conference on Biomedical & Health Informatics (BHI)
comments: 2022 IEEE EMBS International Conference on Biomedical & Health Informatics (BHI)
abstract: The analysis of speech measures in individuals with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) can provide essential information for early diagnosis and tracking disease progression. However, current methods for extracting speech and pause features are manual or semi-automatic, which makes them time-consuming and labour-intensive. The advent of speech-text alignment algorithms provides an opportunity for inexpensive, automated, and accurate analysis of speech measures in individuals with ALS. There is a need to validate speech and pause features calculated by these algorithms against current gold standard methods. In this study, we extracted 8 speech/pause features from 646 audio files of individuals with ALS and healthy controls performing passage reading. Two pretrained forced alignment models - one using transformers and another using a Gaussian mixture / hidden Markov architecture - were used for automatic feature extraction. The results were then validated against semi-automatic speech/pause analysis software, with further subgroup analyses based on audio quality and disease severity. Features extracted using transformer-based forced alignment had the highest agreement with gold standards, including in terms of audio quality and disease severity. This study lays the groundwork for future intelligent diagnostic support systems for clinicians, and for novel methods of tracking disease progression remotely from home.
summary: The analysis of speech measures in individuals with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) can provide essential information for early diagnosis and tracking disease progression. However, current methods for extracting speech and pause features are manual or semi-automatic, which makes them time-consuming and labour-intensive. The advent of speech-text alignment algorithms provides an opportunity for inexpensive, automated, and accurate analysis of speech measures in individuals with ALS. There is a need to validate speech and pause features calculated by these algorithms against current gold standard methods. In this study, we extracted 8 speech/pause features from 646 audio files of individuals with ALS and healthy controls performing passage reading. Two pretrained forced alignment models - one using transformers and another using a Gaussian mixture / hidden Markov architecture - were used for automatic feature extraction. The results were then validated against semi-automatic speech/pause analysis software, with further subgroup analyses based on audio quality and disease severity. Features extracted using transformer-based forced alignment had the highest agreement with gold standards, including in terms of audio quality and disease severity. This study lays the groundwork for future intelligent diagnostic support systems for clinicians, and for novel methods of tracking disease progression remotely from home.
abstract_zh: 对肌萎缩侧索硬化症 (ALS) 患者言语测量的分析可以为早期诊断和跟踪疾病进展提供重要信息。然而，当前提取语音和停顿特征的方法是手动或半自动的，这使得它们既耗时又费力。语音文本对齐算法的出现为对 ALS 患者的语音测量进行廉价、自动化和准确的分析提供了机会。需要根据当前的黄金标准方法来验证这些算法计算出的语音和停顿特征。在这项研究中，我们从 ALS 患者和健康对照组执行段落阅读的 646 个音频文件中提取了 8 个语音/暂停特征。两个预训练的强制对齐模型（一个使用变压器，另一个使用高斯混合/隐马尔可夫架构）用于自动特征提取。然后针对半自动语音/暂停分析软件验证结果，并根据音频质量和疾病严重程度进行进一步的亚组分析。使用基于变压器的强制对齐提取的特征与黄金标准具有最高的一致性，包括音频质量和疾病严重程度。这项研究为临床医生未来的智能诊断支持系统以及在家远程跟踪疾病进展的新方法奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 验证自动语音和停顿测量方法在ALS患者阅读时的并发效度。
AI.motivation: ALS患者语音分析需高效工具，现有手动或半自动方法耗时费力，需验证自动算法准确性以支持早期诊断和远程病情追踪。
AI.method: 使用两种预训练强制对齐模型（基于Transformer和高斯混合/隐马尔可夫架构）处理646个音频文件，提取语音/停顿特征，并与半自动软件结果对比，分音频质量和疾病严重程度子组分析。
AI.result: 基于Transformer的模型在音频质量及疾病严重程度各子组中均与金标准达成最高一致性。
AI.conclusion: 为未来智能诊断系统及远程病情监测方法奠定基础，证明自动算法的有效性。
