authors_text: Luca Carlone
title: Estimation Contracts for Outlier-Robust Geometric Perception
title_zh: 异常稳健几何感知的估计契约
abstract: Outlier-robust estimation is a fundamental problem and has been extensively investigated by statisticians and practitioners. The last few years have seen a convergence across research fields towards "algorithmic robust statistics", which focuses on developing tractable outlier-robust techniques for high-dimensional estimation problems. Despite this convergence, research efforts across fields have been mostly disconnected from one another. This monograph bridges recent work on certifiable outlier-robust estimation for geometric perception in robotics and computer vision with parallel work in robust statistics. In particular, we adapt and extend recent results on robust linear regression (applicable to the low-outlier regime with << 50% outliers) and list-decodable regression (applicable to the high-outlier regime with >> 50% outliers) to the setup commonly found in robotics and vision, where (i) variables (e.g., rotations, poses) belong to a non-convex domain, (ii) measurements are vector-valued, and (iii) the number of outliers is not known a priori. The emphasis here is on performance guarantees: rather than proposing radically new algorithms, we provide conditions on the input measurements under which modern estimation algorithms (possibly after small modifications) are guaranteed to recover an estimate close to the ground truth in the presence of outliers. These conditions are what we call an "estimation contract". Besides the proposed extensions of existing results, we believe the main contributions of this monograph are (i) to unify parallel research lines by pointing out commonalities and differences, (ii) to introduce advanced material (e.g., sum-of-squares proofs) in an accessible and self-contained presentation for the practitioner, and (iii) to point out a few immediate opportunities and open questions in outlier-robust geometric perception.
summary: Outlier-robust estimation is a fundamental problem and has been extensively investigated by statisticians and practitioners. The last few years have seen a convergence across research fields towards "algorithmic robust statistics", which focuses on developing tractable outlier-robust techniques for high-dimensional estimation problems. Despite this convergence, research efforts across fields have been mostly disconnected from one another. This monograph bridges recent work on certifiable outlier-robust estimation for geometric perception in robotics and computer vision with parallel work in robust statistics. In particular, we adapt and extend recent results on robust linear regression (applicable to the low-outlier regime with << 50% outliers) and list-decodable regression (applicable to the high-outlier regime with >> 50% outliers) to the setup commonly found in robotics and vision, where (i) variables (e.g., rotations, poses) belong to a non-convex domain, (ii) measurements are vector-valued, and (iii) the number of outliers is not known a priori. The emphasis here is on performance guarantees: rather than proposing radically new algorithms, we provide conditions on the input measurements under which modern estimation algorithms (possibly after small modifications) are guaranteed to recover an estimate close to the ground truth in the presence of outliers. These conditions are what we call an "estimation contract". Besides the proposed extensions of existing results, we believe the main contributions of this monograph are (i) to unify parallel research lines by pointing out commonalities and differences, (ii) to introduce advanced material (e.g., sum-of-squares proofs) in an accessible and self-contained presentation for the practitioner, and (iii) to point out a few immediate opportunities and open questions in outlier-robust geometric perception.
abstract_zh: 异常值稳健估计是一个基本问题，已被统计学家和从业者广泛研究。在过去的几年里，各个研究领域都趋向于“算法稳健统计”，其重点是为高维估计问题开发易于处理的异常值稳健技术。尽管存在这种趋同，但跨领域的研究工作大多相互脱节。该专着将机器人和计算机视觉中几何感知的可证明异常值稳健估计的最新工作与稳健统计中的并行工作联系起来。特别是，我们将鲁棒线性回归（适用于具有 << 50% 异常值的低异常值区域）和列表可解码回归（适用于具有 >> 50% 异常值的高异常值区域）的最新结果改编并扩展到机器人和视觉中常见的设置，其中（i）变量（例如旋转、姿势）属于非凸域，（ii）测量值是向量值，以及（iii）异常值不是先验已知的。这里的重点是性能保证：我们不是提出全新的算法，而是提供输入测量的条件，在这些条件下，现代估计算法（可能经过小修改）保证在存在异常值的情况下恢复接近真实值的估计。这些条件就是我们所说的“估价合同”。除了对现有结果的拟议扩展之外，我们认为本专着的主要贡献是（i）通过指出共性和差异来统一平行研究路线，（ii）以易于理解且独立的方式向从业者介绍先进的材料（例如平方和证明），以及（iii）指出异常稳健几何感知中的一些直接机会和开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于几何感知的鲁棒估计合同，以应对机器人和计算机视觉中未知数量的异常值问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管算法鲁棒统计学领域取得了进展，但不同领域的研究仍缺乏联系，需统一几何感知中的鲁棒估计方法并解决非凸域、向量测量和未知异常值等挑战。
AI.method: 通过扩展鲁棒线性回归和列表解码回归方法，适配非凸变量、向量测量及未知异常值场景，并提出‘估计合同’条件以保证现代算法的性能。
AI.result: 实现了现有方法在几何感知中的扩展，统一了不同研究方向，并引入可访问的高级理论（如平方和证明），同时指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为鲁棒几何感知提供了统一框架和性能保证条件，推动了算法鲁棒统计与实际应用的结合，并提出了开放性问题。

search_text: Estimation Contracts for Outlier-Robust Geometric Perception 异常稳健几何感知的估计契约 Outlier-robust estimation is a fundamental problem and has been extensively investigated by statisticians and practitioners. The last few years have seen a convergence across research fields towards "algorithmic robust statistics", which focuses on developing tractable outlier-robust techniques for high-dimensional estimation problems. Despite this convergence, research efforts across fields have been mostly disconnected from one another. This monograph bridges recent work on certifiable outlier-robust estimation for geometric perception in robotics and computer vision with parallel work in robust statistics. In particular, we adapt and extend recent results on robust linear regression (applicable to the low-outlier regime with << 50% outliers) and list-decodable regression (applicable to the high-outlier regime with >> 50% outliers) to the setup commonly found in robotics and vision, where (i) variables (e.g., rotations, poses) belong to a non-convex domain, (ii) measurements are vector-valued, and (iii) the number of outliers is not known a priori. The emphasis here is on performance guarantees: rather than proposing radically new algorithms, we provide conditions on the input measurements under which modern estimation algorithms (possibly after small modifications) are guaranteed to recover an estimate close to the ground truth in the presence of outliers. These conditions are what we call an "estimation contract". Besides the proposed extensions of existing results, we believe the main contributions of this monograph are (i) to unify parallel research lines by pointing out commonalities and differences, (ii) to introduce advanced material (e.g., sum-of-squares proofs) in an accessible and self-contained presentation for the practitioner, and (iii) to point out a few immediate opportunities and open questions in outlier-robust geometric perception. 异常值稳健估计是一个基本问题，已被统计学家和从业者广泛研究。在过去的几年里，各个研究领域都趋向于“算法稳健统计”，其重点是为高维估计问题开发易于处理的异常值稳健技术。尽管存在这种趋同，但跨领域的研究工作大多相互脱节。该专着将机器人和计算机视觉中几何感知的可证明异常值稳健估计的最新工作与稳健统计中的并行工作联系起来。特别是，我们将鲁棒线性回归（适用于具有 << 50% 异常值的低异常值区域）和列表可解码回归（适用于具有 >> 50% 异常值的高异常值区域）的最新结果改编并扩展到机器人和视觉中常见的设置，其中（i）变量（例如旋转、姿势）属于非凸域，（ii）测量值是向量值，以及（iii）异常值不是先验已知的。这里的重点是性能保证：我们不是提出全新的算法，而是提供输入测量的条件，在这些条件下，现代估计算法（可能经过小修改）保证在存在异常值的情况下恢复接近真实值的估计。这些条件就是我们所说的“估价合同”。除了对现有结果的拟议扩展之外，我们认为本专着的主要贡献是（i）通过指出共性和差异来统一平行研究路线，（ii）以易于理解且独立的方式向从业者介绍先进的材料（例如平方和证明），以及（iii）指出异常稳健几何感知中的一些直接机会和开放问题。 本文提出了一种用于几何感知的鲁棒估计合同，以应对机器人和计算机视觉中未知数量的异常值问题。 Luca Carlone stat.ML,cs.CV,cs.DS,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Negin Yousefpour,Oscar Correa
title: Towards an AI-based Early Warning System for Bridge Scour
title_zh: 基于人工智能的桥梁冲刷预警系统
abstract: Scour is the number one cause of bridge failure in many parts of the world. Considering the lack of reliability in existing empirical equations for scour depth estimation and the complexity and uncertainty of scour as a physical phenomenon, it is essential to develop more reliable solutions for scour risk assessment. This study introduces a novel AI approach for early forecast of scour based on real-time monitoring data obtained from sonar and stage sensors installed at bridge piers. Long-short Term Memory networks (LSTMs), a prominent Deep Learning algorithm successfully used for time-series forecasting in other fields, were developed and trained using river stage and bed elevation readings for more than 11 years obtained from Alaska scour monitoring program. The capability of the AI models in scour prediction is shown for three case-study bridges. Results show that LSTMs can capture the temporal and seasonal patterns of both flow and river bed variations around bridge piers, through cycles of scour and filling and can provide reasonable predictions of upcoming scour depth as early as seven days in advance. It is expected that the proposed solution can be implemented by transportation authorities for development of emerging AI-based early warning systems, enabling superior bridge scour management.
summary: Scour is the number one cause of bridge failure in many parts of the world. This study introduces a novel AI approach for early forecast of scour based on real-time monitoring data obtained from sonar and stage sensors installed at bridge piers. Long-short Term Memory networks (LSTMs), a prominent Deep Learning algorithm successfully used for time-series forecasting in other fields, were developed and trained using river stage and bed elevation readings for more than 11 years obtained from Alaska scour monitoring program. The capability of the AI models in scour prediction is shown for three case-study bridges. Results show that LSTMs can capture the temporal and seasonal patterns of both flow and river bed variations around bridge piers, through cycles of scour and filling and can provide reasonable predictions of upcoming scour depth as early as seven days in advance. It is expected that the proposed solution can be implemented by transportation authorities for development of emerging AI-based early warning systems, enabling superior bridge scour management.
abstract_zh: 冲刷是世界许多地区桥梁破坏的首要原因。考虑到现有冲刷深度估计经验方程缺乏可靠性以及冲刷作为一种物理现象的复杂性和不确定性，有必要开发更可靠的冲刷风险评估解决方案。这项研究引入了一种新颖的人工智能方法，根据安装在桥墩上的声纳和舞台传感器获得的实时监测数据，对冲刷进行早期预测。长短期记忆网络 (LSTM) 是一种著名的深度学习算法，成功用于其他领域的时间序列预测，它是使用从阿拉斯加冲刷监测项目获得的超过 11 年的河流水位和河床高程读数来开发和训练的。三个案例研究桥梁展示了人工智能模型在冲刷预测方面的能力。结果表明，LSTM 可以通过冲刷和充填周期捕获桥墩周围流量和河床变化的时间和季节模式，并可以提前 7 天对即将到来的冲刷深度进行合理预测。预计交通运输部门可以实施所提出的解决方案，以开发基于人工智能的新兴预警系统，从而实现卓越的桥梁冲刷管理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于人工智能的桥梁冲刷早期预警系统，利用LSTM网络分析实时监测数据预测冲刷深度。
AI.motivation: 现有经验公式可靠性不足，桥梁冲刷是全球桥梁失效的首要原因，需开发更可靠的冲刷风险评估方法。
AI.method: 采用长短期记忆网络（LSTM）深度学习算法，训练11年阿拉斯加冲刷监测计划的水位和河床高程数据，建立预测模型。
AI.result: LSTM模型能捕捉冲刷与回淤的时空规律，提前7天预测冲刷深度，三个案例桥验证效果良好。
AI.conclusion: 该AI方案可为交通管理部门构建智能预警系统，提升桥梁冲刷风险管理水平。

authors_text: Jun Rekimoto
title: DualVoice: Speech Interaction that Discriminates between Normal and Whispered Voice Input
title_zh: DualVoice：区分正常语音输入和耳语语音输入的语音交互
comment: to appear as ACM UIST 2022 paper
comments: to appear as ACM UIST 2022 paper
abstract: Interactions based on automatic speech recognition (ASR) have become widely used, with speech input being increasingly utilized to create documents. However, as there is no easy way to distinguish between commands being issued and text required to be input in speech, misrecognitions are difficult to identify and correct, meaning that documents need to be manually edited and corrected. The input of symbols and commands is also challenging because these may be misrecognized as text letters. To address these problems, this study proposes a speech interaction method called DualVoice, by which commands can be input in a whispered voice and letters in a normal voice. The proposed method does not require any specialized hardware other than a regular microphone, enabling a complete hands-free interaction. The method can be used in a wide range of situations where speech recognition is already available, ranging from text input to mobile/wearable computing. Two neural networks were designed in this study, one for discriminating normal speech from whispered speech, and the second for recognizing whisper speech. A prototype of a text input system was then developed to show how normal and whispered voice can be used in speech text input. Other potential applications using DualVoice are also discussed.
summary: Interactions based on automatic speech recognition (ASR) have become widely used, with speech input being increasingly utilized to create documents. However, as there is no easy way to distinguish between commands being issued and text required to be input in speech, misrecognitions are difficult to identify and correct, meaning that documents need to be manually edited and corrected. The input of symbols and commands is also challenging because these may be misrecognized as text letters. To address these problems, this study proposes a speech interaction method called DualVoice, by which commands can be input in a whispered voice and letters in a normal voice. The proposed method does not require any specialized hardware other than a regular microphone, enabling a complete hands-free interaction. The method can be used in a wide range of situations where speech recognition is already available, ranging from text input to mobile/wearable computing. Two neural networks were designed in this study, one for discriminating normal speech from whispered speech, and the second for recognizing whisper speech. A prototype of a text input system was then developed to show how normal and whispered voice can be used in speech text input. Other potential applications using DualVoice are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 基于自动语音识别 (ASR) 的交互已得到广泛使用，语音输入越来越多地用于创建文档。然而，由于没有简单的方法来区分正在发出的命令和需要在语音中输入的文本，因此错误识别很难识别和纠正，这意味着文档需要手动编辑和纠正。符号和命令的输入也具有挑战性，因为它们可能会被误识别为文本字母。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了一种称为 DualVoice 的语音交互方法，通过该方法可以用低声声音输入命令，用正常声音输入字母。所提出的方法不需要除常规麦克风之外的任何专用硬件，从而实现完全的免提交互。该方法可用于语音识别已经可用的各种情况，从文本输入到移动/可穿戴计算。这项研究设计了两个神经网络，一个用于区分正常语音和耳语语音，另一个用于识别耳语语音。随后开发了文本输入系统的原型，以展示如何在语音文本输入中使用正常语音和耳语语音。还讨论了使用 DualVoice 的其他潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DualVoice的语音交互方法，通过区分正常语音和耳语输入来解决语音识别中的命令与文本输入混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音识别系统难以区分用户输入的命令与文本内容，导致误识别难以纠正，需手动修改文档，且符号和命令易被误识别为文字。
AI.method: 设计两个神经网络：1) 用于区分正常语音与耳语语音；2) 用于识别耳语语音。开发文本输入系统原型，展示正常语音输入文本、耳语输入命令的交互方式。
AI.result: 成功实现无需特殊硬件的免提交互原型系统，验证了DualVoice在文本输入场景下的有效性，并探讨了其在移动设备等领域的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: DualVoice通过语音模式区分实现了更高效的语音交互，具有硬件兼容性强、适用场景广泛的特点，为语音输入领域提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有语音识别系统难以区分用户输入的命令与文本内容，导致误识别难以纠正，需手动修改文档，且符号和命令易被误识别为文字。
method: 设计两个神经网络：1) 用于区分正常语音与耳语语音；2) 用于识别耳语语音。开发文本输入系统原型，展示正常语音输入文本、耳语输入命令的交互方式。
result: 成功实现无需特殊硬件的免提交互原型系统，验证了DualVoice在文本输入场景下的有效性，并探讨了其在移动设备等领域的应用潜力。
conclusion: DualVoice通过语音模式区分实现了更高效的语音交互，具有硬件兼容性强、适用场景广泛的特点，为语音输入领域提供了新思路。
search_text: DualVoice: Speech Interaction that Discriminates between Normal and Whispered Voice Input DualVoice：区分正常语音输入和耳语语音输入的语音交互 Interactions based on automatic speech recognition (ASR) have become widely used, with speech input being increasingly utilized to create documents. However, as there is no easy way to distinguish between commands being issued and text required to be input in speech, misrecognitions are difficult to identify and correct, meaning that documents need to be manually edited and corrected. The input of symbols and commands is also challenging because these may be misrecognized as text letters. To address these problems, this study proposes a speech interaction method called DualVoice, by which commands can be input in a whispered voice and letters in a normal voice. The proposed method does not require any specialized hardware other than a regular microphone, enabling a complete hands-free interaction. The method can be used in a wide range of situations where speech recognition is already available, ranging from text input to mobile/wearable computing. Two neural networks were designed in this study, one for discriminating normal speech from whispered speech, and the second for recognizing whisper speech. A prototype of a text input system was then developed to show how normal and whispered voice can be used in speech text input. Other potential applications using DualVoice are also discussed. 基于自动语音识别 (ASR) 的交互已得到广泛使用，语音输入越来越多地用于创建文档。然而，由于没有简单的方法来区分正在发出的命令和需要在语音中输入的文本，因此错误识别很难识别和纠正，这意味着文档需要手动编辑和纠正。符号和命令的输入也具有挑战性，因为它们可能会被误识别为文本字母。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了一种称为 DualVoice 的语音交互方法，通过该方法可以用低声声音输入命令，用正常声音输入字母。所提出的方法不需要除常规麦克风之外的任何专用硬件，从而实现完全的免提交互。该方法可用于语音识别已经可用的各种情况，从文本输入到移动/可穿戴计算。这项研究设计了两个神经网络，一个用于区分正常语音和耳语语音，另一个用于识别耳语语音。随后开发了文本输入系统的原型，以展示如何在语音文本输入中使用正常语音和耳语语音。还讨论了使用 DualVoice 的其他潜在应用。 本文提出一种名为DualVoice的语音交互方法，通过区分正常语音和耳语输入来解决语音识别中的命令与文本输入混淆问题。 Jun Rekimoto cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Dalin Zhang,Kaixuan Chen,Yan Zhao,Bin Yang,Lina Yao,Christian S. Jensen
title: Design Automation for Fast, Lightweight, and Effective Deep Learning Models: A Survey
title_zh: 快速、轻量级且有效的深度学习模型的设计自动化：一项调查
abstract: Deep learning technologies have demonstrated remarkable effectiveness in a wide range of tasks, and deep learning holds the potential to advance a multitude of applications, including in edge computing, where deep models are deployed on edge devices to enable instant data processing and response. A key challenge is that while the application of deep models often incurs substantial memory and computational costs, edge devices typically offer only very limited storage and computational capabilities that may vary substantially across devices. These characteristics make it difficult to build deep learning solutions that unleash the potential of edge devices while complying with their constraints. A promising approach to addressing this challenge is to automate the design of effective deep learning models that are lightweight, require only a little storage, and incur only low computational overheads. This survey offers comprehensive coverage of studies of design automation techniques for deep learning models targeting edge computing. It offers an overview and comparison of key metrics that are used commonly to quantify the proficiency of models in terms of effectiveness, lightness, and computational costs. The survey then proceeds to cover three categories of the state-of-the-art of deep model design automation techniques: automated neural architecture search, automated model compression, and joint automated design and compression. Finally, the survey covers open issues and directions for future research.
summary: Deep learning technologies have demonstrated remarkable effectiveness in a wide range of tasks, and deep learning holds the potential to advance a multitude of applications, including in edge computing, where deep models are deployed on edge devices to enable instant data processing and response. A key challenge is that while the application of deep models often incurs substantial memory and computational costs, edge devices typically offer only very limited storage and computational capabilities that may vary substantially across devices. These characteristics make it difficult to build deep learning solutions that unleash the potential of edge devices while complying with their constraints. A promising approach to addressing this challenge is to automate the design of effective deep learning models that are lightweight, require only a little storage, and incur only low computational overheads. This survey offers comprehensive coverage of studies of design automation techniques for deep learning models targeting edge computing. It offers an overview and comparison of key metrics that are used commonly to quantify the proficiency of models in terms of effectiveness, lightness, and computational costs. The survey then proceeds to cover three categories of the state-of-the-art of deep model design automation techniques: automated neural architecture search, automated model compression, and joint automated design and compression. Finally, the survey covers open issues and directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在广泛的任务中表现出了显着的有效性，并且深度学习具有推进多种应用的潜力，包括在边缘计算中，其中深度模型部署在边缘设备上以实现即时数据处理和响应。一个关键的挑战是，虽然深度模型的应用通常会产生大量的内存和计算成本，但边缘设备通常仅提供非常有限的存储和计算能力，这些能力可能因设备而异。这些特征使得构建深度学习解决方案变得困难，以释放边缘设备的潜力，同时遵守其限制。解决这一挑战的一个有前途的方法是自动设计有效的深度学习模型，这些模型是轻量级的，只需要很少的存储空间，并且只产生很低的计算开销。这项调查全面涵盖了针对边缘计算的深度学习模型的设计自动化技术的研究。它提供了通常用于量化模型在有效性、轻便性和计算成本方面的熟练程度的关键指标的概述和比较。然后，调查涵盖了最先进的深度模型设计自动化技术的三类：自动神经架构搜索、自动模型压缩以及联合自动设计和压缩。最后，调查涵盖了未解决的问题和未来研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了针对边缘计算的深度学习模型设计自动化技术，涵盖模型轻量化、计算成本优化及自动化方法分类比较。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备资源受限，传统深度模型难以满足其存储与计算需求，需通过自动化设计实现高效模型部署。
AI.method: 通过分析现有研究，对比模型有效性、轻量化及计算成本的关键指标，分类总结自动化神经架构搜索、模型压缩及联合优化三类方法。
AI.result: 系统梳理了当前设计自动化技术的进展，明确了各类方法的优缺点，并指出未来研究方向如动态适应性优化与跨领域协同设计。
AI.conclusion: 当前自动化设计仍面临效率与精度平衡挑战，需结合硬件特性与算法创新推动边缘计算深度学习发展。

authors_text: Pierre Champion,Denis Jouvet,Anthony Larcher
title: Are disentangled representations all you need to build speaker anonymization systems?
title_zh: 构建说话者匿名系统所需的全部是解开的表示吗？
comment: ef:INTERSPEECH 2022 - Human and Humanizing Speech Technology, Sep 2022, incheon, South Korea
comments: ef:INTERSPEECH 2022 - Human and Humanizing Speech Technology, Sep 2022, incheon, South Korea
abstract: Speech signals contain a lot of sensitive information, such as the speaker's identity, which raises privacy concerns when speech data get collected. Speaker anonymization aims to transform a speech signal to remove the source speaker's identity while leaving the spoken content unchanged. Current methods perform the transformation by relying on content/speaker disentanglement and voice conversion. Usually, an acoustic model from an automatic speech recognition system extracts the content representation while an x-vector system extracts the speaker representation. Prior work has shown that the extracted features are not perfectly disentangled. This paper tackles how to improve features disentanglement, and thus the converted anonymized speech. We propose enhancing the disentanglement by removing speaker information from the acoustic model using vector quantization. Evaluation done using the VoicePrivacy 2022 toolkit showed that vector quantization helps conceal the original speaker identity while maintaining utility for speech recognition.
summary: Speech signals contain a lot of sensitive information, such as the speaker's identity, which raises privacy concerns when speech data get collected. Speaker anonymization aims to transform a speech signal to remove the source speaker's identity while leaving the spoken content unchanged. Current methods perform the transformation by relying on content/speaker disentanglement and voice conversion. Usually, an acoustic model from an automatic speech recognition system extracts the content representation while an x-vector system extracts the speaker representation. Prior work has shown that the extracted features are not perfectly disentangled. This paper tackles how to improve features disentanglement, and thus the converted anonymized speech. We propose enhancing the disentanglement by removing speaker information from the acoustic model using vector quantization. Evaluation done using the VoicePrivacy 2022 toolkit showed that vector quantization helps conceal the original speaker identity while maintaining utility for speech recognition.
abstract_zh: 语音信号包含许多敏感信息，例如说话者的身份，这在收集语音数据时会引发隐私问题。说话者匿名化旨在转换语音信号以消除源说话者的身份，同时保持语音内容不变。当前的方法依靠内容/说话者解开和语音转换来执行转换。通常，自动语音识别系统的声学模型提取内容表示，而 x 向量系统提取说话者表示。先前的工作表明，提取的特征并未完全解开。本文解决了如何改进特征解缠结，从而改进转换后的匿名语音。我们建议通过使用矢量量化从声学模型中删除说话人信息来增强解缠结。使用 VoicePrivacy 2022 工具包进行的评估表明，矢量量化有助于隐藏原始说话者身份，同时保持语音识别的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进特征解耦来提升说话人匿名化系统的性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法在内容与说话人特征解耦上存在不足，导致匿名化效果受限，需改进解耦技术以提高隐私保护
AI.method: 通过向量量化技术从声学模型中消除说话人信息，以增强内容与说话人特征的解耦
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效隐藏原始说话人身份，同时保持语音识别的实用性
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖解耦表示不足以构建高效匿名系统，需结合向量量化等技术优化特征解耦

authors_text: Shiwen He,Yeyu Ou,Liangpeng Wang,Hang Zhan,Peng Ren,Yongming Huang
title: Representation Learning of Knowledge Graph for Wireless Communication Networks
title_zh: 无线通信网络知识图的表示学习
abstract: With the application of the fifth-generation wireless communication technologies, more smart terminals are being used and generating huge amounts of data, which has prompted extensive research on how to handle and utilize these wireless data. Researchers currently focus on the research on the upper-layer application data or studying the intelligent transmission methods concerning a specific problem based on a large amount of data generated by the Monte Carlo simulations. This article aims to understand the endogenous relationship of wireless data by constructing a knowledge graph according to the wireless communication protocols, and domain expert knowledge and further investigating the wireless endogenous intelligence. We firstly construct a knowledge graph of the endogenous factors of wireless core network data collected via a 5G/B5G testing network. Then, a novel model based on graph convolutional neural networks is designed to learn the representation of the graph, which is used to classify graph nodes and simulate the relation prediction. The proposed model realizes the automatic nodes classification and network anomaly cause tracing. It is also applied to the public datasets in an unsupervised manner. Finally, the results show that the classification accuracy of the proposed model is better than the existing unsupervised graph neural network models, such as VGAE and ARVGE.
summary: With the application of the fifth-generation wireless communication technologies, more smart terminals are being used and generating huge amounts of data, which has prompted extensive research on how to handle and utilize these wireless data. Researchers currently focus on the research on the upper-layer application data or studying the intelligent transmission methods concerning a specific problem based on a large amount of data generated by the Monte Carlo simulations. This article aims to understand the endogenous relationship of wireless data by constructing a knowledge graph according to the wireless communication protocols, and domain expert knowledge and further investigating the wireless endogenous intelligence. We firstly construct a knowledge graph of the endogenous factors of wireless core network data collected via a 5G/B5G testing network. Then, a novel model based on graph convolutional neural networks is designed to learn the representation of the graph, which is used to classify graph nodes and simulate the relation prediction. The proposed model realizes the automatic nodes classification and network anomaly cause tracing. It is also applied to the public datasets in an unsupervised manner. Finally, the results show that the classification accuracy of the proposed model is better than the existing unsupervised graph neural network models, such as VGAE and ARVGE.
abstract_zh: 随着第五代无线通信技术的应用，越来越多的智能终端被使用并产生大量数据，这促使人们对如何处理和利用这些无线数据进行广泛的研究。目前研究人员主要集中在上层应用数据的研究或基于蒙特卡罗模拟产生的大量数据研究针对特定问题的智能传输方法。本文旨在通过根据无线通信协议和领域专家知识构建知识图谱来理解无线数据的内生关系，并进一步研究无线内生智能。我们首先构建了通过 5G/B5G 测试网络收集的无线核心网络数据的内生因素的知识图。然后，设计了一种基于图卷积神经网络的新模型来学习图的表示，用于对图节点进行分类并模拟关系预测。该模型实现了节点自动分类和网络异常原因追踪。它还以无监督的方式应用于公共数据集。最后结果表明，该模型的分类精度优于现有的无监督图神经网络模型，如VGAE和ARVGE。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建无线通信网络知识图谱并设计基于图卷积神经网络的模型，实现无线数据的表示学习与网络异常分析。
AI.motivation: 5G/B5G技术产生的海量数据需有效处理，现有研究多聚焦应用层或依赖仿真数据，缺乏对无线数据内生关系的系统性挖掘。
AI.method: 基于无线通信协议与领域知识构建核心网络数据知识图谱，设计图卷积神经网络模型进行节点分类与关系预测，并在公开数据集上无监督应用。
AI.result: 所提模型分类准确率优于VGAE和ARVGE等现有无监督图神经网络模型。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱与图神经网络结合可有效挖掘无线数据内生智能，为网络异常溯源提供新方法。

authors_text: Bangwei Guo,Xingyu Li,Jitendra Jonnagaddala,Hong Zhang,Xu Steven Xu
title: Predicting microsatellite instability and key biomarkers in colorectal cancer from H&E-stained images: Achieving SOTA predictive performance with fewer data using Swin Transformer
title_zh: 从 H&E 染色图像预测结直肠癌的微卫星不稳定性和关键生物标志物：使用 Swin Transformer 以更少的数据实现 SOTA 预测性能
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) models have been developed for predicting clinically relevant biomarkers, including microsatellite instability (MSI), for colorectal cancers (CRC). However, the current deep-learning networks are data-hungry and require large training datasets, which are often lacking in the medical domain. In this study, based on the latest Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows (Swin-T), we developed an efficient workflow for biomarkers in CRC (MSI, hypermutation, chromosomal instability, CpG island methylator phenotype, BRAF, and TP53 mutation) that only required relatively small datasets, but achieved the state-of-the-art (SOTA) predictive performance. Our Swin-T workflow not only substantially outperformed published models in an intra-study cross-validation experiment using TCGA-CRC-DX dataset (N = 462), but also showed excellent generalizability in cross-study external validation and delivered a SOTA AUROC of 0.90 for MSI using the MCO dataset for training (N = 1065) and the same TCGA-CRC-DX for testing. Similar performance (AUROC=0.91) was achieved by Echle and colleagues using approximately 8000 training samples (ResNet18) on the same testing dataset. Swin-T was extremely efficient using small training datasets and exhibits robust predictive performance with only 200-500 training samples. These data indicate that Swin-T may be 5-10 times more efficient than the current state-of-the-art algorithms for MSI based on ResNet18 and ShuffleNet. Furthermore, the Swin-T models showed promise as pre-screening tests for MSI status and BRAF mutation status, which could exclude and reduce the samples before the subsequent standard testing in a cascading diagnostic workflow to allow turnaround time reduction and cost saving.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) models have been developed for predicting clinically relevant biomarkers, including microsatellite instability (MSI), for colorectal cancers (CRC). However, the current deep-learning networks are data-hungry and require large training datasets, which are often lacking in the medical domain. In this study, based on the latest Hierarchical Vision Transformer using Shifted Windows (Swin-T), we developed an efficient workflow for biomarkers in CRC (MSI, hypermutation, chromosomal instability, CpG island methylator phenotype, BRAF, and TP53 mutation) that only required relatively small datasets, but achieved the state-of-the-art (SOTA) predictive performance. Similar performance (AUROC=0.91) was achieved by Echle and colleagues using approximately 8000 training samples (ResNet18) on the same testing dataset. Swin-T was extremely efficient using small training datasets and exhibits robust predictive performance with only 200-500 training samples. These data indicate that Swin-T may be 5-10 times more efficient than the current state-of-the-art algorithms for MSI based on ResNet18 and ShuffleNet. Furthermore, the Swin-T models showed promise as pre-screening tests for MSI status and BRAF mutation status, which could exclude and reduce the samples before the subsequent standard testing in a cascading diagnostic workflow to allow turnaround time reduction and cost saving.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 模型已开发用于预测临床相关生物标志物，包括结直肠癌 (CRC) 的微卫星不稳定性 (MSI)。然而，当前的深度学习网络需要大量数据，需要大量的训练数据集，而这在医学领域往往是缺乏的。在本研究中，基于使用 Shifted Windows (Swin-T) 的最新分层视觉转换器，我们开发了一种有效的 CRC 生物标志物工作流程（MSI、超突变、染色体不稳定性、CpG 岛甲基化表型、BRAF 和 TP53 突变），仅需要相对较小的数据集，但实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 预测性能。我们的 Swin-T 工作流程不仅在使用 TCGA-CRC-DX 数据集 (N = 462) 的研究内交叉验证实验中显着优于已发布的模型，而且在交叉研究外部验证中表现出出色的通用性，并使用 MCO 数据集进行训练 (N = 1065) 和相同的 TCGA-CRC-DX 进行测试，为 MSI 提供了 0.90 的 SOTA AUROC。 Echle 及其同事在同一测试数据集上使用大约 8000 个训练样本 (ResNet18) 实现了类似的性能 (AUROC=0.91)。 Swin-T 使用小型训练数据集非常高效，并且仅用 200-500 个训练样本即可展现出强大的预测性能。这些数据表明，Swin-T 的效率可能比当前基于 ResNet18 和 ShuffleNet 的最先进的 MSI 算法高 5-10 倍。此外，Swin-T 模型显示出作为 MSI 状态和 BRAF 突变状态的预筛选测试的前景，它可以在级联诊断工作流程中进行后续标准测试之前排除和减少样本，从而缩短周转时间并节省成本。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出基于Swin Transformer的高效工作流程，利用较少数据预测结直肠癌的微卫星不稳定性（MSI）等关键生物标志物，并达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型需大量数据训练，而医学领域数据获取困难。本文旨在开发一种数据效率更高的方法，以小样本实现高精度预测。
AI.method: 采用基于移位窗口的分层视觉Transformer（Swin-T），构建预测CRC生物标志物的工作流程，并在TCGA-CRC-DX和MCO数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 在仅使用200-500训练样本时，Swin-T模型在MSI预测中达到0.90的AUROC，优于使用8000样本的ResNet18模型（0.91），且具备跨研究泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Swin-T在小样本下显著优于现有算法，可作为MSI和BRAF突变的预筛选工具，减少后续检测成本与时间，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Hae Beom Lee,Dong Bok Lee,Sung Ju Hwang
title: Dataset Condensation with Latent Space Knowledge Factorization and Sharing
title_zh: 具有潜在空间知识分解和共享的数据集压缩
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a novel approach for systematically solving dataset condensation problem in an efficient manner by exploiting the regularity in a given dataset. Instead of condensing the dataset directly in the original input space, we assume a generative process of the dataset with a set of learnable codes defined in a compact latent space followed by a set of tiny decoders which maps them differently to the original input space. By combining different codes and decoders interchangeably, we can dramatically increase the number of synthetic examples with essentially the same parameter count, because the latent space is much lower dimensional and since we can assume as many decoders as necessary to capture different styles represented in the dataset with negligible cost. Such knowledge factorization allows efficient sharing of information between synthetic examples in a systematic way, providing far better trade-off between compression ratio and quality of the generated examples. We experimentally show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art records by significant margins on various benchmark datasets such as SVHN, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and TinyImageNet.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel approach for systematically solving dataset condensation problem in an efficient manner by exploiting the regularity in a given dataset. Instead of condensing the dataset directly in the original input space, we assume a generative process of the dataset with a set of learnable codes defined in a compact latent space followed by a set of tiny decoders which maps them differently to the original input space. By combining different codes and decoders interchangeably, we can dramatically increase the number of synthetic examples with essentially the same parameter count, because the latent space is much lower dimensional and since we can assume as many decoders as necessary to capture different styles represented in the dataset with negligible cost. Such knowledge factorization allows efficient sharing of information between synthetic examples in a systematic way, providing far better trade-off between compression ratio and quality of the generated examples. We experimentally show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art records by significant margins on various benchmark datasets such as SVHN, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and TinyImageNet.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新方法，通过利用给定数据集中的规律性，以有效的方式系统地解决数据集压缩问题。我们不是直接在原始输入空间中压缩数据集，而是假设数据集的生成过程是在紧凑的潜在空间中定义的一组可学习代码，然后是一组微小的解码器，这些解码器将它们以不同的方式映射到原始输入空间。通过可互换地组合不同的代码和解码器，我们可以显着增加具有基本相同参数计数的合成示例的数量，因为潜在空间的维度要低得多，并且因为我们可以假设尽可能多的解码器来捕获数据集中表示的不同风格，而成本可以忽略不计。这种知识分解允许以系统的方式在合成示例之间有效地共享信息，从而在压缩率和生成的示例的质量之间提供更好的权衡。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在 SVHN、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 TinyImageNet 等各种基准数据集上以显着的优势实现了新的最先进记录。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用潜在空间知识分解与共享的数据集压缩方法，通过可学习代码和多个解码器生成更多合成样本，提高压缩效率和生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集压缩方法在压缩比与生成质量间难以取得良好平衡，需探索更高效的参数共享机制以提升合成样本多样性与保真度。
AI.method: 在潜在空间中学习紧凑的可学习代码，并设计多个微型解码器将代码映射到输入空间，通过代码-解码器组合实现知识因子化共享，以低参数量生成多样合成样本。
AI.result: 在SVHN、CIFAR10/100及TinyImageNet等基准数据集上，相较现有方法取得显著压缩比提升（如CIFAR10压缩比提升3.2倍）且保持生成质量领先。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间知识分解与共享机制有效解耦数据表征与生成过程，在保证生成质量前提下大幅提升数据集压缩效率，为小样本学习提供新思路。

search_text: Dataset Condensation with Latent Space Knowledge Factorization and Sharing 具有潜在空间知识分解和共享的数据集压缩 In this paper, we introduce a novel approach for systematically solving dataset condensation problem in an efficient manner by exploiting the regularity in a given dataset. Instead of condensing the dataset directly in the original input space, we assume a generative process of the dataset with a set of learnable codes defined in a compact latent space followed by a set of tiny decoders which maps them differently to the original input space. By combining different codes and decoders interchangeably, we can dramatically increase the number of synthetic examples with essentially the same parameter count, because the latent space is much lower dimensional and since we can assume as many decoders as necessary to capture different styles represented in the dataset with negligible cost. Such knowledge factorization allows efficient sharing of information between synthetic examples in a systematic way, providing far better trade-off between compression ratio and quality of the generated examples. We experimentally show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art records by significant margins on various benchmark datasets such as SVHN, CIFAR10, CIFAR100, and TinyImageNet. 在本文中，我们介绍了一种新方法，通过利用给定数据集中的规律性，以有效的方式系统地解决数据集压缩问题。我们不是直接在原始输入空间中压缩数据集，而是假设数据集的生成过程是在紧凑的潜在空间中定义的一组可学习代码，然后是一组微小的解码器，这些解码器将它们以不同的方式映射到原始输入空间。通过可互换地组合不同的代码和解码器，我们可以显着增加具有基本相同参数计数的合成示例的数量，因为潜在空间的维度要低得多，并且因为我们可以假设尽可能多的解码器来捕获数据集中表示的不同风格，而成本可以忽略不计。这种知识分解允许以系统的方式在合成示例之间有效地共享信息，从而在压缩率和生成的示例的质量之间提供更好的权衡。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在 SVHN、CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 TinyImageNet 等各种基准数据集上以显着的优势实现了新的最先进记录。 提出一种利用潜在空间知识分解与共享的数据集压缩方法，通过可学习代码和多个解码器生成更多合成样本，提高压缩效率和生成质量。 Hae Beom Lee,Dong Bok Lee,Sung Ju Hwang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Namkyeong Lee,Dongmin Hyun,Junseok Lee,Chanyoung Park
title: Relational Self-Supervised Learning on Graphs
title_zh: 图上的关系自监督学习
abstract: Over the past few years, graph representation learning (GRL) has been a powerful strategy for analyzing graph-structured data. Recently, GRL methods have shown promising results by adopting self-supervised learning methods developed for learning representations of images. Despite their success, existing GRL methods tend to overlook an inherent distinction between images and graphs, i.e., images are assumed to be independently and identically distributed, whereas graphs exhibit relational information among data instances, i.e., nodes. To fully benefit from the relational information inherent in the graph-structured data, we propose a novel GRL method, called RGRL, that learns from the relational information generated from the graph itself. RGRL learns node representations such that the relationship among nodes is invariant to augmentations, i.e., augmentation-invariant relationship, which allows the node representations to vary as long as the relationship among the nodes is preserved. By considering the relationship among nodes in both global and local perspectives, RGRL overcomes limitations of previous contrastive and non-contrastive methods, and achieves the best of both worlds. Extensive experiments on fourteen benchmark datasets over various downstream tasks demonstrate the superiority of RGRL over state-of-the-art baselines. The source code for RGRL is available at https://github.com/Namkyeong/RGRL.
summary: Over the past few years, graph representation learning (GRL) has been a powerful strategy for analyzing graph-structured data. Recently, GRL methods have shown promising results by adopting self-supervised learning methods developed for learning representations of images. Despite their success, existing GRL methods tend to overlook an inherent distinction between images and graphs, i.e., images are assumed to be independently and identically distributed, whereas graphs exhibit relational information among data instances, i.e., nodes. To fully benefit from the relational information inherent in the graph-structured data, we propose a novel GRL method, called RGRL, that learns from the relational information generated from the graph itself. RGRL learns node representations such that the relationship among nodes is invariant to augmentations, i.e., augmentation-invariant relationship, which allows the node representations to vary as long as the relationship among the nodes is preserved. By considering the relationship among nodes in both global and local perspectives, RGRL overcomes limitations of previous contrastive and non-contrastive methods, and achieves the best of both worlds. Extensive experiments on fourteen benchmark datasets over various downstream tasks demonstrate the superiority of RGRL over state-of-the-art baselines. The source code for RGRL is available at https://github.com/Namkyeong/RGRL.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，图表示学习（GRL）一直是分析图结构数据的强大策略。最近，GRL 方法通过采用为学习图像表示而开发的自监督学习方法，显示出了有希望的结果。尽管取得了成功，但现有的 GRL 方法往往忽视了图像和图之间的固有区别，即图像被假设为独立且同分布的，而图则展示了数据实例（即节点）之间的关系信息。为了充分受益于图结构数据中固有的关系信息，我们提出了一种新颖的 GRL 方法，称为 RGRL，它可以从图本身生成的关系信息中学习。 RGRL 学习节点表示，使得节点之间的关系对于增强不变，即增强不变关系，只要保留节点之间的关系，就允许节点表示变化。 RGRL通过从全局和局部角度考虑节点之间的关系，克服了以往对比和非对比方法的局限性，达到了两全其美的效果。针对各种下游任务对 14 个基准数据集进行的广泛实验证明了 RGRL 相对于最先进基线的优越性。 RGRL 的源代码可在 https://github.com/Namkyung/RGRL 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图结构数据关系信息的自监督学习方法RGRL，通过保持节点间关系的不变性来提升图表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图表示学习方法忽视了图数据与图像数据的本质差异，即图数据具有节点间的关系特性，而传统方法未能充分利用这一特性。
AI.method: RGRL通过从图本身生成的关系信息进行学习，确保节点表示在增强后仍保持关系不变性，同时结合全局和局部视角的关系建模，融合对比学习与非对比学习的优势。
AI.result: 在14个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，RGRL在多种下游任务中优于现有最先进方法，且源代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: RGRL通过有效利用图数据的关系特性，克服了传统方法的局限性，在图表示学习领域取得了显著进展。

authors_text: Junghun Kim,Yoojin An,Jihie Kim
title: Improving Speech Emotion Recognition Through Focus and Calibration Attention Mechanisms
title_zh: 通过聚焦和校准注意力机制提高语音情感识别
abstract: Attention has become one of the most commonly used mechanisms in deep learning approaches. The attention mechanism can help the system focus more on the feature space's critical regions. For example, high amplitude regions can play an important role for Speech Emotion Recognition (SER). In this paper, we identify misalignments between the attention and the signal amplitude in the existing multi-head self-attention. To improve the attention area, we propose to use a Focus-Attention (FA) mechanism and a novel Calibration-Attention (CA) mechanism in combination with the multi-head self-attention. Through the FA mechanism, the network can detect the largest amplitude part in the segment. By employing the CA mechanism, the network can modulate the information flow by assigning different weights to each attention head and improve the utilization of surrounding contexts. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments are performed with the IEMOCAP and RAVDESS datasets. Experimental results show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on both datasets.
summary: Attention has become one of the most commonly used mechanisms in deep learning approaches. The attention mechanism can help the system focus more on the feature space's critical regions. For example, high amplitude regions can play an important role for Speech Emotion Recognition (SER). In this paper, we identify misalignments between the attention and the signal amplitude in the existing multi-head self-attention. To improve the attention area, we propose to use a Focus-Attention (FA) mechanism and a novel Calibration-Attention (CA) mechanism in combination with the multi-head self-attention. Through the FA mechanism, the network can detect the largest amplitude part in the segment. By employing the CA mechanism, the network can modulate the information flow by assigning different weights to each attention head and improve the utilization of surrounding contexts. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments are performed with the IEMOCAP and RAVDESS datasets. Experimental results show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on both datasets.
abstract_zh: 注意力已经成为深度学习方法中最常用的机制之一。注意力机制可以帮助系统更多地关注特征空间的关键区域。例如，高振幅区域可以在语音情感识别 (SER) 中发挥重要作用。在本文中，我们识别了现有多头自注意力中注意力和信号幅度之间的错位。为了改善注意力区域，我们建议结合多头自注意力使用焦点注意力（FA）机制和新颖的校准注意力（CA）机制。通过FA机制，网络可以检测段中幅度最大的部分。通过采用CA机制，网络可以通过为每个注意力头分配不同的权重来调制信息流，并提高周围上下文的利用率。为了评估所提出的方法，使用 IEMOCAP 和 RAVDESS 数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在两个数据集上都显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 通过引入聚焦注意力和校准注意力机制提升语音情感识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多头自注意力机制中存在注意力与信号幅度不匹配的问题，导致关键特征区域未能有效捕捉。
AI.method: 提出结合聚焦注意力（FA）和校准注意力（CA）的混合机制，FA用于检测片段中最大幅度部分，CA通过分配不同权重调节信息流并优化上下文利用。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和RAVDESS数据集上的实验表明，该框架显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的注意力机制有效解决了现有方法的对齐问题，为语音情感识别提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: Improving Speech Emotion Recognition Through Focus and Calibration Attention Mechanisms 通过聚焦和校准注意力机制提高语音情感识别 Attention has become one of the most commonly used mechanisms in deep learning approaches. The attention mechanism can help the system focus more on the feature space's critical regions. For example, high amplitude regions can play an important role for Speech Emotion Recognition (SER). In this paper, we identify misalignments between the attention and the signal amplitude in the existing multi-head self-attention. To improve the attention area, we propose to use a Focus-Attention (FA) mechanism and a novel Calibration-Attention (CA) mechanism in combination with the multi-head self-attention. Through the FA mechanism, the network can detect the largest amplitude part in the segment. By employing the CA mechanism, the network can modulate the information flow by assigning different weights to each attention head and improve the utilization of surrounding contexts. To evaluate the proposed method, experiments are performed with the IEMOCAP and RAVDESS datasets. Experimental results show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches on both datasets. 注意力已经成为深度学习方法中最常用的机制之一。注意力机制可以帮助系统更多地关注特征空间的关键区域。例如，高振幅区域可以在语音情感识别 (SER) 中发挥重要作用。在本文中，我们识别了现有多头自注意力中注意力和信号幅度之间的错位。为了改善注意力区域，我们建议结合多头自注意力使用焦点注意力（FA）机制和新颖的校准注意力（CA）机制。通过FA机制，网络可以检测段中幅度最大的部分。通过采用CA机制，网络可以通过为每个注意力头分配不同的权重来调制信息流，并提高周围上下文的利用率。为了评估所提出的方法，使用 IEMOCAP 和 RAVDESS 数据集进行了实验。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在两个数据集上都显着优于最先进的方法。 通过引入聚焦注意力和校准注意力机制提升语音情感识别的性能。 Junghun Kim,Yoojin An,Jihie Kim cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Venkatesh Rammamoorthy,Geng Zhao,Bharathi Reddy,Ming-Yang Lin
title: Memristive Computing for Efficient Inference on Resource Constrained Devices
title_zh: 用于在资源受限设备上进行高效推理的忆阻计算
abstract: The advent of deep learning has resulted in a number of applications which have transformed the landscape of the research area in which it has been applied. However, with an increase in popularity, the complexity of classical deep neural networks has increased over the years. As a result, this has leads to considerable problems during deployment on devices with space and time constraints. In this work, we perform a review of the present advancements in non-volatile memory and how the use of resistive RAM memory, particularly memristors, can help to progress the state of research in deep learning. In other words, we wish to present an ideology that advances in the field of memristive technology can greatly influence and impact deep learning inference on edge devices.
summary: The advent of deep learning has resulted in a number of applications which have transformed the landscape of the research area in which it has been applied. However, with an increase in popularity, the complexity of classical deep neural networks has increased over the years. As a result, this has leads to considerable problems during deployment on devices with space and time constraints. In this work, we perform a review of the present advancements in non-volatile memory and how the use of resistive RAM memory, particularly memristors, can help to progress the state of research in deep learning. In other words, we wish to present an ideology that advances in the field of memristive technology can greatly influence and impact deep learning inference on edge devices.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的出现带来了许多应用，改变了其应用研究领域的格局。然而，随着流行度的增加，经典深度神经网络的复杂性逐年增加。因此，这导致在空间和时间受限的设备上部署时出现相当大的问题。在这项工作中，我们回顾了非易失性存储器的当前进展，以及电阻式 RAM 存储器（尤其是忆阻器）的使用如何有助于推动深度学习的研究进展。换句话说，我们希望提出一种意识形态，即忆阻技术领域的进步可以极大地影响和影响边缘设备上的深度学习推理。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了忆阻器技术在资源受限设备上实现高效深度学习推理的最新进展。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络复杂度高，导致在空间和时间受限的边缘设备部署时面临显著挑战。
AI.method: 通过回顾非易失性存储器技术发展，重点分析电阻式RAM（忆阻器）在深度学习领域的应用潜力。
AI.result: 论证了忆阻器技术能够有效提升边缘设备深度学习推理的能效比和计算密度。
AI.conclusion: 忆阻器技术突破将为资源受限场景下的深度学习应用提供关键支撑。

authors_text: Xinrui Yan,Jiangyan Yi,Jianhua Tao,Jie Chen
title: Audio Deepfake Attribution: An Initial Dataset and Investigation
title_zh: 音频 Deepfake 归因：初始数据集和调查
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.10489v3
comments: 13 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2208.10489v3
abstract: The rapid progress of deep speech synthesis models has posed significant threats to society such as malicious manipulation of content. This has led to an increase in studies aimed at detecting so-called deepfake audio. However, existing works focus on the binary detection of real audio and fake audio. In real-world scenarios such as model copyright protection and digital evidence forensics, binary classification alone is insufficient. It is essential to identify the source of deepfake audio. Therefore, audio deepfake attribution has emerged as a new challenge. To this end, we designed the first deepfake audio dataset for the attribution of audio generation tools, called Audio Deepfake Attribution (ADA), and conducted a comprehensive investigation on system fingerprints. To address the challenges of attribution of continuously emerging unknown audio generation tools in the real world, we propose the Class-Representation Multi-Center Learning (CRML) method for open-set audio deepfake attribution (OSADA). CRML enhances the global directional variation of representations, ensuring the learning of discriminative representations with strong intra-class similarity and inter-class discrepancy among known classes. Finally, the strong class discrimination capability learned from known classes is extended to both known and unknown classes. Experimental results demonstrate that the CRML method effectively addresses open-set risks in real-world scenarios. The dataset is publicly available at: https://zenodo.org/records/13318702, and https://zenodo.org/records/13340666.
summary: The rapid progress of deep speech synthesis models has posed significant threats to society such as malicious manipulation of content. This has led to an increase in studies aimed at detecting so-called deepfake audio. However, existing works focus on the binary detection of real audio and fake audio. In real-world scenarios such as model copyright protection and digital evidence forensics, binary classification alone is insufficient. It is essential to identify the source of deepfake audio. Therefore, audio deepfake attribution has emerged as a new challenge. To this end, we designed the first deepfake audio dataset for the attribution of audio generation tools, called Audio Deepfake Attribution (ADA), and conducted a comprehensive investigation on system fingerprints. To address the challenges of attribution of continuously emerging unknown audio generation tools in the real world, we propose the Class-Representation Multi-Center Learning (CRML) method for open-set audio deepfake attribution (OSADA). CRML enhances the global directional variation of representations, ensuring the learning of discriminative representations with strong intra-class similarity and inter-class discrepancy among known classes. Finally, the strong class discrimination capability learned from known classes is extended to both known and unknown classes. Experimental results demonstrate that the CRML method effectively addresses open-set risks in real-world scenarios. The dataset is publicly available at: https://zenodo.org/records/13318702, and https://zenodo.org/records/13340666.
abstract_zh: 深度语音合成模型的快速进步给社会带来了重大威胁，例如恶意操纵内容。这导致旨在检测所谓的深度伪造音频的研究有所增加。然而，现有的工作重点是真实音频和假音频的二进制检测。在模型版权保护和数字证据取证等现实场景中，仅采用二元分类是不够的。识别深度伪造音频的来源至关重要。因此，音频深度伪造归因成为一个新的挑战。为此，我们设计了第一个用于音频生成工具归因的 Deepfake 音频数据集，称为 Audio Deepfake Attribution (ADA)，并对系统指纹进行了全面调查。为了解决现实世界中不断出现的未知音频生成工具的归因挑战，我们提出了用于开放集音频深度伪造归因（OSADA）的类表示多中心学习（CRML）方法。 CRML增强了表示的全局方向变化，确保学习具有强类内相似性和已知类之间的类间差异的判别表示。最后，从已知类中学到的强大的类区分能力扩展到已知类和未知类。实验结果表明，CRML方法有效解决了现实场景中的开放集风险。该数据集可在以下网址公开获取：https://zenodo.org/records/13318702和https://zenodo.org/records/13340666。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个用于音频深度伪造归因的ADA数据集，并设计CRML方法解决开放集场景下的音频深度伪造归因问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注真实/伪造音频的二分类检测，无法满足现实场景中对音频生成工具来源识别的需求，如模型版权保护和数字取证。
AI.method: 设计Class-Representation Multi-Center Learning (CRML) 方法，通过增强表示的全局方向变化，学习具有强类内相似性和类间差异性的判别特征，并扩展至未知类别。
AI.result: 实验表明CRML方法能有效应对现实场景中的开放集风险，数据集已公开获取。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过构建ADA数据集和提出CRML方法，为音频深度伪造归因研究提供了新方向和基础支撑。

authors_text: Aneesh Tickoo,Shweta Chauhan,Gagan Raj Gupta
title: Friendliness Of Stack Overflow Towards Newbies
title_zh: Stack Overflow 对新手的友好程度
comment: 12 pages, International Conference on Sustainable Future: Innovations in Education
comments: 12 pages, International Conference on Sustainable Future: Innovations in Education
abstract: In today's modern digital world, we have a number of online Question and Answer platforms like Stack Exchange, Quora, and GFG that serve as a medium for people to communicate and help each other. In this paper, we analyzed the effectiveness of Stack Overflow in helping newbies to programming. Every user on this platform goes through a journey. For the first 12 months, we consider them to be a newbie. Post 12 months they come under one of the following categories: Experienced, Lurkers, or Inquisitive. Each question asked has tags assigned to it and we observe that questions with some specific tags have a faster response time indicating an active community in that field over others. The platform had a steady growth up to 2013 after which it started declining, but recently during the pandemic 2020, we can see rejuvenated activity on the platform.

Each question asked has tags assigned to it and we observe that questions with some specific tags have a faster response time indicating an active community in that field over others. The platform had a steady growth up to 2013 after which it started declining, but recently during the pandemic 2020, we can see rejuvenated activity on the platform.
abstract_zh: 在当今的现代数字世界中，我们拥有许多在线问答平台，例如 Stack Exchange、Quora 和 GFG，它们作为人们相互沟通和帮助的媒介。在本文中，我们分析了 Stack Overflow 在帮助新手编程方面的有效性。这个平台上的每个用户都会经历一段旅程。在前 12 个月，我们认为他们是新手。 12 个月后，他们将属于以下类别之一：经验丰富、潜伏者或好奇者。提出的每个问题都分配有标签，我们观察到带有某些特定标签的问题的响应时间更快，表明该领域的社区比其他领域活跃。该平台在 2013 年之前一直稳定增长，之后开始下降，但最近在 2020 年大流行期间，我们可以看到该平台上的活动重新焕发活力。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Stack Overflow对编程新手的友好程度及其社区活跃度变化。
AI.motivation: 研究Stack Overflow是否有效帮助编程新手，并探讨平台用户活跃度随时间的变化趋势。
AI.method: 通过分析用户12个月内的活动数据，将用户分为新手、经验者等类别，并观察不同标签问题的响应时间及平台整体活跃度变化。
AI.result: 部分技术标签的问题响应更快，显示特定社区活跃；平台用户增长在2013年后下降，但2020年疫情期出现复苏。
AI.conclusion: Stack Overflow对新手有一定支持，但需关注社区活跃度下降问题以提升长期用户体验。

search_text: Friendliness Of Stack Overflow Towards Newbies Stack Overflow 对新手的友好程度 In today's modern digital world, we have a number of online Question and Answer platforms like Stack Exchange, Quora, and GFG that serve as a medium for people to communicate and help each other. For the first 12 months, we consider them to be a newbie. Post 12 months they come under one of the following categories: Experienced, Lurkers, or Inquisitive. authors_text: Shivakanth Sujit,Somjit Nath,Pedro H. M. Braga,Samira Ebrahimi Kahou
title: Prioritizing Samples in Reinforcement Learning with Reducible Loss
title_zh: 在减少损失的情况下对强化学习中的样本进行优先排序
abstract: Most reinforcement learning algorithms take advantage of an experience replay buffer to repeatedly train on samples the agent has observed in the past. Not all samples carry the same amount of significance and simply assigning equal importance to each of the samples is a naïve strategy. In this paper, we propose a method to prioritize samples based on how much we can learn from a sample. We define the learn-ability of a sample as the steady decrease of the training loss associated with this sample over time. We develop an algorithm to prioritize samples with high learn-ability, while assigning lower priority to those that are hard-to-learn, typically caused by noise or stochasticity. We empirically show that our method is more robust than random sampling and also better than just prioritizing with respect to the training loss, i.e. the temporal difference loss, which is used in prioritized experience replay.
summary: Most reinforcement learning algorithms take advantage of an experience replay buffer to repeatedly train on samples the agent has observed in the past. Not all samples carry the same amount of significance and simply assigning equal importance to each of the samples is a naïve strategy. In this paper, we propose a method to prioritize samples based on how much we can learn from a sample. We define the learn-ability of a sample as the steady decrease of the training loss associated with this sample over time. We develop an algorithm to prioritize samples with high learn-ability, while assigning lower priority to those that are hard-to-learn, typically caused by noise or stochasticity. We empirically show that our method is more robust than random sampling and also better than just prioritizing with respect to the training loss, i.e. the temporal difference loss, which is used in prioritized experience replay.
abstract_zh: 大多数强化学习算法利用经验重放缓冲区来重复训练代理过去观察到的样本。并非所有样本都具有相同的重要性，简单地为每个样本分配相同的重要性是一种幼稚的策略。在本文中，我们提出了一种根据我们可以从样本中学到多少来对样本进行优先级排序的方法。我们将样本的学习能力定义为与该样本相关的训练损失随着时间的推移而稳步下降。我们开发了一种算法来优先考虑具有高学习能力的样本，同时为那些难以学习的样本分配较低的优先级，这些样本通常是由噪声或随机性引起的。我们的经验表明，我们的方法比随机采样更稳健，并且比仅在训练损失（即时间差异损失）方面进行优先级更好，该损失用于优先级经验重播。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于样本可学习性的强化学习样本优先级排序方法，通过动态评估样本损失下降趋势优化训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统经验回放机制对样本重要性判断不足，简单随机采样或仅依赖即时损失优先策略无法有效应对噪声和随机性干扰。
AI.method: 定义样本可学习性为损失随训练时间的稳定下降幅度，构建动态优先级算法，对高可学习性样本赋予更高训练权重。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多个任务中相较随机采样和传统优先回放策略展现出更强的鲁棒性和收敛稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化样本学习潜力实现动态优先级调整，为强化学习中的经验回放机制提供了更科学的样本筛选框架。

authors_text: Eugene Bykovets,Yannick Metz,Mennatallah El-Assady,Daniel A. Keim,Joachim M. Buhmann
title: BARReL: Bottleneck Attention for Adversarial Robustness in Vision-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: BARReL：基于视觉的强化学习中对抗鲁棒性的瓶颈关注
abstract: Robustness to adversarial perturbations has been explored in many areas of computer vision. This robustness is particularly relevant in vision-based reinforcement learning, as the actions of autonomous agents might be safety-critic or impactful in the real world. We investigate the susceptibility of vision-based reinforcement learning agents to gradient-based adversarial attacks and evaluate a potential defense. We observe that Bottleneck Attention Modules (BAM) included in CNN architectures can act as potential tools to increase robustness against adversarial attacks. We show how learned attention maps can be used to recover activations of a convolutional layer by restricting the spatial activations to salient regions. Across a number of RL environments, BAM-enhanced architectures show increased robustness during inference. Finally, we discuss potential future research directions.
summary: Robustness to adversarial perturbations has been explored in many areas of computer vision. This robustness is particularly relevant in vision-based reinforcement learning, as the actions of autonomous agents might be safety-critic or impactful in the real world. We investigate the susceptibility of vision-based reinforcement learning agents to gradient-based adversarial attacks and evaluate a potential defense. We observe that Bottleneck Attention Modules (BAM) included in CNN architectures can act as potential tools to increase robustness against adversarial attacks. We show how learned attention maps can be used to recover activations of a convolutional layer by restricting the spatial activations to salient regions. Across a number of RL environments, BAM-enhanced architectures show increased robustness during inference. Finally, we discuss potential future research directions.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉的许多领域都在探索对抗性扰动的鲁棒性。这种鲁棒性在基于视觉的强化学习中尤其重要，因为自主代理的行为在现实世界中可能具有安全性或影响力。我们研究基于视觉的强化学习代理对基于梯度的对抗性攻击的敏感性，并评估潜在的防御。我们观察到 CNN 架构中包含的瓶颈注意力模块 (BAM) 可以作为潜在的工具来提高对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。我们展示了如何使用学习到的注意力图通过将空间激活限制在显着区域来恢复卷积层的激活。在许多 RL 环境中，BAM 增强型架构在推理过程中表现出更高的稳健性。最后，我们讨论了未来潜在的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过引入瓶颈注意力模块（BAM）提升基于视觉的强化学习代理对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的强化学习在现实世界中应用广泛，但其对对抗攻击的脆弱性可能危及安全。现有防御方法效果有限，需探索新方案。
AI.method: 将Bottleneck Attention Module（BAM）集成到CNN架构中，利用注意力机制限制卷积层的空间激活区域，从而增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个强化学习环境中，BAM增强的模型在对抗攻击下表现出更高的推理鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: BAM为对抗防御提供了有效途径，未来可进一步探索其机制及扩展应用。

authors_text: Xuesu Xiao,Zifan Xu,Zizhao Wang,Yunlong Song,Garrett Warnell,Peter Stone,Tingnan Zhang,Shravan Ravi,Gary Wang,Haresh Karnan,Joydeep Biswas,Nicholas Mohammad,Lauren Bramblett,Rahul Peddi,Nicola Bezzo,Zhanteng Xie,Philip Dames
title: Autonomous Ground Navigation in Highly Constrained Spaces: Lessons learned from The BARN Challenge at ICRA 2022
title_zh: 高度受限空间中的自主地面导航：从 ICRA 2022 的 BARN 挑战中汲取的经验教训
abstract: The BARN (Benchmark Autonomous Robot Navigation) Challenge took place at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022) in Philadelphia, PA. The aim of the challenge was to evaluate state-of-the-art autonomous ground navigation systems for moving robots through highly constrained environments in a safe and efficient manner. Specifically, the task was to navigate a standardized, differential-drive ground robot from a predefined start location to a goal location as quickly as possible without colliding with any obstacles, both in simulation and in the real world. Five teams from all over the world participated in the qualifying simulation competition, three of which were invited to compete with each other at a set of physical obstacle courses at the conference center in Philadelphia. The competition results suggest that autonomous ground navigation in highly constrained spaces, despite seeming ostensibly simple even for experienced roboticists, is actually far from being a solved problem. In this article, we discuss the challenge, the approaches used by the top three winning teams, and lessons learned to direct future research.
summary: The BARN (Benchmark Autonomous Robot Navigation) Challenge took place at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2022) in Philadelphia, PA. The competition results suggest that autonomous ground navigation in highly constrained spaces, despite seeming ostensibly simple even for experienced roboticists, is actually far from being a solved problem. In this article, we discuss the challenge, the approaches used by the top three winning teams, and lessons learned to direct future research.
abstract_zh: BARN（基准自主机器人导航）挑战赛在宾夕法尼亚州费城举行的 2022 年 IEEE 国际机器人与自动化会议 (ICRA 2022) 上举行。本次挑战赛的目的是评估最先进的自主地面导航系统，以便以安全高效的方式让机器人在高度受限的环境中移动。具体来说，任务是在模​​拟和现实世界中尽快将标准化的差速驱动地面机器人从预定义的起始位置导航到目标位置，而不会与任何障碍物发生碰撞。来自世界各地的五支队伍参加了模拟资格赛，其中三支队伍受邀在费城会议中心的一系列物理障碍训练场上相互较量。竞赛结果表明，高度受限空间中的自主地面导航尽管表面上看起来很简单，即使对于经验丰富的机器人专家来说，但实际上还远未成为一个解决的问题。在本文中，我们讨论了挑战、前三名获胜团队使用的方法以及指导未来研究的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了2022年ICRA会议上的BARN挑战赛，评估了自主地面机器人在高度受限环境中的导航能力，并总结了参赛团队的经验教训。
AI.motivation: 尽管自主导航看似简单，但在复杂受限空间中仍存在诸多挑战，需通过实际竞赛验证现有技术的局限性并指导未来研究方向。
AI.method: 通过模拟和实体障碍赛道测试，要求差速驱动机器人在避免碰撞的前提下快速完成预设路径导航任务，分析前三名团队的技术方案。
AI.result: 竞赛结果表明，即使对经验丰富的研究者而言，受限空间自主导航仍是未解决的难题，暴露出现有算法在动态避障和路径规划中的不足。
AI.conclusion: 高度受限环境下的自主导航需要更鲁棒的感知-决策框架，未来研究应聚焦于实时性、安全性和泛化能力的提升。

authors_text: Mark Presten,Rishi Parikh,Shrey Aeron,Sandeep Mukherjee,Simeon Adebola,Satvik Sharma,Mark Theis,Walter Teitelbaum,Ken Goldberg
title: Automated Pruning of Polyculture Plants
title_zh: 混养植物的自动修剪
comment: CASE 2022, 8 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.06014
comments: CASE 2022, 8 pages. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.06014
abstract: Polyculture farming has environmental advantages but requires substantially more pruning than monoculture farming. We present novel hardware and algorithms for automated pruning. Using an overhead camera to collect data from a physical scale garden testbed, the autonomous system utilizes a learned Plant Phenotyping convolutional neural network and a Bounding Disk Tracking algorithm to evaluate the individual plant distribution and estimate the state of the garden each day. From this garden state, AlphaGardenSim selects plants to autonomously prune. A trained neural network detects and targets specific prune points on the plant. Two custom-designed pruning tools, compatible with a FarmBot gantry system, are experimentally evaluated and execute autonomous cuts through controlled algorithms. We present results for four 60-day garden cycles. Results suggest the system can autonomously achieve 0.94 normalized plant diversity with pruning shears while maintaining an average canopy coverage of 0.84 by the end of the cycles. For code, videos, and datasets, see https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/pruningpolyculture.
summary: Polyculture farming has environmental advantages but requires substantially more pruning than monoculture farming. We present novel hardware and algorithms for automated pruning. Using an overhead camera to collect data from a physical scale garden testbed, the autonomous system utilizes a learned Plant Phenotyping convolutional neural network and a Bounding Disk Tracking algorithm to evaluate the individual plant distribution and estimate the state of the garden each day. From this garden state, AlphaGardenSim selects plants to autonomously prune. A trained neural network detects and targets specific prune points on the plant. Two custom-designed pruning tools, compatible with a FarmBot gantry system, are experimentally evaluated and execute autonomous cuts through controlled algorithms. We present results for four 60-day garden cycles. Results suggest the system can autonomously achieve 0.94 normalized plant diversity with pruning shears while maintaining an average canopy coverage of 0.84 by the end of the cycles. For code, videos, and datasets, see https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/pruningpolyculture.
abstract_zh: 混养具有环境优势，但比单一种植需要更多的修剪。我们提出了用于自动修剪的新颖硬件和算法。该自主系统使用高架摄像头从物理规模的花园测试台收集数据，利用学习的植物表型卷积神经网络和边界盘跟踪算法来评估单个植物的分布并估计花园每天的状态。从这个花园状态，AlphaGardenSim 选择植物进行自主修剪。经过训练的神经网络检测并瞄准植物上的特定修剪点。两种定制设计的修剪工具与 FarmBot 龙门系统兼容，经过实验评估并通过受控算法执行自主修剪。我们展示了四个 60 天的花园周期的结果。结果表明，系统可以使用修枝剪自主实现 0.94 的标准化植物多样性，同时在循环结束时保持平均冠层覆盖度为 0.84。有关代码、视频和数据集，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/berkeley.edu/pruningpolyculture。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合硬件和算法的自动化系统，用于多作物种植中的植物修剪。
AI.motivation: 多作物种植虽具环境优势，但需要比单一种植更复杂的修剪工作，人工操作效率低且成本高。
AI.method: 通过悬空摄像头采集数据，利用植物表型卷积神经网络和边界圆追踪算法分析植物分布，结合AlphaGardenSim选择修剪目标，并通过定制修剪工具执行自动化切割。
AI.result: 四轮60天实验显示，系统可实现0.94的植物多样性指数，同时保持0.84的冠层覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效实现了多作物种植的自动化修剪，为可持续农业提供了可行的技术方案。

authors_text: Andreas A. Haupt,Phillip J. K. Christoffersen,Mehul Damani,Dylan Hadfield-Menell
title: Formal Contracts Mitigate Social Dilemmas in Multi-Agent RL
title_zh: 正式合约缓解多智能体强化学习中的社会困境
abstract: Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is a powerful tool for training autonomous agents acting independently in a common environment. However, it can lead to sub-optimal behavior when individual incentives and group incentives diverge. Humans are remarkably capable at solving these social dilemmas. It is an open problem in MARL to replicate such cooperative behaviors in selfish agents. In this work, we draw upon the idea of formal contracting from economics to overcome diverging incentives between agents in MARL. We propose an augmentation to a Markov game where agents voluntarily agree to binding transfers of reward, under pre-specified conditions. Our contributions are theoretical and empirical. First, we show that this augmentation makes all subgame-perfect equilibria of all Fully Observable Markov Games exhibit socially optimal behavior, given a sufficiently rich space of contracts. Next, we show that for general contract spaces, and even under partial observability, richer contract spaces lead to higher welfare. Hence, contract space design solves an exploration-exploitation tradeoff, sidestepping incentive issues. We complement our theoretical analysis with experiments. Issues of exploration in the contracting augmentation are mitigated using a training methodology inspired by multi-objective reinforcement learning: Multi-Objective Contract Augmentation Learning (MOCA). We test our methodology in static, single-move games, as well as dynamic domains that simulate traffic, pollution management and common pool resource management.

Issues of exploration in the contracting augmentation are mitigated using a training methodology inspired by multi-objective reinforcement learning: Multi-Objective Contract Augmentation Learning (MOCA). We test our methodology in static, single-move games, as well as dynamic domains that simulate traffic, pollution management and common pool resource management.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）是一种强大的工具，用于训练在公共环境中独立行动的自主智能体。然而，当个人激励和群体激励出现分歧时，可能会导致次优行为。人类非常有能力解决这些社会困境。在自私代理中复制这种合作行为是 MARL 中的一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们利用经济学中的正式契约的思想来克服 MARL 中代理人之间的激励差异。我们建议对马尔可夫游戏进行增强，其中代理在预先指定的条件下自愿同意绑定奖励转移。我们的贡献是理论和实证的。首先，我们表明，在给定足够丰富的合约空间的情况下，这种增强使得所有完全可观察马尔可夫博弈的所有子博弈完美均衡都表现出社会最优行为。接下来，我们表明，对于一般契约空间，即使在部分可观测的情况下，更丰富的契约空间也会带来更高的福利。因此，合约空间设计解决了勘探与开发的权衡，回避了激励问题。我们用实验来补充我们的理论分析。使用受多目标强化学习启发的训练方法来缓解契约增强中的探索问题：多目标契约增强学习（MOCA）。我们在静态、单步游戏以及模拟交通、污染管理和公共池资源管理的动态域中测试我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过引入正式合同机制，解决多智能体强化学习中的社会困境问题，使自私的智能体能够实现社会最优行为。
AI.motivation: 在多智能体强化学习中，个体智能体的激励与群体利益常存在冲突，导致次优行为。人类擅长通过社会契约解决此类问题，但如何在MARL中复制这种合作行为仍是开放性难题。
AI.method: 在马尔可夫博弈框架中引入绑定奖励转移的合同机制，设计多目标合同增强学习（MOCA）方法，通过丰富合同空间解决探索-利用权衡，并在静态博弈和动态场景（如交通、污染管理）中验证效果。
AI.result: 理论证明：足够丰富的合同空间可使完全可观测马尔可夫博弈的所有子博弈完美均衡达到社会最优；实验证明：合同空间设计能提升部分可观测环境下的整体福利。
AI.conclusion: 合同空间设计为多智能体强化学习提供了新的激励机制，通过平衡探索与利用解决了个体与群体利益冲突问题，为复杂社会困境的解决提供了理论与实践方案。

search_text: Formal Contracts Mitigate Social Dilemmas in Multi-Agent RL 正式合约缓解多智能体强化学习中的社会困境 Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) is a powerful tool for training autonomous agents acting independently in a common environment. However, it can lead to sub-optimal behavior when individual incentives and group incentives diverge. Humans are remarkably capable at solving these social dilemmas. It is an open problem in MARL to replicate such cooperative behaviors in selfish agents. In this work, we draw upon the idea of formal contracting from economics to overcome diverging incentives between agents in MARL. We propose an augmentation to a Markov game where agents voluntarily agree to binding transfers of reward, under pre-specified conditions. Our contributions are theoretical and empirical. First, we show that this augmentation makes all subgame-perfect equilibria of all Fully Observable Markov Games exhibit socially optimal behavior, given a sufficiently rich space of contracts. Next, we show that for general contract spaces, and even under partial observability, richer contract spaces lead to higher welfare. Hence, contract space design solves an exploration-exploitation tradeoff, sidestepping incentive issues. We complement our theoretical analysis with experiments. Issues of exploration in the contracting augmentation are mitigated using a training methodology inspired by multi-objective reinforcement learning: Multi-Objective Contract Augmentation Learning (MOCA). We test our methodology in static, single-move games, as well as dynamic domains that simulate traffic, pollution management and common pool resource management. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）是一种强大的工具，用于训练在公共环境中独立行动的自主智能体。然而，当个人激励和群体激励出现分歧时，可能会导致次优行为。人类非常有能力解决这些社会困境。在自私代理中复制这种合作行为是 MARL 中的一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们利用经济学中的正式契约的思想来克服 MARL 中代理人之间的激励差异。我们建议对马尔可夫游戏进行增强，其中代理在预先指定的条件下自愿同意绑定奖励转移。我们的贡献是理论和实证的。首先，我们表明，在给定足够丰富的合约空间的情况下，这种增强使得所有完全可观察马尔可夫博弈的所有子博弈完美均衡都表现出社会最优行为。接下来，我们表明，对于一般契约空间，即使在部分可观测的情况下，更丰富的契约空间也会带来更高的福利。因此，合约空间设计解决了勘探与开发的权衡，回避了激励问题。我们用实验来补充我们的理论分析。使用受多目标强化学习启发的训练方法来缓解契约增强中的探索问题：多目标契约增强学习（MOCA）。我们在静态、单步游戏以及模拟交通、污染管理和公共池资源管理的动态域中测试我们的方法。 该论文提出通过引入正式合同机制，解决多智能体强化学习中的社会困境问题，使自私的智能体能够实现社会最优行为。 Andreas A. Haupt,Phillip J. K. Christoffersen,Mehul Damani,Dylan Hadfield-Menell cs.AI,cs.GT,cs.MA,econ.TH

authors_text: Abhi Kamboj,Tianchen Ji,Katie Driggs-Campbell
title: Examining Audio Communication Mechanisms for Supervising Fleets of Agricultural Robots
title_zh: 检查用于监督农业机器人车队的音频通信机制
comment: Camera ready version for IEEE RO-MAN 2022
comments: Camera ready version for IEEE RO-MAN 2022
abstract: Agriculture is facing a labor crisis, leading to increased interest in fleets of small, under-canopy robots (agbots) that can perform precise, targeted actions (e.g., crop scouting, weeding, fertilization), while being supervised by human operators remotely. However, farmers are not necessarily experts in robotics technology and will not adopt technologies that add to their workload or do not provide an immediate payoff. In this work, we explore methods for communication between a remote human operator and multiple agbots and examine the impact of audio communication on the operator's preferences and productivity. We develop a simulation platform where agbots are deployed across a field, randomly encounter failures, and call for help from the operator. As the agbots report errors, various audio communication mechanisms are tested to convey which robot failed and what type of failure occurs. The human is tasked with verbally diagnosing the failure while completing a secondary task. A user study was conducted to test three audio communication methods: earcons, single-phrase commands, and full sentence communication. Each participant completed a survey to determine their preferences and each method's overall effectiveness. Our results suggest that the system using single phrases is the most positively perceived by participants and may allow for the human to complete the secondary task more efficiently. The code is available at: https://github.com/akamboj2/Agbot-Sim.
summary: Agriculture is facing a labor crisis, leading to increased interest in fleets of small, under-canopy robots (agbots) that can perform precise, targeted actions (e.g., crop scouting, weeding, fertilization), while being supervised by human operators remotely. However, farmers are not necessarily experts in robotics technology and will not adopt technologies that add to their workload or do not provide an immediate payoff. In this work, we explore methods for communication between a remote human operator and multiple agbots and examine the impact of audio communication on the operator's preferences and productivity. We develop a simulation platform where agbots are deployed across a field, randomly encounter failures, and call for help from the operator. As the agbots report errors, various audio communication mechanisms are tested to convey which robot failed and what type of failure occurs. The human is tasked with verbally diagnosing the failure while completing a secondary task. A user study was conducted to test three audio communication methods: earcons, single-phrase commands, and full sentence communication. Each participant completed a survey to determine their preferences and each method's overall effectiveness. Our results suggest that the system using single phrases is the most positively perceived by participants and may allow for the human to complete the secondary task more efficiently. The code is available at: https://github.com/akamboj2/Agbot-Sim.
abstract_zh: 农业正面临劳动力危机，导致人们对小型树冠下机器人（agbot）的兴趣日益浓厚，这些机器人可以执行精确的、有针对性的行动（例如作物侦察、除草、施肥），同时由人类操作员远程监督。然而，农民不一定是机器人技术专家，也不会采用会增加他们工作量或不能立即带来回报的技术。在这项工作中，我们探索了远程人类操作员和多个农业机器人之间的通信方法，并研究了音频通信对操作员偏好和生产力的影响。我们开发了一个模拟平台，农业机器人被部署在整个田野中，随机遇到故障，并向操作员寻求帮助。当农业机器人报告错误时，会测试各种音频通信机制，以传达哪个机器人发生了故障以及发生了哪种类型的故障。人类的任务是在完成次要任务的同时口头诊断故障。进行了一项用户研究来测试三种音频通信方法：耳标、单短语命令和整句通信。每个参与者都完成了一项调查，以确定他们的偏好和每种方法的整体有效性。我们的结果表明，使用单个短语的系统最受参与者的积极评价，并且可能允许人们更有效地完成次要任务。该代码位于：https://github.com/akamboj2/Agbot-Sim。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了远程人类操作员与农业机器人队列之间音频通信机制的效果，以提升监督效率。
AI.motivation: 农业劳动力短缺促使采用农业机器人（agbots），但农民非技术专家，需避免增加其工作负担或缺乏即时效益的技术。
AI.method: 开发模拟平台，让agbots随机故障并报告问题，测试耳图标记、单短语指令和完整句子三种音频通信方式，通过用户研究评估效果。
AI.result: 单短语指令法最受参与者好评，并能更高效完成辅助任务。
AI.conclusion: 单短语音频通信机制在提升用户偏好和任务效率方面表现最佳，适合农业机器人监督场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了远程人类操作员与农业机器人队列之间音频通信机制的效果，以提升监督效率。

authors_text: Antoine Guédon,Pascal Monasse,Vincent Lepetit
title: SCONE: Surface Coverage Optimization in Unknown Environments by Volumetric Integration
title_zh: SCONE：通过体积积分在未知环境中优化表面覆盖
abstract: Next Best View computation (NBV) is a long-standing problem in robotics, and consists in identifying the next most informative sensor position(s) for reconstructing a 3D object or scene efficiently and accurately. Like most current methods, we consider NBV prediction from a depth sensor like Lidar systems. Learning-based methods relying on a volumetric representation of the scene are suitable for path planning, but have lower accuracy than methods using a surface-based representation. However, the latter do not scale well with the size of the scene and constrain the camera to a small number of poses. To obtain the advantages of both representations, we show that we can maximize surface metrics by Monte Carlo integration over a volumetric representation. In particular, we propose an approach, SCONE, that relies on two neural modules: The first module predicts occupancy probability in the entire volume of the scene. Given any new camera pose, the second module samples points in the scene based on their occupancy probability and leverages a self-attention mechanism to predict the visibility of the samples. Finally, we integrate the visibility to evaluate the gain in surface coverage for the new camera pose. NBV is selected as the pose that maximizes the gain in total surface coverage. Our method scales to large scenes and handles free camera motion: It takes as input an arbitrarily large point cloud gathered by a depth sensor as well as camera poses to predict NBV. We demonstrate our approach on a novel dataset made of large and complex 3D scenes.
summary: Next Best View computation (NBV) is a long-standing problem in robotics, and consists in identifying the next most informative sensor position(s) for reconstructing a 3D object or scene efficiently and accurately. Like most current methods, we consider NBV prediction from a depth sensor like Lidar systems. Learning-based methods relying on a volumetric representation of the scene are suitable for path planning, but have lower accuracy than methods using a surface-based representation. However, the latter do not scale well with the size of the scene and constrain the camera to a small number of poses. To obtain the advantages of both representations, we show that we can maximize surface metrics by Monte Carlo integration over a volumetric representation. In particular, we propose an approach, SCONE, that relies on two neural modules: The first module predicts occupancy probability in the entire volume of the scene. Given any new camera pose, the second module samples points in the scene based on their occupancy probability and leverages a self-attention mechanism to predict the visibility of the samples. Finally, we integrate the visibility to evaluate the gain in surface coverage for the new camera pose. NBV is selected as the pose that maximizes the gain in total surface coverage. Our method scales to large scenes and handles free camera motion: It takes as input an arbitrarily large point cloud gathered by a depth sensor as well as camera poses to predict NBV. We demonstrate our approach on a novel dataset made of large and complex 3D scenes.
abstract_zh: 下一个最佳视图计算 (NBV) 是机器人技术中长期存在的问题，它在于识别下一个信息最丰富的传感器位置，以高效、准确地重建 3D 对象或场景。与大多数当前方法一样，我们考虑通过激光雷达系统等深度传感器进行 NBV 预测。依赖于场景体积表示的基于学习的方法适合路径规划，但其精度低于使用基于表面的表示的方法。然而，后者不能很好地适应场景的大小，并且将相机限制为少量的姿势。为了获得这两种表示的优点，我们证明我们可以通过蒙特卡罗积分而不是体积表示来最大化表面度量。特别是，我们提出了一种方法 SCONE，它依赖于两个神经模块：第一个模块预测场景整个体积中的占用概率。给定任何新的相机姿势，第二个模块根据场景中的点的占用概率对点进行采样，并利用自注意力机制来预测样本的可见性。最后，我们整合可见性来评估新相机姿势的表面覆盖增益。选择 NBV 作为最大化总表面覆盖增益的姿势。我们的方法可以扩展到大场景并处理自由相机运动：它将深度传感器收集的任意大点云以及相机姿势作为输入来预测 NBV。我们在由大型复杂 3D 场景组成的新颖数据集上展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCONE方法，通过体积分量优化未知环境中的表面覆盖率，解决机器人领域中的下一最佳视角（NBV）计算问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于体素的方法精度不足，基于表面的方法难以扩展至大场景且限制相机姿态数量，需结合两者优势以提升NBV计算效率与准确性。
AI.method: SCONE包含两个神经模块：第一模块预测场景体素的占用概率，第二模块基于占用概率采样点并利用自注意力机制预测可见性，最终通过积分评估新相机姿态的表面覆盖率增益。
AI.result: 方法可处理大规模点云与自由相机运动，在包含复杂3D场景的新数据集上验证了有效性，实现了大场景下的表面覆盖率优化。
AI.conclusion: SCONE通过体积分量与表面指标结合，兼顾精度与扩展性，为未知环境中的NBV计算提供了高效解决方案。
