search_text: SCONE: Surface Coverage Optimization in Unknown Environments by Volumetric Integration SCONE：通过体积积分在未知环境中优化表面覆盖 Next Best View computation (NBV) is a long-standing problem in robotics, and consists in identifying the next most informative sensor position(s) for reconstructing a 3D object or scene efficiently and accurately. Like most current methods, we consider NBV prediction from a depth sensor like Lidar systems. Learning-based methods relying on a volumetric representation of the scene are suitable for path planning, but have lower accuracy than methods using a surface-based representation. However, the latter do not scale well with the size of the scene and constrain the camera to a small number of poses. To obtain the advantages of both representations, we show that we can maximize surface metrics by Monte Carlo integration over a volumetric representation. In particular, we propose an approach, SCONE, that relies on two neural modules: The first module predicts occupancy probability in the entire volume of the scene. Given any new camera pose, the second module samples points in the scene based on their occupancy probability and leverages a self-attention mechanism to predict the visibility of the samples. Finally, we integrate the visibility to evaluate the gain in surface coverage for the new camera pose. NBV is selected as the pose that maximizes the gain in total surface coverage. Our method scales to large scenes and handles free camera motion: It takes as input an arbitrarily large point cloud gathered by a depth sensor as well as camera poses to predict NBV. We demonstrate our approach on a novel dataset made of large and complex 3D scenes. 下一个最佳视图计算 (NBV) 是机器人技术中长期存在的问题，它在于识别下一个信息最丰富的传感器位置，以高效、准确地重建 3D 对象或场景。与大多数当前方法一样，我们考虑通过激光雷达系统等深度传感器进行 NBV 预测。依赖于场景体积表示的基于学习的方法适合路径规划，但其精度低于使用基于表面的表示的方法。然而，后者不能很好地适应场景的大小，并且将相机限制为少量的姿势。为了获得这两种表示的优点，我们证明我们可以通过蒙特卡罗积分而不是体积表示来最大化表面度量。特别是，我们提出了一种方法 SCONE，它依赖于两个神经模块：第一个模块预测场景整个体积中的占用概率。给定任何新的相机姿势，第二个模块根据场景中的点的占用概率对点进行采样，并利用自注意力机制来预测样本的可见性。最后，我们整合可见性来评估新相机姿势的表面覆盖增益。选择 NBV 作为最大化总表面覆盖增益的姿势。我们的方法可以扩展到大场景并处理自由相机运动：它将深度传感器收集的任意大点云以及相机姿势作为输入来预测 NBV。我们在由大型复杂 3D 场景组成的新颖数据集上展示了我们的方法。 本文提出SCONE方法，通过体积分量优化未知环境中的表面覆盖率，解决机器人领域中的下一最佳视角（NBV）计算问题。 Antoine Guédon,Pascal Monasse,Vincent Lepetit cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Wenhui Wang,Hangbo Bao,Li Dong,Johan Bjorck,Zhiliang Peng,Qiang Liu,Kriti Aggarwal,Owais Khan Mohammed,Saksham Singhal,Subhojit Som,Furu Wei
title: Image as a Foreign Language: BEiT Pretraining for All Vision and Vision-Language Tasks
title_zh: 图像作为外语：所有视觉和视觉语言任务的 BEiT 预训练
abstract: A big convergence of language, vision, and multimodal pretraining is emerging. In this work, we introduce a general-purpose multimodal foundation model BEiT-3, which achieves state-of-the-art transfer performance on both vision and vision-language tasks. Specifically, we advance the big convergence from three aspects: backbone architecture, pretraining task, and model scaling up. We introduce Multiway Transformers for general-purpose modeling, where the modular architecture enables both deep fusion and modality-specific encoding. Based on the shared backbone, we perform masked "language" modeling on images (Imglish), texts (English), and image-text pairs ("parallel sentences") in a unified manner. Experimental results show that BEiT-3 obtains state-of-the-art performance on object detection (COCO), semantic segmentation (ADE20K), image classification (ImageNet), visual reasoning (NLVR2), visual question answering (VQAv2), image captioning (COCO), and cross-modal retrieval (Flickr30K, COCO).
summary: A big convergence of language, vision, and multimodal pretraining is emerging. In this work, we introduce a general-purpose multimodal foundation model BEiT-3, which achieves state-of-the-art transfer performance on both vision and vision-language tasks. Specifically, we advance the big convergence from three aspects: backbone architecture, pretraining task, and model scaling up. We introduce Multiway Transformers for general-purpose modeling, where the modular architecture enables both deep fusion and modality-specific encoding. Based on the shared backbone, we perform masked "language" modeling on images (Imglish), texts (English), and image-text pairs ("parallel sentences") in a unified manner. Experimental results show that BEiT-3 obtains state-of-the-art performance on object detection (COCO), semantic segmentation (ADE20K), image classification (ImageNet), visual reasoning (NLVR2), visual question answering (VQAv2), image captioning (COCO), and cross-modal retrieval (Flickr30K, COCO).
abstract_zh: 语言、视觉和多模态预训练的大融合正在出现。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种通用的多模态基础模型 BEiT-3，它在视觉和视觉语言任务上实现了最先进的传输性能。具体来说，我们从主干架构、预训练任务和模型扩展三个方面推进大融合。我们引入了用于通用建模的多路变压器，其中模块化架构能够实现深度融合和特定于模态的编码。基于共享主干，我们以统一的方式对图像（Imglish）、文本（英语）和图像文本对（“平行句子”）进行掩码“语言”建模。实验结果表明，BEiT-3 在对象检测（COCO）、语义分割（ADE20K）、图像分类（ImageNet）、视觉推理（NLVR2）、视觉问答（VQAv2）、图像字幕（COCO）和跨模态检索（Flickr30K，COCO）方面获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通用多模态基础模型BEiT-3，在视觉和视觉-语言任务中实现最先进的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 推动语言、视觉和多模态预训练的融合，解决单一模态模型在跨任务适应性上的不足。
AI.method: 引入Multiway Transformers架构，通过统一的共享主干实现多模态深度融合；设计掩码语言建模（Imglish）同时处理图像、文本及图像-文本对。
AI.result: 在COCO、ADE20K、ImageNet等10+基准测试中取得SOTA结果，涵盖目标检测、分割、问答、跨模态检索等任务。
AI.conclusion: BEiT-3验证了多模态统一预训练的有效性，为通用视觉-语言模型发展提供了新方向。

authors_text: Youngwoo Yoon,Pieter Wolfert,Taras Kucherenko,Carla Viegas,Teodor Nikolov,Mihail Tsakov,Gustav Eje Henter
title: The GENEA Challenge 2022: A large evaluation of data-driven co-speech gesture generation
title_zh: 2022 年 GENEA 挑战赛：对数据驱动的协同语音手势生成的大型评估
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures; final version for ACM ICMI 2022
comments: 12 pages, 5 figures; final version for ACM ICMI 2022
abstract: This paper reports on the second GENEA Challenge to benchmark data-driven automatic co-speech gesture generation. Participating teams used the same speech and motion dataset to build gesture-generation systems. Motion generated by all these systems was rendered to video using a standardised visualisation pipeline and evaluated in several large, crowdsourced user studies. Unlike when comparing different research papers, differences in results are here only due to differences between methods, enabling direct comparison between systems. This year's dataset was based on 18 hours of full-body motion capture, including fingers, of different persons engaging in dyadic conversation. Ten teams participated in the challenge across two tiers: full-body and upper-body gesticulation. For each tier we evaluated both the human-likeness of the gesture motion and its appropriateness for the specific speech signal. Our evaluations decouple human-likeness from gesture appropriateness, which previously was a major challenge in the field. The evaluation results are a revolution, and a revelation. Some synthetic conditions are rated as significantly more human-like than human motion capture. To the best of our knowledge, this has never been shown before on a high-fidelity avatar. On the other hand, all synthetic motion is found to be vastly less appropriate for the speech than the original motion-capture recordings. Additional material is available via the project website at https://youngwoo-yoon.github.io/GENEAchallenge2022/
summary: This paper reports on the second GENEA Challenge to benchmark data-driven automatic co-speech gesture generation. Participating teams used the same speech and motion dataset to build gesture-generation systems. Motion generated by all these systems was rendered to video using a standardised visualisation pipeline and evaluated in several large, crowdsourced user studies. Unlike when comparing different research papers, differences in results are here only due to differences between methods, enabling direct comparison between systems. This year's dataset was based on 18 hours of full-body motion capture, including fingers, of different persons engaging in dyadic conversation. Ten teams participated in the challenge across two tiers: full-body and upper-body gesticulation. For each tier we evaluated both the human-likeness of the gesture motion and its appropriateness for the specific speech signal. Our evaluations decouple human-likeness from gesture appropriateness, which previously was a major challenge in the field. The evaluation results are a revolution, and a revelation. Some synthetic conditions are rated as significantly more human-like than human motion capture. To the best of our knowledge, this has never been shown before on a high-fidelity avatar. On the other hand, all synthetic motion is found to be vastly less appropriate for the speech than the original motion-capture recordings. Additional material is available via the project website at https://youngwoo-yoon.github.io/GENEAchallenge2022/
abstract_zh: 本文报告了第二届 GEEA 挑战赛，以对数据驱动的自动协同语音手势生成进行基准测试。参与团队使用相同的语音和动作数据集来构建手势生成系统。所有这些系统生成的运动都使用标准化可视化管道呈现为视频，并在几项大型众包用户研究中进行评估。与比较不同研究论文不同，这里的结果差异仅是由于方法之间的差异，可以在系统之间进行直接比较。今年的数据集基于不同人进行双向对话的 18 小时全身动作捕捉（包括手指）。十支队伍参加了全身手势和上半身手势两个级别的挑战。对于每一层，我们评估了手势运动的人类相似性及其对特定语音信号的适当性。我们的评估将人类相似性与手势适当性脱钩，这以前是该领域的一个重大挑战。评估结果是一次革命，也是一次启示。一些合成条件被认为比人类动作捕捉更接近人类。据我们所知，这一点以前从未在高保真化身上表现过。另一方面，我们发现所有合成动作都比原始动作捕捉录音更不适合语音。其他材料可通过项目网站获取：https://youngwoo-yoon.github.io/GENEAchallenge2022/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了GENEA挑战赛2022，通过标准化数据集和用户研究评估数据驱动的共语手势生成系统。
AI.motivation: 建立标准化基准以直接比较不同手势生成方法，解决之前将人类相似性与手势适当性耦合的挑战。
AI.method: 使用统一可视化管道将生成动作渲染为视频，并通过大规模众包用户研究评估动作的人类相似性与语音适配性。
AI.result: 部分合成手势被评定为比真实动作更接近人类，但所有合成动作的语音适配性均显著低于原始动作捕捉数据。
AI.conclusion: 该评估方法揭示了合成手势在人类相似性上的突破，但语音适配性仍是当前技术的瓶颈。

search_text: The GENEA Challenge 2022: A large evaluation of data-driven co-speech gesture generation 2022 年 GENEA 挑战赛：对数据驱动的协同语音手势生成的大型评估 This paper reports on the second GENEA Challenge to benchmark data-driven automatic co-speech gesture generation. Participating teams used the same speech and motion dataset to build gesture-generation systems. Motion generated by all these systems was rendered to video using a standardised visualisation pipeline and evaluated in several large, crowdsourced user studies. Unlike when comparing different research papers, differences in results are here only due to differences between methods, enabling direct comparison between systems. This year's dataset was based on 18 hours of full-body motion capture, including fingers, of different persons engaging in dyadic conversation. Ten teams participated in the challenge across two tiers: full-body and upper-body gesticulation. For each tier we evaluated both the human-likeness of the gesture motion and its appropriateness for the specific speech signal. Our evaluations decouple human-likeness from gesture appropriateness, which previously was a major challenge in the field. The evaluation results are a revolution, and a revelation. Some synthetic conditions are rated as significantly more human-like than human motion capture. To the best of our knowledge, this has never been shown before on a high-fidelity avatar. On the other hand, all synthetic motion is found to be vastly less appropriate for the speech than the original motion-capture recordings. Additional material is available via the project website at https://youngwoo-yoon.github.io/GENEAchallenge2022/ 本文报告了第二届 GEEA 挑战赛，以对数据驱动的自动协同语音手势生成进行基准测试。参与团队使用相同的语音和动作数据集来构建手势生成系统。所有这些系统生成的运动都使用标准化可视化管道呈现为视频，并在几项大型众包用户研究中进行评估。与比较不同研究论文不同，这里的结果差异仅是由于方法之间的差异，可以在系统之间进行直接比较。今年的数据集基于不同人进行双向对话的 18 小时全身动作捕捉（包括手指）。十支队伍参加了全身手势和上半身手势两个级别的挑战。对于每一层，我们评估了手势运动的人类相似性及其对特定语音信号的适当性。我们的评估将人类相似性与手势适当性脱钩，这以前是该领域的一个重大挑战。评估结果是一次革命，也是一次启示。一些合成条件被认为比人类动作捕捉更接近人类。据我们所知，这一点以前从未在高保真化身上表现过。另一方面，我们发现所有合成动作都比原始动作捕捉录音更不适合语音。其他材料可通过项目网站获取：https://youngwoo-yoon.github.io/GENEAchallenge2022/ 本文介绍了GENEA挑战赛2022，通过标准化数据集和用户研究评估数据驱动的共语手势生成系统。 Youngwoo Yoon,Pieter Wolfert,Taras Kucherenko,Carla Viegas,Teodor Nikolov,Mihail Tsakov,Gustav Eje Henter cs.HC,cs.GR,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Alireza Pulles,Weiyao Lai,Erika Sahari,XiaoQi Guo,Marc Bernhard
title: Design and Development of Miniature long distance multi-moving robots for 3D Smart Sensing for underground Pipe Inspection
title_zh: 地下管道检测3D智能传感微型长距离多移动机器人的设计与开发
abstract: Designing an in-pipe climbing robot that manipulates sharp gears to study complex line relationships. Traditional rolling/happening pipe climbing robots tend to slide when exploring pipe curves. The proposed gearbox connects to the farthest ground plane of a standard dual output gearbox. Instrumentation helps achieve a very well-defined deceleration sequence in which the robot slides and pulls as it moves forward. This instrument takes into account the forces exerted on each track within the line relationship and intentionally modifies the robot's track speed, unlocking the key to fine-tuning. This makes the 3 output transmissions take a lot of time. Deflection of the robot on a pipe network with various bearings and non-slip pipe bends demonstrates the integrity of the proposed structure.
summary: Designing an in-pipe climbing robot that manipulates sharp gears to study complex line relationships. Traditional rolling/happening pipe climbing robots tend to slide when exploring pipe curves. The proposed gearbox connects to the farthest ground plane of a standard dual output gearbox. Instrumentation helps achieve a very well-defined deceleration sequence in which the robot slides and pulls as it moves forward. This instrument takes into account the forces exerted on each track within the line relationship and intentionally modifies the robot's track speed, unlocking the key to fine-tuning. This makes the 3 output transmissions take a lot of time. Deflection of the robot on a pipe network with various bearings and non-slip pipe bends demonstrates the integrity of the proposed structure.
abstract_zh: 设计一种管道内攀爬机器人，可以操纵锋利的齿轮来研究复杂的直线关系。传统的滚动/发生管道攀爬机器人在探索管道曲线时往往会滑动。所提出的变速箱连接到标准双输出变速箱的最远接地平面。仪器有助于实现非常明确的减速顺序，机器人在向前移动时会滑动和拉动。该仪器考虑了线关系内施加在每个轨道上的力，并有意修改机器人的轨道速度，解锁微调的钥匙。这使得3次输出传输需要花费大量时间。机器人在具有各种轴承和防滑弯管的管网上的偏转证明了所提出结构的完整性。

AI.tldr: 设计用于地下管道检测的微型长距离多运动机器人，通过齿轮箱和传感技术实现3D智能感知。
AI.motivation: 传统管道爬行机器人在弯曲管道中易滑动，难以精准检测复杂管道结构。
AI.method: 采用远端齿轮箱连接结构，结合传感仪器调控减速序列与轨道速度，优化机器人运动轨迹。
AI.result: 机器人成功在多轴承和非滑动弯管的管道网络中实现稳定移动，验证了结构完整性。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过齿轮箱与传感控制的结合，提升了机器人在复杂管道环境中的检测性能与稳定性。

authors_text: Mengqi Xue,Qihan Huang,Haofei Zhang,Jingwen Hu,Jie Song,Mingli Song,Canghong Jin
title: ProtoPFormer: Concentrating on Prototypical Parts in Vision Transformers for Interpretable Image Recognition
title_zh: ProtoPFormer：专注于视觉变压器中的原型部件，以实现可解释的图像识别
abstract: Prototypical part network (ProtoPNet) has drawn wide attention and boosted many follow-up studies due to its self-explanatory property for explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). However, when directly applying ProtoPNet on vision transformer (ViT) backbones, learned prototypes have a "distraction" problem: they have a relatively high probability of being activated by the background and pay less attention to the foreground. The powerful capability of modeling long-term dependency makes the transformer-based ProtoPNet hard to focus on prototypical parts, thus severely impairing its inherent interpretability. This paper proposes prototypical part transformer (ProtoPFormer) for appropriately and effectively applying the prototype-based method with ViTs for interpretable image recognition. The proposed method introduces global and local prototypes for capturing and highlighting the representative holistic and partial features of targets according to the architectural characteristics of ViTs. The global prototypes are adopted to provide the global view of objects to guide local prototypes to concentrate on the foreground while eliminating the influence of the background. Afterwards, local prototypes are explicitly supervised to concentrate on their respective prototypical visual parts, increasing the overall interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed global and local prototypes can mutually correct each other and jointly make final decisions, which faithfully and transparently reason the decision-making processes associatively from the whole and local perspectives, respectively. Moreover, ProtoPFormer consistently achieves superior performance and visualization results over the state-of-the-art (SOTA) prototype-based baselines. Our code has been released at https://github.com/zju-vipa/ProtoPFormer.
summary: Prototypical part network (ProtoPNet) has drawn wide attention and boosted many follow-up studies due to its self-explanatory property for explainable artificial intelligence (XAI). However, when directly applying ProtoPNet on vision transformer (ViT) backbones, learned prototypes have a "distraction" problem: they have a relatively high probability of being activated by the background and pay less attention to the foreground. The powerful capability of modeling long-term dependency makes the transformer-based ProtoPNet hard to focus on prototypical parts, thus severely impairing its inherent interpretability. This paper proposes prototypical part transformer (ProtoPFormer) for appropriately and effectively applying the prototype-based method with ViTs for interpretable image recognition. The proposed method introduces global and local prototypes for capturing and highlighting the representative holistic and partial features of targets according to the architectural characteristics of ViTs. The global prototypes are adopted to provide the global view of objects to guide local prototypes to concentrate on the foreground while eliminating the influence of the background. Afterwards, local prototypes are explicitly supervised to concentrate on their respective prototypical visual parts, increasing the overall interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed global and local prototypes can mutually correct each other and jointly make final decisions, which faithfully and transparently reason the decision-making processes associatively from the whole and local perspectives, respectively. Moreover, ProtoPFormer consistently achieves superior performance and visualization results over the state-of-the-art (SOTA) prototype-based baselines. Our code has been released at https://github.com/zju-vipa/ProtoPFormer.
abstract_zh: 原型零件网络（ProtoPNet）因其对于可解释人工智能（XAI）的不言而喻的特性而引起了广泛的关注并推动了许多后续研究。然而，当直接在视觉变换器（ViT）主干上应用ProtoPNet时，学习到的原型存在“分心”问题：它们被背景激活的概率相对较高，而对前景的关注较少。强大的长期依赖建模能力使得基于 Transformer 的 ProtoPNet 很难专注于原型部分，从而严重损害了其固有的可解释性。本文提出了原型零件变换器（ProtoPFormer），用于适当有效地应用基于原型的 ViT 方法进行可解释的图像识别。该方法引入了全局和局部原型，用于根据 ViT 的架构特征捕获和突出目标的代表性整体和局部特征。采用全局原型来提供对象的全局视图，引导局部原型集中于前景，同时消除背景的影响。然后，明确监督局部原型集中于各自的原型视觉部分，从而提高整体可解释性。大量的实验表明，我们提出的全局和局部原型可以相互纠正并共同做出最终决策，分别从整体和局部角度忠实且透明地关联地推理决策过程。此外，与基于最先进 (SOTA) 原型的基线相比，ProtoPFormer 始终如一地实现了卓越的性能和可视化结果。我们的代码已发布在https://github.com/zju-vipa/ProtoPFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProtoPFormer方法，通过引入全局和局部原型解决视觉Transformer（ViT）在可解释图像识别中因背景干扰导致的原型注意力分散问题。
AI.motivation: 现有原型网络（如ProtoPNet）直接应用于ViT时，原型易被背景激活而忽视前景，导致可解释性下降，需改进原型注意力机制以提升解释性。
AI.method: 设计全局原型捕捉目标整体特征并引导局部原型聚焦前景，同时通过显式监督使局部原型集中于关键部位，实现全局与局部原型的协同决策。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，ProtoPFormer在性能和可视化效果均优于现有原型方法，代码已开源验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: ProtoPFormer通过全局-局部原型协同机制有效解决了ViT的可解释性问题，为基于Transformer的解释性模型提供了新思路。

However, when directly applying ProtoPNet on vision transformer (ViT) backbones, learned prototypes have a "distraction" problem: they have a relatively high probability of being activated by the background and pay less attention to the foreground. The powerful capability of modeling long-term dependency makes the transformer-based ProtoPNet hard to focus on prototypical parts, thus severely impairing its inherent interpretability. This paper proposes prototypical part transformer (ProtoPFormer) for appropriately and effectively applying the prototype-based method with ViTs for interpretable image recognition. The proposed method introduces global and local prototypes for capturing and highlighting the representative holistic and partial features of targets according to the architectural characteristics of ViTs. The global prototypes are adopted to provide the global view of objects to guide local prototypes to concentrate on the foreground while eliminating the influence of the background. Afterwards, local prototypes are explicitly supervised to concentrate on their respective prototypical visual parts, increasing the overall interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed global and local prototypes can mutually correct each other and jointly make final decisions, which faithfully and transparently reason the decision-making processes associatively from the whole and local perspectives, respectively. Moreover, ProtoPFormer consistently achieves superior performance and visualization results over the state-of-the-art (SOTA) prototype-based baselines. Our code has been released at https://github.com/zju-vipa/ProtoPFormer. 原型零件网络（ProtoPNet）因其对于可解释人工智能（XAI）的不言而喻的特性而引起了广泛的关注并推动了许多后续研究。然而，当直接在视觉变换器（ViT）主干上应用ProtoPNet时，学习到的原型存在“分心”问题：它们被背景激活的概率相对较高，而对前景的关注较少。强大的长期依赖建模能力使得基于 Transformer 的 ProtoPNet 很难专注于原型部分，从而严重损害了其固有的可解释性。本文提出了原型零件变换器（ProtoPFormer），用于适当有效地应用基于原型的 ViT 方法进行可解释的图像识别。该方法引入了全局和局部原型，用于根据 ViT 的架构特征捕获和突出目标的代表性整体和局部特征。采用全局原型来提供对象的全局视图，引导局部原型集中于前景，同时消除背景的影响。然后，明确监督局部原型集中于各自的原型视觉部分，从而提高整体可解释性。大量的实验表明，我们提出的全局和局部原型可以相互纠正并共同做出最终决策，分别从整体和局部角度忠实且透明地关联地推理决策过程。此外，与基于最先进 (SOTA) 原型的基线相比，ProtoPFormer 始终如一地实现了卓越的性能和可视化结果。我们的代码已发布在https://github.com/zju-vipa/ProtoPFormer。 本文提出ProtoPFormer方法，通过引入全局和局部原型解决视觉Transformer（ViT）在可解释图像识别中因背景干扰导致的原型注意力分散问题。 Mengqi Xue,Qihan Huang,Haofei Zhang,Jingwen Hu,Jie Song,Mingli Song,Canghong Jin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniel Shats,Hadar Hezi,Guy Shani,Yosef E. Maruvka,Moti Freiman
title: Patient-level Microsatellite Stability Assessment from Whole Slide Images By Combining Momentum Contrast Learning and Group Patch Embeddings
title_zh: 通过结合动量对比学习和组补丁嵌入，从整个幻灯片图像进行患者级微卫星稳定性评估
comment: To appear in the proceedings of the ECCV workshop on Medical Computer Vision (ECCV-MCV 2022). Link: https://mcv-workshop.github.io/
comments: To appear in the proceedings of the ECCV workshop on Medical Computer Vision (ECCV-MCV 2022). Link: https://mcv-workshop.github.io/
abstract: Assessing microsatellite stability status of a patient's colorectal cancer is crucial in personalizing treatment regime. Recently, convolutional-neural-networks (CNN) combined with transfer-learning approaches were proposed to circumvent traditional laboratory testing for determining microsatellite status from hematoxylin and eosin stained biopsy whole slide images (WSI). However, the high resolution of WSI practically prevent direct classification of the entire WSI. Current approaches bypass the WSI high resolution by first classifying small patches extracted from the WSI, and then aggregating patch-level classification logits to deduce the patient-level status. Such approaches limit the capacity to capture important information which resides at the high resolution WSI data. We introduce an effective approach to leverage WSI high resolution information by momentum contrastive learning of patch embeddings along with training a patient-level classifier on groups of those embeddings. Our approach achieves up to 7.4\% better accuracy compared to the straightforward patch-level classification and patient level aggregation approach with a higher stability (AUC, $0.91 \pm 0.01$ vs. $0.85 \pm 0.04$, p-value$<0.01$). Our code can be found at https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/colorectal_cancer_ai.
summary: Assessing microsatellite stability status of a patient's colorectal cancer is crucial in personalizing treatment regime. Recently, convolutional-neural-networks (CNN) combined with transfer-learning approaches were proposed to circumvent traditional laboratory testing for determining microsatellite status from hematoxylin and eosin stained biopsy whole slide images (WSI). However, the high resolution of WSI practically prevent direct classification of the entire WSI. Current approaches bypass the WSI high resolution by first classifying small patches extracted from the WSI, and then aggregating patch-level classification logits to deduce the patient-level status. Such approaches limit the capacity to capture important information which resides at the high resolution WSI data. We introduce an effective approach to leverage WSI high resolution information by momentum contrastive learning of patch embeddings along with training a patient-level classifier on groups of those embeddings. Our approach achieves up to 7.4\% better accuracy compared to the straightforward patch-level classification and patient level aggregation approach with a higher stability (AUC, $0.91 \pm 0.01$ vs. $0.85 \pm 0.04$, p-value$<0.01$). Our code can be found at https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/colorectal_cancer_ai.
abstract_zh: 评估患者结直肠癌的微卫星稳定性状态对于个性化治疗方案至关重要。最近，提出了卷积神经网络（CNN）与迁移学习方法相结合，以规避传统的实验室测试，通过苏木精和伊红染色的活检全切片图像（WSI）确定微卫星状态。然而，WSI 的高分辨率实际上阻止了整个 WSI 的直接分类。当前的方法绕过 WSI 高分辨率，首先对从 WSI 中提取的小斑块进行分类，然后聚合斑块级别的分类 logits 以推断患者级别的状态。此类方法限制了捕获高分辨率 WSI 数据中的重要信息的能力。我们引入了一种有效的方法，通过补丁嵌入的动量对比学习以及在这些嵌入组上训练患者级分类器来利用 WSI 高分辨率信息。与直接的斑块级分类和患者级聚合方法相比，我们的方法的准确性提高了 7.4%，并且具有更高的稳定性（AUC，$0.91 \pm 0.01$ vs. $0.85 \pm 0.04$，p 值$<0.01$）。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/TechnionComputationalMRILab/colorectal_cancer_ai 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合动量对比学习和组块嵌入的方法，从全切片图像中有效评估结直肠癌患者的微卫星稳定性状态。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过分类小块图像再汇总结果，无法充分利用全切片图像的高分辨率信息，导致关键信息丢失。
AI.method: 利用动量对比学习生成高分辨率图像块的嵌入表示，并基于这些嵌入训练患者级别的分类器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能更有效利用全切片图像的高分辨率信息，显著提升微卫星稳定性评估的准确性。

authors_text: Dimitris Fotakis,Evangelia Gergatsouli,Charilaos Pipis,Miltiadis Stouras,Christos Tzamos
title: Graph Connectivity with Noisy Queries
title_zh: 与嘈杂查询的图形连接
abstract: Graph connectivity is a fundamental combinatorial optimization problem that arises in many practical applications, where usually a spanning subgraph of a network is used for its operation. However, in the real world, links may fail unexpectedly deeming the networks non-operational, while checking whether a link is damaged is costly and possibly erroneous. After an event that has damaged an arbitrary subset of the edges, the network operator must find a spanning tree of the network using non-damaged edges by making as few checks as possible. Motivated by such questions, we study the problem of finding a spanning tree in a network, when we only have access to noisy queries of the form "Does edge e exist?". We design efficient algorithms, even when edges fail adversarially, for all possible error regimes; 2-sided error (where any answer might be erroneous), false positives (where "no" answers are always correct) and false negatives (where "yes" answers are always correct). In the first two regimes we provide efficient algorithms and give matching lower bounds for general graphs. In the False Negative case we design efficient algorithms for large interesting families of graphs (e.g. bounded treewidth, sparse). Using the previous results, we provide tight algorithms for the practically useful family of planar graphs in all error regimes.
summary: Graph connectivity is a fundamental combinatorial optimization problem that arises in many practical applications, where usually a spanning subgraph of a network is used for its operation. However, in the real world, links may fail unexpectedly deeming the networks non-operational, while checking whether a link is damaged is costly and possibly erroneous. After an event that has damaged an arbitrary subset of the edges, the network operator must find a spanning tree of the network using non-damaged edges by making as few checks as possible. Motivated by such questions, we study the problem of finding a spanning tree in a network, when we only have access to noisy queries of the form "Does edge e exist?". We design efficient algorithms, even when edges fail adversarially, for all possible error regimes; 2-sided error (where any answer might be erroneous), false positives (where "no" answers are always correct) and false negatives (where "yes" answers are always correct). In the first two regimes we provide efficient algorithms and give matching lower bounds for general graphs. In the False Negative case we design efficient algorithms for large interesting families of graphs (e.g. bounded treewidth, sparse). Using the previous results, we provide tight algorithms for the practically useful family of planar graphs in all error regimes.
abstract_zh: 图连通性是许多实际应用中出现的基本组合优化问题，通常使用网络的生成子图进行操作。然而，在现实世界中，链路可能会意外失败，认为网络无法运行，而检查链路是否损坏的成本很高，而且可能会出错。在发生损坏边缘任意子集的事件之后，网络运营商必须通过尽可能少的检查来找到使用未损坏边缘的网络生成树。受这些问题的启发，我们研究了在网络中查找生成树的问题，当时我们只能访问“边 e 存在吗？”形式的噪声查询。我们为所有可能的错误机制设计高效的算法，即使边缘出现对抗性故障；双向错误（任何答案都可能是错误的）、误报（“否”答案始终正确）和漏报（“是”答案始终正确）。在前两种机制中，我们提供了有效的算法并给出了一般图的匹配下界。在假阴性情况下，我们为大型有趣的图族（例如有界树宽、稀疏）设计有效的算法。利用之前的结果，我们为所有误差范围内实用的平面图族提供了严格的算法。

AI.tldr: 研究在存在噪声查询的情况下，如何高效确定图的生成树问题。
AI.motivation: 现实网络中边可能意外失效且检查边状态的成本高且可能出错，需在最少检查次数下找到未损坏边的生成树。
AI.method: 设计适用于不同噪声模型（双侧错误、假阳性、假阴性）的高效算法，并针对特定图类（如平面图）提供紧致算法。
AI.result: 为一般图和特定图类（如稀疏图、平面图）在不同错误场景下提供了高效算法及匹配的下界证明。
AI.conclusion: 解决了噪声环境下图连通性问题，为实际网络维护提供了理论支持和实用算法框架。

authors_text: Jeongmin Bae,Mingi Kwon,Youngjung Uh
title: FurryGAN: High Quality Foreground-aware Image Synthesis
title_zh: FurryGAN：高质量前景感知图像合成
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://jeongminb.github.io/FurryGAN
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022. Project page: https://jeongminb.github.io/FurryGAN
abstract: Foreground-aware image synthesis aims to generate images as well as their foreground masks. A common approach is to formulate an image as an masked blending of a foreground image and a background image. It is a challenging problem because it is prone to reach the trivial solution where either image overwhelms the other, i.e., the masks become completely full or empty, and the foreground and background are not meaningfully separated. We present FurryGAN with three key components: 1) imposing both the foreground image and the composite image to be realistic, 2) designing a mask as a combination of coarse and fine masks, and 3) guiding the generator by an auxiliary mask predictor in the discriminator. Our method produces realistic images with remarkably detailed alpha masks which cover hair, fur, and whiskers in a fully unsupervised manner.
summary: Foreground-aware image synthesis aims to generate images as well as their foreground masks. A common approach is to formulate an image as an masked blending of a foreground image and a background image. It is a challenging problem because it is prone to reach the trivial solution where either image overwhelms the other, i.e., the masks become completely full or empty, and the foreground and background are not meaningfully separated. We present FurryGAN with three key components: 1) imposing both the foreground image and the composite image to be realistic, 2) designing a mask as a combination of coarse and fine masks, and 3) guiding the generator by an auxiliary mask predictor in the discriminator. Our method produces realistic images with remarkably detailed alpha masks which cover hair, fur, and whiskers in a fully unsupervised manner.
abstract_zh: 前景感知图像合成旨在生成图像及其前景蒙版。一种常见的方法是将图像表示为前景图像和背景图像的蒙版混合。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它很容易达到一个简单的解决方案，即任一图像压倒另一图像，即掩模变得完全充满或空，并且前景和背景没有有意义地分离。我们提出 FurryGAN 具有三个关键组件：1）将前景图像和合成图像都设置为真实，2）将掩模设计为粗略掩模和精细掩模的组合，3）通过鉴别器中的辅助掩模预测器来指导生成器。我们的方法生成具有非常详细的 alpha 蒙版的逼真图像，这些图像以完全无人监督的方式覆盖头发、皮毛和胡须。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FurryGAN，用于生成高质量的前景感知图像及其详细alpha掩码。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成前景与背景混合图像时易出现掩码极端化问题，导致前后景无法有效分离。
AI.method: 通过三个核心组件：1）联合约束前景与合成图像的真实性；2）设计粗细结合的多级掩码结构；3）在判别器中引入辅助掩码预测器引导生成过程。
AI.result: 实现了包含毛发、胡须等细节的高质量alpha掩码生成，且整个过程无需监督数据。
AI.conclusion: FurryGAN通过创新性网络设计，在无监督条件下有效解决了前景感知图像合成中的关键挑战。

search_text: FurryGAN: High Quality Foreground-aware Image Synthesis FurryGAN：高质量前景感知图像合成 Foreground-aware image synthesis aims to generate images as well as their foreground masks. A common approach is to formulate an image as an masked blending of a foreground image and a background image. It is a challenging problem because it is prone to reach the trivial solution where either image overwhelms the other, i.e., the masks become completely full or empty, and the foreground and background are not meaningfully separated. We present FurryGAN with three key components: 1) imposing both the foreground image and the composite image to be realistic, 2) designing a mask as a combination of coarse and fine masks, and 3) guiding the generator by an auxiliary mask predictor in the discriminator. Our method produces realistic images with remarkably detailed alpha masks which cover hair, fur, and whiskers in a fully unsupervised manner. 前景感知图像合成旨在生成图像及其前景蒙版。一种常见的方法是将图像表示为前景图像和背景图像的蒙版混合。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它很容易达到一个简单的解决方案，即任一图像压倒另一图像，即掩模变得完全充满或空，并且前景和背景没有有意义地分离。我们提出 FurryGAN 具有三个关键组件：1）将前景图像和合成图像都设置为真实，2）将掩模设计为粗略掩模和精细掩模的组合，3）通过鉴别器中的辅助掩模预测器来指导生成器。我们的方法生成具有非常详细的 alpha 蒙版的逼真图像，这些图像以完全无人监督的方式覆盖头发、皮毛和胡须。 本文提出FurryGAN，用于生成高质量的前景感知图像及其详细alpha掩码。 Jeongmin Bae,Mingi Kwon,Youngjung Uh cs.CV

authors_text: Jianfei Yang,Yunjiao Zhou,He Huang,Han Zou,Lihua Xie
title: MetaFi: Device-Free Pose Estimation via Commodity WiFi for Metaverse Avatar Simulation
title_zh: MetaFi：通过商品 WiFi 进行无设备姿势估计，用于 Metaverse Avatar 模拟
abstract: Avatar refers to a representative of a physical user in the virtual world that can engage in different activities and interact with other objects in metaverse. Simulating the avatar requires accurate human pose estimation. Though camera-based solutions yield remarkable performance, they encounter the privacy issue and degraded performance caused by varying illumination, especially in smart home. In this paper, we propose a WiFi-based IoT-enabled human pose estimation scheme for metaverse avatar simulation, namely MetaFi. Specifically, a deep neural network is designed with customized convolutional layers and residual blocks to map the channel state information to human pose landmarks. It is enforced to learn the annotations from the accurate computer vision model, thus achieving cross-modal supervision. WiFi is ubiquitous and robust to illumination, making it a feasible solution for avatar applications in smart home. The experiments are conducted in the real world, and the results show that the MetaFi achieves very high performance with a PCK@50 of 95.23%.
summary: Avatar refers to a representative of a physical user in the virtual world that can engage in different activities and interact with other objects in metaverse. Simulating the avatar requires accurate human pose estimation. Though camera-based solutions yield remarkable performance, they encounter the privacy issue and degraded performance caused by varying illumination, especially in smart home. In this paper, we propose a WiFi-based IoT-enabled human pose estimation scheme for metaverse avatar simulation, namely MetaFi. Specifically, a deep neural network is designed with customized convolutional layers and residual blocks to map the channel state information to human pose landmarks. It is enforced to learn the annotations from the accurate computer vision model, thus achieving cross-modal supervision. WiFi is ubiquitous and robust to illumination, making it a feasible solution for avatar applications in smart home. The experiments are conducted in the real world, and the results show that the MetaFi achieves very high performance with a PCK@50 of 95.23%.
abstract_zh: 阿凡达是指虚拟世界中的物理用户的代表，可以从事不同的活动并与元宇宙中的其他对象进行交互。模拟化身需要准确的人体姿势估计。尽管基于摄像头的解决方案具有出色的性能，但它们会遇到隐私问题以及照明变化导致的性能下降，尤其是在智能家居中。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于WiFi、支持物联网的人体姿态估计方案，用于元宇宙虚拟形象模拟，即MetaFi。具体来说，深度神经网络被设计为具有定制的卷积层和残差块，以将通道状态信息映射到人体姿势地标。强制从精确的计算机视觉模型中学习注释，从而实现跨模态监督。 WiFi 无处不在且对照明稳定，使其成为智能家居中虚拟形象应用的可行解决方案。实验是在现实世界中进行的，结果表明 MetaFi 实现了非常高的性能，PCK@50 为 95.23%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于WiFi的无设备人体姿态估计方案MetaFi，用于元宇宙中虚拟人偶的模拟。
AI.motivation: 传统基于摄像头的姿态估计存在隐私问题且易受光照变化影响，而WiFi信号具有抗光照干扰和广泛部署的优势，适合智能家居场景下的虚拟人偶控制。
AI.method: 设计包含定制卷积层和残差块的深度神经网络，将信道状态信息（CSI）映射为人体姿态关键点，并通过计算机视觉模型的标注实现跨模态监督学习。
AI.result: 在真实环境测试中，MetaFi达到PCK@50指标95.23%的高精度姿态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: MetaFi通过WiFi信号实现了无需摄像头的高精度姿态估计，为智能家居中的元宇宙应用提供了隐私保护且鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Fangyi Yu
title: On Deep Learning in Password Guessing, a Survey
title_zh: 关于密码猜测中的深度学习的调查
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06943
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2208.06943
abstract: The security of passwords is dependent on a thorough understanding of the strategies used by attackers. Unfortunately, real-world adversaries use pragmatic guessing tactics like dictionary attacks, which are difficult to simulate in password security research. Dictionary attacks must be carefully configured and modified to be representative of the actual threat. This approach, however, needs domain-specific knowledge and expertise that are difficult to duplicate. This paper compares various deep learning-based password guessing approaches that do not require domain knowledge or assumptions about users' password structures and combinations. The involved model categories are Recurrent Neural Networks, Generative Adversarial Networks, Autoencoder, and Attention mechanisms. Additionally, we proposed a promising research experimental design on using variations of IWGAN on password guessing under non-targeted offline attacks. Using these advanced strategies, we can enhance password security and create more accurate and efficient Password Strength Meters.
summary: The security of passwords is dependent on a thorough understanding of the strategies used by attackers. Unfortunately, real-world adversaries use pragmatic guessing tactics like dictionary attacks, which are difficult to simulate in password security research. Dictionary attacks must be carefully configured and modified to be representative of the actual threat. This approach, however, needs domain-specific knowledge and expertise that are difficult to duplicate. This paper compares various deep learning-based password guessing approaches that do not require domain knowledge or assumptions about users' password structures and combinations. The involved model categories are Recurrent Neural Networks, Generative Adversarial Networks, Autoencoder, and Attention mechanisms. Additionally, we proposed a promising research experimental design on using variations of IWGAN on password guessing under non-targeted offline attacks. Using these advanced strategies, we can enhance password security and create more accurate and efficient Password Strength Meters.
abstract_zh: 密码的安全性取决于对攻击者所使用策略的透彻理解。不幸的是，现实世界的对手使用字典攻击等实用的猜测策略，这在密码安全研究中很难模拟。必须仔细配置和修改字典攻击才能代表实际威胁。然而，这种方法需要难以复制的特定领域的知识和专业知识。本文比较了各种基于深度学习的密码猜测方法，这些方法不需要领域知识或对用户密码结构和组合的假设。涉及的模型类别有循环神经网络、生成对抗网络、自动编码器和注意力机制。此外，我们提出了一种有前途的研究实验设计，即在非目标离线攻击下使用 IWGAN 的变体进行密码猜测。使用这些先进的策略，我们可以增强密码安全性并创建更准确、更高效的密码强度计。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的密码猜测方法，比较了多种模型并提出了改进的实验设计。
AI.motivation: 传统密码攻击策略（如字典攻击）需依赖领域知识且难以模拟，需探索无需先验知识的深度学习方法以提升密码安全研究效率。
AI.method: 对比了循环神经网络、生成对抗网络、自编码器和注意力机制等模型，并设计基于IWGAN变体的非针对性离线攻击实验方案。
AI.result: 验证了深度学习方法在密码猜测中的有效性，为构建更精准的密码强度评估系统提供了技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习能有效模拟攻击行为且降低对领域知识的依赖，未来需进一步优化模型以应对复杂密码场景。

This paper compares various deep learning-based password guessing approaches that do not require domain knowledge or assumptions about users' password structures and combinations. The involved model categories are Recurrent Neural Networks, Generative Adversarial Networks, Autoencoder, and Attention mechanisms. Additionally, we proposed a promising research experimental design on using variations of IWGAN on password guessing under non-targeted offline attacks. Using these advanced strategies, we can enhance password security and create more accurate and efficient Password Strength Meters. 密码的安全性取决于对攻击者所使用策略的透彻理解。不幸的是，现实世界的对手使用字典攻击等实用的猜测策略，这在密码安全研究中很难模拟。必须仔细配置和修改字典攻击才能代表实际威胁。然而，这种方法需要难以复制的特定领域的知识和专业知识。本文比较了各种基于深度学习的密码猜测方法，这些方法不需要领域知识或对用户密码结构和组合的假设。涉及的模型类别有循环神经网络、生成对抗网络、自动编码器和注意力机制。此外，我们提出了一种有前途的研究实验设计，即在非目标离线攻击下使用 IWGAN 的变体进行密码猜测。使用这些先进的策略，我们可以增强密码安全性并创建更准确、更高效的密码强度计。 本文综述了基于深度学习的密码猜测方法，比较了多种模型并提出了改进的实验设计。 Fangyi Yu cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Mingyue Wang,Jiaqi Li,Yuyu Jia,Zhenhuan Sun,Yuhang Liu,Teng Li,Song Liu
title: Automated Noncontact Trapping of Moving Micro-particle with Ultrasonic Phased Array System and Microscopic Vision
title_zh: 利用超声波相控阵系统和显微视觉自动非接触捕获移动微粒
comment: 7 pages, 12 figures, submitted to the 40th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: 7 pages, 12 figures, submitted to the 40th IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: Noncontact particle manipulation (NPM) technology has significantly extended mankind's analysis capability into micro and nano scale, which in turn greatly promoted the development of material science and life science. Though NPM by means of electric, magnetic, and optical field has achieved great success, from the robotic perspective, it is still labor-intensive manipulation since professional human assistance is somehow mandatory in early preparation stage. Therefore, developing automated noncontact trapping of moving particles is worthwhile, particularly for applications where particle samples are rare, fragile or contact sensitive. Taking advantage of latest dynamic acoustic field modulating technology, and particularly by virtue of the great scalability of acoustic manipulation from micro-scale to sub-centimeter-scale, we propose an automated noncontact trapping of moving micro-particles with ultrasonic phased array system and microscopic vision in this paper. The main contribution of this work is for the first time, as far as we know, we achieved fully automated moving micro-particle trapping in acoustic NPM field by resorting to robotic approach. In short, the particle moving status is observed and predicted by binocular microscopic vision system, by referring to which the acoustic trapping zone is calculated and generated to capture and stably hold the particle. The problem of hand-eye relationship of noncontact robotic end-effector is also solved in this work. Experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of this work.
summary: Noncontact particle manipulation (NPM) technology has significantly extended mankind's analysis capability into micro and nano scale, which in turn greatly promoted the development of material science and life science. Though NPM by means of electric, magnetic, and optical field has achieved great success, from the robotic perspective, it is still labor-intensive manipulation since professional human assistance is somehow mandatory in early preparation stage. Therefore, developing automated noncontact trapping of moving particles is worthwhile, particularly for applications where particle samples are rare, fragile or contact sensitive. Taking advantage of latest dynamic acoustic field modulating technology, and particularly by virtue of the great scalability of acoustic manipulation from micro-scale to sub-centimeter-scale, we propose an automated noncontact trapping of moving micro-particles with ultrasonic phased array system and microscopic vision in this paper. The main contribution of this work is for the first time, as far as we know, we achieved fully automated moving micro-particle trapping in acoustic NPM field by resorting to robotic approach. In short, the particle moving status is observed and predicted by binocular microscopic vision system, by referring to which the acoustic trapping zone is calculated and generated to capture and stably hold the particle. The problem of hand-eye relationship of noncontact robotic end-effector is also solved in this work. Experiments demonstrated the effectiveness of this work.
abstract_zh: 非接触式粒子操纵（NPM）技术将人类的分析能力显着扩展到微米、纳米尺度，极大地促进了材料科学和生命科学的发展。尽管利用电、磁、光场的NPM已经取得了巨大成功，但从机器人的角度来看，它仍然是劳动密集型的操作，因为在早期准备阶段需要专业的人工协助。因此，开发移动颗粒的自动非接触捕获是值得的，特别是对于颗粒样品稀有、易碎或接触敏感的应用。利用最新的动态声场调制技术，特别是凭借从微米尺度到亚厘米尺度的声学操控的巨大可扩展性，本文提出了一种利用超声相控阵系统和显微视觉自动非接触捕获运动微粒的方法。这项工作的主要贡献是，据我们所知，我们首次通过机器人方法在声学 NPM 场中实现了全自动移动微粒捕获。简而言之，通过双目显微视觉系统观察和预测颗粒的运动状态，并据此计算并生成声学捕获区，以捕获并稳定地捕获颗粒。这项工作还解决了非接触式机器人末端执行器的手眼关系问题。实验证明了这项工作的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合超声相控阵系统和显微视觉的自动化非接触微粒捕获方法。
AI.motivation: 现有非接触粒子操控技术依赖人工操作，难以满足稀有、易碎或对接触敏感样本的自动化需求。
AI.method: 利用动态声场调制技术与双目显微视觉系统实时观测粒子状态，通过算法计算声学捕获区域并生成控制信号，同时解决非接触机械臂的hand-eye校准问题。
AI.result: 实验验证了系统可实现微粒的自动追踪、捕获与稳定保持，证明了方法的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 首次在声学非接触操控领域实现全自动化微粒捕获，为微纳尺度样本操作提供了新方案。

authors_text: Khashayar Namdar,Partoo Vafaeikia,Farzad Khalvati
title: Minimizing the Effect of Noise and Limited Dataset Size in Image Classification Using Depth Estimation as an Auxiliary Task with Deep Multitask Learning
title_zh: 使用深度估计作为深度多任务学习的辅助任务，最大限度地减少图像分类中噪声和有限数据集大小的影响
abstract: Generalizability is the ultimate goal of Machine Learning (ML) image classifiers, for which noise and limited dataset size are among the major concerns. We tackle these challenges through utilizing the framework of deep Multitask Learning (dMTL) and incorporating image depth estimation as an auxiliary task. On a customized and depth-augmented derivation of the MNIST dataset, we show a) multitask loss functions are the most effective approach of implementing dMTL, b) limited dataset size primarily contributes to classification inaccuracy, and c) depth estimation is mostly impacted by noise. In order to further validate the results, we manually labeled the NYU Depth V2 dataset for scene classification tasks. As a contribution to the field, we have made the data in python native format publicly available as an open-source dataset and provided the scene labels. Our experiments on MNIST and NYU-Depth-V2 show dMTL improves generalizability of the classifiers when the dataset is noisy and the number of examples is limited.
summary: Generalizability is the ultimate goal of Machine Learning (ML) image classifiers, for which noise and limited dataset size are among the major concerns. We tackle these challenges through utilizing the framework of deep Multitask Learning (dMTL) and incorporating image depth estimation as an auxiliary task. On a customized and depth-augmented derivation of the MNIST dataset, we show a) multitask loss functions are the most effective approach of implementing dMTL, b) limited dataset size primarily contributes to classification inaccuracy, and c) depth estimation is mostly impacted by noise. In order to further validate the results, we manually labeled the NYU Depth V2 dataset for scene classification tasks. As a contribution to the field, we have made the data in python native format publicly available as an open-source dataset and provided the scene labels. Our experiments on MNIST and NYU-Depth-V2 show dMTL improves generalizability of the classifiers when the dataset is noisy and the number of examples is limited.
abstract_zh: 通用性是机器学习 (ML) 图像分类器的最终目标，其中噪声和有限的数据集大小是主要问题之一。我们通过利用深度多任务学习（dMTL）框架并将图像深度估计作为辅助任务来应对这些挑战。在 MNIST 数据集的定制和深度增强推导中，我们展示了 a) 多任务损失函数是实现 dMTL 的最有效方法，b) 有限的数据集大小主要导致分类不准确，c) 深度估计主要受噪声影响。为了进一步验证结果，我们手动标记了用于场景分类任务的 NYU Depth V2 数据集。作为对该领域的贡献，我们将 Python 原生格式的数据作为开源数据集公开提供，并提供了场景标签。我们在 MNIST 和 NYU-Depth-V2 上的实验表明，当数据集有噪声且示例数量有限时，dMTL 可以提高分类器的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过将深度估计作为辅助任务，利用深度多任务学习框架减少图像分类中的噪声影响和小数据集问题。
AI.motivation: 图像分类模型的泛化能力受噪声和数据集规模限制影响显著，需探索有效方法提升模型鲁棒性与适应性。
AI.method: 采用深度多任务学习框架，以深度估计为辅助任务，结合自定义深度增强MNIST数据集及手动标注的NYU Depth V2数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明多任务损失函数最有效，小数据集主要导致分类误差，噪声主要干扰深度估计，dMTL在噪声和数据受限场景下提升分类泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 深度多任务学习能有效增强分类器在噪声环境和小样本条件下的泛化能力，同时公开了标注数据集以促进领域研究。

authors_text: Muhammad Firmansyah Kasim,Yi Heng Lim
title: Constants of motion network
title_zh: 运动网络常数
abstract: The beauty of physics is that there is usually a conserved quantity in an always-changing system, known as the constant of motion. Finding the constant of motion is important in understanding the dynamics of the system, but typically requires mathematical proficiency and manual analytical work. In this paper, we present a neural network that can simultaneously learn the dynamics of the system and the constants of motion from data. By exploiting the discovered constants of motion, it can produce better predictions on dynamics and can work on a wider range of systems than Hamiltonian-based neural networks. In addition, the training progresses of our method can be used as an indication of the number of constants of motion in a system which could be useful in studying a novel physical system.
summary: The beauty of physics is that there is usually a conserved quantity in an always-changing system, known as the constant of motion. Finding the constant of motion is important in understanding the dynamics of the system, but typically requires mathematical proficiency and manual analytical work. In this paper, we present a neural network that can simultaneously learn the dynamics of the system and the constants of motion from data. By exploiting the discovered constants of motion, it can produce better predictions on dynamics and can work on a wider range of systems than Hamiltonian-based neural networks. In addition, the training progresses of our method can be used as an indication of the number of constants of motion in a system which could be useful in studying a novel physical system.
abstract_zh: 物理学的美妙之处在于，在不断变化的系统中通常存在一个守恒量，称为运动常数。找到运动常数对于理解系统的动力学非常重要，但通常需要数学熟练程度和手动分析工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种神经网络，可以同时从数据中学习系统的动力学和运动常数。通过利用发现的运动常数，它可以对动力学产生更好的预测，并且可以在比基于哈密顿量的神经网络更广泛的系统上工作。此外，我们方法的训练进度可以用作系统中运动常数数量的指示，这对于研究新颖的物理系统可能很有用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经网络，从数据中同时学习系统动态及守恒量，提升预测能力和适用范围。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动分析，耗时且需数学能力，而该网络可自动化学习，提升效率并适用于更多系统。
AI.method: 构建神经网络同时学习系统动态与守恒量，利用守恒量优化预测，并通过训练过程推断守恒量数量。
AI.result: 实验显示方法在动态预测上更优，适用系统更广，并能通过训练过程确定守恒量数量。
AI.conclusion: 该网络有效自动发现守恒量，提升动力学预测，为物理系统研究提供新工具。

search_text: Constants of motion network 运动网络常数 The beauty of physics is that there is usually a conserved quantity in an always-changing system, known as the constant of motion. Finding the constant of motion is important in understanding the dynamics of the system, but typically requires mathematical proficiency and manual analytical work. In this paper, we present a neural network that can simultaneously learn the dynamics of the system and the constants of motion from data. By exploiting the discovered constants of motion, it can produce better predictions on dynamics and can work on a wider range of systems than Hamiltonian-based neural networks. In addition, the training progresses of our method can be used as an indication of the number of constants of motion in a system which could be useful in studying a novel physical system. 物理学的美妙之处在于，在不断变化的系统中通常存在一个守恒量，称为运动常数。找到运动常数对于理解系统的动力学非常重要，但通常需要数学熟练程度和手动分析工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种神经网络，可以同时从数据中学习系统的动力学和运动常数。通过利用发现的运动常数，它可以对动力学产生更好的预测，并且可以在比基于哈密顿量的神经网络更广泛的系统上工作。此外，我们方法的训练进度可以用作系统中运动常数数量的指示，这对于研究新颖的物理系统可能很有用。 提出一种神经网络，从数据中同时学习系统动态及守恒量，提升预测能力和适用范围。 Muhammad Firmansyah Kasim,Yi Heng Lim cs.LG,cs.AI,physics.class-ph,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Phan Thanh An,Nguyen Thi Le
title: Multiple Shooting Approach for Finding Approximately Shortest Paths for Autonomous Robots in Unknown Environments in 2D
title_zh: 用于在二维未知环境中寻找自主机器人近似最短路径的多重射击方法
abstract: An autonomous robot with a limited vision range finds a path to the goal in an unknown environment in 2D avoiding polygonal obstacles. In the process of discovering the environmental map, the robot has to return to some positions marked previously, the regions where the robot traverses to return are defined as sequences of bundles of line segments. This paper presents a novel algorithm for finding approximately shortest paths along the sequences of bundles of line segments based on the method of multiple shooting. Three factors of the approach including bundle partition, collinear condition, and update of shooting points are presented. We then show that if the collinear condition holds, the exactly shortest paths of the problems are determined, otherwise, the sequence of paths obtained by the update of the method converges to the shortest path. The algorithm is implemented in Python and some numerical examples show that the running time of path-planning for autonomous robots using our method is faster than that using the rubber band technique of Li and Klette in Euclidean Shortest Paths, Springer, 53-89 (2011).
summary: An autonomous robot with a limited vision range finds a path to the goal in an unknown environment in 2D avoiding polygonal obstacles. In the process of discovering the environmental map, the robot has to return to some positions marked previously, the regions where the robot traverses to return are defined as sequences of bundles of line segments. This paper presents a novel algorithm for finding approximately shortest paths along the sequences of bundles of line segments based on the method of multiple shooting. Three factors of the approach including bundle partition, collinear condition, and update of shooting points are presented. We then show that if the collinear condition holds, the exactly shortest paths of the problems are determined, otherwise, the sequence of paths obtained by the update of the method converges to the shortest path. The algorithm is implemented in Python and some numerical examples show that the running time of path-planning for autonomous robots using our method is faster than that using the rubber band technique of Li and Klette in Euclidean Shortest Paths, Springer, 53-89 (2011).
abstract_zh: 视觉范围有限的自主机器人在未知的二维环境中找到通往目标的路径，避开多边形障碍物。在发现环境地图的过程中，机器人必须返回到先前标记的一些位置，机器人返回所经过的区域被定义为线段束序列。本文提出了一种基于多重射击方法沿线段束序列寻找近似最短路径的新算法。提出了该方法的三个因素，包括束划分、共线条件和射击点更新。然后我们证明，如果共线条件成立，则确定问题的最短路径，否则，通过方法更新获得的路径序列收敛到最短路径。该算法在 Python 中实现，一些数值示例表明，使用我们的方法进行自主机器人路径规划的运行时间比使用 Li 和 Klette 在 Euclidean Shortest Paths, Springer, 53-89 (2011) 中的橡皮筋技术的运行时间要快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多重射击法的算法，用于在未知二维环境中为自主机器人寻找近似最短路径，避免多边形障碍物。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人在未知环境中路径规划需应对有限视野和动态障碍物，传统方法效率较低，需更优算法提升计算速度与路径精度。
AI.method: 通过划分线段束序列、应用共线条件及迭代更新射击点，结合多重射击法优化路径搜索，确保满足共线条件时获得精确最短路径，否则收敛至最优解。
AI.result: Python实现的算法在数值实验中显示，相比Li和Klette的橡胶带技术，路径规划运行时间显著缩短。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了路径精度与计算效率，为自主机器人未知环境导航提供了可行的优化方案。

authors_text: Yuanning Cui,Yuxin Wang,Zequn Sun,Wenqiang Liu,Yiqiao Jiang,Kexin Han,Wei Hu
title: Inductive Knowledge Graph Reasoning for Multi-batch Emerging Entities
title_zh: 多批次新兴实体的归纳知识图推理
comment: Accepted in the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
comments: Accepted in the 31st ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management (CIKM 2022)
abstract: Over the years, reasoning over knowledge graphs (KGs), which aims to infer new conclusions from known facts, has mostly focused on static KGs. The unceasing growth of knowledge in real life raises the necessity to enable the inductive reasoning ability on expanding KGs. Existing inductive work assumes that new entities all emerge once in a batch, which oversimplifies the real scenario that new entities continually appear. This study dives into a more realistic and challenging setting where new entities emerge in multiple batches. We propose a walk-based inductive reasoning model to tackle the new setting. Specifically, a graph convolutional network with adaptive relation aggregation is designed to encode and update entities using their neighboring relations. To capture the varying neighbor importance, we employ a query-aware feedback attention mechanism during the aggregation. Furthermore, to alleviate the sparse link problem of new entities, we propose a link augmentation strategy to add trustworthy facts into KGs. We construct three new datasets for simulating this multi-batch emergence scenario. The experimental results show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art embedding-based, walk-based and rule-based models on inductive KG reasoning.
summary: Over the years, reasoning over knowledge graphs (KGs), which aims to infer new conclusions from known facts, has mostly focused on static KGs. The unceasing growth of knowledge in real life raises the necessity to enable the inductive reasoning ability on expanding KGs. Existing inductive work assumes that new entities all emerge once in a batch, which oversimplifies the real scenario that new entities continually appear. This study dives into a more realistic and challenging setting where new entities emerge in multiple batches. We propose a walk-based inductive reasoning model to tackle the new setting. Specifically, a graph convolutional network with adaptive relation aggregation is designed to encode and update entities using their neighboring relations. To capture the varying neighbor importance, we employ a query-aware feedback attention mechanism during the aggregation. Furthermore, to alleviate the sparse link problem of new entities, we propose a link augmentation strategy to add trustworthy facts into KGs. We construct three new datasets for simulating this multi-batch emergence scenario. The experimental results show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art embedding-based, walk-based and rule-based models on inductive KG reasoning.
abstract_zh: 多年来，旨在从已知事实推断出新结论的知识图谱（KG）推理主要集中在静态知识图谱上。现实生活中知识的不断增长提出了在扩展知识图谱上启用归纳推理能力的必要性。现有的归纳工作假设新实体批量出现一次，这过于简化了新实体不断出现的真实场景。这项研究深入探讨了一个更现实、更具挑战性的环境，其中新实体分批出现。我们提出了一种基于步行的归纳推理模型来应对新的环境。具体来说，具有自适应关系聚合的图卷积网络被设计为使用实体的相邻关系来编码和更新实体。为了捕获不同的邻居重要性，我们在聚合期间采用了查询感知反馈注意机制。此外，为了缓解新实体的稀疏链接问题，我们提出了一种链接增强策略，将可信事实添加到知识图谱中。我们构建了三个新数据集来模拟这种多批次出现场景。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在归纳知识图谱推理方面优于最先进的基于嵌入、基于行走和基于规则的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多批次新兴实体环境下，如何通过归纳推理对知识图谱进行有效推理的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有归纳推理方法假设新实体以单批次出现，无法应对现实中持续涌现的多批次新实体场景，需更贴近实际的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出基于图卷积网络与自适应关系聚合的步行归纳模型，结合查询感知反馈注意力机制及链接增强策略，解决新实体稀疏链接问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多批次新兴实体的归纳知识图谱推理任务中，优于现有嵌入式、步行式和规则式模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效应对了多批次新实体场景下的归纳推理挑战，为动态知识图谱推理提供了新思路与数据集支持。

Furthermore, to alleviate the sparse link problem of new entities, we propose a link augmentation strategy to add trustworthy facts into KGs. We construct three new datasets for simulating this multi-batch emergence scenario. The experimental results show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art embedding-based, walk-based and rule-based models on inductive KG reasoning. 多年来，旨在从已知事实推断出新结论的知识图谱（KG）推理主要集中在静态知识图谱上。现实生活中知识的不断增长提出了在扩展知识图谱上启用归纳推理能力的必要性。现有的归纳工作假设新实体批量出现一次，这过于简化了新实体不断出现的真实场景。这项研究深入探讨了一个更现实、更具挑战性的环境，其中新实体分批出现。我们提出了一种基于步行的归纳推理模型来应对新的环境。具体来说，具有自适应关系聚合的图卷积网络被设计为使用实体的相邻关系来编码和更新实体。为了捕获不同的邻居重要性，我们在聚合期间采用了查询感知反馈注意机制。此外，为了缓解新实体的稀疏链接问题，我们提出了一种链接增强策略，将可信事实添加到知识图谱中。我们构建了三个新数据集来模拟这种多批次出现场景。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在归纳知识图谱推理方面优于最先进的基于嵌入、基于行走和基于规则的模型。 本文研究了在多批次新兴实体环境下，如何通过归纳推理对知识图谱进行有效推理的问题。 Yuanning Cui,Yuxin Wang,Zequn Sun,Wenqiang Liu,Yiqiao Jiang,Kexin Han,Wei Hu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yongwei Wang,Yuan Li,Zhiqi Shen,Yuhui Qiao
title: Reversing Skin Cancer Adversarial Examples by Multiscale Diffusive and Denoising Aggregation Mechanism
title_zh: 通过多尺度扩散和去噪聚合机制逆转皮肤癌对抗样本
comment: Accepted by Computers in Biology and Medicine
comments: Accepted by Computers in Biology and Medicine
abstract: Reliable skin cancer diagnosis models play an essential role in early screening and medical intervention. Prevailing computer-aided skin cancer classification systems employ deep learning approaches. However, recent studies reveal their extreme vulnerability to adversarial attacks -- often imperceptible perturbations to significantly reduce the performances of skin cancer diagnosis models. To mitigate these threats, this work presents a simple, effective, and resource-efficient defense framework by reverse engineering adversarial perturbations in skin cancer images. Specifically, a multiscale image pyramid is first established to better preserve discriminative structures in the medical imaging domain. To neutralize adversarial effects, skin images at different scales are then progressively diffused by injecting isotropic Gaussian noises to move the adversarial examples to the clean image manifold. Crucially, to further reverse adversarial noises and suppress redundant injected noises, a novel multiscale denoising mechanism is carefully designed that aggregates image information from neighboring scales. We evaluated the defensive effectiveness of our method on ISIC 2019, a largest skin cancer multiclass classification dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can successfully reverse adversarial perturbations from different attacks and significantly outperform some state-of-the-art methods in defending skin cancer diagnosis models.
summary: Reliable skin cancer diagnosis models play an essential role in early screening and medical intervention. Prevailing computer-aided skin cancer classification systems employ deep learning approaches. However, recent studies reveal their extreme vulnerability to adversarial attacks -- often imperceptible perturbations to significantly reduce the performances of skin cancer diagnosis models. To mitigate these threats, this work presents a simple, effective, and resource-efficient defense framework by reverse engineering adversarial perturbations in skin cancer images. Specifically, a multiscale image pyramid is first established to better preserve discriminative structures in the medical imaging domain. To neutralize adversarial effects, skin images at different scales are then progressively diffused by injecting isotropic Gaussian noises to move the adversarial examples to the clean image manifold. Crucially, to further reverse adversarial noises and suppress redundant injected noises, a novel multiscale denoising mechanism is carefully designed that aggregates image information from neighboring scales. We evaluated the defensive effectiveness of our method on ISIC 2019, a largest skin cancer multiclass classification dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can successfully reverse adversarial perturbations from different attacks and significantly outperform some state-of-the-art methods in defending skin cancer diagnosis models.
abstract_zh: 可靠的皮肤癌诊断模型在早期筛查和医疗干预中发挥着重要作用。流行的计算机辅助皮肤癌分类系统采用深度学习方法。然而，最近的研究表明，它们非常容易受到对抗性攻击的影响——通常是难以察觉的扰动，从而显着降低皮肤癌诊断模型的性能。为了减轻这些威胁，这项工作通过对皮肤癌图像中的对抗性扰动进行逆向工程，提出了一种简单、有效且资源高效的防御框架。具体来说，首先建立多尺度图像金字塔以更好地保留医学成像领域的判别结构。为了抵消对抗性影响，通过注入各向同性高斯噪声将对抗性示例移动到干净的图像流形，从而逐渐扩散不同尺度的皮肤图像。至关重要的是，为了进一步逆转对抗性噪声并抑制冗余注入噪声，精心设计了一种新颖的多尺度去噪机制，该机制可以聚合来自相邻尺度的图像信息。我们在最大的皮肤癌多类分类数据集 ISIC 2019 上评估了我们的方法的防御有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以成功逆转来自不同攻击的对抗性扰动，并且在防御皮肤癌诊断模型方面显着优于一些最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度扩散与去噪聚合机制，用于逆转皮肤癌诊断模型中的对抗样本攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习皮肤癌诊断模型易受对抗攻击影响，而对抗样本的微小扰动会显著降低模型性能，需开发有效防御方法以保障诊断可靠性。
AI.method: 构建多尺度图像金字塔以保留医学图像关键结构，通过注入各向同性高斯噪声逐步扩散不同尺度皮肤图像，将对抗样本推向干净图像流形，并设计多尺度去噪机制聚合相邻尺度信息以消除对抗噪声。
AI.result: 在ISIC 2019数据集上验证，该方法能成功逆转多种攻击的对抗扰动，且防御效果优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多尺度扩散与去噪框架为皮肤癌诊断模型提供了简单高效的对抗防御方案，有效提升了模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Shunli Ren,Siheng Chen,Wenjun Zhang
title: Collaborative Perception for Autonomous Driving: Current Status and Future Trend
title_zh: 自动驾驶协同感知：现状与未来趋势
abstract: Perception is one of the crucial module of the autonomous driving system, which has made great progress recently. However, limited ability of individual vehicles results in the bottleneck of improvement of the perception performance. To break through the limits of individual perception, collaborative perception has been proposed which enables vehicles to share information to perceive the environments beyond line-of-sight and field-of-view. In this paper, we provide a review of the related work about the promising collaborative perception technology, including introducing the fundamental concepts, generalizing the collaboration modes and summarizing the key ingredients and applications of collaborative perception. Finally, we discuss the open challenges and issues of this research area and give some potential further directions.
summary: Perception is one of the crucial module of the autonomous driving system, which has made great progress recently. However, limited ability of individual vehicles results in the bottleneck of improvement of the perception performance. To break through the limits of individual perception, collaborative perception has been proposed which enables vehicles to share information to perceive the environments beyond line-of-sight and field-of-view. In this paper, we provide a review of the related work about the promising collaborative perception technology, including introducing the fundamental concepts, generalizing the collaboration modes and summarizing the key ingredients and applications of collaborative perception. Finally, we discuss the open challenges and issues of this research area and give some potential further directions.
abstract_zh: 感知是自动驾驶系统的关键模块之一，近年来取得了长足的进展。然而，个体车辆能力有限，导致感知性能提升遇到瓶颈。为了突破个体感知的限制，协作感知被提出，使车辆能够共享信息来感知超出视线和视野的环境。在本文中，我们对有前景的协作感知技术的相关工作进行了回顾，包括介绍基本概念、概括协作模式并总结协作感知的关键要素和应用。最后，我们讨论了该研究领域的开放挑战和问题，并给出了一些潜在的进一步方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶领域协作感知技术的现状与未来趋势，分析了其核心概念、协作模式及应用，并探讨了现存挑战。
AI.motivation: 单个自动驾驶车辆的感知能力受限于视野和传感器范围，难以满足复杂环境需求，需通过车辆间协作提升感知性能。
AI.method: 系统梳理协作感知相关文献，归纳其基本原理、协作方式、关键技术及典型应用场景，结合案例进行分析总结。
AI.result: 明确了协作感知的技术框架与实现路径，指出现阶段在通信延迟、数据融合、隐私安全等方面存在显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: 协作感知是突破自动驾驶感知瓶颈的关键方向，未来需在跨车通信、边缘计算、标准化协议等维度持续探索。

authors_text: Wooseok Shin,Hyun Joon Park,Jin Sob Kim,Byung Hoon Lee,Sung Won Han
title: Multi-View Attention Transfer for Efficient Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 用于高效语音增强的多视图注意力转移
abstract: Recent deep learning models have achieved high performance in speech enhancement; however, it is still challenging to obtain a fast and low-complexity model without significant performance degradation. Previous knowledge distillation studies on speech enhancement could not solve this problem because their output distillation methods do not fit the speech enhancement task in some aspects. In this study, we propose multi-view attention transfer (MV-AT), a feature-based distillation, to obtain efficient speech enhancement models in the time domain. Based on the multi-view features extraction model, MV-AT transfers multi-view knowledge of the teacher network to the student network without additional parameters. The experimental results show that the proposed method consistently improved the performance of student models of various sizes on the Valentini and deep noise suppression (DNS) datasets. MANNER-S-8.1GF with our proposed method, a lightweight model for efficient deployment, achieved 15.4x and 4.71x fewer parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs), respectively, compared to the baseline model with similar performance.
summary: Recent deep learning models have achieved high performance in speech enhancement; however, it is still challenging to obtain a fast and low-complexity model without significant performance degradation. Previous knowledge distillation studies on speech enhancement could not solve this problem because their output distillation methods do not fit the speech enhancement task in some aspects. In this study, we propose multi-view attention transfer (MV-AT), a feature-based distillation, to obtain efficient speech enhancement models in the time domain. Based on the multi-view features extraction model, MV-AT transfers multi-view knowledge of the teacher network to the student network without additional parameters. The experimental results show that the proposed method consistently improved the performance of student models of various sizes on the Valentini and deep noise suppression (DNS) datasets. MANNER-S-8.1GF with our proposed method, a lightweight model for efficient deployment, achieved 15.4x and 4.71x fewer parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs), respectively, compared to the baseline model with similar performance.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习模型在语音增强方面取得了高性能；然而，在不显着性能下降的情况下获得快速且低复杂度的模型仍然具有挑战性。先前关于语音增强的知识蒸馏研究无法解决这个问题，因为它们的输出蒸馏方法在某些方面不适合语音增强任务。在本研究中，我们提出了多视图注意力转移（MV-AT），一种基于特征的蒸馏，以获得时域中有效的语音增强模型。基于多视图特征提取模型，MV-AT将教师网络的多视图知识传输到学生网络，无需额外参数。实验结果表明，所提出的方法持续提高了各种规模的学生模型在 Valentini 和深度噪声抑制（DNS）数据集上的性能。与具有类似性能的基准模型相比，采用我们提出的方法（一种用于高效部署的轻量级模型）的 MANNER-S-8.1GF 分别减少了 15.4 倍和 4.71 倍的参数和浮点运算 (FLOP)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多视角注意力迁移（MV-AT）方法，通过特征蒸馏实现高效语音增强模型的构建。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习语音增强模型存在计算复杂度高、推理速度慢的问题，传统知识蒸馏方法因输出对齐方式不适应语音增强任务而效果有限。
AI.method: 基于多视角特征提取框架，设计无需额外参数的特征级知识迁移方案，将教师网络的多视角注意力知识传递至学生网络。
AI.result: 在Valentini和DNS数据集上，轻量级模型MANNER-S-8.1GF参数量和FLOPs分别减少15.4倍和4.71倍，性能接近基线模型。
AI.conclusion: MV-AT方法有效解决了语音增强模型的效率与性能平衡问题，为部署提供可行方案。

search_text: Multi-View Attention Transfer for Efficient Speech Enhancement 用于高效语音增强的多视图注意力转移 Recent deep learning models have achieved high performance in speech enhancement; however, it is still challenging to obtain a fast and low-complexity model without significant performance degradation. Previous knowledge distillation studies on speech enhancement could not solve this problem because their output distillation methods do not fit the speech enhancement task in some aspects. In this study, we propose multi-view attention transfer (MV-AT), a feature-based distillation, to obtain efficient speech enhancement models in the time domain. Based on the multi-view features extraction model, MV-AT transfers multi-view knowledge of the teacher network to the student network without additional parameters. The experimental results show that the proposed method consistently improved the performance of student models of various sizes on the Valentini and deep noise suppression (DNS) datasets. MANNER-S-8.1GF with our proposed method, a lightweight model for efficient deployment, achieved 15.4x and 4.71x fewer parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs), respectively, compared to the baseline model with similar performance. 最近的深度学习模型在语音增强方面取得了高性能；然而，在不显着性能下降的情况下获得快速且低复杂度的模型仍然具有挑战性。先前关于语音增强的知识蒸馏研究无法解决这个问题，因为它们的输出蒸馏方法在某些方面不适合语音增强任务。在本研究中，我们提出了多视图注意力转移（MV-AT），一种基于特征的蒸馏，以获得时域中有效的语音增强模型。基于多视图特征提取模型，MV-AT将教师网络的多视图知识传输到学生网络，无需额外参数。实验结果表明，所提出的方法持续提高了各种规模的学生模型在 Valentini 和深度噪声抑制（DNS）数据集上的性能。与具有类似性能的基准模型相比，采用我们提出的方法（一种用于高效部署的轻量级模型）的 MANNER-S-8.1GF 分别减少了 15.4 倍和 4.71 倍的参数和浮点运算 (FLOP)。 本文提出多视角注意力迁移（MV-AT）方法，通过特征蒸馏实现高效语音增强模型的构建。 Wooseok Shin,Hyun Joon Park,Jin Sob Kim,Byung Hoon Lee,Sung Won Han cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Bing Liu,Wen Hua,Guido Zuccon,Genghong Zhao,Xia Zhang
title: High-quality Task Division for Large-scale Entity Alignment
title_zh: 大规模实体对齐的高质量任务划分
abstract: Entity Alignment (EA) aims to match equivalent entities that refer to the same real-world objects and is a key step for Knowledge Graph (KG) fusion. Most neural EA models cannot be applied to large-scale real-life KGs due to their excessive consumption of GPU memory and time. One promising solution is to divide a large EA task into several subtasks such that each subtask only needs to match two small subgraphs of the original KGs. However, it is challenging to divide the EA task without losing effectiveness. Existing methods display low coverage of potential mappings, insufficient evidence in context graphs, and largely differing subtask sizes. In this work, we design the DivEA framework for large-scale EA with high-quality task division. To include in the EA subtasks a high proportion of the potential mappings originally present in the large EA task, we devise a counterpart discovery method that exploits the locality principle of the EA task and the power of trained EA models. Unique to our counterpart discovery method is the explicit modelling of the chance of a potential mapping. We also introduce an evidence passing mechanism to quantify the informativeness of context entities and find the most informative context graphs with flexible control of the subtask size. Extensive experiments show that DivEA achieves higher EA performance than alternative state-of-the-art solutions.
summary: Entity Alignment (EA) aims to match equivalent entities that refer to the same real-world objects and is a key step for Knowledge Graph (KG) fusion. Most neural EA models cannot be applied to large-scale real-life KGs due to their excessive consumption of GPU memory and time. One promising solution is to divide a large EA task into several subtasks such that each subtask only needs to match two small subgraphs of the original KGs. However, it is challenging to divide the EA task without losing effectiveness. Existing methods display low coverage of potential mappings, insufficient evidence in context graphs, and largely differing subtask sizes. In this work, we design the DivEA framework for large-scale EA with high-quality task division. To include in the EA subtasks a high proportion of the potential mappings originally present in the large EA task, we devise a counterpart discovery method that exploits the locality principle of the EA task and the power of trained EA models. Unique to our counterpart discovery method is the explicit modelling of the chance of a potential mapping. We also introduce an evidence passing mechanism to quantify the informativeness of context entities and find the most informative context graphs with flexible control of the subtask size. Extensive experiments show that DivEA achieves higher EA performance than alternative state-of-the-art solutions.
abstract_zh: 实体对齐（EA）旨在匹配引用相同现实世界对象的等效实体，是知识图（KG）融合的关键步骤。大多数神经 EA 模型由于过度消耗 GPU 内存和时间而无法应用于大规模的现实生活 KG。一种有前途的解决方案是将大型 EA 任务划分为多个子任务，这样每个子任务只需要匹配原始 KG 的两个小子图。然而，在不损失有效性的情况下划分 EA 任务具有挑战性。现有方法显示潜在映射覆盖率低、上下文图中证据不足以及子任务大小差异很大。在这项工作中，我们设计了具有高质量任务划分的大规模 EA 的 DivEA 框架。为了在 EA 子任务中包含大型 EA 任务中最初存在的大部分潜在映射，我们设计了一种对应的发现方法，该方法利用 EA 任务的局部性原则和经过训练的 EA 模型的强大功能。我们的对应发现方法的独特之处在于对潜在映射机会的显式建模。我们还引入了一种证据传递机制来量化上下文实体的信息量，并通过灵活控制子任务大小来找到信息量最大的上下文图。大量实验表明，与替代的最先进解决方案相比，DivEA 实现了更高的 EA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DivEA框架，通过高质量任务划分解决大规模知识图谱实体对齐的效率与效果问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络实体对齐模型难以处理大规模知识图谱，因计算资源消耗过大且任务划分方法存在覆盖不足、上下文证据不足及子任务规模不均等问题。
AI.method: 设计DivEA框架，包含基于局部性原理的配对发现机制和证据传递机制，通过显式建模潜在映射概率并量化上下文实体信息，实现灵活控制子任务规模的高效划分。
AI.result: 实验表明DivEA在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，在保持高对齐精度的同时显著降低计算资源消耗。
AI.conclusion: DivEA通过创新的任务划分策略有效解决了大规模实体对齐的挑战，为知识图谱融合提供了更高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Jintang Li,Zhouxin Yu,Zulun Zhu,Liang Chen,Qi Yu,Zibin Zheng,Sheng Tian,Ruofan Wu,Changhua Meng
title: Scaling Up Dynamic Graph Representation Learning via Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过尖峰神经网络扩展动态图表示学习
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2023.Contains appendix with additional details about algorithms and experiments. Code available at https://github.com/EdisonLeeeee/SpikeNet
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2023.Contains appendix with additional details about algorithms and experiments. Code available at https://github.com/EdisonLeeeee/SpikeNet
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in research on dynamic graph representation learning, which aims to model temporal graphs that are dynamic and evolving constantly over time. However, current work typically models graph dynamics with recurrent neural networks (RNNs), making them suffer seriously from computation and memory overheads on large temporal graphs. So far, scalability of dynamic graph representation learning on large temporal graphs remains one of the major challenges. In this paper, we present a scalable framework, namely SpikeNet, to efficiently capture the temporal and structural patterns of temporal graphs. We explore a new direction in that we can capture the evolving dynamics of temporal graphs with spiking neural networks (SNNs) instead of RNNs. As a low-power alternative to RNNs, SNNs explicitly model graph dynamics as spike trains of neuron populations and enable spike-based propagation in an efficient way. Experiments on three large real-world temporal graph datasets demonstrate that SpikeNet outperforms strong baselines on the temporal node classification task with lower computational costs. Particularly, SpikeNet generalizes to a large temporal graph (2.7M nodes and 13.9M edges) with significantly fewer parameters and computation overheads.Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/EdisonLeeeee/SpikeNet}.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge in research on dynamic graph representation learning, which aims to model temporal graphs that are dynamic and evolving constantly over time. However, current work typically models graph dynamics with recurrent neural networks (RNNs), making them suffer seriously from computation and memory overheads on large temporal graphs. So far, scalability of dynamic graph representation learning on large temporal graphs remains one of the major challenges. In this paper, we present a scalable framework, namely SpikeNet, to efficiently capture the temporal and structural patterns of temporal graphs. We explore a new direction in that we can capture the evolving dynamics of temporal graphs with spiking neural networks (SNNs) instead of RNNs. As a low-power alternative to RNNs, SNNs explicitly model graph dynamics as spike trains of neuron populations and enable spike-based propagation in an efficient way. Experiments on three large real-world temporal graph datasets demonstrate that SpikeNet outperforms strong baselines on the temporal node classification task with lower computational costs. Particularly, SpikeNet generalizes to a large temporal graph (2.7M nodes and 13.9M edges) with significantly fewer parameters and computation overheads.Our code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/EdisonLeeeee/SpikeNet}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，动态图表示学习的研究激增，旨在对动态且随时间不断变化的时间图进行建模。然而，当前的工作通常使用循环神经网络（RNN）对图动态进行建模，这使得它们严重受到大型时序图的计算和内存开销的影响。到目前为止，大型时序图上动态图表示学习的可扩展性仍然是主要挑战之一。在本文中，我们提出了一个可扩展的框架，即 SpikeNet，以有效捕获时间图的时间和结构模式。我们探索了一个新的方向，即我们可以使用尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 而不是 RNN 来捕获时间图的动态演化。作为 RNN 的低功耗替代方案，SNN 将图动态显式建模为神经元群体的尖峰序列，并以有效的方式实现基于尖峰的传播。对三个大型现实世界时间图数据集的实验表明，SpikeNet 在时间节点分类任务上优于强基线，且计算成本较低。特别是，SpikeNet 可以推广到一个大型时间图（270 万个节点和 1390 万条边），参数和计算开销显着减少。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/EdisonLeeeee/SpikeNet} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于脉冲神经网络的可扩展动态图表示学习框架SpikeNet，以解决传统方法在大规模动态图上的计算和内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图表示学习方法依赖RNN建模时序动态，导致计算和内存开销过大，难以处理大规模动态图数据。
AI.method: 设计SpikeNet框架，采用脉冲神经网络(SNN)替代RNN，通过神经元群体的脉冲序列显式建模图动态，并实现高效的脉冲传播机制。
AI.result: 在三个大规模真实动态图数据集上，SpikeNet在计算成本降低的情况下优于现有方法，尤其在2.7M节点的超大规模图上参数量减少且效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SpikeNet通过脉冲神经网络有效解决了动态图表示学习的可扩展性难题，为大规模动态图分析提供了新思路。
