This article tackles the data isolation issue in the field of smart energy systems by examining Semantic Web methods on top of a household energy system. We offer an ontology-based approach for managing decentralized data at the device-level resolution in a system. As a consequence, the scope of the data associated with each device may easily be expanded in an interoperable manner throughout the Web, and additional information, such as weather, can be obtained from the Web, provided that the data is organized according to W3C standards. 在由家电、电动汽车、太阳能电池板等各种设备组成的分散式家庭能源系统中，终端用户如果能够获得设备粒度的电能消耗和生产数据，就能够更深入地挖掘系统的细节，进一步实现能源的可持续性。然而，该领域的许多数据库与其他领域是孤立的，仅包括与能源有关的信息。这可能会导致每个设备的能源使用信息（例如天气）丢失。同时，大量数据集已广泛应用于机器学习模型等计算建模技术。虽然这种计算方法通过仅关注数据集的局部视图来实现很高的准确性和性能，但无法保证模型的可靠性，因为当考虑到信息遗漏时，此类模型非常容易受到数据输入波动的影响。本文通过研究家庭能源系统之上的语义网方法来解决智能能源系统领域的数据隔离问题。我们提供基于本体的方法，用于在系统中以设备级分辨率管理分散数据。因此，与每个设备相关的数据范围可以很容易地以可互操作的方式扩展到整个 Web，并且可以从 Web 获得附加信息，例如天气，只要数据是根据 W3C 标准组织的。 提出基于语义网络的方法解决家庭能源数据孤岛问题，整合多源数据提升系统可持续性。 Jiantao Wu,Fabrizio Orlandi,Tarek AlSkaif,Declan O'Sullivan,Soumyabrata Dev cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Gati Aher,Rosa I. Arriaga,Adam Tauman Kalai
title: Using Large Language Models to Simulate Multiple Humans and Replicate Human Subject Studies
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型模拟多个人类并复制人类受试者研究
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2023
comments: Accepted for oral presentation at International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2023
abstract: We introduce a new type of test, called a Turing Experiment (TE), for evaluating to what extent a given language model, such as GPT models, can simulate different aspects of human behavior. A TE can also reveal consistent distortions in a language model's simulation of a specific human behavior. Unlike the Turing Test, which involves simulating a single arbitrary individual, a TE requires simulating a representative sample of participants in human subject research. We carry out TEs that attempt to replicate well-established findings from prior studies. We design a methodology for simulating TEs and illustrate its use to compare how well different language models are able to reproduce classic economic, psycholinguistic, and social psychology experiments: Ultimatum Game, Garden Path Sentences, Milgram Shock Experiment, and Wisdom of Crowds. In the first three TEs, the existing findings were replicated using recent models, while the last TE reveals a "hyper-accuracy distortion" present in some language models (including ChatGPT and GPT-4), which could affect downstream applications in education and the arts.
summary: We introduce a new type of test, called a Turing Experiment (TE), for evaluating to what extent a given language model, such as GPT models, can simulate different aspects of human behavior. A TE can also reveal consistent distortions in a language model's simulation of a specific human behavior. Unlike the Turing Test, which involves simulating a single arbitrary individual, a TE requires simulating a representative sample of participants in human subject research. We carry out TEs that attempt to replicate well-established findings from prior studies. We design a methodology for simulating TEs and illustrate its use to compare how well different language models are able to reproduce classic economic, psycholinguistic, and social psychology experiments: Ultimatum Game, Garden Path Sentences, Milgram Shock Experiment, and Wisdom of Crowds. In the first three TEs, the existing findings were replicated using recent models, while the last TE reveals a "hyper-accuracy distortion" present in some language models (including ChatGPT and GPT-4), which could affect downstream applications in education and the arts.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种称为图灵实验（TE）的新型测试，用于评估给定语言模型（例如 GPT 模型）可以在多大程度上模拟人类行为的不同方面。 TE 还可以揭示语言模型对特定人类行为的模拟中的一致扭曲。与涉及模拟单个任意个体的图灵测试不同，TE 需要模拟人类受试者研究参与者的代表性样本。我们进行的 TE 试图复制先前研究中已得到证实的结果。我们设计了一种模拟 TE 的方法，并说明了它的用途，以比较不同的语言模型能够如何重现经典的经济、心理语言学和社会心理学实验：最后通牒游戏、花园小径句子、米尔格拉姆休克实验和群体智慧。在前三个 TE 中，现有的研究结果是使用最新模型复制的，而最后一个 TE 揭示了某些语言模型（包括 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4）中存在的“超准确度失真”，这可能会影响教育和艺术领域的下游应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为图灵实验（TE）的新测试方法，用于评估大型语言模型模拟人类行为的能力，并尝试复现经典心理学和经济学实验。
AI.motivation: 传统图灵测试仅关注模拟单个个体，而本文旨在通过模拟人类受试者研究中的代表性样本，检验语言模型是否能准确复现人类行为模式及其潜在偏差。
AI.method: 设计图灵实验方法，通过模拟 Ultimatum Game（最后通牒博弈）、Garden Path Sentences（花园路径句）、Milgram Shock Experiment（米尔格拉姆电击实验）和 Wisdom of Crowds（群体智慧）等经典实验，比较不同语言模型的模拟效果。
AI.result: 前三个实验成功复现了既有研究结论，但最后一个实验发现部分模型（如ChatGPT和GPT-4）存在‘超准确性偏差’，可能影响教育和艺术等领域的应用。
AI.conclusion: 图灵实验为评估语言模型的人类行为模拟能力提供了有效框架，但需警惕模型在特定任务中产生的系统性偏差。

authors_text: Shuchan Wang
title: Information-Theoretic Equivalence of Entropic Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport: A Theory for Multi-Agent Communication
title_zh: 熵多边际最优传输的信息论等价：多智能体通信理论
comment: The assumption at the beginning of the main results that "X^n is i.i.d. if and only if it is in the typical set" is a huge mistake. This makes the subsequent proofs invalid. This is corrected in a recent paper motivated in a quantum setting
comments: The assumption at the beginning of the main results that "X^n is i.i.d. if and only if it is in the typical set" is a huge mistake. This makes the subsequent proofs invalid. This is corrected in a recent paper motivated in a quantum setting
abstract: In this paper, we propose our information-theoretic equivalence of entropic multi-marginal optimal transport (MOT). This equivalence can be easily reduced to the case of entropic optimal transport (OT). Because OT is widely used to compare differences between knowledge or beliefs, we apply this result to the communication between agents with different beliefs. Our results formally prove the statement that entropic OT is information-theoretically optimal given by Wang et al. [2020] and generalize it to the multi-agent case. We believe that our work can shed light on OT theory in future multi-agent teaming systems.
summary: In this paper, we propose our information-theoretic equivalence of entropic multi-marginal optimal transport (MOT). This equivalence can be easily reduced to the case of entropic optimal transport (OT). Because OT is widely used to compare differences between knowledge or beliefs, we apply this result to the communication between agents with different beliefs. Our results formally prove the statement that entropic OT is information-theoretically optimal given by Wang et al. [2020] and generalize it to the multi-agent case. We believe that our work can shed light on OT theory in future multi-agent teaming systems.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了熵多边缘最优传输（MOT）的信息论等价。这种等价性可以很容易地简化为熵最优传输（OT）的情况。由于 OT 广泛用于比较知识或信念之间的差异，因此我们将此结果应用于具有不同信念的主体之间的沟通。我们的结果正式证明了 Wang 等人给出的熵 OT 是信息理论上最优的陈述。 [2020]并将其推广到多智能体情况。我们相信我们的工作可以揭示未来多智能体团队系统中的 OT 理论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵多边际最优传输的信息论等价性，并将其应用于多智能体通信场景。
AI.motivation: 最优传输（OT）常用于比较知识或信念差异，但需扩展至多智能体场景以解决异质信念通信问题。
AI.method: 建立熵多边际OT的信息论等价性理论，通过简化至熵OT并证明其最优性。
AI.result: 严格证明熵OT的信息论最优性（Wang等2020），并推广至多智能体通信场景。
AI.conclusion: 为多智能体协作系统中的OT理论提供了新视角与理论支撑。

authors_text: Balder ten Cate,Maurice Funk,Jean Christoph Jung,Carsten Lutz
title: On the non-efficient PAC learnability of conjunctive queries
title_zh: 论联合查询的非高效 PAC 可学习性
comment: To appear in Information Processing Letters
comments: To appear in Information Processing Letters
abstract: This note serves three purposes: (i) we provide a self-contained exposition of the fact that conjunctive queries are not efficiently learnable in the Probably-Approximately-Correct (PAC) model, paying clear attention to the complicating fact that this concept class lacks the polynomial-size fitting property, a property that is tacitly assumed in much of the computational learning theory literature; (ii) we establish a strong negative PAC learnability result that applies to many restricted classes of conjunctive queries (CQs), including acyclic CQs for a wide range of notions of "acyclicity"; (iii) we show that CQs (and UCQs) are efficiently PAC learnable with membership queries.
summary: This note serves three purposes: (i) we provide a self-contained exposition of the fact that conjunctive queries are not efficiently learnable in the Probably-Approximately-Correct (PAC) model, paying clear attention to the complicating fact that this concept class lacks the polynomial-size fitting property, a property that is tacitly assumed in much of the computational learning theory literature; (ii) we establish a strong negative PAC learnability result that applies to many restricted classes of conjunctive queries (CQs), including acyclic CQs for a wide range of notions of "acyclicity"; (iii) we show that CQs (and UCQs) are efficiently PAC learnable with membership queries.
abstract_zh: 这篇文章有三个目的：（i）我们提供了一个独立的解释，说明连接查询在可能近似正确（PAC）模型中无法有效学习，明确注意这个概念类缺乏多项式大小拟合属性的复杂事实，这是许多计算学习理论文献中默认假设的属性； (ii) 我们建立了一个强大的负 PAC 可学习性结果，适用于许多受限类别的联合查询 (CQ)，包括用于各种“非循环性”概念的非循环 CQ； (iii) 我们证明 CQ（和 UCQ）可以通过成员资格查询有效地进行 PAC 学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究连合查询（CQs）在PAC模型下的非高效可学习性，并探讨其受限类别的学习性。
AI.motivation: 现有计算学习理论常假设概念类具有多项式大小拟合属性，但CQs缺乏此属性，需明确其学习难度及限制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与反例构造，证明CQs的非高效PAC可学习性，并针对受限类建立强负结果，同时结合成员查询证明其可学习性。
AI.result: CQs在PAC模型下非高效可学习；受限类如无环CQs存在强负结果；CQs与UCQs在成员查询下可高效学习。
AI.conclusion: CQs的PAC学习受限于其缺乏多项式拟合属性，但引入成员查询可突破限制，凸显学习模型假设的重要性。

search_text: On the non-efficient PAC learnability of conjunctive queries 论联合查询的非高效 PAC 可学习性 This note serves three purposes: (i) we provide a self-contained exposition of the fact that conjunctive queries are not efficiently learnable in the Probably-Approximately-Correct (PAC) model, paying clear attention to the complicating fact that this concept class lacks the polynomial-size fitting property, a property that is tacitly assumed in much of the computational learning theory literature; (ii) we establish a strong negative PAC learnability result that applies to many restricted classes of conjunctive queries (CQs), including acyclic CQs for a wide range of notions of "acyclicity"; (iii) we show that CQs (and UCQs) are efficiently PAC learnable with membership queries. 这篇文章有三个目的：（i）我们提供了一个独立的解释，说明连接查询在可能近似正确（PAC）模型中无法有效学习，明确注意这个概念类缺乏多项式大小拟合属性的复杂事实，这是许多计算学习理论文献中默认假设的属性； (ii) 我们建立了一个强大的负 PAC 可学习性结果，适用于许多受限类别的联合查询 (CQ)，包括用于各种“非循环性”概念的非循环 CQ； (iii) 我们证明 CQ（和 UCQ）可以通过成员资格查询有效地进行 PAC 学习。 本文研究连合查询（CQs）在PAC模型下的非高效可学习性，并探讨其受限类别的学习性。 Balder ten Cate,Maurice Funk,Jean Christoph Jung,Carsten Lutz cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Jiayi Wang,Rongzhou Bao,Zhuosheng Zhang,Hai Zhao
title: Rethinking Textual Adversarial Defense for Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 重新思考预训练语言模型的文本对抗性防御
abstract: Although pre-trained language models (PrLMs) have achieved significant success, recent studies demonstrate that PrLMs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. By generating adversarial examples with slight perturbations on different levels (sentence / word / character), adversarial attacks can fool PrLMs to generate incorrect predictions, which questions the robustness of PrLMs. However, we find that most existing textual adversarial examples are unnatural, which can be easily distinguished by both human and machine. Based on a general anomaly detector, we propose a novel metric (Degree of Anomaly) as a constraint to enable current adversarial attack approaches to generate more natural and imperceptible adversarial examples. Under this new constraint, the success rate of existing attacks drastically decreases, which reveals that the robustness of PrLMs is not as fragile as they claimed. In addition, we find that four types of randomization can invalidate a large portion of textual adversarial examples. Based on anomaly detector and randomization, we design a universal defense framework, which is among the first to perform textual adversarial defense without knowing the specific attack. Empirical results show that our universal defense framework achieves comparable or even higher after-attack accuracy with other specific defenses, while preserving higher original accuracy at the same time. Our work discloses the essence of textual adversarial attacks, and indicates that (1) further works of adversarial attacks should focus more on how to overcome the detection and resist the randomization, otherwise their adversarial examples would be easily detected and invalidated; and (2) compared with the unnatural and perceptible adversarial examples, it is those undetectable adversarial examples that pose real risks for PrLMs and require more attention for future robustness-enhancing strategies.
summary: Although pre-trained language models (PrLMs) have achieved significant success, recent studies demonstrate that PrLMs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. By generating adversarial examples with slight perturbations on different levels (sentence / word / character), adversarial attacks can fool PrLMs to generate incorrect predictions, which questions the robustness of PrLMs. However, we find that most existing textual adversarial examples are unnatural, which can be easily distinguished by both human and machine. Based on a general anomaly detector, we propose a novel metric (Degree of Anomaly) as a constraint to enable current adversarial attack approaches to generate more natural and imperceptible adversarial examples. Under this new constraint, the success rate of existing attacks drastically decreases, which reveals that the robustness of PrLMs is not as fragile as they claimed. In addition, we find that four types of randomization can invalidate a large portion of textual adversarial examples. Based on anomaly detector and randomization, we design a universal defense framework, which is among the first to perform textual adversarial defense without knowing the specific attack. Empirical results show that our universal defense framework achieves comparable or even higher after-attack accuracy with other specific defenses, while preserving higher original accuracy at the same time. Our work discloses the essence of textual adversarial attacks, and indicates that (1) further works of adversarial attacks should focus more on how to overcome the detection and resist the randomization, otherwise their adversarial examples would be easily detected and invalidated; and (2) compared with the unnatural and perceptible adversarial examples, it is those undetectable adversarial examples that pose real risks for PrLMs and require more attention for future robustness-enhancing strategies.
abstract_zh: 尽管预训练语言模型 (PrLM) 取得了巨大成功，但最近的研究表明 PrLM 很容易受到对抗性攻击。通过生成在不同级别（句子/单词/字符）上有轻微扰动的对抗性示例，对抗性攻击可以欺骗 PrLM 生成错误的预测，从而质疑 PrLM 的稳健性。然而，我们发现大多数现有的文本对抗示例都是不自然的，人类和机器都可以轻松区分。基于通用异常检测器，我们提出了一种新的度量（异常度）作为约束，使当前的对抗性攻击方法能够生成更自然和难以察觉的对抗性示例。在这种新的约束下，现有攻击的成功率急剧下降，这表明 PrLM 的鲁棒性并不像他们声称的那么脆弱。此外，我们发现四种类型的随机化可以使大部分文本对抗性示例无效。基于异常检测器和随机化，我们设计了一个通用的防御框架，该框架是第一个在不知道具体攻击的情况下执行文本对抗性防御的框架。实证结果表明，我们的通用防御框架实现了与其他特定防御相当甚至更高的攻击后精度，同时保留了更高的原始精度。我们的工作揭示了文本对抗性攻击的本质，并表明：（1）对抗性攻击的进一步工作应更多地关注如何克服检测和抵抗随机化，否则其对抗性示例将很容易被检测到并失效； （2）与非自然且可感知的对抗性例子相比，那些不可察觉的对抗性例子对 PrLM 构成了真正的风险，需要更多关注未来的鲁棒性增强策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异常检测和随机化的通用文本对抗防御框架，以提升预训练语言模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本对抗样本存在不自然、易被检测的问题，且现有防御方法依赖特定攻击知识，缺乏普适性。
AI.method: 提出Degree of Anomaly度量约束对抗样本生成，并结合四种随机化技术设计无需攻击先验知识的通用防御框架。
AI.result: 防御框架在保持高原始准确率的同时，显著提升攻击后准确率，效果优于现有特定防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击需突破检测与随机化防御，不可检测的对抗样本才是预训练模型的真实威胁。

authors_text: Chuyuan Li,Chloé Braud,Maxime Amblard
title: Multi-Task Learning for Depression Detection in Dialogs
title_zh: 用于对话中抑郁症检测的多任务学习
comment: ef:The 23rd Annual Meeting of the Special Interest Group on Discourse and Dialogue (SIGDIAL 2022), Sep 2022, Edinbourg, United Kingdom
comments: ef:The 23rd Annual Meeting of the Special Interest Group on Discourse and Dialogue (SIGDIAL 2022), Sep 2022, Edinbourg, United Kingdom
abstract: Depression is a serious mental illness that impacts the way people communicate, especially through their emotions, and, allegedly, the way they interact with others. This work examines depression signals in dialogs, a less studied setting that suffers from data sparsity. We hypothesize that depression and emotion can inform each other, and we propose to explore the influence of dialog structure through topic and dialog act prediction. We investigate a Multi-Task Learning (MTL) approach, where all tasks mentioned above are learned jointly with dialog-tailored hierarchical modeling. We experiment on the DAIC and DailyDialog corpora-both contain dialogs in English-and show important improvements over state-ofthe-art on depression detection (at best 70.6% F 1), which demonstrates the correlation of depression with emotion and dialog organization and the power of MTL to leverage information from different sources.
summary: Depression is a serious mental illness that impacts the way people communicate, especially through their emotions, and, allegedly, the way they interact with others. This work examines depression signals in dialogs, a less studied setting that suffers from data sparsity. We hypothesize that depression and emotion can inform each other, and we propose to explore the influence of dialog structure through topic and dialog act prediction. We investigate a Multi-Task Learning (MTL) approach, where all tasks mentioned above are learned jointly with dialog-tailored hierarchical modeling. We experiment on the DAIC and DailyDialog corpora-both contain dialogs in English-and show important improvements over state-ofthe-art on depression detection (at best 70.6% F 1), which demonstrates the correlation of depression with emotion and dialog organization and the power of MTL to leverage information from different sources.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是一种严重的精神疾病，它影响人们的沟通方式，尤其是通过他们的情绪，据称还影响他们与他人互动的方式。这项工作检查了对话中的抑郁信号，这是一种研究较少且受数据稀疏影响的环境。我们假设抑郁和情绪可以相互影响，并且我们建议通过主题和对话行为预测来探索对话结构的影响。我们研究了一种多任务学习（MTL）方法，其中上述所有任务都是通过对话定制的分层建模联合学习的。我们在 DAIC 和 DailyDialog 语料库（均包含英语对话）上进行了实验，结果显示在抑郁症检测方面较最先进的技术（最多 70.6% F 1）有重要改进，这证明了抑郁症与情绪和对话组织的相关性，以及 MTL 利用不同来源信息的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多任务学习（MTL）的方法，通过结合对话结构和情绪信息来检测抑郁症状。
AI.motivation: 抑郁会影响人们的沟通方式，尤其在对话中表现出情绪和互动模式的变化。现有研究在对话场景下数据稀疏且缺乏对抑郁与情绪关联的深入探索。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，联合学习抑郁检测、情绪识别、主题预测和对话行为识别任务，并引入对话定制的层次化建模方法。
AI.result: 在DAIC和DailyDialog数据集上实现抑郁检测F1值最高达70.6%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习能有效利用情绪和对话结构信息，证明抑郁与情绪及对话组织存在关联性，为稀疏数据场景下的抑郁检测提供新思路。

We experiment on the DAIC and DailyDialog corpora-both contain dialogs in English-and show important improvements over state-ofthe-art on depression detection (at best 70.6% F 1), which demonstrates the correlation of depression with emotion and dialog organization and the power of MTL to leverage information from different sources. 抑郁症是一种严重的精神疾病，它影响人们的沟通方式，尤其是通过他们的情绪，据称还影响他们与他人互动的方式。这项工作检查了对话中的抑郁信号，这是一种研究较少且受数据稀疏影响的环境。我们假设抑郁和情绪可以相互影响，并且我们建议通过主题和对话行为预测来探索对话结构的影响。我们研究了一种多任务学习（MTL）方法，其中上述所有任务都是通过对话定制的分层建模联合学习的。我们在 DAIC 和 DailyDialog 语料库（均包含英语对话）上进行了实验，结果显示在抑郁症检测方面较最先进的技术（最多 70.6% F 1）有重要改进，这证明了抑郁症与情绪和对话组织的相关性，以及 MTL 利用不同来源信息的能力。 本文提出了一种基于多任务学习（MTL）的方法，通过结合对话结构和情绪信息来检测抑郁症状。 Chuyuan Li,Chloé Braud,Maxime Amblard cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikola Lackovic,Claude Montacié,Gauthier Lalande,Marie-José Caraty
title: Prediction of User Request and Complaint in Spoken Customer-Agent Conversations
title_zh: 预测客户与代理语音对话中的用户请求和投诉
abstract: We present the corpus called HealthCall. This was recorded in real-life conditions in the call center of Malakoff Humanis. It includes two separate audio channels, the first one for the customer and the second one for the agent. Each conversation was anonymized respecting the General Data Protection Regulation. This corpus includes a transcription of the spoken conversations and was divided into two sets: Train and Devel sets. Two important customer relationship management tasks were assessed on the HealthCall corpus: Automatic prediction of type of user requests and complaints detection. For this purpose, we have investigated 14 feature sets: 6 linguistic feature sets, 6 audio feature sets and 2 vocal interaction feature sets. We have used Bidirectional Encoder Representation from Transformers models for the linguistic features, openSMILE and Wav2Vec 2.0 for the audio features. The vocal interaction feature sets were designed and developed from Turn Takings. The results show that the linguistic features always give the best results (91.2% for the Request task and 70.3% for the Complaint task). The Wav2Vec 2.0 features seem more suitable for these two tasks than the ComPaRe16 features. Vocal interaction features outperformed ComPaRe16 features on Complaint task with a 57% rate achieved with only six features.
summary: We present the corpus called HealthCall. This was recorded in real-life conditions in the call center of Malakoff Humanis. It includes two separate audio channels, the first one for the customer and the second one for the agent. Each conversation was anonymized respecting the General Data Protection Regulation. This corpus includes a transcription of the spoken conversations and was divided into two sets: Train and Devel sets. Two important customer relationship management tasks were assessed on the HealthCall corpus: Automatic prediction of type of user requests and complaints detection. For this purpose, we have investigated 14 feature sets: 6 linguistic feature sets, 6 audio feature sets and 2 vocal interaction feature sets. We have used Bidirectional Encoder Representation from Transformers models for the linguistic features, openSMILE and Wav2Vec 2.0 for the audio features. The vocal interaction feature sets were designed and developed from Turn Takings. The results show that the linguistic features always give the best results (91.2% for the Request task and 70.3% for the Complaint task). The Wav2Vec 2.0 features seem more suitable for these two tasks than the ComPaRe16 features. Vocal interaction features outperformed ComPaRe16 features on Complaint task with a 57% rate achieved with only six features.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了名为 HealthCall 的语料库。这是在 Malakoff Humanis 呼叫中心的现实生活条件下记录的。它包括两个独立的音频通道，第一个用于客户，第二个用于代理。根据《通用数据保护条例》，每次对话都是匿名的。该语料库包含口语对话的转录，并分为两组：训练集和开发集。在 HealthCall 语料库上评估了两项重要的客户关系管理任务：自动预测用户请求类型和投诉检测。为此，我们研究了 14 个特征集：6 个语言特征集、6 个音频特征集和 2 个语音交互特征集。我们使用 Transformers 模型中的双向编码器表示来处理语言特征，使用 openSMILE 和 Wav2Vec 2.0 来处理音频特征。语音交互功能集是根据 Turn Takes 设计和开发的。结果表明，语言特征总是给出最好的结果（请求任务为 91.2%，投诉任务为 70.3%）。 Wav2Vec 2.0 功能似乎比 ComPaRe16 功能更适合这两项任务。在投诉任务中，语音交互功能的表现优于 ComPaRe16 功能，仅使用 6 个功能即可实现 57% 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个名为HealthCall的语料库，用于预测客服对话中的用户请求和投诉类型。
AI.motivation: 通过分析真实客服对话数据，提升客户关系管理中自动识别用户需求和投诉的能力，以优化服务流程。
AI.method: 构建包含双通道音频和转录文本的HealthCall语料库，采用14种特征集（6种语言特征、6种音频特征、2种语音交互特征），结合BERT、openSMILE、Wav2Vec 2.0等模型进行任务评估。
AI.result: 语言特征表现最佳（请求任务91.2%，投诉任务70.3%），Wav2Vec 2.0优于ComPaRe16，语音交互特征在投诉任务中以6个特征达到57%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 语言特征对请求预测效果最佳，音频模型中Wav2Vec 2.0更优，语音交互特征在投诉检测中具有潜力。

authors_text: Charles Lovering,Ellie Pavlick
title: Unit Testing for Concepts in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络概念的单元测试
abstract: Many complex problems are naturally understood in terms of symbolic concepts. For example, our concept of "cat" is related to our concepts of "ears" and "whiskers" in a non-arbitrary way. Fodor (1998) proposes one theory of concepts, which emphasizes symbolic representations related via constituency structures. Whether neural networks are consistent with such a theory is open for debate. We propose unit tests for evaluating whether a system's behavior is consistent with several key aspects of Fodor's criteria. Using a simple visual concept learning task, we evaluate several modern neural architectures against this specification. We find that models succeed on tests of groundedness, modularlity, and reusability of concepts, but that important questions about causality remain open. Resolving these will require new methods for analyzing models' internal states.
summary: Many complex problems are naturally understood in terms of symbolic concepts. For example, our concept of "cat" is related to our concepts of "ears" and "whiskers" in a non-arbitrary way. Fodor (1998) proposes one theory of concepts, which emphasizes symbolic representations related via constituency structures. Whether neural networks are consistent with such a theory is open for debate. We propose unit tests for evaluating whether a system's behavior is consistent with several key aspects of Fodor's criteria. Using a simple visual concept learning task, we evaluate several modern neural architectures against this specification. We find that models succeed on tests of groundedness, modularlity, and reusability of concepts, but that important questions about causality remain open. Resolving these will require new methods for analyzing models' internal states.
abstract_zh: 许多复杂的问题自然可以用符号概念来理解。例如，我们的“猫”概念与我们的“耳朵”和“胡须”概念以非任意的方式相关。 Fodor (1998) 提出了一种概念理论，强调通过选区结构相关的符号表示。神经网络是否符合这样的理论还有待商榷。我们提出单元测试来评估系统的行为是否与福多标准的几个关键方面一致。使用简单的视觉概念学习任务，我们根据此规范评估了几种现代神经架构。我们发现模型在概念的基础性、模块化和可重用性测试中取得了成功，但关于因果关系的重要问题仍然悬而未决。解决这些问题需要新的方法来分析模型的内部状态。

AI.tldr: 设计单元测试评估神经网络是否符合Fodor的符号概念理论
AI.motivation: 验证神经网络是否符合Fodor提出的符号概念理论，解决其与神经网络一致性的争议
AI.method: 通过简单的视觉概念学习任务，对多种现代神经网络架构进行单元测试，评估其符合Fodor标准的程度
AI.result: 模型在根基性、模块性和概念可重用性测试中表现良好，但因果性问题仍未解决
AI.conclusion: 需开发新方法分析模型内部状态以解决因果性问题，推动符号概念理论与神经网络的结合

authors_text: Muhammad Saad Saeed,Shah Nawaz,Muhammad Haris Khan,Sajid Javed,Muhammad Haroon Yousaf,Alessio Del Bue
title: Learning Branched Fusion and Orthogonal Projection for Face-Voice Association
title_zh: 学习面部语音关联的分支融合和正交投影
comment: Submitted: IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.10483
comments: Submitted: IEEE Transactions on Multimedia. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2112.10483
abstract: Recent years have seen an increased interest in establishing association between faces and voices of celebrities leveraging audio-visual information from YouTube. Prior works adopt metric learning methods to learn an embedding space that is amenable for associated matching and verification tasks. Albeit showing some progress, such formulations are, however, restrictive due to dependency on distance-dependent margin parameter, poor run-time training complexity, and reliance on carefully crafted negative mining procedures. In this work, we hypothesize that an enriched representation coupled with an effective yet efficient supervision is important towards realizing a discriminative joint embedding space for face-voice association tasks. To this end, we propose a light-weight, plug-and-play mechanism that exploits the complementary cues in both modalities to form enriched fused embeddings and clusters them based on their identity labels via orthogonality constraints. We coin our proposed mechanism as fusion and orthogonal projection (FOP) and instantiate in a two-stream network. The overall resulting framework is evaluated on VoxCeleb1 and MAV-Celeb datasets with a multitude of tasks, including cross-modal verification and matching. Results reveal that our method performs favourably against the current state-of-the-art methods and our proposed formulation of supervision is more effective and efficient than the ones employed by the contemporary methods. In addition, we leverage cross-modal verification and matching tasks to analyze the impact of multiple languages on face-voice association. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/msaadsaeed/FOP}
summary: Recent years have seen an increased interest in establishing association between faces and voices of celebrities leveraging audio-visual information from YouTube. Prior works adopt metric learning methods to learn an embedding space that is amenable for associated matching and verification tasks. Albeit showing some progress, such formulations are, however, restrictive due to dependency on distance-dependent margin parameter, poor run-time training complexity, and reliance on carefully crafted negative mining procedures. In this work, we hypothesize that an enriched representation coupled with an effective yet efficient supervision is important towards realizing a discriminative joint embedding space for face-voice association tasks. To this end, we propose a light-weight, plug-and-play mechanism that exploits the complementary cues in both modalities to form enriched fused embeddings and clusters them based on their identity labels via orthogonality constraints. We coin our proposed mechanism as fusion and orthogonal projection (FOP) and instantiate in a two-stream network. The overall resulting framework is evaluated on VoxCeleb1 and MAV-Celeb datasets with a multitude of tasks, including cross-modal verification and matching. Results reveal that our method performs favourably against the current state-of-the-art methods and our proposed formulation of supervision is more effective and efficient than the ones employed by the contemporary methods. In addition, we leverage cross-modal verification and matching tasks to analyze the impact of multiple languages on face-voice association. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/msaadsaeed/FOP}
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们越来越有兴趣利用 YouTube 的视听信息在名人的面孔和声音之间建立关联。先前的工作采用度量学习方法来学习适合相关匹配和验证任务的嵌入空间。尽管取得了一些进展，但由于依赖于距离相关的裕度参数、较差的运行时训练复杂性以及对精心设计的负挖掘程序的依赖，这种公式具有限制性。在这项工作中，我们假设丰富的表示加上有效且高效的监督对于实现面部语音关联任务的判别性联合嵌入空间非常重要。为此，我们提出了一种轻量级、即插即用的机制，利用两种模式中的互补线索来形成丰富的融合嵌入，并通过正交性约束根据其身份标签对它们进行聚类。我们将提出的机制称为融合和正交投影（FOP），并在双流网络中实例化。总体结果框架在 VoxCeleb1 和 MAV-Celeb 数据集上通过多种任务进行评估，包括跨模式验证和匹配。结果表明，我们的方法优于当前最先进的方法，并且我们提出的监督制定比当代方法所采用的监督制定更加有效和高效。此外，我们利用跨模式验证和匹配任务来分析多种语言对面部语音关联的影响。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/msaadsaeed/FOP}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合分支与正交投影的方法（FOP），用于通过音频-视觉信息建立名人面孔与声音的关联。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖距离相关边距参数、训练复杂度高且需精细负样本挖掘，限制了人脸识别与声音关联的性能。
AI.method: 设计轻量级双流网络，通过模态互补线索生成丰富嵌入，并利用正交约束进行身份标签聚类，形成FOP框架。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1和MAV-Celeb数据集上，FOP在跨模态验证与匹配任务中优于现有方法，且监督机制更高效；分析了多语言对关联任务的影响。
AI.conclusion: FOP框架通过融合与正交投影有效提升了人脸-声音关联性能，其监督机制更具效率优势，且揭示了多语言因素的影响。

search_text: Learning Branched Fusion and Orthogonal Projection for Face-Voice Association 学习面部语音关联的分支融合和正交投影 Recent years have seen an increased interest in establishing association between faces and voices of celebrities leveraging audio-visual information from YouTube. Prior works adopt metric learning methods to learn an embedding space that is amenable for associated matching and verification tasks. Albeit showing some progress, such formulations are, however, restrictive due to dependency on distance-dependent margin parameter, poor run-time training complexity, and reliance on carefully crafted negative mining procedures. In this work, we hypothesize that an enriched representation coupled with an effective yet efficient supervision is important towards realizing a discriminative joint embedding space for face-voice association tasks. To this end, we propose a light-weight, plug-and-play mechanism that exploits the complementary cues in both modalities to form enriched fused embeddings and clusters them based on their identity labels via orthogonality constraints. We coin our proposed mechanism as fusion and orthogonal projection (FOP) and instantiate in a two-stream network. The overall resulting framework is evaluated on VoxCeleb1 and MAV-Celeb datasets with a multitude of tasks, including cross-modal verification and matching. Results reveal that our method performs favourably against the current state-of-the-art methods and our proposed formulation of supervision is more effective and efficient than the ones employed by the contemporary methods. In addition, we leverage cross-modal verification and matching tasks to analyze the impact of multiple languages on face-voice association. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/msaadsaeed/FOP} 近年来，人们越来越有兴趣利用 YouTube 的视听信息在名人的面孔和声音之间建立关联。先前的工作采用度量学习方法来学习适合相关匹配和验证任务的嵌入空间。尽管取得了一些进展，但由于依赖于距离相关的裕度参数、较差的运行时训练复杂性以及对精心设计的负挖掘程序的依赖，这种公式具有限制性。在这项工作中，我们假设丰富的表示加上有效且高效的监督对于实现面部语音关联任务的判别性联合嵌入空间非常重要。为此，我们提出了一种轻量级、即插即用的机制，利用两种模式中的互补线索来形成丰富的融合嵌入，并通过正交性约束根据其身份标签对它们进行聚类。我们将提出的机制称为融合和正交投影（FOP），并在双流网络中实例化。总体结果框架在 VoxCeleb1 和 MAV-Celeb 数据集上通过多种任务进行评估，包括跨模式验证和匹配。结果表明，我们的方法优于当前最先进的方法，并且我们提出的监督制定比当代方法所采用的监督制定更加有效和高效。此外，我们利用跨模式验证和匹配任务来分析多种语言对面部语音关联的影响。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/msaadsaeed/FOP} 本文提出一种融合分支与正交投影的方法（FOP），用于通过音频-视觉信息建立名人面孔与声音的关联。 Muhammad Saad Saeed,Shah Nawaz,Muhammad Haris Khan,Sajid Javed,Muhammad Haroon Yousaf,Alessio Del Bue cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Unnervik,Sébastien Marcel
title: An anomaly detection approach for backdoored neural networks: face recognition as a case study
title_zh: 后门神经网络的异常检测方法：以人脸识别为例
abstract: Backdoor attacks allow an attacker to embed functionality jeopardizing proper behavior of any algorithm, machine learning or not. This hidden functionality can remain inactive for normal use of the algorithm until activated by the attacker. Given how stealthy backdoor attacks are, consequences of these backdoors could be disastrous if such networks were to be deployed for applications as critical as border or access control. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoored network detection method based on the principle of anomaly detection, involving access to the clean part of the training data and the trained network. We highlight its promising potential when considering various triggers, locations and identity pairs, without the need to make any assumptions on the nature of the backdoor and its setup. We test our method on a novel dataset of backdoored networks and report detectability results with perfect scores.
summary: Backdoor attacks allow an attacker to embed functionality jeopardizing proper behavior of any algorithm, machine learning or not. This hidden functionality can remain inactive for normal use of the algorithm until activated by the attacker. Given how stealthy backdoor attacks are, consequences of these backdoors could be disastrous if such networks were to be deployed for applications as critical as border or access control. In this paper, we propose a novel backdoored network detection method based on the principle of anomaly detection, involving access to the clean part of the training data and the trained network. We highlight its promising potential when considering various triggers, locations and identity pairs, without the need to make any assumptions on the nature of the backdoor and its setup. We test our method on a novel dataset of backdoored networks and report detectability results with perfect scores.
abstract_zh: 后门攻击允许攻击者嵌入危害任何算法（无论是否是机器学习）的正确行为的功能。此隐藏功能可以在算法的正常使用中保持不活动状态，直到被攻击者激活为止。考虑到后门攻击的隐蔽性，如果将此类网络部署用于边界或访问控制等关键应用，那么这些后门的后果可能是灾难性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于异常检测原理的新型后门网络检测方法，涉及访问训练数据的干净部分和训练后的网络。在考虑各种触发器、位置和身份对时，我们强调了它的巨大潜力，而无需对后门的性质及其设置做出任何假设。我们在后门网络的新颖数据集上测试我们的方法，并以完美的分数报告可检测性结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异常检测的后门神经网络检测方法，并以人脸识别为例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 后门攻击具有隐蔽性，若部署在关键系统（如边境控制）可能造成灾难性后果，亟需有效检测方法。
AI.method: 利用干净训练数据和已训练网络，通过异常检测原理识别后门，无需假设后门类型或触发条件。
AI.result: 在新型后门网络数据集上实现100%检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不同触发器、位置和身份对场景下均有效，为后门检测提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Jan Tönshoff,Berke Kisin,Jakob Lindner,Martin Grohe
title: One Model, Any CSP: Graph Neural Networks as Fast Global Search Heuristics for Constraint Satisfaction
title_zh: 一种模型，任何 CSP：图神经网络作为约束满足的快速全局搜索启发式方法
abstract: We propose a universal Graph Neural Network architecture which can be trained as an end-2-end search heuristic for any Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). Our architecture can be trained unsupervised with policy gradient descent to generate problem specific heuristics for any CSP in a purely data driven manner. The approach is based on a novel graph representation for CSPs that is both generic and compact and enables us to process every possible CSP instance with one GNN, regardless of constraint arity, relations or domain size. Unlike previous RL-based methods, we operate on a global search action space and allow our GNN to modify any number of variables in every step of the stochastic search. This enables our method to properly leverage the inherent parallelism of GNNs. We perform a thorough empirical evaluation where we learn heuristics for well known and important CSPs from random data, including graph coloring, MaxCut, 3-SAT and MAX-k-SAT. Our approach outperforms prior approaches for neural combinatorial optimization by a substantial margin. It can compete with, and even improve upon, conventional search heuristics on test instances that are several orders of magnitude larger and structurally more complex than those seen during training.
summary: We propose a universal Graph Neural Network architecture which can be trained as an end-2-end search heuristic for any Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). Our architecture can be trained unsupervised with policy gradient descent to generate problem specific heuristics for any CSP in a purely data driven manner. The approach is based on a novel graph representation for CSPs that is both generic and compact and enables us to process every possible CSP instance with one GNN, regardless of constraint arity, relations or domain size. Unlike previous RL-based methods, we operate on a global search action space and allow our GNN to modify any number of variables in every step of the stochastic search. This enables our method to properly leverage the inherent parallelism of GNNs. We perform a thorough empirical evaluation where we learn heuristics for well known and important CSPs from random data, including graph coloring, MaxCut, 3-SAT and MAX-k-SAT. Our approach outperforms prior approaches for neural combinatorial optimization by a substantial margin. It can compete with, and even improve upon, conventional search heuristics on test instances that are several orders of magnitude larger and structurally more complex than those seen during training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通用的图神经网络架构，可以将其训练为任何约束满足问题（CSP）的端到端搜索启发式。我们的架构可以通过策略梯度下降进行无监督训练，以纯粹数据驱动的方式为任何 CSP 生成特定于问题的启发式方法。该方法基于一种新颖的 CSP 图形表示，它既通用又紧凑，使我们能够使用一个 GNN 处理每个可能的 CSP 实例，而不管约束数量、关系或域大小如何。与之前基于强化学习的方法不同，我们在全局搜索动作空间上进行操作，并允许我们的 GNN 在随机搜索的每一步中修改任意数量的变量。这使得我们的方法能够正确利用 GNN 固有的并行性。我们进行彻底的实证评估，从随机数据中学习众所周知且重要的 CSP 的启发式方法，包括图形着色、MaxCut、3-SAT 和 MAX-k-SAT。我们的方法大大优于先前的神经组合优化方法。它可以与测试实例上的传统搜索启发式方法竞争甚至改进，这些测试实例比训练期间看到的要大几个数量级，结构上也更复杂。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用图神经网络架构，可作为端到端的约束满足问题（CSP）搜索启发式方法，适用于各种CSP实例。
AI.motivation: 现有CSP求解方法缺乏通用性，需针对不同问题设计特定启发式，且难以有效利用并行计算优势。
AI.method: 基于无监督策略梯度训练，构建通用图表示以处理任意约束类型，通过全局搜索动作空间实现变量并行修改。
AI.result: 在图着色、MaxCut、SAT等CSP任务中显著优于神经组合优化方法，且在规模更大更复杂的测试实例上超越传统启发式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了图神经网络作为通用CSP求解器的潜力，为大规模组合优化问题提供了新思路。

result: 在图着色、MaxCut、SAT等CSP任务中显著优于神经组合优化方法，且在规模更大更复杂的测试实例上超越传统启发式。
conclusion: 该方法验证了图神经网络作为通用CSP求解器的潜力，为大规模组合优化问题提供了新思路。
search_text: One Model, Any CSP: Graph Neural Networks as Fast Global Search Heuristics for Constraint Satisfaction 一种模型，任何 CSP：图神经网络作为约束满足的快速全局搜索启发式方法 We propose a universal Graph Neural Network architecture which can be trained as an end-2-end search heuristic for any Constraint Satisfaction Problem (CSP). Our architecture can be trained unsupervised with policy gradient descent to generate problem specific heuristics for any CSP in a purely data driven manner. The approach is based on a novel graph representation for CSPs that is both generic and compact and enables us to process every possible CSP instance with one GNN, regardless of constraint arity, relations or domain size. Unlike previous RL-based methods, we operate on a global search action space and allow our GNN to modify any number of variables in every step of the stochastic search. This enables our method to properly leverage the inherent parallelism of GNNs. We perform a thorough empirical evaluation where we learn heuristics for well known and important CSPs from random data, including graph coloring, MaxCut, 3-SAT and MAX-k-SAT. Our approach outperforms prior approaches for neural combinatorial optimization by a substantial margin. It can compete with, and even improve upon, conventional search heuristics on test instances that are several orders of magnitude larger and structurally more complex than those seen during training. 我们提出了一种通用的图神经网络架构，可以将其训练为任何约束满足问题（CSP）的端到端搜索启发式。我们的架构可以通过策略梯度下降进行无监督训练，以纯粹数据驱动的方式为任何 CSP 生成特定于问题的启发式方法。该方法基于一种新颖的 CSP 图形表示，它既通用又紧凑，使我们能够使用一个 GNN 处理每个可能的 CSP 实例，而不管约束数量、关系或域大小如何。与之前基于强化学习的方法不同，我们在全局搜索动作空间上进行操作，并允许我们的 GNN 在随机搜索的每一步中修改任意数量的变量。这使得我们的方法能够正确利用 GNN 固有的并行性。我们进行彻底的实证评估，从随机数据中学习众所周知且重要的 CSP 的启发式方法，包括图形着色、MaxCut、3-SAT 和 MAX-k-SAT。我们的方法大大优于先前的神经组合优化方法。它可以与测试实例上的传统搜索启发式方法竞争甚至改进，这些测试实例比训练期间看到的要大几个数量级，结构上也更复杂。 本文提出一种通用图神经网络架构，可作为端到端的约束满足问题（CSP）搜索启发式方法，适用于各种CSP实例。 Jan Tönshoff,Berke Kisin,Jakob Lindner,Martin Grohe cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Yutao Zhu,Jian-Yun Nie,Yixuan Su,Haonan Chen,Xinyu Zhang,Zhicheng Dou
title: From Easy to Hard: A Dual Curriculum Learning Framework for Context-Aware Document Ranking
title_zh: 从易到难：上下文感知文档排名的双课程学习框架
abstract: Contextual information in search sessions is important for capturing users' search intents. Various approaches have been proposed to model user behavior sequences to improve document ranking in a session. Typically, training samples of (search context, document) pairs are sampled randomly in each training epoch. In reality, the difficulty to understand user's search intent and to judge document's relevance varies greatly from one search context to another. Mixing up training samples of different difficulties may confuse the model's optimization process. In this work, we propose a curriculum learning framework for context-aware document ranking, in which the ranking model learns matching signals between the search context and the candidate document in an easy-to-hard manner. In so doing, we aim to guide the model gradually toward a global optimum. To leverage both positive and negative examples, two curricula are designed. Experiments on two real query log datasets show that our proposed framework can improve the performance of several existing methods significantly, demonstrating the effectiveness of curriculum learning for context-aware document ranking.
summary: Contextual information in search sessions is important for capturing users' search intents. Various approaches have been proposed to model user behavior sequences to improve document ranking in a session. Typically, training samples of (search context, document) pairs are sampled randomly in each training epoch. In reality, the difficulty to understand user's search intent and to judge document's relevance varies greatly from one search context to another. Mixing up training samples of different difficulties may confuse the model's optimization process. In this work, we propose a curriculum learning framework for context-aware document ranking, in which the ranking model learns matching signals between the search context and the candidate document in an easy-to-hard manner. In so doing, we aim to guide the model gradually toward a global optimum. To leverage both positive and negative examples, two curricula are designed. Experiments on two real query log datasets show that our proposed framework can improve the performance of several existing methods significantly, demonstrating the effectiveness of curriculum learning for context-aware document ranking.
abstract_zh: 搜索会话中的上下文信息对于捕获用户的搜索意图非常重要。已经提出了各种方法来对用户行为序列进行建模，以提高会话中的文档排名。通常，（搜索上下文、文档）对的训练样本在每个训练时期中随机采样。实际上，理解用户的搜索意图和判断文档的相关性的难度因一种搜索上下文而异。混合不同难度的训练样本可能会混淆模型的优化过程。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于上下文感知文档排名的课程学习框架，其中排名模型以由易到难的方式学习搜索上下文和候选文档之间的匹配信号。这样做的目的是引导模型逐渐走向全局最优。为了利用正面和反面的例子，设计了两门课程。对两个真实查询日志数据集的实验表明，我们提出的框架可以显着提高几种现有方法的性能，证明了课程学习对于上下文感知文档排名的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双课程学习框架，通过从易到难的学习方式提升上下文感知的文档排序效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法随机采样训练样本导致模型优化困难，因不同搜索上下文的难度差异大，混合样本可能混淆模型学习过程。
AI.method: 设计双课程学习框架，利用正负样本分别构建课程，按难度逐步训练模型以捕捉上下文与文档的相关性。
AI.result: 在两个真实查询日志数据集上，该框架显著提升了现有方法的排序性能，验证了课程学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习能有效引导模型逐步优化，为上下文感知的文档排序任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Darshan Gera,Naveen Siva Kumar Badveeti,Bobbili Veerendra Raj Kumar,S Balasubramanian
title: Dynamic Adaptive Threshold based Learning for Noisy Annotations Robust Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 基于动态自适应阈值的噪声注释学习稳健的面部表情识别
abstract: The real-world facial expression recognition (FER) datasets suffer from noisy annotations due to crowd-sourcing, ambiguity in expressions, the subjectivity of annotators and inter-class similarity. However, the recent deep networks have strong capacity to memorize the noisy annotations leading to corrupted feature embedding and poor generalization. To handle noisy annotations, we propose a dynamic FER learning framework (DNFER) in which clean samples are selected based on dynamic class specific threshold during training. Specifically, DNFER is based on supervised training using selected clean samples and unsupervised consistent training using all the samples. During training, the mean posterior class probabilities of each mini-batch is used as dynamic class-specific threshold to select the clean samples for supervised training. This threshold is independent of noise rate and does not need any clean data unlike other methods. In addition, to learn from all samples, the posterior distributions between weakly-augmented image and strongly-augmented image are aligned using an unsupervised consistency loss. We demonstrate the robustness of DNFER on both synthetic as well as on real noisy annotated FER datasets like RAFDB, FERPlus, SFEW and AffectNet.
summary: The real-world facial expression recognition (FER) datasets suffer from noisy annotations due to crowd-sourcing, ambiguity in expressions, the subjectivity of annotators and inter-class similarity. However, the recent deep networks have strong capacity to memorize the noisy annotations leading to corrupted feature embedding and poor generalization. To handle noisy annotations, we propose a dynamic FER learning framework (DNFER) in which clean samples are selected based on dynamic class specific threshold during training. Specifically, DNFER is based on supervised training using selected clean samples and unsupervised consistent training using all the samples. During training, the mean posterior class probabilities of each mini-batch is used as dynamic class-specific threshold to select the clean samples for supervised training. This threshold is independent of noise rate and does not need any clean data unlike other methods. In addition, to learn from all samples, the posterior distributions between weakly-augmented image and strongly-augmented image are aligned using an unsupervised consistency loss. We demonstrate the robustness of DNFER on both synthetic as well as on real noisy annotated FER datasets like RAFDB, FERPlus, SFEW and AffectNet.
abstract_zh: 由于众包、表情模糊、注释者的主观性和类间相似性，现实世界的面部表情识别（FER）数据集受到噪声注释的影响。然而，最近的深度网络具有很强的记忆噪声注释的能力，导致特征嵌入损坏和泛化能力差。为了处理噪声注释，我们提出了一个动态 FER 学习框架（DNFER），其中在训练期间根据动态类别特定阈值选择干净样本。具体来说，DNFER 基于使用选定的干净样本的监督训练和使用所有样本的无监督一致训练。在训练过程中，每个小批量的平均后验类别概率用作动态特定类别阈值来选择干净样本进行监督训练。该阈值与噪声率无关，并且与其他方法不同，不需要任何干净的数据。此外，为了从所有样本中学习，弱增强图像和强增强图像之间的后验分布使用无监督一致性损失进行对齐。我们在合成数据集和真实噪声注释 FER 数据集（如 RAFDB、FERPlus、SFEW 和 AffectNet）上证明了 DNFER 的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态自适应阈值的鲁棒面部表情识别方法，用于解决噪声标注数据下的特征嵌入损坏和泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中面部表情数据集存在标注噪声问题，现有深度网络易受噪声干扰，且传统去噪方法依赖干净数据或噪声率估计，难以实际应用。
AI.method: 提出DNFER框架，通过动态类别阈值筛选干净样本进行监督训练，同时利用无监督一致性损失对齐增强图像的后验分布，无需依赖噪声率或干净数据。
AI.result: 在RAFDB、FERPlus等合成及真实噪声数据集上验证了方法的有效性，证明其具有良好的噪声鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DNFER通过动态阈值筛选与无监督对齐机制，有效提升了噪声标注下面部表情识别的准确性，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Vincent Wall,Oliver Brock
title: A Virtual 2D Tactile Array for Soft Actuators Using Acoustic Sensing
title_zh: 使用声学传感的软执行器的虚拟 2D 触觉阵列
comment: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted at 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: We create a virtual 2D tactile array for soft pneumatic actuators using embedded audio components. We detect contact-specific changes in sound modulation to infer tactile information. We evaluate different sound representations and learning methods to detect even small contact variations. We demonstrate the acoustic tactile sensor array by the example of a PneuFlex actuator and use a Braille display to individually control the contact of 29x4 pins with the actuator's 90x10 mm palmar surface. Evaluating the spatial resolution, the acoustic sensor localizes edges in x- and y-direction with a root-mean-square regression error of 1.67 mm and 0.0 mm, respectively. Even light contacts of a single Braille pin with a lifting force of 0.17 N are measured with high accuracy. Finally, we demonstrate the sensor's sensitivity to complex contact shapes by successfully reading the 26 letters of the Braille alphabet from a single display cell with a classification rate of 88%.

We evaluate different sound representations and learning methods to detect even small contact variations. We demonstrate the acoustic tactile sensor array by the example of a PneuFlex actuator and use a Braille display to individually control the contact of 29x4 pins with the actuator's 90x10 mm palmar surface. Evaluating the spatial resolution, the acoustic sensor localizes edges in x- and y-direction with a root-mean-square regression error of 1.67 mm and 0.0 mm, respectively. Even light contacts of a single Braille pin with a lifting force of 0.17 N are measured with high accuracy. Finally, we demonstrate the sensor's sensitivity to complex contact shapes by successfully reading the 26 letters of the Braille alphabet from a single display cell with a classification rate of 88%.
abstract_zh: 我们使用嵌入式音频组件为软气动执行器创建虚拟 2D 触觉阵列。我们检测声音调制中特定于接触的变化来推断触觉信息。我们评估不同的声音表征和学习方法，以检测甚至很小的接触变化。我们以 PneuFlex 执行器为例演示了声学触觉传感器阵列，并使用盲文显示器单独控制 29x4 引脚与执行器 90x10 mm 手掌表面的接触。在评估空间分辨率时，声学传感器定位 x 和 y 方向的边缘，均方根回归误差分别为 1.67 mm 和 0.0 mm。即使是单个盲文销的轻微接触，提升力为 0.17 N，也能高精度测量。最后，我们通过从单个显示单元成功读取盲文字母表中的 26 个字母（分类率为 88%），展示了传感器对复杂接触形状的灵敏度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声学传感的二维触觉阵列，用于软体执行器，通过检测声音调制变化实现触觉信息的高精度感知。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉传感器存在分辨率低、成本高等问题，需开发新型高灵敏度、低成本的触觉感知方案以满足软体机器人等应用需求。
AI.method: 嵌入音频组件检测接触引发的声调制变化，结合多种声学特征表示与机器学习方法，通过PneuFlex执行器与盲文显示器验证系统性能。
AI.result: 实现1.67mm(x轴)/0.0mm(y轴)空间分辨率，可检测0.17N微小接触力，盲文字符分类准确率达88%。
AI.conclusion: 声学传感方案有效实现了高精度触觉检测，验证了其在复杂接触形态识别中的潜力，为软体机器人感知技术提供新思路。

We detect contact-specific changes in sound modulation to infer tactile information. We evaluate different sound representations and learning methods to detect even small contact variations. We demonstrate the acoustic tactile sensor array by the example of a PneuFlex actuator and use a Braille display to individually control the contact of 29x4 pins with the actuator's 90x10 mm palmar surface. Evaluating the spatial resolution, the acoustic sensor localizes edges in x- and y-direction with a root-mean-square regression error of 1.67 mm and 0.0 mm, respectively. authors_text: Fabien Baradel,Romain Brégier,Thibault Groueix,Philippe Weinzaepfel,Yannis Kalantidis,Grégory Rogez
title: PoseBERT: A Generic Transformer Module for Temporal 3D Human Modeling
title_zh: PoseBERT：用于时态 3D 人体建模的通用 Transformer 模块
abstract: Training state-of-the-art models for human pose estimation in videos requires datasets with annotations that are really hard and expensive to obtain. Although transformers have been recently utilized for body pose sequence modeling, related methods rely on pseudo-ground truth to augment the currently limited training data available for learning such models. In this paper, we introduce PoseBERT, a transformer module that is fully trained on 3D Motion Capture (MoCap) data via masked modeling. It is simple, generic and versatile, as it can be plugged on top of any image-based model to transform it in a video-based model leveraging temporal information. We showcase variants of PoseBERT with different inputs varying from 3D skeleton keypoints to rotations of a 3D parametric model for either the full body (SMPL) or just the hands (MANO). Since PoseBERT training is task agnostic, the model can be applied to several tasks such as pose refinement, future pose prediction or motion completion without finetuning. Our experimental results validate that adding PoseBERT on top of various state-of-the-art pose estimation methods consistently improves their performances, while its low computational cost allows us to use it in a real-time demo for smoothly animating a robotic hand via a webcam. Test code and models are available at https://github.com/naver/posebert.
summary: Training state-of-the-art models for human pose estimation in videos requires datasets with annotations that are really hard and expensive to obtain. Although transformers have been recently utilized for body pose sequence modeling, related methods rely on pseudo-ground truth to augment the currently limited training data available for learning such models. In this paper, we introduce PoseBERT, a transformer module that is fully trained on 3D Motion Capture (MoCap) data via masked modeling. It is simple, generic and versatile, as it can be plugged on top of any image-based model to transform it in a video-based model leveraging temporal information. We showcase variants of PoseBERT with different inputs varying from 3D skeleton keypoints to rotations of a 3D parametric model for either the full body (SMPL) or just the hands (MANO). Since PoseBERT training is task agnostic, the model can be applied to several tasks such as pose refinement, future pose prediction or motion completion without finetuning. Our experimental results validate that adding PoseBERT on top of various state-of-the-art pose estimation methods consistently improves their performances, while its low computational cost allows us to use it in a real-time demo for smoothly animating a robotic hand via a webcam. Test code and models are available at https://github.com/naver/posebert.
abstract_zh: 训练用于视频中人体姿势估计的最先进模型需要带有注释的数据集，而获得这些数据集非常困难且昂贵。尽管变压器最近已被用于身体姿势序列建模，但相关方法依赖于伪地面事实来增强当前可用于学习此类模型的有限训练数据。在本文中，我们介绍了 PoseBERT，这是一个通过掩模建模对 3D 运动捕捉 (MoCap) 数据进行全面训练的转换器模块。它简单、通用且用途广泛，因为它可以插入任何基于图像的模型之上，以利用时间信息将其转换为基于视频的模型。我们展示了具有不同输入的 PoseBERT 变体，从 3D 骨架关键点到全身 (SMPL) 或仅手 (MANO) 的 3D 参数模型的旋转。由于 PoseBERT 训练与任务无关，因此该模型可以应用于多种任务，例如姿势细化、未来姿势预测或运动完成，而无需微调。我们的实验结果证实，在各种最先进的姿态估计方法之上添加 PoseBERT 可以持续提高其性能，而其较低的计算成本使我们能够在实时演示中使用它，通过网络摄像头平滑地制作机器人手的动画。测试代码和模型可在 https://github.com/naver/posebert 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoseBERT，一种基于Transformer的模块，通过利用时间信息提升视频中3D人体姿态估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 视频中人体姿态估计需要大量昂贵的标注数据，现有方法依赖伪真实值扩充数据，存在局限性。需一种通用且无需微调的解决方案。
AI.method: PoseBERT通过掩码建模在3D动作捕捉数据上预训练，可集成到任意图像模型顶部，支持多种输入（如3D骨骼点、SMPL/MANO模型旋转参数），任务无关训练。
AI.result: 实验表明PoseBERT显著提升多种先进姿态估计方法的性能，且计算成本低，支持实时演示（如通过摄像头流畅动画机械手）。
AI.conclusion: PoseBERT是一种高效、通用的时序3D人体建模模块，无需微调即可跨任务应用，为视频姿态估计提供新思路。

authors_text: Juliane Braunsmann,Marko Rajković,Martin Rumpf,Benedikt Wirth
title: Convergent autoencoder approximation of low bending and low distortion manifold embeddings
title_zh: 低弯曲和低失真流形嵌入的收敛自动编码器近似
comment: 27 pages, 10 figures. This publication is an extended version of the previous conference proceeding presented at DiffCVML 2021
comments: 27 pages, 10 figures. This publication is an extended version of the previous conference proceeding presented at DiffCVML 2021
abstract: Autoencoders, which consist of an encoder and a decoder, are widely used in machine learning for dimension reduction of high-dimensional data. The encoder embeds the input data manifold into a lower-dimensional latent space, while the decoder represents the inverse map, providing a parametrization of the data manifold by the manifold in latent space. A good regularity and structure of the embedded manifold may substantially simplify further data processing tasks such as cluster analysis or data interpolation. We propose and analyze a novel regularization for learning the encoder component of an autoencoder: a loss functional that prefers isometric, extrinsically flat embeddings and allows to train the encoder on its own. To perform the training it is assumed that for pairs of nearby points on the input manifold their local Riemannian distance and their local Riemannian average can be evaluated. The loss functional is computed via Monte Carlo integration with different sampling strategies for pairs of points on the input manifold. Our main theorem identifies a geometric loss functional of the embedding map as the $Γ$-limit of the sampling-dependent loss functionals. Numerical tests, using image data that encodes different explicitly given data manifolds, show that smooth manifold embeddings into latent space are obtained. Due to the promotion of extrinsic flatness, these embeddings are regular enough such that interpolation between not too distant points on the manifold is well approximated by linear interpolation in latent space as one possible postprocessing.
summary: Autoencoders, which consist of an encoder and a decoder, are widely used in machine learning for dimension reduction of high-dimensional data. The encoder embeds the input data manifold into a lower-dimensional latent space, while the decoder represents the inverse map, providing a parametrization of the data manifold by the manifold in latent space. A good regularity and structure of the embedded manifold may substantially simplify further data processing tasks such as cluster analysis or data interpolation. We propose and analyze a novel regularization for learning the encoder component of an autoencoder: a loss functional that prefers isometric, extrinsically flat embeddings and allows to train the encoder on its own. To perform the training it is assumed that for pairs of nearby points on the input manifold their local Riemannian distance and their local Riemannian average can be evaluated. The loss functional is computed via Monte Carlo integration with different sampling strategies for pairs of points on the input manifold. Our main theorem identifies a geometric loss functional of the embedding map as the $Γ$-limit of the sampling-dependent loss functionals. Numerical tests, using image data that encodes different explicitly given data manifolds, show that smooth manifold embeddings into latent space are obtained. Due to the promotion of extrinsic flatness, these embeddings are regular enough such that interpolation between not too distant points on the manifold is well approximated by linear interpolation in latent space as one possible postprocessing.
abstract_zh: 自动编码器由编码器和解码器组成，广泛应用于机器学习中，用于高维数据的降维。编码器将输入数据流形嵌入到低维潜在空间中，而解码器表示逆映射，通过潜在空间中的流形提供数据流形的参数化。嵌入流形的良好规律性和结构可以大大简化进一步的数据处理任务，例如聚类分析或数据插值。我们提出并分析了一种用于学习自动编码器的编码器组件的新颖正则化：一种更喜欢等距、外部平坦嵌入并允许自行训练编码器的损失函数。为了执行训练，假设对于输入流形上的附近点对，可以评估它们的局部黎曼距离和它们的局部黎曼平均值。损失函数是通过蒙特卡罗积分以及输入流形上的点对的不同采样策略来计算的。我们的主要定理将嵌入图的几何损失函数确定为采样相关损失函数的$Γ$限制。使用编码不同显式给定数据流形的图像数据进行的数值测试表明，获得了到潜在空间的平滑流形嵌入。由于外在平坦度的提升，这些嵌入足够规则，使得流形上不太远的点之间的插值可以通过潜在空间中的线性插值很好地近似，作为一种可能的后处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自编码器正则化方法，通过几何损失函数促进低弯曲和低失真流形嵌入，提升潜在空间表示的正则性。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器嵌入可能缺乏结构正则性，影响后续数据分析任务。需设计正则化方法以获得更平滑、可解释的流形嵌入。
AI.method: 设计基于等距和外在平坦性的几何损失函数，结合蒙特卡洛积分与采样策略计算，通过Γ极限理论分析其收敛性，并在图像数据上验证。
AI.result: 数值实验显示方法可生成平滑流形嵌入，潜在空间中线性插值能有效近似流形上点的插值，验证了外在平坦性优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正则化方法能有效学习结构良好的流形嵌入，为后续数据处理（如插值、聚类）提供高质量潜在空间表示。

search_text: Convergent autoencoder approximation of low bending and low distortion manifold embeddings 低弯曲和低失真流形嵌入的收敛自动编码器近似 Autoencoders, which consist of an encoder and a decoder, are widely used in machine learning for dimension reduction of high-dimensional data. The encoder embeds the input data manifold into a lower-dimensional latent space, while the decoder represents the inverse map, providing a parametrization of the data manifold by the manifold in latent space. A good regularity and structure of the embedded manifold may substantially simplify further data processing tasks such as cluster analysis or data interpolation. We propose and analyze a novel regularization for learning the encoder component of an autoencoder: a loss functional that prefers isometric, extrinsically flat embeddings and allows to train the encoder on its own. To perform the training it is assumed that for pairs of nearby points on the input manifold their local Riemannian distance and their local Riemannian average can be evaluated. The loss functional is computed via Monte Carlo integration with different sampling strategies for pairs of points on the input manifold. Our main theorem identifies a geometric loss functional of the embedding map as the $Γ$-limit of the sampling-dependent loss functionals. Numerical tests, using image data that encodes different explicitly given data manifolds, show that smooth manifold embeddings into latent space are obtained. Due to the promotion of extrinsic flatness, these embeddings are regular enough such that interpolation between not too distant points on the manifold is well approximated by linear interpolation in latent space as one possible postprocessing. 自动编码器由编码器和解码器组成，广泛应用于机器学习中，用于高维数据的降维。编码器将输入数据流形嵌入到低维潜在空间中，而解码器表示逆映射，通过潜在空间中的流形提供数据流形的参数化。嵌入流形的良好规律性和结构可以大大简化进一步的数据处理任务，例如聚类分析或数据插值。我们提出并分析了一种用于学习自动编码器的编码器组件的新颖正则化：一种更喜欢等距、外部平坦嵌入并允许自行训练编码器的损失函数。为了执行训练，假设对于输入流形上的附近点对，可以评估它们的局部黎曼距离和它们的局部黎曼平均值。损失函数是通过蒙特卡罗积分以及输入流形上的点对的不同采样策略来计算的。我们的主要定理将嵌入图的几何损失函数确定为采样相关损失函数的$Γ$限制。使用编码不同显式给定数据流形的图像数据进行的数值测试表明，获得了到潜在空间的平滑流形嵌入。由于外在平坦度的提升，这些嵌入足够规则，使得流形上不太远的点之间的插值可以通过潜在空间中的线性插值很好地近似，作为一种可能的后处理。 本文提出一种新的自编码器正则化方法，通过几何损失函数促进低弯曲和低失真流形嵌入，提升潜在空间表示的正则性。 Juliane Braunsmann,Marko Rajković,Martin Rumpf,Benedikt Wirth math.NA,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaobo Gao,Qi Kuang,Xin Jin,Bin Zhou,Boyan Dong,Xunyu Wang
title: Aesthetics Driven Autonomous Time-Lapse Photography Generation by Virtual and Real Robots
title_zh: 美学驱动的虚拟和真实机器人自主延时摄影生成
abstract: Time-lapse photography is employed in movies and promotional films because it can reflect the passage of time in a short time and strengthen the visual attraction. However, since it takes a long time and requires the stable shooting, it is a great challenge for the photographer. In this article, we propose a time-lapse photography system with virtual and real robots. To help users shoot time-lapse videos efficiently, we first parameterize the time-lapse photography and propose a parameter optimization method. For different parameters, different aesthetic models, including image and video aesthetic quality assessment networks, are used to generate optimal parameters. Then we propose a time-lapse photography interface to facilitate users to view and adjust parameters and use virtual robots to conduct virtual photography in a three-dimensional scene. The system can also export the parameters and provide them to real robots so that the time-lapse videos can be filmed in the real world. In addition, we propose a time-lapse photography aesthetic assessment method that can automatically evaluate the aesthetic quality of time-lapse video. The experimental results show that our method can efficiently obtain the time-lapse videos. We also conduct a user study. The results show that our system has the similar effect as professional photographers and is more efficient.
summary: Time-lapse photography is employed in movies and promotional films because it can reflect the passage of time in a short time and strengthen the visual attraction. However, since it takes a long time and requires the stable shooting, it is a great challenge for the photographer. In this article, we propose a time-lapse photography system with virtual and real robots. To help users shoot time-lapse videos efficiently, we first parameterize the time-lapse photography and propose a parameter optimization method. For different parameters, different aesthetic models, including image and video aesthetic quality assessment networks, are used to generate optimal parameters. Then we propose a time-lapse photography interface to facilitate users to view and adjust parameters and use virtual robots to conduct virtual photography in a three-dimensional scene. The system can also export the parameters and provide them to real robots so that the time-lapse videos can be filmed in the real world. In addition, we propose a time-lapse photography aesthetic assessment method that can automatically evaluate the aesthetic quality of time-lapse video. The experimental results show that our method can efficiently obtain the time-lapse videos. We also conduct a user study. The results show that our system has the similar effect as professional photographers and is more efficient.
abstract_zh: 延时摄影被用于电影和宣传片中，因为它可以在短时间内反映时间的流逝，增强视觉吸引力。但由于拍摄时间长、拍摄稳定，对摄影师来说是一个很大的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种带有虚拟和真实机器人的延时摄影系统。为了帮助用户高效地拍摄延时视频，我们首先对延时摄影进行参数化，并提出了参数优化方法。对于不同的参数，使用不同的美学模型，包括图像和视频美学质量评估网络来生成最佳参数。然后我们提出了一个延时摄影界面，方便用户查看和调整参数，并使用虚拟机器人在三维场景中进行虚拟摄影。该系统还可以导出参数并将其提供给真实的机器人，以便在现实世界中拍摄延时视频。此外，我们提出了一种延时摄影美学评估方法，可以自动评估延时视频的美学质量。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地获取延时视频。我们还进行了用户研究。结果表明，我们的系统具有与专业摄影师相似的效果，并且效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合虚拟与真实机器人的延时摄影系统，通过美学驱动的参数优化方法自动生成高质量延时视频。
AI.motivation: 传统延时摄影耗时长且需稳定拍摄，人工操作效率低，难以兼顾美学效果与拍摄效率。
AI.method: 参数化延时摄影流程，结合图像/视频美学评估网络优化参数；设计虚拟摄影界面辅助参数调整，并将优化参数传输至真实机器人执行拍摄。
AI.result: 实验表明系统可高效生成延时视频，用户研究显示其效果与专业摄影师相当且效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过虚拟仿真与真实机器人协同，结合美学评估模型，有效提升了延时摄影的自动化水平和美学质量。

authors_text: Chang Nie,Yiqing Hu,Yanqiu Qu,Hao Liu,Deqiang Jiang,Bo Ren
title: TaCo: Textual Attribute Recognition via Contrastive Learning
title_zh: TaCo：通过对比学习进行文本属性识别
abstract: As textual attributes like font are core design elements of document format and page style, automatic attributes recognition favor comprehensive practical applications. Existing approaches already yield satisfactory performance in differentiating disparate attributes, but they still suffer in distinguishing similar attributes with only subtle difference. Moreover, their performance drop severely in real-world scenarios where unexpected and obvious imaging distortions appear. In this paper, we aim to tackle these problems by proposing TaCo, a contrastive framework for textual attribute recognition tailored toward the most common document scenes. Specifically, TaCo leverages contrastive learning to dispel the ambiguity trap arising from vague and open-ended attributes. To realize this goal, we design the learning paradigm from three perspectives: 1) generating attribute views, 2) extracting subtle but crucial details, and 3) exploiting valued view pairs for learning, to fully unlock the pre-training potential. Extensive experiments show that TaCo surpasses the supervised counterparts and advances the state-of-the-art remarkably on multiple attribute recognition tasks. Online services of TaCo will be made available.
summary: As textual attributes like font are core design elements of document format and page style, automatic attributes recognition favor comprehensive practical applications. Existing approaches already yield satisfactory performance in differentiating disparate attributes, but they still suffer in distinguishing similar attributes with only subtle difference. Moreover, their performance drop severely in real-world scenarios where unexpected and obvious imaging distortions appear. In this paper, we aim to tackle these problems by proposing TaCo, a contrastive framework for textual attribute recognition tailored toward the most common document scenes. Specifically, TaCo leverages contrastive learning to dispel the ambiguity trap arising from vague and open-ended attributes. To realize this goal, we design the learning paradigm from three perspectives: 1) generating attribute views, 2) extracting subtle but crucial details, and 3) exploiting valued view pairs for learning, to fully unlock the pre-training potential. Extensive experiments show that TaCo surpasses the supervised counterparts and advances the state-of-the-art remarkably on multiple attribute recognition tasks. Online services of TaCo will be made available.
abstract_zh: 由于字体等文本属性是文档格式和页面样式的核心设计元素，自动属性识别有利于综合实际应用。现有的方法已经在区分不同属性方面产生了令人满意的性能，但它们在区分只有细微差别的相似属性方面仍然受到影响。此外，在出现意外且明显的图像失真的现实场景中，它们的性能严重下降。在本文中，我们旨在通过提出 TaCo 来解决这些问题，TaCo 是一种针对最常见文档场景的文本属性识别对比框架。具体来说，TaCo 利用对比学习来消除由模糊和开放式属性引起的歧义陷阱。为了实现这一目标，我们从三个角度设计学习范式：1）生成属性视图，2）提取微妙但关键的细节，3）利用有价值的视图对进行学习，以充分释放预训练潜力。大量实验表明，TaCo 超越了有监督的同行，并在多个属性识别任务上显着提高了最先进的水平。 TaCo的在线服务将开放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TaCo框架，通过对比学习解决文本属性识别中相似属性区分困难及图像失真影响的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在区分相似属性及处理真实场景图像失真时表现不佳，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计对比学习框架，从生成属性视图、提取细微特征、利用关键视图对三个角度优化学习过程。
AI.result: TaCo在多个属性识别任务中超越监督方法，显著提升现有最优水平并提供在线服务。
AI.conclusion: TaCo有效解决了文本属性识别的核心挑战，为实际应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出TaCo框架，通过对比学习解决文本属性识别中相似属性区分困难及图像失真影响的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在区分相似属性及处理真实场景图像失真时表现不佳，需更鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: TaCo: Textual Attribute Recognition via Contrastive Learning TaCo：通过对比学习进行文本属性识别 As textual attributes like font are core design elements of document format and page style, automatic attributes recognition favor comprehensive practical applications. Existing approaches already yield satisfactory performance in differentiating disparate attributes, but they still suffer in distinguishing similar attributes with only subtle difference. Moreover, their performance drop severely in real-world scenarios where unexpected and obvious imaging distortions appear. In this paper, we aim to tackle these problems by proposing TaCo, a contrastive framework for textual attribute recognition tailored toward the most common document scenes. Specifically, TaCo leverages contrastive learning to dispel the ambiguity trap arising from vague and open-ended attributes. To realize this goal, we design the learning paradigm from three perspectives: 1) generating attribute views, 2) extracting subtle but crucial details, and 3) exploiting valued view pairs for learning, to fully unlock the pre-training potential. Extensive experiments show that TaCo surpasses the supervised counterparts and advances the state-of-the-art remarkably on multiple attribute recognition tasks. Online services of TaCo will be made available. 由于字体等文本属性是文档格式和页面样式的核心设计元素，自动属性识别有利于综合实际应用。现有的方法已经在区分不同属性方面产生了令人满意的性能，但它们在区分只有细微差别的相似属性方面仍然受到影响。此外，在出现意外且明显的图像失真的现实场景中，它们的性能严重下降。在本文中，我们旨在通过提出 TaCo 来解决这些问题，TaCo 是一种针对最常见文档场景的文本属性识别对比框架。具体来说，TaCo 利用对比学习来消除由模糊和开放式属性引起的歧义陷阱。为了实现这一目标，我们从三个角度设计学习范式：1）生成属性视图，2）提取微妙但关键的细节，3）利用有价值的视图对进行学习，以充分释放预训练潜力。大量实验表明，TaCo 超越了有监督的同行，并在多个属性识别任务上显着提高了最先进的水平。 TaCo的在线服务将开放。 本文提出TaCo框架，通过对比学习解决文本属性识别中相似属性区分困难及图像失真影响的问题。 Chang Nie,Yiqing Hu,Yanqiu Qu,Hao Liu,Deqiang Jiang,Bo Ren cs.CV

authors_text: Yujing Zhang,Zhangming Chan,Shuhao Xu,Weijie Bian,Shuguang Han,Hongbo Deng,Bo Zheng
title: KEEP: An Industrial Pre-Training Framework for Online Recommendation via Knowledge Extraction and Plugging
title_zh: KEEP：通过知识提取和插入进行在线推荐的工业预训练框架
comment: Accepted at CIKM 2022, 10 pages. Yujing Zhang and Zhangming Chan contributed equally to this work
comments: Accepted at CIKM 2022, 10 pages. Yujing Zhang and Zhangming Chan contributed equally to this work
abstract: An industrial recommender system generally presents a hybrid list that contains results from multiple subsystems. In practice, each subsystem is optimized with its own feedback data to avoid the disturbance among different subsystems. However, we argue that such data usage may lead to sub-optimal online performance because of the \textit{data sparsity}. To alleviate this issue, we propose to extract knowledge from the \textit{super-domain} that contains web-scale and long-time impression data, and further assist the online recommendation task (downstream task). To this end, we propose a novel industrial \textbf{K}nowl\textbf{E}dge \textbf{E}xtraction and \textbf{P}lugging (\textbf{KEEP}) framework, which is a two-stage framework that consists of 1) a supervised pre-training knowledge extraction module on super-domain, and 2) a plug-in network that incorporates the extracted knowledge into the downstream model. This makes it friendly for incremental training of online recommendation. Moreover, we design an efficient empirical approach for KEEP and introduce our hands-on experience during the implementation of KEEP in a large-scale industrial system. Experiments conducted on two real-world datasets demonstrate that KEEP can achieve promising results. It is notable that KEEP has also been deployed on the display advertising system in Alibaba, bringing a lift of $+5.4\%$ CTR and $+4.7\%$ RPM.
summary: An industrial recommender system generally presents a hybrid list that contains results from multiple subsystems. In practice, each subsystem is optimized with its own feedback data to avoid the disturbance among different subsystems. However, we argue that such data usage may lead to sub-optimal online performance because of the \textit{data sparsity}. To alleviate this issue, we propose to extract knowledge from the \textit{super-domain} that contains web-scale and long-time impression data, and further assist the online recommendation task (downstream task). To this end, we propose a novel industrial \textbf{K}nowl\textbf{E}dge \textbf{E}xtraction and \textbf{P}lugging (\textbf{KEEP}) framework, which is a two-stage framework that consists of 1) a supervised pre-training knowledge extraction module on super-domain, and 2) a plug-in network that incorporates the extracted knowledge into the downstream model. This makes it friendly for incremental training of online recommendation. Moreover, we design an efficient empirical approach for KEEP and introduce our hands-on experience during the implementation of KEEP in a large-scale industrial system. Experiments conducted on two real-world datasets demonstrate that KEEP can achieve promising results. It is notable that KEEP has also been deployed on the display advertising system in Alibaba, bringing a lift of $+5.4\%$ CTR and $+4.7\%$ RPM.
abstract_zh: 工业推荐系统通常提供包含来自多个子系统的结果的混合列表。在实际应用中，每个子系统都利用自己的反馈数据进行优化，以避免不同子系统之间的干扰。然而，我们认为，由于\textit{数据稀疏}，这种数据使用可能会导致在线性能次优。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议从包含网络规模和长期印象数据的 \textit{super-domain} 中提取知识，并进一步协助在线推荐任务（下游任务）。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的工业 \textbf{K}nowl\textbf{E}dge \textbf{E}xtraction 和 \textbf{P}lugging (\textbf{KEEP}) 框架，这是一个两阶段框架，由 1）超级域上的有监督预训练知识提取模块组成，2）将提取的知识合并到下游模型中的插件网络。这使得在线推荐的增量训练变得友好。此外，我们为KEEP设计了一种有效的实证方法，并介绍了我们在大规模工业系统中实施KEEP的实践经验。在两个真实数据集上进行的实验表明 KEEP 可以取得有希望的结果。值得注意的是，KEEP 也已部署在阿里巴巴的展示广告系统上，带来 $+5.4\%$ CTR 和 $+4.7\%$ RPM 提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KEEP框架，通过从超领域中提取知识并注入下游模型，提升工业级在线推荐系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统因子系统间数据隔离导致数据稀疏性问题，限制了在线推荐效果的优化。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：1) 基于超领域数据的监督预训练知识提取模块；2) 将提取知识注入下游模型的插件网络，支持增量训练。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上验证有效性，部署于阿里巴巴广告系统后点击率提升5.4%，每千次展示收益提升4.7%。
AI.conclusion: KEEP通过跨领域知识迁移有效缓解数据稀疏性问题，为工业级推荐系统提供可扩展的解决方案。

search_text: KEEP: An Industrial Pre-Training Framework for Online Recommendation via Knowledge Extraction and Plugging KEEP：通过知识提取和插入进行在线推荐的工业预训练框架 An industrial recommender system generally presents a hybrid list that contains results from multiple subsystems. In practice, each subsystem is optimized with its own feedback data to avoid the disturbance among different subsystems. However, we argue that such data usage may lead to sub-optimal online performance because of the \textit{data sparsity}. To alleviate this issue, we propose to extract knowledge from the \textit{super-domain} that contains web-scale and long-time impression data, and further assist the online recommendation task (downstream task). To this end, we propose a novel industrial \textbf{K}nowl\textbf{E}dge \textbf{E}xtraction and \textbf{P}lugging (\textbf{KEEP}) framework, which is a two-stage framework that consists of 1) a supervised pre-training knowledge extraction module on super-domain, and 2) a plug-in network that incorporates the extracted knowledge into the downstream model. This makes it friendly for incremental training of online recommendation. Moreover, we design an efficient empirical approach for KEEP and introduce our hands-on experience during the implementation of KEEP in a large-scale industrial system. Experiments conducted on two real-world datasets demonstrate that KEEP can achieve promising results. It is notable that KEEP has also been deployed on the display advertising system in Alibaba, bringing a lift of $+5.4\%$ CTR and $+4.7\%$ RPM. 工业推荐系统通常提供包含来自多个子系统的结果的混合列表。在实际应用中，每个子系统都利用自己的反馈数据进行优化，以避免不同子系统之间的干扰。然而，我们认为，由于\textit{数据稀疏}，这种数据使用可能会导致在线性能次优。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议从包含网络规模和长期印象数据的 \textit{super-domain} 中提取知识，并进一步协助在线推荐任务（下游任务）。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的工业 \textbf{K}nowl\textbf{E}dge \textbf{E}xtraction 和 \textbf{P}lugging (\textbf{KEEP}) 框架，这是一个两阶段框架，由 1）超级域上的有监督预训练知识提取模块组成，2）将提取的知识合并到下游模型中的插件网络。这使得在线推荐的增量训练变得友好。此外，我们为KEEP设计了一种有效的实证方法，并介绍了我们在大规模工业系统中实施KEEP的实践经验。在两个真实数据集上进行的实验表明 KEEP 可以取得有希望的结果。值得注意的是，KEEP 也已部署在阿里巴巴的展示广告系统上，带来 $+5.4\%$ CTR 和 $+4.7\%$ RPM 提升。 本文提出KEEP框架，通过从超领域中提取知识并注入下游模型，提升工业级在线推荐系统的性能。 Yujing Zhang,Zhangming Chan,Shuhao Xu,Weijie Bian,Shuguang Han,Hongbo Deng,Bo Zheng cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Chenqi Qian,Philipp del Hougne
title: Noise-Adaptive Intelligent Programmable Meta-Imager
title_zh: 噪声自适应智能可编程元成像仪
abstract: We present an intelligent programmable computational meta-imager that tailors its sequence of coherent scene illuminations not only to a specific information-extraction task (e.g., object recognition) but also adapts to different types and levels of noise. We systematically study how the learned illumination patterns depend on the noise, and we discover that trends in intensity and overlap of the learned illumination patterns can be understood intuitively. We conduct our analysis based on an analytical coupled-dipole forward model of a microwave dynamic metasurface antenna (DMA); we formulate a differentiable end-to-end information-flow pipeline comprising the programmable physical measurement process including noise as well as the subsequent digital processing layers. This pipeline allows us to jointly inverse-design the programmable physical weights (DMA configurations that determine the coherent scene illuminations) and the trainable digital weights. Our noise-adaptive intelligent meta-imager outperforms the conventional use of pseudo-random illumination patterns most clearly under conditions that make the extraction of sufficient task-relevant information challenging: latency constraints (limiting the number of allowed measurements) and strong noise. Programmable microwave meta-imagers in indoor surveillance and earth observation will be confronted with these conditions.
summary: We present an intelligent programmable computational meta-imager that tailors its sequence of coherent scene illuminations not only to a specific information-extraction task (e.g., object recognition) but also adapts to different types and levels of noise. We systematically study how the learned illumination patterns depend on the noise, and we discover that trends in intensity and overlap of the learned illumination patterns can be understood intuitively. We conduct our analysis based on an analytical coupled-dipole forward model of a microwave dynamic metasurface antenna (DMA); we formulate a differentiable end-to-end information-flow pipeline comprising the programmable physical measurement process including noise as well as the subsequent digital processing layers. This pipeline allows us to jointly inverse-design the programmable physical weights (DMA configurations that determine the coherent scene illuminations) and the trainable digital weights. Our noise-adaptive intelligent meta-imager outperforms the conventional use of pseudo-random illumination patterns most clearly under conditions that make the extraction of sufficient task-relevant information challenging: latency constraints (limiting the number of allowed measurements) and strong noise. Programmable microwave meta-imagers in indoor surveillance and earth observation will be confronted with these conditions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种智能可编程计算元成像器，它不仅可以根据特定的信息提取任务（例如对象识别）定制其相干场景照明序列，而且还可以适应不同类型和水平的噪声。我们系统地研究了学习的照明模式如何依赖于噪声，并且我们发现可以直观地理解学习的照明模式的强度和重叠趋势。我们基于微波动态超表面天线 (DMA) 的分析耦合偶极子正向模型进行分析；我们制定了一个可微的端到端信息流管道，包括可编程物理测量过程（包括噪声）以及后续的数字处理层。该管道使我们能够联合逆向设计可编程物理权重（确定相干场景照明的 DMA 配置）和可训练数字权重。在提取足够的任务相关信息具有挑战性的条件下：延迟约束（限制允许的测量数量）和强噪声，我们的噪声自适应智能元成像仪明显优于伪随机照明模式的传统使用。室内监视和地球观测中的可编程微波元成像仪将面临这些条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种智能可编程计算超材料成像仪，能够根据特定信息提取任务和不同噪声类型调整其相干场景照明序列。
AI.motivation: 传统伪随机照明模式在噪声干扰大或测量次数受限时难以有效提取任务相关的信息，亟需噪声自适应的成像方案。
AI.method: 基于微波动态超表面天线的耦合偶极子模型，构建包含噪声的端到端可微分信息流管道，联合逆向设计物理权重和数字权重。
AI.result: 该噪声自适应超材料成像仪在强噪声和测量次数受限条件下显著优于传统方法，适用于室内监控和地球观测等场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过物理-数字联合逆向设计，噪声自适应智能超材料成像仪能有效提升复杂环境下的信息提取性能。
