search_text: Noise-Adaptive Intelligent Programmable Meta-Imager 噪声自适应智能可编程元成像仪 We present an intelligent programmable computational meta-imager that tailors its sequence of coherent scene illuminations not only to a specific information-extraction task (e.g., object recognition) but also adapts to different types and levels of noise. We systematically study how the learned illumination patterns depend on the noise, and we discover that trends in intensity and overlap of the learned illumination patterns can be understood intuitively. We conduct our analysis based on an analytical coupled-dipole forward model of a microwave dynamic metasurface antenna (DMA); we formulate a differentiable end-to-end information-flow pipeline comprising the programmable physical measurement process including noise as well as the subsequent digital processing layers. This pipeline allows us to jointly inverse-design the programmable physical weights (DMA configurations that determine the coherent scene illuminations) and the trainable digital weights. Our noise-adaptive intelligent meta-imager outperforms the conventional use of pseudo-random illumination patterns most clearly under conditions that make the extraction of sufficient task-relevant information challenging: latency constraints (limiting the number of allowed measurements) and strong noise. Programmable microwave meta-imagers in indoor surveillance and earth observation will be confronted with these conditions. 我们提出了一种智能可编程计算元成像器，它不仅可以根据特定的信息提取任务（例如对象识别）定制其相干场景照明序列，而且还可以适应不同类型和水平的噪声。我们系统地研究了学习的照明模式如何依赖于噪声，并且我们发现可以直观地理解学习的照明模式的强度和重叠趋势。我们基于微波动态超表面天线 (DMA) 的分析耦合偶极子正向模型进行分析；我们制定了一个可微的端到端信息流管道，包括可编程物理测量过程（包括噪声）以及后续的数字处理层。该管道使我们能够联合逆向设计可编程物理权重（确定相干场景照明的 DMA 配置）和可训练数字权重。在提取足够的任务相关信息具有挑战性的条件下：延迟约束（限制允许的测量数量）和强噪声，我们的噪声自适应智能元成像仪明显优于伪随机照明模式的传统使用。室内监视和地球观测中的可编程微波元成像仪将面临这些条件。 本文提出了一种智能可编程计算超材料成像仪，能够根据特定信息提取任务和不同噪声类型调整其相干场景照明序列。 Chenqi Qian,Philipp del Hougne eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.IT,physics.app-ph,physics.optics

authors_text: Jie Qin,Jie Wu,Ming Li,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Xingang Wang
title: Multi-Granularity Distillation Scheme Towards Lightweight Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 面向轻量级半监督语义分割的多粒度蒸馏方案
abstract: Albeit with varying degrees of progress in the field of Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation, most of its recent successes are involved in unwieldy models and the lightweight solution is still not yet explored. We find that existing knowledge distillation techniques pay more attention to pixel-level concepts from labeled data, which fails to take more informative cues within unlabeled data into account. Consequently, we offer the first attempt to provide lightweight SSSS models via a novel multi-granularity distillation (MGD) scheme, where multi-granularity is captured from three aspects: i) complementary teacher structure; ii) labeled-unlabeled data cooperative distillation; iii) hierarchical and multi-levels loss setting. Specifically, MGD is formulated as a labeled-unlabeled data cooperative distillation scheme, which helps to take full advantage of diverse data characteristics that are essential in the semi-supervised setting. Image-level semantic-sensitive loss, region-level content-aware loss, and pixel-level consistency loss are set up to enrich hierarchical distillation abstraction via structurally complementary teachers. Experimental results on PASCAL VOC2012 and Cityscapes reveal that MGD can outperform the competitive approaches by a large margin under diverse partition protocols. For example, the performance of ResNet-18 and MobileNet-v2 backbone is boosted by 11.5% and 4.6% respectively under 1/16 partition protocol on Cityscapes. Although the FLOPs of the model backbone is compressed by 3.4-5.3x (ResNet-18) and 38.7-59.6x (MobileNetv2), the model manages to achieve satisfactory segmentation results.
summary: Albeit with varying degrees of progress in the field of Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation, most of its recent successes are involved in unwieldy models and the lightweight solution is still not yet explored. We find that existing knowledge distillation techniques pay more attention to pixel-level concepts from labeled data, which fails to take more informative cues within unlabeled data into account. Consequently, we offer the first attempt to provide lightweight SSSS models via a novel multi-granularity distillation (MGD) scheme, where multi-granularity is captured from three aspects: i) complementary teacher structure; ii) labeled-unlabeled data cooperative distillation; iii) hierarchical and multi-levels loss setting. Specifically, MGD is formulated as a labeled-unlabeled data cooperative distillation scheme, which helps to take full advantage of diverse data characteristics that are essential in the semi-supervised setting. Image-level semantic-sensitive loss, region-level content-aware loss, and pixel-level consistency loss are set up to enrich hierarchical distillation abstraction via structurally complementary teachers. Experimental results on PASCAL VOC2012 and Cityscapes reveal that MGD can outperform the competitive approaches by a large margin under diverse partition protocols. For example, the performance of ResNet-18 and MobileNet-v2 backbone is boosted by 11.5% and 4.6% respectively under 1/16 partition protocol on Cityscapes. Although the FLOPs of the model backbone is compressed by 3.4-5.3x (ResNet-18) and 38.7-59.6x (MobileNetv2), the model manages to achieve satisfactory segmentation results.
abstract_zh: 尽管半监督语义分割领域取得了不同程度的进展，但其最近的大部分成功都涉及笨重的模型，并且尚未探索轻量级解决方案。我们发现现有的知识蒸馏技术更关注标记数据中的像素级概念，而未能考虑未标记数据中的更多信息线索。因此，我们首次尝试通过新颖的多粒度蒸馏（MGD）方案提供轻量级 SSSS 模型，其中多粒度从三个方面捕获：i）互补的教师结构； ii) 标记-未标记数据协同蒸馏； iii) 分层和多级损失设置。具体来说，MGD 被制定为一种标记-未标记数据协作蒸馏方案，这有助于充分利用半监督环境中必不可少的各种数据特征。设置图像级语义敏感损失、区域级内容感知损失和像素级一致性损失，通过结构互补的教师来丰富层次蒸馏抽象。 PASCAL VOC2012 和 Cityscapes 上的实验结果表明，在不同的分区协议下，MGD 可以大幅优于竞争方法。例如，在 Cityscapes 上的 1/16 分区协议下，ResNet-18 和 MobileNet-v2 主干网的性能分别提高了 11.5% 和 4.6%。尽管模型主干的 FLOP 被压缩了 3.4-5.3 倍（ResNet-18）和 38.7-59.6 倍（MobileNetv2），但该模型仍取得了令人满意的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级半监督语义分割模型，通过多粒度知识蒸馏方案（MGD）提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督语义分割方法依赖复杂模型，且未充分利用未标记数据的潜在信息，轻量级解决方案尚未被有效探索。
AI.method: 设计多粒度知识蒸馏框架，包含互补教师结构、标记-未标记数据协同蒸馏及分层多级损失函数，通过图像级、区域级和像素级损失增强层次化蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC2012和Cityscapes数据集上，MGD在1/16划分协议下使ResNet-18和MobileNet-v2的性能分别提升11.5%和4.6%，同时模型计算量压缩3.4-59.6倍。
AI.conclusion: 多粒度蒸馏方案有效平衡了轻量化与性能，通过协同利用标记和未标记数据，为半监督语义分割提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Merav Parter,Asaf Petruschka
title: Õptimal Dual Vertex Failure Connectivity Labels
title_zh: Õ最佳双顶点故障连接标签
abstract: In this paper we present succinct labeling schemes for supporting connectivity queries under vertex faults. For a given $n$-vertex graph $G$, an $f$-VFT (resp., EFT) connectivity labeling scheme is a distributed data structure that assigns each of the graph edges and vertices a short label, such that given the labels of a vertex pair $u$ and $v$, and the labels of at most $f$ failing vertices (resp., edges) $F$, one can determine if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G \setminus F$. The primary complexity measure is the length of the individual labels. Since their introduction by [Courcelle, Twigg, STACS '07], FT labeling schemes have been devised only for a limited collection of graph families. A recent work [Dory and Parter, PODC 2021] provided EFT labeling schemes for general graphs under edge failures, leaving the vertex failure case fairly open. We provide the first sublinear $f$-VFT labeling schemes for $f \geq 2$ for any $n$-vertex graph. Our key result is $2$-VFT connectivity labels with $O(\log^3 n)$ bits. Our constructions are based on analyzing the structure of dual failure replacement paths on top of the well-known heavy-light tree decomposition technique of [Sleator and Tarjan, STOC 1981]. We also provide $f$-VFT labels with sub-linear length (in $|V|$) for any $f=o(\log\log n)$, that are based on a reduction to the existing EFT labels.
summary: In this paper we present succinct labeling schemes for supporting connectivity queries under vertex faults. For a given $n$-vertex graph $G$, an $f$-VFT (resp., EFT) connectivity labeling scheme is a distributed data structure that assigns each of the graph edges and vertices a short label, such that given the labels of a vertex pair $u$ and $v$, and the labels of at most $f$ failing vertices (resp., edges) $F$, one can determine if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G \setminus F$. The primary complexity measure is the length of the individual labels. Since their introduction by [Courcelle, Twigg, STACS '07], FT labeling schemes have been devised only for a limited collection of graph families. A recent work [Dory and Parter, PODC 2021] provided EFT labeling schemes for general graphs under edge failures, leaving the vertex failure case fairly open. We provide the first sublinear $f$-VFT labeling schemes for $f \geq 2$ for any $n$-vertex graph. Our key result is $2$-VFT connectivity labels with $O(\log^3 n)$ bits. Our constructions are based on analyzing the structure of dual failure replacement paths on top of the well-known heavy-light tree decomposition technique of [Sleator and Tarjan, STOC 1981]. We also provide $f$-VFT labels with sub-linear length (in $|V|$) for any $f=o(\log\log n)$, that are based on a reduction to the existing EFT labels.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了用于支持顶点故障下的连通性查询的简洁标记方案。对于给定的$n$-顶点图$G$，$f$-VFT（或EFT）连接标记方案是一种分布式数据结构，它为每个图边和顶点分配一个短标签，这样给定顶点对$u$和$v$的标签，以及至多$f$失败顶点（或边）$F$的标签，可以确定$u$和$v$是否在$G\setminus中连接F$。主要的复杂性度量是各个标签的长度。自从 [Courcelle, Twigg, STACS '07] 引入以来，FT 标记方案仅针对有限的图族集合而设计。最近的一项工作 [Dory 和 Parter，PODC 2021] 为边缘故障下的一般图提供了 EFT 标记方案，使顶点故障案例相当开放。我们为任何 $n$ 顶点图的 $f \geq 2$ 提供第一个次线性 $f$-VFT 标记方案。我们的关键结果是具有 $O(\log^3 n)$ 位的 $2$-VFT 连接标签。我们的构造基于对 [Sleator 和 Tarjan，STOC 1981] 著名的重轻树分解技术之上的双故障替换路径结构的分析。我们还为任何 $f=o(\log\log n)$ 提供具有亚线性长度（以 $|V|$ 为单位）的 $f$-VFT 标签，这些标签基于对现有 EFT 标签的缩减。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种高效的顶点故障容忍连通性标签方案，能够在图中存在多个顶点故障的情况下快速判断任意两点是否连通。
AI.motivation: 现有故障容忍标签方案仅适用于特定图类或边故障场景，顶点故障下的通用解决方案仍缺乏研究，需填补该领域空白。
AI.method: 基于双重故障替换路径分析与heavy-light树分解技术，结合边故障标签方案的转化方法，构建顶点故障标签体系。
AI.result: 首次提出适用于任意n顶点图的次线性长度f-VFT标签（f≥2），其中2-VFT标签长度为O(log³n)，并扩展至f=o(log log n)的次线性长度方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文突破性地解决了多顶点故障下的连通性标签问题，为大规模网络的容错查询提供了理论基础与实用工具。

conclusion: 本文突破性地解决了多顶点故障下的连通性标签问题，为大规模网络的容错查询提供了理论基础与实用工具。
search_text: Õptimal Dual Vertex Failure Connectivity Labels Õ最佳双顶点故障连接标签 In this paper we present succinct labeling schemes for supporting connectivity queries under vertex faults. For a given $n$-vertex graph $G$, an $f$-VFT (resp., EFT) connectivity labeling scheme is a distributed data structure that assigns each of the graph edges and vertices a short label, such that given the labels of a vertex pair $u$ and $v$, and the labels of at most $f$ failing vertices (resp., edges) $F$, one can determine if $u$ and $v$ are connected in $G \setminus F$. The primary complexity measure is the length of the individual labels. Since their introduction by [Courcelle, Twigg, STACS '07], FT labeling schemes have been devised only for a limited collection of graph families. A recent work [Dory and Parter, PODC 2021] provided EFT labeling schemes for general graphs under edge failures, leaving the vertex failure case fairly open. We provide the first sublinear $f$-VFT labeling schemes for $f \geq 2$ for any $n$-vertex graph. Our key result is $2$-VFT connectivity labels with $O(\log^3 n)$ bits. Our constructions are based on analyzing the structure of dual failure replacement paths on top of the well-known heavy-light tree decomposition technique of [Sleator and Tarjan, STOC 1981]. We also provide $f$-VFT labels with sub-linear length (in $|V|$) for any $f=o(\log\log n)$, that are based on a reduction to the existing EFT labels. 在本文中，我们提出了用于支持顶点故障下的连通性查询的简洁标记方案。对于给定的$n$-顶点图$G$，$f$-VFT（或EFT）连接标记方案是一种分布式数据结构，它为每个图边和顶点分配一个短标签，这样给定顶点对$u$和$v$的标签，以及至多$f$失败顶点（或边）$F$的标签，可以确定$u$和$v$是否在$G\setminus中连接F$。主要的复杂性度量是各个标签的长度。自从 [Courcelle, Twigg, STACS '07] 引入以来，FT 标记方案仅针对有限的图族集合而设计。最近的一项工作 [Dory 和 Parter，PODC 2021] 为边缘故障下的一般图提供了 EFT 标记方案，使顶点故障案例相当开放。我们为任何 $n$ 顶点图的 $f \geq 2$ 提供第一个次线性 $f$-VFT 标记方案。我们的关键结果是具有 $O(\log^3 n)$ 位的 $2$-VFT 连接标签。我们的构造基于对 [Sleator 和 Tarjan，STOC 1981] 著名的重轻树分解技术之上的双故障替换路径结构的分析。我们还为任何 $f=o(\log\log n)$ 提供具有亚线性长度（以 $|V|$ 为单位）的 $f$-VFT 标签，这些标签基于对现有 EFT 标签的缩减。 本文设计了一种高效的顶点故障容忍连通性标签方案，能够在图中存在多个顶点故障的情况下快速判断任意两点是否连通。 Merav Parter,Asaf Petruschka cs.DS

authors_text: Kinga Skorupska,Ewa Makowska,Anna Jaskulska
title: Interdisciplinary Research with Older Adults in the area of ICT: Selected Ethical Considerations and Challenges
title_zh: 信息通信技术领域老年人的跨学科研究：精选的伦理考量和挑战
abstract: In this paper we analyse, classify and discuss some ethical considerations and challenges related to pursuing exploratory and interdisciplinary research projects in the area of ICT, especially those involving older adults. First, we identify spotlight areas, which are especially prominent in these fields. Next, we explore possible pitfalls interdisciplinary researchers may stumble onto when planning, conducting and presenting exploratory research activities. Finally, some of these are selected and discussed more closely, while related open questions are posed.
summary: In this paper we analyse, classify and discuss some ethical considerations and challenges related to pursuing exploratory and interdisciplinary research projects in the area of ICT, especially those involving older adults. First, we identify spotlight areas, which are especially prominent in these fields. Next, we explore possible pitfalls interdisciplinary researchers may stumble onto when planning, conducting and presenting exploratory research activities. Finally, some of these are selected and discussed more closely, while related open questions are posed.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们分析、分类和讨论了与在信息通信技术领域（尤其是涉及老年人的项目）开展探索性和跨学科研究项目相关的一些伦理考虑和挑战。首先，我们确定重点领域，在这些领域中尤其突出。接下来，我们探讨跨学科研究人员在规划、进行和展示探索性研究活动时可能遇到的陷阱。最后，选择其中一些并进行更仔细的讨论，同时提出相关的开放性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并讨论了在信息通信技术（ICT）领域与老年人相关的跨学科研究中的伦理问题和挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着ICT技术发展，老年人参与研究的伦理问题逐渐凸显，跨学科研究可能面临独特挑战，需明确相关伦理考量以指导实践。
AI.method: 通过识别关键伦理领域、分析跨学科研究陷阱，并选取部分问题深入探讨，结合开放性问题提出讨论。
AI.result: 明确了ICT与老年人跨学科研究中的核心伦理议题，揭示了研究设计与实施中的潜在风险，并提出需进一步解决的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 需加强伦理框架建设以支持负责任的研究实践，跨学科合作中应重视伦理考量的动态性与复杂性。

authors_text: Jae-Hyeon Park,Dong Eui Chang
title: Unscented Kalman filter with stable embedding for simple, accurate and computationally efficient state estimation of systems on manifolds in Euclidean space
title_zh: 具有稳定嵌入的无迹卡尔曼滤波器，可对欧几里德空间流形上的系统进行简单、准确且计算高效的状态估计
comment: This paper is published in International Journal of Robust and Nonliner Control
comments: This paper is published in International Journal of Robust and Nonliner Control
abstract: This paper proposes a simple, accurate and computationally efficient method to apply the ordinary unscented Kalman filter developed in Euclidean space to systems whose dynamics evolve on manifolds.We use the mathematical theory called stable embedding to make a variant of unscented Kalman filter that keeps state estimates in closeproximity to the manifold while exhibiting excellent estimation performance. We confirm the performance of our devised filter by applying it to the satellite system model and comparing the performance with other unscented Kalman filters devised specifically for systems on manifolds. Our devised filter has a low estimation error, keeps the state estimates in close proximity to the manifold as expected, and consumes a minor amount of computation time. Also our devised filter is simple and easy to use because our filter directly employs the off-the-shelf standard unscented Kalman filter devised in Euclidean space without any particular manifold-structure-preserving discretization method or coordinate transformation.
summary: This paper proposes a simple, accurate and computationally efficient method to apply the ordinary unscented Kalman filter developed in Euclidean space to systems whose dynamics evolve on manifolds.We use the mathematical theory called stable embedding to make a variant of unscented Kalman filter that keeps state estimates in closeproximity to the manifold while exhibiting excellent estimation performance. We confirm the performance of our devised filter by applying it to the satellite system model and comparing the performance with other unscented Kalman filters devised specifically for systems on manifolds. Our devised filter has a low estimation error, keeps the state estimates in close proximity to the manifold as expected, and consumes a minor amount of computation time. Also our devised filter is simple and easy to use because our filter directly employs the off-the-shelf standard unscented Kalman filter devised in Euclidean space without any particular manifold-structure-preserving discretization method or coordinate transformation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种简单、准确且计算高效的方法，将在欧几里德空间中开发的普通无味卡尔曼滤波器应用于动力学在流形上演化的系统。我们使用称为稳定嵌入的数学理论来制作无味卡尔曼滤波器的变体，使状态估计保持接近流形，同时表现出优异的估计性能。我们通过将设计的滤波器应用于卫星系统模型并将其性能与专为流形系统设计的其他无味卡尔曼滤波器进行比较来确认其性能。我们设计的滤波器具有较低的估计误差，使状态估计与预期的流形非常接近，并且消耗少量的计算时间。此外，我们设计的滤波器简单且易于使用，因为我们的滤波器直接采用在欧几里得空间中设计的现成标准无迹卡尔曼滤波器，无需任何特定的流形结构保留离散化方法或坐标变换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单、准确且计算高效的无味卡尔曼滤波器，用于在欧几里得空间中对流形上的系统进行状态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统的无味卡尔曼滤波器适用于欧几里得空间，但在处理流形上的系统时效果不佳，需要一种能够保持状态估计接近流形并具有良好估计性能的方法。
AI.method: 本文利用稳定嵌入的数学理论，对普通无味卡尔曼滤波器进行改进，使其能够在保持状态估计接近流形的同时，实现良好的估计性能。
AI.result: 所提出的滤波器在卫星系统模型上的应用表明，其估计误差低，状态估计接近流形，计算时间消耗小，并且易于使用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法简单有效，无需复杂的流形结构保持离散化方法或坐标变换，直接使用标准无味卡尔曼滤波器即可实现良好的估计效果。

authors_text: Rui Wang,Xingkai Wang,Huanhuan Chen,Jérémie Decouchant,Stjepan Picek,Nikolaos Laoutaris,Kaitai Liang
title: MUDGUARD: Taming Malicious Majorities in Federated Learning using Privacy-Preserving Byzantine-Robust Clustering
title_zh: MUDGUARD：使用隐私保护拜占庭稳健集群来驯服联邦学习中的恶意多数
abstract: Byzantine-robust Federated Learning (FL) aims to counter malicious clients and train an accurate global model while maintaining an extremely low attack success rate. Most existing systems, however, are only robust when most of the clients are honest. FLTrust (NDSS '21) and Zeno++ (ICML '20) do not make such an honest majority assumption but can only be applied to scenarios where the server is provided with an auxiliary dataset used to filter malicious updates. FLAME (USENIX '22) and EIFFeL (CCS '22) maintain the semi-honest majority assumption to guarantee robustness and the confidentiality of updates. It is therefore currently impossible to ensure Byzantine robustness and confidentiality of updates without assuming a semi-honest majority. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Byzantine-robust and privacy-preserving FL system, called MUDGUARD, that can operate under malicious minority \emph{or majority} in both the server and client sides. Based on DBSCAN, we design a new method for extracting features from model updates via pairwise adjusted cosine similarity to boost the accuracy of the resulting clustering. To thwart attacks from a malicious majority, we develop a method called \textit{Model Segmentation}, that aggregates together only the updates from within a cluster, sending the corresponding model only to the clients of the corresponding cluster. The fundamental idea is that even if malicious clients are in their majority, their poisoned updates cannot harm benign clients if they are confined only within the malicious cluster. We also leverage multiple cryptographic tools to conduct clustering without sacrificing training correctness and updates confidentiality. We present a detailed security proof and empirical evaluation along with a convergence analysis for MUDGUARD.
summary: Byzantine-robust Federated Learning (FL) aims to counter malicious clients and train an accurate global model while maintaining an extremely low attack success rate. Most existing systems, however, are only robust when most of the clients are honest. FLTrust (NDSS '21) and Zeno++ (ICML '20) do not make such an honest majority assumption but can only be applied to scenarios where the server is provided with an auxiliary dataset used to filter malicious updates. FLAME (USENIX '22) and EIFFeL (CCS '22) maintain the semi-honest majority assumption to guarantee robustness and the confidentiality of updates. It is therefore currently impossible to ensure Byzantine robustness and confidentiality of updates without assuming a semi-honest majority. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Byzantine-robust and privacy-preserving FL system, called MUDGUARD, that can operate under malicious minority \emph{or majority} in both the server and client sides. Based on DBSCAN, we design a new method for extracting features from model updates via pairwise adjusted cosine similarity to boost the accuracy of the resulting clustering. To thwart attacks from a malicious majority, we develop a method called \textit{Model Segmentation}, that aggregates together only the updates from within a cluster, sending the corresponding model only to the clients of the corresponding cluster. The fundamental idea is that even if malicious clients are in their majority, their poisoned updates cannot harm benign clients if they are confined only within the malicious cluster. We also leverage multiple cryptographic tools to conduct clustering without sacrificing training correctness and updates confidentiality. We present a detailed security proof and empirical evaluation along with a convergence analysis for MUDGUARD.
abstract_zh: 拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习（FL）旨在对抗恶意客户端并训练准确的全局模型，同时保持极低的攻击成功率。然而，大多数现有系统只有在大多数客户都是诚实的情况下才会稳健。 FLTrust (NDSS '21) 和 Zeno++ (ICML '20) 没有做出如此诚实的多数假设，但只能应用于为服务器提供用于过滤恶意更新的辅助数据集的场景。 FLAME (USENIX '22) 和 EIFFeL (CCS '22) 维持半诚实多数假设以保证更新的稳健性和机密性。因此，如果不假设半诚实的多数，目前不可能确保更新的拜占庭稳健性和机密性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的拜占庭鲁棒性和隐私保护的 FL 系统，称为 MUDGUARD，它可以在服务器和客户端的恶意少数\emph{或多数}下运行。基于 DBSCAN，我们设计了一种新方法，通过成对调整余弦相似度从模型更新中提取特征，以提高聚类结果的准确性。为了阻止恶意多数人的攻击，我们开发了一种名为 \textit{Model Segmentation} 的方法，该方法仅将集群内的更新聚合在一起，仅将相应的模型发送到相应集群的客户端。基本思想是，即使恶意客户端占大多数，如果它们仅被限制在恶意集群内，那么它们的有毒更新也不会伤害良性客户端。我们还利用多种加密工具进行聚类，而不会牺牲训练的正确性和更新的机密性。我们提出了详细的安全证明和实证评估以及 MUDGUARD 的收敛性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MUDGUARD的联邦学习系统，能够在不依赖半诚实多数假设的情况下，通过隐私保护的拜占庭鲁棒聚类方法应对客户端或服务器端的恶意少数或多数攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习系统在应对恶意客户端时通常需要假设存在诚实多数或依赖辅助数据集，这限制了其适用性。同时，保障更新保密性与拜占庭鲁棒性之间的矛盾尚未被有效解决。
AI.method: 基于DBSCAN算法，通过成对调整余弦相似度提取模型更新特征以提升聚类准确性；设计模型分割方法，仅聚合同一聚类内的更新并定向发送模型；结合多方密码学工具实现隐私保护。
AI.result: 理论证明与实验评估表明，MUDGUARD在恶意多数场景下仍能保持模型训练准确性，同时通过聚类隔离机制有效防止毒化攻击，并实现更新信息的保密性。
AI.conclusion: MUDGUARD通过创新的聚类隔离与密码学技术，首次在无需半诚实多数假设的前提下，同时实现了联邦学习的拜占庭鲁棒性与更新保密性，突破了现有方法的限制。

search_text: MUDGUARD: Taming Malicious Majorities in Federated Learning using Privacy-Preserving Byzantine-Robust Clustering MUDGUARD：使用隐私保护拜占庭稳健集群来驯服联邦学习中的恶意多数 Byzantine-robust Federated Learning (FL) aims to counter malicious clients and train an accurate global model while maintaining an extremely low attack success rate. Most existing systems, however, are only robust when most of the clients are honest. FLTrust (NDSS '21) and Zeno++ (ICML '20) do not make such an honest majority assumption but can only be applied to scenarios where the server is provided with an auxiliary dataset used to filter malicious updates. FLAME (USENIX '22) and EIFFeL (CCS '22) maintain the semi-honest majority assumption to guarantee robustness and the confidentiality of updates. It is therefore currently impossible to ensure Byzantine robustness and confidentiality of updates without assuming a semi-honest majority. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Byzantine-robust and privacy-preserving FL system, called MUDGUARD, that can operate under malicious minority \emph{or majority} in both the server and client sides. Based on DBSCAN, we design a new method for extracting features from model updates via pairwise adjusted cosine similarity to boost the accuracy of the resulting clustering. To thwart attacks from a malicious majority, we develop a method called \textit{Model Segmentation}, that aggregates together only the updates from within a cluster, sending the corresponding model only to the clients of the corresponding cluster. The fundamental idea is that even if malicious clients are in their majority, their poisoned updates cannot harm benign clients if they are confined only within the malicious cluster. We also leverage multiple cryptographic tools to conduct clustering without sacrificing training correctness and updates confidentiality. We present a detailed security proof and empirical evaluation along with a convergence analysis for MUDGUARD. 拜占庭鲁棒联邦学习（FL）旨在对抗恶意客户端并训练准确的全局模型，同时保持极低的攻击成功率。然而，大多数现有系统只有在大多数客户都是诚实的情况下才会稳健。 FLTrust (NDSS '21) 和 Zeno++ (ICML '20) 没有做出如此诚实的多数假设，但只能应用于为服务器提供用于过滤恶意更新的辅助数据集的场景。 FLAME (USENIX '22) 和 EIFFeL (CCS '22) 维持半诚实多数假设以保证更新的稳健性和机密性。因此，如果不假设半诚实的多数，目前不可能确保更新的拜占庭稳健性和机密性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的拜占庭鲁棒性和隐私保护的 FL 系统，称为 MUDGUARD，它可以在服务器和客户端的恶意少数\emph{或多数}下运行。基于 DBSCAN，我们设计了一种新方法，通过成对调整余弦相似度从模型更新中提取特征，以提高聚类结果的准确性。为了阻止恶意多数人的攻击，我们开发了一种名为 \textit{Model Segmentation} 的方法，该方法仅将集群内的更新聚合在一起，仅将相应的模型发送到相应集群的客户端。基本思想是，即使恶意客户端占大多数，如果它们仅被限制在恶意集群内，那么它们的有毒更新也不会伤害良性客户端。我们还利用多种加密工具进行聚类，而不会牺牲训练的正确性和更新的机密性。我们提出了详细的安全证明和实证评估以及 MUDGUARD 的收敛性分析。 本文提出了一种名为MUDGUARD的联邦学习系统，能够在不依赖半诚实多数假设的情况下，通过隐私保护的拜占庭鲁棒聚类方法应对客户端或服务器端的恶意少数或多数攻击。 Rui Wang,Xingkai Wang,Huanhuan Chen,Jérémie Decouchant,Stjepan Picek,Nikolaos Laoutaris,Kaitai Liang cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lingbo Liu,Jianlong Chang,Bruce X. B. Yu,Liang Lin,Qi Tian,Chang-Wen Chen
title: Prompt-Matched Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 快速匹配语义分割
abstract: The objective of this work is to explore how to effectively and efficiently adapt pre-trained visual foundation models to various downstream tasks of semantic segmentation. Previous methods usually fine-tuned the entire networks for each specific dataset, which will be burdensome to store massive parameters of these networks. A few recent works attempted to insert some extra trainable parameters into the frozen networks to learn visual prompts for parameter-efficient tuning. However, these works showed poor generality as they were designed specifically for Transformers. Moreover, using limited information in these schemes, they exhibited a poor capacity to learn beneficial prompts. To alleviate these issues, we propose a novel Stage-wise Prompt-Matched Framework for generic and effective visual prompt tuning. Specifically, to ensure generality, we divide the pre-trained backbone with frozen parameters into multiple stages and perform prompt learning between different stages, which makes the proposed scheme applicable to various architectures of CNN and Transformer. For effective tuning, a lightweight Semantic-aware Prompt Matcher (SPM) is designed to progressively learn reasonable prompts with a recurrent mechanism, guided by the rich information of interim semantic maps. Working as deep matched filter of representation learning, the proposed SPM can well transform the output of the previous stage into a desirable input for the next stage, thus achieving the better matching/stimulating for the pre-trained knowledge. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed scheme can achieve a promising trade-off between parameter efficiency and performance effectiveness. Our code and models will be released.
summary: The objective of this work is to explore how to effectively and efficiently adapt pre-trained visual foundation models to various downstream tasks of semantic segmentation. Previous methods usually fine-tuned the entire networks for each specific dataset, which will be burdensome to store massive parameters of these networks. A few recent works attempted to insert some extra trainable parameters into the frozen networks to learn visual prompts for parameter-efficient tuning. However, these works showed poor generality as they were designed specifically for Transformers. Moreover, using limited information in these schemes, they exhibited a poor capacity to learn beneficial prompts. To alleviate these issues, we propose a novel Stage-wise Prompt-Matched Framework for generic and effective visual prompt tuning. Specifically, to ensure generality, we divide the pre-trained backbone with frozen parameters into multiple stages and perform prompt learning between different stages, which makes the proposed scheme applicable to various architectures of CNN and Transformer. For effective tuning, a lightweight Semantic-aware Prompt Matcher (SPM) is designed to progressively learn reasonable prompts with a recurrent mechanism, guided by the rich information of interim semantic maps. Working as deep matched filter of representation learning, the proposed SPM can well transform the output of the previous stage into a desirable input for the next stage, thus achieving the better matching/stimulating for the pre-trained knowledge. Extensive experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed scheme can achieve a promising trade-off between parameter efficiency and performance effectiveness. Our code and models will be released.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是探索如何有效且高效地使预训练的视觉基础模型适应语义分割的各种下游任务。以前的方法通常针对每个特定数据集对整个网络进行微调，这对于存储这些网络的大量参数来说是很繁重的。最近的一些工作尝试将一些额外的可训练参数插入到冻结网络中，以学习参数高效调整的视觉提示。然而，这些作品都是专门为《变形金刚》设计的，通用性较差。此外，在这些方案中使用的信息有限，他们学习有益提示的能力很差。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的阶段式提示匹配框架，用于通用且有效的视觉提示调整。具体来说，为了确保通用性，我们将具有冻结参数的预训练主干划分为多个阶段，并在不同阶段之间进行即时学习，这使得所提出的方案适用于 CNN 和 Transformer 的各种架构。为了进行有效的调整，设计了一个轻量级的语义感知提示匹配器（SPM），在临时语义图的丰富信息的指导下，通过循环机制逐步学习合理的提示。作为表示学习的深度匹配滤波器，所提出的SPM可以很好地将前一阶段的输出转换为下一阶段所需的输入，从而实现对预训练知识的更好匹配/刺激。对四个基准的大量实验表明，所提出的方案可以在参数效率和性能有效性之间实现有希望的权衡。我们的代码和模型将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索如何高效适应预训练视觉基础模型以完成语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过微调整个网络或插入可训练参数进行提示学习，但存在参数存储负担大、泛化性差和提示学习能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出分阶段提示匹配框架，将冻结的预训练主干网络划分为多个阶段，并设计轻量级语义感知提示匹配器（SPM）通过递归机制逐步学习合理提示。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上验证了该方法在参数效率与性能之间的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了对CNN和Transformer等多种架构的通用有效视觉提示调优。

authors_text: Yuqing Wang,Xiangxian Li,Zhuang Qi,Jingyu Li,Xuelong Li,Xiangxu Meng,Lei Meng
title: Meta-Causal Feature Learning for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 用于分布外泛化的元因果特征学习
abstract: Causal inference has become a powerful tool to handle the out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem, which aims to extract the invariant features. However, conventional methods apply causal learners from multiple data splits, which may incur biased representation learning from imbalanced data distributions and difficulty in invariant feature learning from heterogeneous sources. To address these issues, this paper presents a balanced meta-causal learner (BMCL), which includes a balanced task generation module (BTG) and a meta-causal feature learning module (MCFL). Specifically, the BTG module learns to generate balanced subsets by a self-learned partitioning algorithm with constraints on the proportions of sample classes and contexts. The MCFL module trains a meta-learner adapted to different distributions. Experiments conducted on NICO++ dataset verified that BMCL effectively identifies the class-invariant visual regions for classification and may serve as a general framework to improve the performance of the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Causal inference has become a powerful tool to handle the out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization problem, which aims to extract the invariant features. However, conventional methods apply causal learners from multiple data splits, which may incur biased representation learning from imbalanced data distributions and difficulty in invariant feature learning from heterogeneous sources. To address these issues, this paper presents a balanced meta-causal learner (BMCL), which includes a balanced task generation module (BTG) and a meta-causal feature learning module (MCFL). Specifically, the BTG module learns to generate balanced subsets by a self-learned partitioning algorithm with constraints on the proportions of sample classes and contexts. The MCFL module trains a meta-learner adapted to different distributions. Experiments conducted on NICO++ dataset verified that BMCL effectively identifies the class-invariant visual regions for classification and may serve as a general framework to improve the performance of the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 因果推理已成为处理分布外（OOD）泛化问题的有力工具，其目的是提取不变特征。然而，传统方法应用来自多个数据分割的因果学习器，这可能会导致从不平衡的数据分布中进行有偏差的表示学习，并且难以从异构源中学习不变特征。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种平衡元因果学习器（BMCL），其中包括平衡任务生成模块（BTG）和元因果特征学习模块（MCFL）。具体来说，BTG 模块通过自学习的划分算法学习生成平衡子集，并限制样本类和上下文的比例。 MCFL 模块训练适应不同分布的元学习器。在NICO++数据集上进行的实验验证了BMCL有效地识别了用于分类的类不变视觉区域，并且可以作为提高最先进方法性能的通用框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种平衡元因果学习器（BMCL），通过生成平衡子集和元因果特征学习模块，解决分布外泛化中的不变特征提取问题。
AI.motivation: 传统因果方法在处理不平衡数据分布和异构源时存在表示偏差及不变特征学习困难，需改进以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计包含平衡任务生成模块（BTG）和元因果特征学习模块（MCFL）的BMCL框架，BTG通过自学习分区生成平衡数据子集，MCFL训练适应不同分布的元学习器。
AI.result: 在NICO++数据集实验中，BMCL有效识别类别不变视觉区域，显著提升分类性能并优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BMCL框架通过平衡数据生成与元学习机制，为分布外泛化提供了通用且有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zengran Wang,Chen Min,Zheng Ge,Yinhao Li,Zeming Li,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang
title: STS: Surround-view Temporal Stereo for Multi-view 3D Detection
title_zh: STS：用于多视图 3D 检测的环视时间立体
abstract: Learning accurate depth is essential to multi-view 3D object detection. Recent approaches mainly learn depth from monocular images, which confront inherent difficulties due to the ill-posed nature of monocular depth learning. Instead of using a sole monocular depth method, in this work, we propose a novel Surround-view Temporal Stereo (STS) technique that leverages the geometry correspondence between frames across time to facilitate accurate depth learning. Specifically, we regard the field of views from all cameras around the ego vehicle as a unified view, namely surroundview, and conduct temporal stereo matching on it. The resulting geometrical correspondence between different frames from STS is utilized and combined with the monocular depth to yield final depth prediction. Comprehensive experiments on nuScenes show that STS greatly boosts 3D detection ability, notably for medium and long distance objects. On BEVDepth with ResNet-50 backbone, STS improves mAP and NDS by 2.6% and 1.4%, respectively. Consistent improvements are observed when using a larger backbone and a larger image resolution, demonstrating its effectiveness
summary: Learning accurate depth is essential to multi-view 3D object detection. Recent approaches mainly learn depth from monocular images, which confront inherent difficulties due to the ill-posed nature of monocular depth learning. Instead of using a sole monocular depth method, in this work, we propose a novel Surround-view Temporal Stereo (STS) technique that leverages the geometry correspondence between frames across time to facilitate accurate depth learning. Specifically, we regard the field of views from all cameras around the ego vehicle as a unified view, namely surroundview, and conduct temporal stereo matching on it. The resulting geometrical correspondence between different frames from STS is utilized and combined with the monocular depth to yield final depth prediction. Comprehensive experiments on nuScenes show that STS greatly boosts 3D detection ability, notably for medium and long distance objects. On BEVDepth with ResNet-50 backbone, STS improves mAP and NDS by 2.6% and 1.4%, respectively. Consistent improvements are observed when using a larger backbone and a larger image resolution, demonstrating its effectiveness
abstract_zh: 学习准确的深度对于多视图 3D 对象检测至关重要。最近的方法主要从单目图像中学习深度，由于单目深度学习的不适定性质，这些方法面临着固有的困难。在这项工作中，我们没有使用单一的单目深度方法，而是提出了一种新颖的环视时间立体（STS）技术，该技术利用帧之间跨时间的几何对应关系来促进准确的深度学习。具体来说，我们将本车周围所有摄像机的视野视为一个统一的视图，即环绕视图，并对其进行时间立体匹配。利用 STS 不同帧之间产生的几何对应关系，并将其与单目深度相结合，以产生最终的深度预测。 nuScenes 上的综合实验表明，STS 极大地提高了 3D 检测能力，特别是对于中距离和长距离物体。在具有 ResNet-50 主干的 BEVDepth 上，STS 分别将 mAP 和 NDS 提高了 2.6% 和 1.4%。当使用更大的主干和更大的图像分辨率时，观察到一致的改进，证明了其有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STS（Surround-view Temporal Stereo）的新技术，用于多视角3D目标检测中的准确深度学习。
AI.motivation: 当前方法主要依赖单目图像学习深度，但由于单目深度学习的固有困难，难以达到理想效果。因此，需要一种新的方法来提高深度学习的准确性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于时间的立体匹配方法，将车辆周围所有摄像头的视角统一为一个环绕视角，并利用不同帧之间的几何对应关系结合单目深度进行最终深度预测。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，STS显著提升了3D检测能力，特别是对中远距离目标。在BEVDepth模型中，STS使mAP和NDS分别提高了2.6%和1.4%。
AI.conclusion: STS方法通过利用时间立体匹配和几何对应关系，有效提高了多视角3D目标检测的深度学习准确性，具有良好的效果和扩展性。

authors_text: Yifan Zhou,Jianghao Lin,Shuai Wang,Chong Zhang
title: Learning Ball-balancing Robot Through Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习学习球平衡机器人
abstract: The ball-balancing robot (ballbot) is a good platform to test the effectiveness of a balancing controller. Considering balancing control, conventional model-based feedback control methods have been widely used. However, contacts and collisions are difficult to model, and often lead to failure in balancing control, especially when the ballbot tilts a large angle. To explore the maximum initial tilting angle of the ballbot, the balancing control is interpreted as a recovery task using Reinforcement Learning (RL). RL is a powerful technique for systems that are difficult to model, because it allows an agent to learn policy by interacting with the environment. In this paper, by combining the conventional feedback controller with the RL method, a compound controller is proposed. We show the effectiveness of the compound controller by training an agent to successfully perform a recovery task involving contacts and collisions. Simulation results demonstrate that using the compound controller, the ballbot can keep balance under a larger set of initial tilting angles, compared to the conventional model-based controller.
summary: The ball-balancing robot (ballbot) is a good platform to test the effectiveness of a balancing controller. Considering balancing control, conventional model-based feedback control methods have been widely used. However, contacts and collisions are difficult to model, and often lead to failure in balancing control, especially when the ballbot tilts a large angle. To explore the maximum initial tilting angle of the ballbot, the balancing control is interpreted as a recovery task using Reinforcement Learning (RL). RL is a powerful technique for systems that are difficult to model, because it allows an agent to learn policy by interacting with the environment. In this paper, by combining the conventional feedback controller with the RL method, a compound controller is proposed. We show the effectiveness of the compound controller by training an agent to successfully perform a recovery task involving contacts and collisions. Simulation results demonstrate that using the compound controller, the ballbot can keep balance under a larger set of initial tilting angles, compared to the conventional model-based controller.
abstract_zh: 球平衡机器人（ballbot）是测试平衡控制器有效性的良好平台。考虑到平衡控制，传统的基于模型的反馈控制方法已被广泛使用。然而，接触和碰撞很难建模，并且经常导致平衡控制失败，特别是当球机器人倾斜较大角度时。为了探索球机器人的最大初始倾斜角度，平衡控制被解释为使用强化学习（RL）的恢复任务。对于难以建模的系统来说，强化学习是一种强大的技术，因为它允许代理通过与环境交互来学习策略。本文将传统的反馈控制器与RL方法相结合，提出了一种复合控制器。我们通过训练代理成功执行涉及接触和碰撞的恢复任务来展示复合控制器的有效性。仿真结果表明，与传统的基于模型的控制器相比，使用复合控制器，球机器人可以在更大的初始倾斜角度下保持平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合传统反馈控制器与强化学习（RL）的复合控制器，以解决球形平衡机器人（ballbot）在大角度倾斜时的平衡控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的反馈控制方法在处理接触和碰撞时存在建模困难，导致球形机器人在大角度倾斜时平衡失败，需探索更有效的控制策略。
AI.method: 将传统反馈控制器与强化学习结合，通过训练智能体完成涉及接触和碰撞的恢复任务，设计复合控制器以提升平衡能力。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，复合控制器使球形机器人能在更大范围的初始倾斜角度下保持平衡，优于传统模型控制器。
AI.conclusion: 复合控制器有效解决了传统方法在复杂接触场景下的局限性，展示了强化学习在平衡控制中的潜力。

ai_content_json.method: 将传统反馈控制器与强化学习结合，通过训练智能体完成涉及接触和碰撞的恢复任务，设计复合控制器以提升平衡能力。
ai_content_json.result: 仿真结果表明，复合控制器使球形机器人能在更大范围的初始倾斜角度下保持平衡，优于传统模型控制器。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 复合控制器有效解决了传统方法在复杂接触场景下的局限性，展示了强化学习在平衡控制中的潜力。

search_text: Learning Ball-balancing Robot Through Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过深度强化学习学习球平衡机器人 The ball-balancing robot (ballbot) is a good platform to test the effectiveness of a balancing controller. Considering balancing control, conventional model-based feedback control methods have been widely used. However, contacts and collisions are difficult to model, and often lead to failure in balancing control, especially when the ballbot tilts a large angle. To explore the maximum initial tilting angle of the ballbot, the balancing control is interpreted as a recovery task using Reinforcement Learning (RL). RL is a powerful technique for systems that are difficult to model, because it allows an agent to learn policy by interacting with the environment. In this paper, by combining the conventional feedback controller with the RL method, a compound controller is proposed. We show the effectiveness of the compound controller by training an agent to successfully perform a recovery task involving contacts and collisions. Simulation results demonstrate that using the compound controller, the ballbot can keep balance under a larger set of initial tilting angles, compared to the conventional model-based controller. 球平衡机器人（ballbot）是测试平衡控制器有效性的良好平台。考虑到平衡控制，传统的基于模型的反馈控制方法已被广泛使用。然而，接触和碰撞很难建模，并且经常导致平衡控制失败，特别是当球机器人倾斜较大角度时。为了探索球机器人的最大初始倾斜角度，平衡控制被解释为使用强化学习（RL）的恢复任务。对于难以建模的系统来说，强化学习是一种强大的技术，因为它允许代理通过与环境交互来学习策略。本文将传统的反馈控制器与RL方法相结合，提出了一种复合控制器。我们通过训练代理成功执行涉及接触和碰撞的恢复任务来展示复合控制器的有效性。仿真结果表明，与传统的基于模型的控制器相比，使用复合控制器，球机器人可以在更大的初始倾斜角度下保持平衡。 本文提出了一种结合传统反馈控制器与强化学习（RL）的复合控制器，以解决球形平衡机器人（ballbot）在大角度倾斜时的平衡控制问题。 Yifan Zhou,Jianghao Lin,Shuai Wang,Chong Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Zhendong Yang,Zhe Li,Yuan Gong,Tianke Zhang,Shanshan Lao,Chun Yuan,Yu Li
title: Rethinking Knowledge Distillation via Cross-Entropy
title_zh: 通过交叉熵重新思考知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has developed extensively and boosted various tasks. The classical KD method adds the KD loss to the original cross-entropy (CE) loss. We try to decompose the KD loss to explore its relation with the CE loss. Surprisingly, we find it can be regarded as a combination of the CE loss and an extra loss which has the identical form as the CE loss. However, we notice the extra loss forces the student's relative probability to learn the teacher's absolute probability. Moreover, the sum of the two probabilities is different, making it hard to optimize. To address this issue, we revise the formulation and propose a distributed loss. In addition, we utilize teachers' target output as the soft target, proposing the soft loss. Combining the soft loss and the distributed loss, we propose a new KD loss (NKD). Furthermore, we smooth students' target output to treat it as the soft target for training without teachers and propose a teacher-free new KD loss (tf-NKD). Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet. For example, with ResNet-34 as the teacher, we boost the ImageNet Top-1 accuracy of ResNet18 from 69.90% to 71.96%. In training without teachers, MobileNet, ResNet-18 and SwinTransformer-Tiny achieve 70.04%, 70.76%, and 81.48%, which are 0.83%, 0.86%, and 0.30% higher than the baseline, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/yzd-v/cls_KD.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) has developed extensively and boosted various tasks. The classical KD method adds the KD loss to the original cross-entropy (CE) loss. We try to decompose the KD loss to explore its relation with the CE loss. Surprisingly, we find it can be regarded as a combination of the CE loss and an extra loss which has the identical form as the CE loss. However, we notice the extra loss forces the student's relative probability to learn the teacher's absolute probability. Moreover, the sum of the two probabilities is different, making it hard to optimize. To address this issue, we revise the formulation and propose a distributed loss. In addition, we utilize teachers' target output as the soft target, proposing the soft loss. Combining the soft loss and the distributed loss, we propose a new KD loss (NKD). Furthermore, we smooth students' target output to treat it as the soft target for training without teachers and propose a teacher-free new KD loss (tf-NKD). Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet. For example, with ResNet-34 as the teacher, we boost the ImageNet Top-1 accuracy of ResNet18 from 69.90% to 71.96%. In training without teachers, MobileNet, ResNet-18 and SwinTransformer-Tiny achieve 70.04%, 70.76%, and 81.48%, which are 0.83%, 0.86%, and 0.30% higher than the baseline, respectively. The code is available at https://github.com/yzd-v/cls_KD.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）已得到广泛发展并促进了各种任务。经典的KD方法将KD损失添加到原始交叉熵（CE）损失中。我们尝试分解 KD 损失来探讨其与 CE 损失的关系。令人惊讶的是，我们发现它可以被视为 CE 损失和与 CE 损失具有相同形式的额外损失的组合。然而，我们注意到额外的损失迫使学生的相对概率学习老师的绝对概率。而且，两个概率之和不同，导致优化变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们修改了公式并提出了分布式损失。此外，我们利用教师的目标产出作为软目标，提出软损失。结合软损失和分布式损失，我们提出了一种新的 KD 损失（NKD）。此外，我们平滑学生的目标输出，将其视为无教师训练的软目标，并提出无教师的新 KD 损失（tf-NKD）。我们的方法在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的性能。例如，以 ResNet-34 为教师，我们将 ResNet18 的 ImageNet Top-1 准确率从 69.90% 提高到 71.96%。在无教师训练中，MobileNet、ResNet-18 和 SwinTransformer-Tiny 达到了 70.04%、70.76% 和 81.48%，分别比基线高出 0.83%、0.86% 和 0.30%。代码可在 https://github.com/yzd-v/cls_KD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过重新思考知识蒸馏中的交叉熵损失，提出了一种改进的知识蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法简单地将KD损失与交叉熵损失相加，但未深入分析两者关系，导致学生模型难以优化。
AI.method: 将KD损失分解为交叉熵损失和额外损失，提出分布式损失和软损失，结合形成NKD损失；进一步提出无需教师模型的tf-NKD损失。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet上取得SOTA性能，例如ResNet18在ImageNet上的Top-1准确率从69.90%提升至71.96%；无教师训练下MobileNet等模型精度均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过优化损失函数形式，有效提升了知识蒸馏效果，且支持教师模型无关的训练模式。

authors_text: Zhihui Lin,Tianyu Yang,Maomao Li,Ziyu Wang,Chun Yuan,Wenhao Jiang,Wei Liu
title: SWEM: Towards Real-Time Video Object Segmentation with Sequential Weighted Expectation-Maximization
title_zh: SWEM：通过顺序加权期望最大化实现实时视频对象分割
abstract: Matching-based methods, especially those based on space-time memory, are significantly ahead of other solutions in semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). However, continuously growing and redundant template features lead to an inefficient inference. To alleviate this, we propose a novel Sequential Weighted Expectation-Maximization (SWEM) network to greatly reduce the redundancy of memory features. Different from the previous methods which only detect feature redundancy between frames, SWEM merges both intra-frame and inter-frame similar features by leveraging the sequential weighted EM algorithm. Further, adaptive weights for frame features endow SWEM with the flexibility to represent hard samples, improving the discrimination of templates. Besides, the proposed method maintains a fixed number of template features in memory, which ensures the stable inference complexity of the VOS system. Extensive experiments on commonly used DAVIS and YouTube-VOS datasets verify the high efficiency (36 FPS) and high performance (84.3\% $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ on DAVIS 2017 validation dataset) of SWEM. Code is available at: https://github.com/lmm077/SWEM.
summary: Matching-based methods, especially those based on space-time memory, are significantly ahead of other solutions in semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). However, continuously growing and redundant template features lead to an inefficient inference. To alleviate this, we propose a novel Sequential Weighted Expectation-Maximization (SWEM) network to greatly reduce the redundancy of memory features. Different from the previous methods which only detect feature redundancy between frames, SWEM merges both intra-frame and inter-frame similar features by leveraging the sequential weighted EM algorithm. Further, adaptive weights for frame features endow SWEM with the flexibility to represent hard samples, improving the discrimination of templates. Besides, the proposed method maintains a fixed number of template features in memory, which ensures the stable inference complexity of the VOS system. Extensive experiments on commonly used DAVIS and YouTube-VOS datasets verify the high efficiency (36 FPS) and high performance (84.3\% $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ on DAVIS 2017 validation dataset) of SWEM. Code is available at: https://github.com/lmm077/SWEM.
abstract_zh: 基于匹配的方法，尤其是基于时空记忆的方法，在半监督视频对象分割（VOS）方面明显领先于其他解决方案。然而，不断增长和冗余的模板特征导致推理效率低下。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的顺序加权期望最大化（SWEM）网络，以大大减少内存特征的冗余。与之前仅检测帧间特征冗余的方法不同，SWEM 利用顺序加权 EM 算法合并帧内和帧间相似特征。此外，帧特征的自适应权重赋予 SWEM 表示硬样本的灵活性，从而提高了模板的辨别力。此外，该方法在内存中维护固定数量的模板特征，保证了VOS系统稳定的推理复杂度。在常用的 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 SWEM 的高效率（36 FPS）和高性能（在 DAVIS 2017 验证数据集上为 84.3\% $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$）。代码位于：https://github.com/lmm077/SWEM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于顺序加权期望最大化（SWEM）的网络，用于实现实时视频对象分割，通过减少内存特征冗余提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于时空记忆的匹配方法在半监督视频对象分割中表现优异，但模板特征冗余导致推理效率低下，需解决冗余问题以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出SWEM网络，利用顺序加权EM算法融合帧内与帧间相似特征，通过自适应权重处理困难样本，并固定内存中模板特征数量以稳定推理复杂度。
AI.result: 在DAVIS和YouTube-VOS数据集上实现36 FPS的高效率，DAVIS 2017验证集达到84.3%的J&F指标，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SWEM通过减少冗余和优化特征表示，有效提升了视频对象分割的实时性与准确性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: SWEM: Towards Real-Time Video Object Segmentation with Sequential Weighted Expectation-Maximization SWEM：通过顺序加权期望最大化实现实时视频对象分割 Matching-based methods, especially those based on space-time memory, are significantly ahead of other solutions in semi-supervised video object segmentation (VOS). However, continuously growing and redundant template features lead to an inefficient inference. To alleviate this, we propose a novel Sequential Weighted Expectation-Maximization (SWEM) network to greatly reduce the redundancy of memory features. Different from the previous methods which only detect feature redundancy between frames, SWEM merges both intra-frame and inter-frame similar features by leveraging the sequential weighted EM algorithm. Further, adaptive weights for frame features endow SWEM with the flexibility to represent hard samples, improving the discrimination of templates. Besides, the proposed method maintains a fixed number of template features in memory, which ensures the stable inference complexity of the VOS system. Extensive experiments on commonly used DAVIS and YouTube-VOS datasets verify the high efficiency (36 FPS) and high performance (84.3\% $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$ on DAVIS 2017 validation dataset) of SWEM. Code is available at: https://github.com/lmm077/SWEM. 基于匹配的方法，尤其是基于时空记忆的方法，在半监督视频对象分割（VOS）方面明显领先于其他解决方案。然而，不断增长和冗余的模板特征导致推理效率低下。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的顺序加权期望最大化（SWEM）网络，以大大减少内存特征的冗余。与之前仅检测帧间特征冗余的方法不同，SWEM 利用顺序加权 EM 算法合并帧内和帧间相似特征。此外，帧特征的自适应权重赋予 SWEM 表示硬样本的灵活性，从而提高了模板的辨别力。此外，该方法在内存中维护固定数量的模板特征，保证了VOS系统稳定的推理复杂度。在常用的 DAVIS 和 YouTube-VOS 数据集上进行的大量实验验证了 SWEM 的高效率（36 FPS）和高性能（在 DAVIS 2017 验证数据集上为 84.3\% $\mathcal{J}\&\mathcal{F}$）。代码位于：https://github.com/lmm077/SWEM。 本文提出了一种基于顺序加权期望最大化（SWEM）的网络，用于实现实时视频对象分割，通过减少内存特征冗余提升效率。 Zhihui Lin,Tianyu Yang,Maomao Li,Ziyu Wang,Chun Yuan,Wenhao Jiang,Wei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Seng W. Loke
title: From Distributed Quantum Computing to Quantum Internet Computing: an Overview
title_zh: 从分布式量子计算到量子互联网计算：概述
abstract: The possibility of quantum computing has been proposed decades ago, at least as far back as the 1980s, and distributed quantum computing has been studied around two decades ago. Recent times have seen experimental successes and advances in quantum computer hardware and in quantum networking, leading towards the quantum Internet. We provide in this paper an overview of concepts and ideas in distributed quantum computing since over two decades ago as well as look at recent efforts in the area, and consider how, with the development of the quantum Internet, distributed quantum computing is evolving into quantum Internet computing.
summary: The possibility of quantum computing has been proposed decades ago, at least as far back as the 1980s, and distributed quantum computing has been studied around two decades ago. Recent times have seen experimental successes and advances in quantum computer hardware and in quantum networking, leading towards the quantum Internet. We provide in this paper an overview of concepts and ideas in distributed quantum computing since over two decades ago as well as look at recent efforts in the area, and consider how, with the development of the quantum Internet, distributed quantum computing is evolving into quantum Internet computing.
abstract_zh: 量子计算的可能性早在几十年前就已经被提出，至少早在 20 世纪 80 年代就已被提出，分布式量子计算大约在二十年前就已经被研究过。近年来，量子计算机硬件和量子网络的实验取得了成功并取得了进展，最终走向了量子互联网。我们在本文中概述了二十多年前分布式量子计算的概念和思想，并回顾了该领域最近的努力，并考虑随着量子互联网的发展，分布式量子计算如何演变为量子互联网计算。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了分布式量子计算的发展历程，并探讨其向量子互联网计算的演进过程。
AI.motivation: 回顾分布式量子计算二十年来的研究进展，分析量子互联网技术对计算范式的革新影响。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与技术演进分析，梳理分布式量子计算概念及量子网络最新研究成果。
AI.result: 明确了量子互联网计算作为分布式量子计算的新阶段，其在硬件与网络层面的突破方向。
AI.conclusion: 量子互联网将推动计算模式从分布式向全局化演进，需进一步解决网络协议与安全传输等关键问题。

authors_text: Xu Yan,Chunhui Ai,Ziqiang Cao,Min Cao,Sujian Li,Wenjie Li,Guohong Fu
title: Revising Image-Text Retrieval via Multi-Modal Entailment
title_zh: 通过多模态蕴涵修改图像文本检索
abstract: An outstanding image-text retrieval model depends on high-quality labeled data. While the builders of existing image-text retrieval datasets strive to ensure that the caption matches the linked image, they cannot prevent a caption from fitting other images. We observe that such a many-to-many matching phenomenon is quite common in the widely-used retrieval datasets, where one caption can describe up to 178 images. These large matching-lost data not only confuse the model in training but also weaken the evaluation accuracy. Inspired by visual and textual entailment tasks, we propose a multi-modal entailment classifier to determine whether a sentence is entailed by an image plus its linked captions. Subsequently, we revise the image-text retrieval datasets by adding these entailed captions as additional weak labels of an image and develop a universal variable learning rate strategy to teach a retrieval model to distinguish the entailed captions from other negative samples. In experiments, we manually annotate an entailment-corrected image-text retrieval dataset for evaluation. The results demonstrate that the proposed entailment classifier achieves about 78% accuracy and consistently improves the performance of image-text retrieval baselines.
summary: An outstanding image-text retrieval model depends on high-quality labeled data. While the builders of existing image-text retrieval datasets strive to ensure that the caption matches the linked image, they cannot prevent a caption from fitting other images. We observe that such a many-to-many matching phenomenon is quite common in the widely-used retrieval datasets, where one caption can describe up to 178 images. These large matching-lost data not only confuse the model in training but also weaken the evaluation accuracy. Inspired by visual and textual entailment tasks, we propose a multi-modal entailment classifier to determine whether a sentence is entailed by an image plus its linked captions. Subsequently, we revise the image-text retrieval datasets by adding these entailed captions as additional weak labels of an image and develop a universal variable learning rate strategy to teach a retrieval model to distinguish the entailed captions from other negative samples. In experiments, we manually annotate an entailment-corrected image-text retrieval dataset for evaluation. The results demonstrate that the proposed entailment classifier achieves about 78% accuracy and consistently improves the performance of image-text retrieval baselines.
abstract_zh: 优秀的图文检索模型依赖于高质量的标记数据。虽然现有图像文本检索数据集的构建者努力确保标题与链接图像匹配，但他们无法阻止标题适合其他图像。我们观察到这种多对多匹配现象在广泛使用的检索数据集中非常常见，其中一个标题可以描述多达 178 张图像。这些大量的匹配丢失数据不仅使模型在训练中变得混乱，而且削弱了评估的准确性。受视觉和文本蕴涵任务的启发，我们提出了一种多模态蕴涵分类器来确定句子是否由图像及其链接的标题蕴含。随后，我们通过添加这些蕴涵标题作为图像的附加弱标签来修改图像文本检索数据集，并开发通用变量学习率策略来教导检索模型将蕴涵标题与其他负样本区分开。在实验中，我们手动注释蕴涵校正的图像文本检索数据集以进行评估。结果表明，所提出的蕴涵分类器达到了约 78% 的准确率，并持续提高了图像文本检索基线的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过多模态蕴含分类器改进图像-文本检索，解决现有数据集中caption与多张图像匹配导致的模型混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像-文本检索数据集中，单个caption可能匹配多张图像（最多178张），导致模型训练混乱且影响评估准确性。
AI.method: 设计多模态蕴含分类器判断句子是否被图像及其关联caption蕴含，并将蕴含caption作为弱标签补充到数据集中，结合自适应学习率策略训练检索模型。
AI.result: 手动标注的修正数据集实验显示，蕴含分类器达到约78%准确率，且持续提升检索基线模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过修正数据集中的多对多匹配问题并引入蕴含约束，有效提升了图像-文本检索模型的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Jonathan Fhima,Jan Van Eijgen,Moti Freiman,Ingeborg Stalmans,Joachim A. Behar
title: Lirot.ai: A Novel Platform for Crowd-Sourcing Retinal Image Segmentations
title_zh: Lirot.ai：众包视网膜图像分割的新型平台
abstract: Introduction: For supervised deep learning (DL) tasks, researchers need a large annotated dataset. In medical data science, one of the major limitations to develop DL models is the lack of annotated examples in large quantity. This is most often due to the time and expertise required to annotate. We introduce Lirot. ai, a novel platform for facilitating and crowd-sourcing image segmentations. Methods: Lirot. ai is composed of three components; an iPadOS client application named Lirot. ai-app, a backend server named Lirot. ai-server and a python API name Lirot. ai-API. Lirot. ai-app was developed in Swift 5.6 and Lirot. ai-server is a firebase backend. Lirot. ai-API allows the management of the database. Lirot. ai-app can be installed on as many iPadOS devices as needed so that annotators may be able to perform their segmentation simultaneously and remotely. We incorporate Apple Pencil compatibility, making the segmentation faster, more accurate, and more intuitive for the expert than any other computer-based alternative. Results: We demonstrate the usage of Lirot. ai for the creation of a retinal fundus dataset with reference vasculature segmentations. Discussion and future work: We will use active learning strategies to continue enlarging our retinal fundus dataset by including a more efficient process to select the images to be annotated and distribute them to annotators.
summary: Introduction: For supervised deep learning (DL) tasks, researchers need a large annotated dataset. In medical data science, one of the major limitations to develop DL models is the lack of annotated examples in large quantity. This is most often due to the time and expertise required to annotate. We introduce Lirot. ai, a novel platform for facilitating and crowd-sourcing image segmentations. Methods: Lirot. ai is composed of three components; an iPadOS client application named Lirot. ai-app, a backend server named Lirot. ai-server and a python API name Lirot. ai-API. Lirot. ai-app was developed in Swift 5.6 and Lirot. ai-server is a firebase backend. Lirot. ai-API allows the management of the database. Lirot. ai-app can be installed on as many iPadOS devices as needed so that annotators may be able to perform their segmentation simultaneously and remotely. We incorporate Apple Pencil compatibility, making the segmentation faster, more accurate, and more intuitive for the expert than any other computer-based alternative. Results: We demonstrate the usage of Lirot. ai for the creation of a retinal fundus dataset with reference vasculature segmentations. Discussion and future work: We will use active learning strategies to continue enlarging our retinal fundus dataset by including a more efficient process to select the images to be annotated and distribute them to annotators.
abstract_zh: 简介：对于监督深度学习 (DL) 任务，研究人员需要大量带注释的数据集。在医学数据科学中，开发深度学习模型的主要限制之一是缺乏大量带注释的示例。这通常是由于注释所需的时间和专业知识造成的。我们介绍一下利罗特。 ai，一个用于促进和众包图像分割的新颖平台。方法：利罗特。 ai由三个部分组成；名为 Lirot 的 iPadOS 客户端应用程序。 ai-app，一个名为 Lirot 的后端服务器。 ai-server 和一个 python API 名称 Lirot。 ai-API。利罗特。 ai-app 是在 Swift 5.6 和 Lirot 中开发的。 ai-server 是一个 firebase 后端。利罗特。 ai-API 允许管理数据库。利罗特。 ai-app 可以根据需要安装在任意数量的 iPadOS 设备上，以便注释者能够同时远程执行分割。我们集成了 Apple Pencil 兼容性，与任何其他基于计算机的替代方案相比，对于专家来说，分割更快、更准确、更直观。结果：我们演示了 Lirot 的用法。 ai 用于创建具有参考脉管系统分割的视网膜眼底数据集。讨论和未来的工作：我们将使用主动学习策略继续扩大我们的视网膜眼底数据集，包括更有效的过程来选择要注释的图像并将其分发给注释者。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Lirot.ai的新平台，用于众包视网膜图像分割，以解决医学图像标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学数据科学中缺乏大规模标注数据是开发深度学习模型的主要限制，传统标注方法耗时且依赖专业知识。
AI.method: Lirot.ai包含三个组件：iPadOS客户端应用（支持Apple Pencil）、Firebase后端服务器和Python API，实现远程多设备协同标注。
AI.result: 展示了Lirot.ai在创建带参考血管分割的视网膜数据集中的应用，并计划通过主动学习策略优化数据标注流程。
AI.conclusion: 该平台通过众包和硬件优化提升了标注效率与准确性，未来将结合主动学习进一步扩展数据集规模。

search_text: Lirot.ai: A Novel Platform for Crowd-Sourcing Retinal Image Segmentations Lirot.ai：众包视网膜图像分割的新型平台 Introduction: For supervised deep learning (DL) tasks, researchers need a large annotated dataset. In medical data science, one of the major limitations to develop DL models is the lack of annotated examples in large quantity. This is most often due to the time and expertise required to annotate. We introduce Lirot. ai, a novel platform for facilitating and crowd-sourcing image segmentations. Methods: Lirot. ai is composed of three components; an iPadOS client application named Lirot. ai-app, a backend server named Lirot. ai-server and a python API name Lirot. ai-API. Lirot. ai-app was developed in Swift 5.6 and Lirot. ai-server is a firebase backend. Lirot. ai-API allows the management of the database. Lirot. ai-app can be installed on as many iPadOS devices as needed so that annotators may be able to perform their segmentation simultaneously and remotely. We incorporate Apple Pencil compatibility, making the segmentation faster, more accurate, and more intuitive for the expert than any other computer-based alternative. Results: We demonstrate the usage of Lirot. ai for the creation of a retinal fundus dataset with reference vasculature segmentations. Discussion and future work: We will use active learning strategies to continue enlarging our retinal fundus dataset by including a more efficient process to select the images to be annotated and distribute them to annotators. 简介：对于监督深度学习 (DL) 任务，研究人员需要大量带注释的数据集。在医学数据科学中，开发深度学习模型的主要限制之一是缺乏大量带注释的示例。这通常是由于注释所需的时间和专业知识造成的。我们介绍一下利罗特。 ai，一个用于促进和众包图像分割的新颖平台。方法：利罗特。 ai由三个部分组成；名为 Lirot 的 iPadOS 客户端应用程序。 ai-app，一个名为 Lirot 的后端服务器。 ai-server 和一个 python API 名称 Lirot。 ai-API。利罗特。 ai-app 是在 Swift 5.6 和 Lirot 中开发的。 ai-server 是一个 firebase 后端。利罗特。 ai-API 允许管理数据库。利罗特。 ai-app 可以根据需要安装在任意数量的 iPadOS 设备上，以便注释者能够同时远程执行分割。我们集成了 Apple Pencil 兼容性，与任何其他基于计算机的替代方案相比，对于专家来说，分割更快、更准确、更直观。结果：我们演示了 Lirot 的用法。 ai 用于创建具有参考脉管系统分割的视网膜眼底数据集。讨论和未来的工作：我们将使用主动学习策略继续扩大我们的视网膜眼底数据集，包括更有效的过程来选择要注释的图像并将其分发给注释者。 本文介绍了一个名为Lirot.ai的新平台，用于众包视网膜图像分割，以解决医学图像标注数据不足的问题。 Jonathan Fhima,Jan Van Eijgen,Moti Freiman,Ingeborg Stalmans,Joachim A. Behar cs.CV

authors_text: Sruthi Gorantla,Kishen N. Gowda,Amit Deshpande,Anand Louis
title: Socially Fair Center-based and Linear Subspace Clustering
title_zh: 基于社会公平中心的线性子空间聚类
abstract: Center-based clustering (e.g., $k$-means, $k$-medians) and clustering using linear subspaces are two most popular techniques to partition real-world data into smaller clusters. However, when the data consists of sensitive demographic groups, significantly different clustering cost per point for different sensitive groups can lead to fairness-related harms (e.g., different quality-of-service). The goal of socially fair clustering is to minimize the maximum cost of clustering per point over all groups. In this work, we propose a unified framework to solve socially fair center-based clustering and linear subspace clustering, and give practical, efficient approximation algorithms for these problems. We do extensive experiments to show that on multiple benchmark datasets our algorithms either closely match or outperform state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Center-based clustering (e.g., $k$-means, $k$-medians) and clustering using linear subspaces are two most popular techniques to partition real-world data into smaller clusters. However, when the data consists of sensitive demographic groups, significantly different clustering cost per point for different sensitive groups can lead to fairness-related harms (e.g., different quality-of-service). The goal of socially fair clustering is to minimize the maximum cost of clustering per point over all groups. In this work, we propose a unified framework to solve socially fair center-based clustering and linear subspace clustering, and give practical, efficient approximation algorithms for these problems. We do extensive experiments to show that on multiple benchmark datasets our algorithms either closely match or outperform state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 基于中心的聚类（例如 $k$-means、$k$-medians）和使用线性子空间的聚类是将现实世界数据划分为更小的聚类的两种最流行的技术。然而，当数据由敏感人口群体组成时，不同敏感群体的每点聚类成本显着不同可能会导致与公平相关的损害（例如，不同的服务质量）。社会公平聚类的目标是最小化所有组中每个点的最大聚类成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架来解决基于社会公平中心的聚类和线性子空间聚类，并为这些问题给出了实用、高效的近似算法。我们进行了大量的实验，以表明在多个基准数据集上，我们的算法要么紧密匹配，要么优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，解决社会公平的中心基聚类与线性子空间聚类问题，旨在减少敏感群体间的聚类成本差异。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法在处理包含敏感群体的数据时，可能因不同群体的聚类成本差异导致公平性损害，需通过算法设计保障服务质量的均衡。
AI.method: 构建统一框架，设计高效近似算法，同时处理中心基聚类与线性子空间聚类的公平性优化问题。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，算法表现与现有最佳方法相当或更优，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功平衡了聚类质量与社会公平性，为敏感数据的聚类分析提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Sijie Shen,Xiang Zhu,Yihong Dong,Qizhi Guo,Yankun Zhen,Ge Li
title: Incorporating Domain Knowledge through Task Augmentation for Front-End JavaScript Code Generation
title_zh: 通过任务增强整合领域知识以生成前端 JavaScript 代码
comment: This paper has been accepted at ESEC/FSE 2022 Industry Track
comments: This paper has been accepted at ESEC/FSE 2022 Industry Track
abstract: Code generation aims to generate a code snippet automatically from natural language descriptions. Generally, the mainstream code generation methods rely on a large amount of paired training data, including both the natural language description and the code. However, in some domain-specific scenarios, building such a large paired corpus for code generation is difficult because there is no directly available pairing data, and a lot of effort is required to manually write the code descriptions to construct a high-quality training dataset. Due to the limited training data, the generation model cannot be well trained and is likely to be overfitting, making the model's performance unsatisfactory for real-world use. To this end, in this paper, we propose a task augmentation method that incorporates domain knowledge into code generation models through auxiliary tasks and a Subtoken-TranX model by extending the original TranX model to support subtoken-level code generation. To verify our proposed approach, we collect a real-world code generation dataset and conduct experiments on it. Our experimental results demonstrate that the subtoken-level TranX model outperforms the original TranX model and the Transformer model on our dataset, and the exact match accuracy of Subtoken-TranX improves significantly by 12.75% with the help of our task augmentation method. The model performance on several code categories has satisfied the requirements for application in industrial systems. Our proposed approach has been adopted by Alibaba's BizCook platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first domain code generation system adopted in industrial development environments.
summary: Code generation aims to generate a code snippet automatically from natural language descriptions. Generally, the mainstream code generation methods rely on a large amount of paired training data, including both the natural language description and the code. However, in some domain-specific scenarios, building such a large paired corpus for code generation is difficult because there is no directly available pairing data, and a lot of effort is required to manually write the code descriptions to construct a high-quality training dataset. Due to the limited training data, the generation model cannot be well trained and is likely to be overfitting, making the model's performance unsatisfactory for real-world use. To this end, in this paper, we propose a task augmentation method that incorporates domain knowledge into code generation models through auxiliary tasks and a Subtoken-TranX model by extending the original TranX model to support subtoken-level code generation. To verify our proposed approach, we collect a real-world code generation dataset and conduct experiments on it. Our experimental results demonstrate that the subtoken-level TranX model outperforms the original TranX model and the Transformer model on our dataset, and the exact match accuracy of Subtoken-TranX improves significantly by 12.75% with the help of our task augmentation method. The model performance on several code categories has satisfied the requirements for application in industrial systems. Our proposed approach has been adopted by Alibaba's BizCook platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first domain code generation system adopted in industrial development environments.
abstract_zh: 代码生成旨在根据自然语言描述自动生成代码片段。一般来说，主流的代码生成方法依赖于大量的配对训练数据，包括自然语言描述和代码。然而，在某些特定领域的场景中，构建如此大的配对语料库用于代码生成是很困难的，因为没有直接可用的配对数据，并且需要花费大量的精力来手动编写代码描述以构建高质量的训练数据集。由于训练数据有限，生成模型无法得到很好的训练，并且很可能出现过拟合，使得模型的性能在实际使用中不能令人满意。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种任务增强方法，通过辅助任务将领域知识融入到代码生成模型中，并通过扩展原始 TranX 模型来支持子令牌级代码生成，从而提出了 Subtoken-TranX 模型。为了验证我们提出的方法，我们收集了真实世界的代码生成数据集并对其进行实验。我们的实验结果表明，子代币级别的 TranX 模型在我们的数据集上优于原始 TranX 模型和 Transformer 模型，并且在我们的任务增强方法的帮助下，Subtoken-TranX 的精确匹配精度显着提高了 12.75%。模型在多个代码类别上的性能满足工业系统应用的要求。我们提出的方法已被阿里巴巴的 BizCook 平台采用。据我们所知，这是第一个在工业开发环境中采用的领域代码生成系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过任务增强和子标记级模型改进前端JavaScript代码生成，解决领域特定场景下训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统代码生成方法依赖大量自然语言与代码的配对数据，但在特定领域难以构建高质量数据集，导致模型过拟合且性能不足。
AI.method: 设计任务增强方法引入领域知识，扩展TranX模型为子标记级Subtoken-TranX模型，支持更精细的代码生成。
AI.result: Subtoken-TranX在数据集上准确率提升12.75%，多个代码类别满足工业应用要求，并被阿里BizCook平台采用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过领域知识增强有效提升代码生成性能，是首个在工业环境中落地的领域代码生成系统。

Our experimental results demonstrate that the subtoken-level TranX model outperforms the original TranX model and the Transformer model on our dataset, and the exact match accuracy of Subtoken-TranX improves significantly by 12.75% with the help of our task augmentation method. The model performance on several code categories has satisfied the requirements for application in industrial systems. Our proposed approach has been adopted by Alibaba's BizCook platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first domain code generation system adopted in industrial development environments. 代码生成旨在根据自然语言描述自动生成代码片段。一般来说，主流的代码生成方法依赖于大量的配对训练数据，包括自然语言描述和代码。然而，在某些特定领域的场景中，构建如此大的配对语料库用于代码生成是很困难的，因为没有直接可用的配对数据，并且需要花费大量的精力来手动编写代码描述以构建高质量的训练数据集。由于训练数据有限，生成模型无法得到很好的训练，并且很可能出现过拟合，使得模型的性能在实际使用中不能令人满意。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种任务增强方法，通过辅助任务将领域知识融入到代码生成模型中，并通过扩展原始 TranX 模型来支持子令牌级代码生成，从而提出了 Subtoken-TranX 模型。为了验证我们提出的方法，我们收集了真实世界的代码生成数据集并对其进行实验。我们的实验结果表明，子代币级别的 TranX 模型在我们的数据集上优于原始 TranX 模型和 Transformer 模型，并且在我们的任务增强方法的帮助下，Subtoken-TranX 的精确匹配精度显着提高了 12.75%。模型在多个代码类别上的性能满足工业系统应用的要求。我们提出的方法已被阿里巴巴的 BizCook 平台采用。据我们所知，这是第一个在工业开发环境中采用的领域代码生成系统。 本文提出通过任务增强和子标记级模型改进前端JavaScript代码生成，解决领域特定场景下训练数据不足的问题。 Sijie Shen,Xiang Zhu,Yihong Dong,Qizhi Guo,Yankun Zhen,Ge Li cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Stephen Su,Samuel Kwong,Qingyu Zhao,De-An Huang,Juan Carlos Niebles,Ehsan Adeli
title: Identifying Auxiliary or Adversarial Tasks Using Necessary Condition Analysis for Adversarial Multi-task Video Understanding
title_zh: 使用对抗性多任务视频理解的必要条件分析来识别辅助或对抗性任务
abstract: There has been an increasing interest in multi-task learning for video understanding in recent years. In this work, we propose a generalized notion of multi-task learning by incorporating both auxiliary tasks that the model should perform well on and adversarial tasks that the model should not perform well on. We employ Necessary Condition Analysis (NCA) as a data-driven approach for deciding what category these tasks should fall in. Our novel proposed framework, Adversarial Multi-Task Neural Networks (AMT), penalizes adversarial tasks, determined by NCA to be scene recognition in the Holistic Video Understanding (HVU) dataset, to improve action recognition. This upends the common assumption that the model should always be encouraged to do well on all tasks in multi-task learning. Simultaneously, AMT still retains all the benefits of multi-task learning as a generalization of existing methods and uses object recognition as an auxiliary task to aid action recognition. We introduce two challenging Scene-Invariant test splits of HVU, where the model is evaluated on action-scene co-occurrences not encountered in training. We show that our approach improves accuracy by ~3% and encourages the model to attend to action features instead of correlation-biasing scene features.
summary: There has been an increasing interest in multi-task learning for video understanding in recent years. In this work, we propose a generalized notion of multi-task learning by incorporating both auxiliary tasks that the model should perform well on and adversarial tasks that the model should not perform well on. We employ Necessary Condition Analysis (NCA) as a data-driven approach for deciding what category these tasks should fall in. Our novel proposed framework, Adversarial Multi-Task Neural Networks (AMT), penalizes adversarial tasks, determined by NCA to be scene recognition in the Holistic Video Understanding (HVU) dataset, to improve action recognition. This upends the common assumption that the model should always be encouraged to do well on all tasks in multi-task learning. Simultaneously, AMT still retains all the benefits of multi-task learning as a generalization of existing methods and uses object recognition as an auxiliary task to aid action recognition. We introduce two challenging Scene-Invariant test splits of HVU, where the model is evaluated on action-scene co-occurrences not encountered in training. We show that our approach improves accuracy by ~3% and encourages the model to attend to action features instead of correlation-biasing scene features.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对视频理解的多任务学习越来越感兴趣。在这项工作中，我们提出了多任务学习的广义概念，将模型应该表现良好的辅助任务和模型不应表现良好的对抗性任务结合起来。我们采用必要条件分析（NCA）作为数据驱动的方法来决定这些任务应该属于什么类别。我们提出的新颖框架，对抗性多任务神经网络（AMT），对由 NCA 确定为整体视频理解（HVU）数据集中的场景识别的对抗性任务进行惩罚，以提高动作识别。这颠覆了一个普遍的假设，即应该始终鼓励模型在多任务学习中的所有任务上表现出色。同时，AMT 仍然保留了多任务学习的所有优点，作为现有方法的泛化，并使用对象识别作为辅助任务来辅助动作识别。我们引入了 HVU 的两个具有挑战性的场景不变测试分割，其中模型根据训练中未遇到的动作场景共现进行评估。我们表明，我们的方法将准确率提高了约 3%，并鼓励模型关注动作特征，而不是相关偏向的场景特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗性多任务神经网络框架（AMT），通过必要条件分析（NCA）识别辅助任务和对抗任务，以改进视频动作识别。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习假设模型应擅长所有任务，但本文发现某些任务（如场景识别）可能干扰动作识别，需通过对抗性任务惩罚提升性能。
AI.method: 利用NCA分析任务相关性，将场景识别标记为对抗任务并进行惩罚，同时保留物体识别作为辅助任务；引入场景不变测试集验证模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在HVU数据集上动作识别准确率提升约3%，模型更关注动作特征而非场景相关性偏倚。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性多任务学习通过区分任务性质优化模型注意力，为多任务视频理解提供新视角。

authors_text: Emily McMilin
title: Selection Collider Bias in Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型中的选择碰撞器偏差
comment: 12 pages, 16 figures, UAI 2022 Causal Representation Learning Workshop
comments: 12 pages, 16 figures, UAI 2022 Causal Representation Learning Workshop
abstract: In this paper we motivate the causal mechanisms behind sample selection induced collider bias (selection collider bias) that can cause Large Language Models (LLMs) to learn unconditional dependence between entities that are unconditionally independent in the real world. We show that selection collider bias can become amplified in underspecified learning tasks, and although difficult to overcome, we describe a method to exploit the resulting spurious correlations for determination of when a model may be uncertain about its prediction. We demonstrate an uncertainty metric that matches human uncertainty in tasks with gender pronoun underspecification on an extended version of the Winogender Schemas evaluation set, and we provide an online demo where users can apply our uncertainty metric to their own texts and models.
summary: In this paper we motivate the causal mechanisms behind sample selection induced collider bias (selection collider bias) that can cause Large Language Models (LLMs) to learn unconditional dependence between entities that are unconditionally independent in the real world. We show that selection collider bias can become amplified in underspecified learning tasks, and although difficult to overcome, we describe a method to exploit the resulting spurious correlations for determination of when a model may be uncertain about its prediction. We demonstrate an uncertainty metric that matches human uncertainty in tasks with gender pronoun underspecification on an extended version of the Winogender Schemas evaluation set, and we provide an online demo where users can apply our uncertainty metric to their own texts and models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们激发了样本选择引起的碰撞偏差（选择碰撞偏差）背后的因果机制，该机制可以导致大型语言模型（LLM）学习现实世界中无条件独立的实体之间的无条件依赖。我们表明，选择碰撞偏差在未指定的学习任务中可能会被放大，尽管难以克服，但我们描述了一种利用由此产生的虚假相关性来确定模型何时可能对其预测不确定的方法。我们展示了一种不确定性度量，该度量将任务中的人类不确定性与 Winogenender Schemas 评估集的扩展版本上的性别代词指定不足相匹配，并且我们提供了一个在线演示，用户可以将我们的不确定性度量应用到他们自己的文本和模型中。

AI.tldr: 研究大语言模型中的选择collider偏差，提出利用该偏差评估模型不确定性的方法。
AI.motivation: 样本选择引起的collider偏差会导致模型学习到现实中不存在的依赖关系，影响预测准确性，需解决此问题以提高模型可靠性。
AI.method: 通过构建不确定性度量指标，结合扩展的Winogender数据集进行验证，并开发在线演示工具。
AI.result: 不确定性度量在性别代词任务中与人类不确定性判断一致，并提供在线工具供用户测试。
AI.conclusion: 尽管难以消除selection collider bias，但可利用其进行不确定性检测，提升模型预测的可信度。

authors_text: JunYoung Gwak,Silvio Savarese,Jeannette Bohg
title: Minkowski Tracker: A Sparse Spatio-Temporal R-CNN for Joint Object Detection and Tracking
title_zh: Minkowski Tracker：用于联合对象检测和跟踪的稀疏时空 R-CNN
abstract: Recent research in multi-task learning reveals the benefit of solving related problems in a single neural network. 3D object detection and multi-object tracking (MOT) are two heavily intertwined problems predicting and associating an object instance location across time. However, most previous works in 3D MOT treat the detector as a preceding separated pipeline, disjointly taking the output of the detector as an input to the tracker. In this work, we present Minkowski Tracker, a sparse spatio-temporal R-CNN that jointly solves object detection and tracking. Inspired by region-based CNN (R-CNN), we propose to solve tracking as a second stage of the object detector R-CNN that predicts assignment probability to tracks. First, Minkowski Tracker takes 4D point clouds as input to generate a spatio-temporal Bird's-eye-view (BEV) feature map through a 4D sparse convolutional encoder network. Then, our proposed TrackAlign aggregates the track region-of-interest (ROI) features from the BEV features. Finally, Minkowski Tracker updates the track and its confidence score based on the detection-to-track match probability predicted from the ROI features. We show in large-scale experiments that the overall performance gain of our method is due to four factors: 1. The temporal reasoning of the 4D encoder improves the detection performance 2. The multi-task learning of object detection and MOT jointly enhances each other 3. The detection-to-track match score learns implicit motion model to enhance track assignment 4. The detection-to-track match score improves the quality of the track confidence score. As a result, Minkowski Tracker achieved the state-of-the-art performance on Nuscenes dataset tracking task without hand-designed motion models.

First, Minkowski Tracker takes 4D point clouds as input to generate a spatio-temporal Bird's-eye-view (BEV) feature map through a 4D sparse convolutional encoder network. Then, our proposed TrackAlign aggregates the track region-of-interest (ROI) features from the BEV features. Finally, Minkowski Tracker updates the track and its confidence score based on the detection-to-track match probability predicted from the ROI features. We show in large-scale experiments that the overall performance gain of our method is due to four factors: 1. The temporal reasoning of the 4D encoder improves the detection performance 2. The multi-task learning of object detection and MOT jointly enhances each other 3. The detection-to-track match score learns implicit motion model to enhance track assignment 4. The detection-to-track match score improves the quality of the track confidence score. As a result, Minkowski Tracker achieved the state-of-the-art performance on Nuscenes dataset tracking task without hand-designed motion models.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习的最新研究揭示了在单个神经网络中解决相关问题的好处。 3D 对象检测和多对象跟踪 (MOT) 是预测和关联对象实例位置随时间变化的两个紧密交织的问题。然而，大多数先前的 3D MOT 工作都将检测器视为前面的独立管道，不相交地将检测器的输出作为跟踪器的输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Minkowski Tracker，这是一种稀疏时空 R-CNN，可以联合解决对象检测和跟踪问题。受基于区域的 CNN (R-CNN) 的启发，我们建议将跟踪作为目标检测器 R-CNN 的第二阶段来解决，该阶段可预测跟踪的分配概率。首先，Minkowski Tracker 以 4D 点云为输入，通过 4D 稀疏卷积编码器网络生成时空鸟瞰（BEV）特征图。然后，我们提出的 TrackAlign 聚合来自 BEV 特征的跟踪感兴趣区域 (ROI) 特征。最后，Minkowski Tracker 根据从 ROI 特征预测的检测到轨迹匹配概率来更新轨迹及其置信度得分。我们在大规模实验中表明，我们方法的整体性能增益归因于四个因素：1. 4D编码器的时间推理提高了检测性能2. 对象检测和MOT的多任务学习共同增强彼此3. 检测到跟踪匹配分数学习隐式运动模型以增强跟踪分配4. 检测到跟踪匹配分数提高了跟踪置信度分数的质量。结果，Minkowski Tracker 在 Nuscenes 数据集跟踪任务上实现了最先进的性能，而无需手工设计运动模型。

AI.motivation: 现有3D MOT方法将检测器与跟踪器视为分离的流水线，未能充分利用两者间的关联性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 方法基于4D稀疏卷积编码器生成时空BEV特征，通过TrackAlign模块聚合ROI特征，并利用检测-跟踪匹配概率更新轨迹及置信度。
AI.result: 在NuScenes数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了时序推理、多任务学习、运动模型隐式学习及置信度优化四个因素的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习框架通过时空特征建模与多任务协同优化，无需手工设计运动模型即可提升检测与跟踪的整体性能。

search_text: Minkowski Tracker: A Sparse Spatio-Temporal R-CNN for Joint Object Detection and Tracking Minkowski Tracker：用于联合对象检测和跟踪的稀疏时空 R-CNN Recent research in multi-task learning reveals the benefit of solving related problems in a single neural network. 3D object detection and multi-object tracking (MOT) are two heavily intertwined problems predicting and associating an object instance location across time. However, most previous works in 3D MOT treat the detector as a preceding separated pipeline, disjointly taking the output of the detector as an input to the tracker. In this work, we present Minkowski Tracker, a sparse spatio-temporal R-CNN that jointly solves object detection and tracking. Inspired by region-based CNN (R-CNN), we propose to solve tracking as a second stage of the object detector R-CNN that predicts assignment probability to tracks. First, Minkowski Tracker takes 4D point clouds as input to generate a spatio-temporal Bird's-eye-view (BEV) feature map through a 4D sparse convolutional encoder network. Then, our proposed TrackAlign aggregates the track region-of-interest (ROI) features from the BEV features. Finally, Minkowski Tracker updates the track and its confidence score based on the detection-to-track match probability predicted from the ROI features. We show in large-scale experiments that the overall performance gain of our method is due to four factors: 1. The temporal reasoning of the 4D encoder improves the detection performance 2. The multi-task learning of object detection and MOT jointly enhances each other 3. The detection-to-track match score learns implicit motion model to enhance track assignment 4. The detection-to-track match score improves the quality of the track confidence score. As a result, Minkowski Tracker achieved the state-of-the-art performance on Nuscenes dataset tracking task without hand-designed motion models. 多任务学习的最新研究揭示了在单个神经网络中解决相关问题的好处。 3D 对象检测和多对象跟踪 (MOT) 是预测和关联对象实例位置随时间变化的两个紧密交织的问题。然而，大多数先前的 3D MOT 工作都将检测器视为前面的独立管道，不相交地将检测器的输出作为跟踪器的输入。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Minkowski Tracker，这是一种稀疏时空 R-CNN，可以联合解决对象检测和跟踪问题。受基于区域的 CNN (R-CNN) 的启发，我们建议将跟踪作为目标检测器 R-CNN 的第二阶段来解决，该阶段可预测跟踪的分配概率。首先，Minkowski Tracker 以 4D 点云为输入，通过 4D 稀疏卷积编码器网络生成时空鸟瞰（BEV）特征图。然后，我们提出的 TrackAlign 聚合来自 BEV 特征的跟踪感兴趣区域 (ROI) 特征。最后，Minkowski Tracker 根据从 ROI 特征预测的检测到轨迹匹配概率来更新轨迹及其置信度得分。我们在大规模实验中表明，我们方法的整体性能增益归因于四个因素：1. 4D编码器的时间推理提高了检测性能2. 对象检测和MOT的多任务学习共同增强彼此3. 检测到跟踪匹配分数学习隐式运动模型以增强跟踪分配4. 检测到跟踪匹配分数提高了跟踪置信度分数的质量。结果，Minkowski Tracker 在 Nuscenes 数据集跟踪任务上实现了最先进的性能，而无需手工设计运动模型。 本文提出Minkowski Tracker，一种稀疏时空R-CNN，用于联合解决3D目标检测与多目标跟踪（MOT）问题。 JunYoung Gwak,Silvio Savarese,Jeannette Bohg cs.CV
